authors_text: Ankur Kamboj,Rajiv Ranganathan,Xiaobo Tan,Vaibhav Srivastava
title: Towards Modeling Human Motor Learning Dynamics in High-Dimensional Spaces
title_zh: 高维空间中人类运动学习动力学建模
abstract: Designing effective rehabilitation strategies for upper extremities, particularly hands and fingers, warrants the need for a computational model of human motor learning. The presence of large degrees of freedom (DoFs) available in these systems makes it difficult to balance the trade-off between learning the full dexterity and accomplishing manipulation goals. The motor learning literature argues that humans use motor synergies to reduce the dimension of control space. Using the low-dimensional space spanned by these synergies, we develop a computational model based on the internal model theory of motor control. We analyze the proposed model in terms of its convergence properties and fit it to the data collected from human experiments. We compare the performance of the fitted model to the experimental data and show that it captures human motor learning behavior well.
summary: Designing effective rehabilitation strategies for upper extremities, particularly hands and fingers, warrants the need for a computational model of human motor learning. The presence of large degrees of freedom (DoFs) available in these systems makes it difficult to balance the trade-off between learning the full dexterity and accomplishing manipulation goals. The motor learning literature argues that humans use motor synergies to reduce the dimension of control space. Using the low-dimensional space spanned by these synergies, we develop a computational model based on the internal model theory of motor control. We analyze the proposed model in terms of its convergence properties and fit it to the data collected from human experiments. We compare the performance of the fitted model to the experimental data and show that it captures human motor learning behavior well.
abstract_zh: 为上肢（尤其是手和手指）设计有效的康复策略需要人类运动学习的计算模型。这些系统中存在较大的自由度（DoF），因此很难在学习完全灵活性和实现操纵目标之间取得平衡。运动学习文献认为，人类利用运动协同作用来减少控制空间的维度。利用这些协同作用所跨越的低维空间，我们开发了一种基于电机控制内模型理论的计算模型。我们分析了所提出的模型的收敛特性，并将其与从人体实验中收集的数据进行拟合。我们将拟合模型的性能与实验数据进行比较，结果表明它很好地捕捉了人类运动学习行为。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一个计算模型，用于模拟人类在高维空间中的运动学习动力学，以改进上肢康复策略。
AI.motivation: 高自由度的上肢系统（如手和手指）在康复训练中需平衡复杂动作与任务目标，传统方法难以处理高维数据，需建立有效计算模型。
AI.method: 基于运动协同理论降低控制空间维度，结合内部模型理论构建计算模型，分析其收敛性并用实验数据拟合验证。
AI.result: 拟合模型与实验数据吻合良好，能有效捕捉人类运动学习行为特征。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为高维运动学习提供了可解释的计算框架，有助于优化康复训练策略。

search_text: Towards Modeling Human Motor Learning Dynamics in High-Dimensional Spaces 高维空间中人类运动学习动力学建模 Designing effective rehabilitation strategies for upper extremities, particularly hands and fingers, warrants the need for a computational model of human motor learning. The presence of large degrees of freedom (DoFs) available in these systems makes it difficult to balance the trade-off between learning the full dexterity and accomplishing manipulation goals. The motor learning literature argues that humans use motor synergies to reduce the dimension of control space. Using the low-dimensional space spanned by these synergies, we develop a computational model based on the internal model theory of motor control. We analyze the proposed model in terms of its convergence properties and fit it to the data collected from human experiments. We compare the performance of the fitted model to the experimental data and show that it captures human motor learning behavior well. 为上肢（尤其是手和手指）设计有效的康复策略需要人类运动学习的计算模型。这些系统中存在较大的自由度（DoF），因此很难在学习完全灵活性和实现操纵目标之间取得平衡。运动学习文献认为，人类利用运动协同作用来减少控制空间的维度。利用这些协同作用所跨越的低维空间，我们开发了一种基于电机控制内模型理论的计算模型。我们分析了所提出的模型的收敛特性，并将其与从人体实验中收集的数据进行拟合。我们将拟合模型的性能与实验数据进行比较，结果表明它很好地捕捉了人类运动学习行为。 本文旨在开发一个计算模型，用于模拟人类在高维空间中的运动学习动力学，以改进上肢康复策略。 Ankur Kamboj,Rajiv Ranganathan,Xiaobo Tan,Vaibhav Srivastava eess.SY,cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Merve Turhan,Ersin Ozturk,Hakan Ali Cirpan
title: Deep Learning-Aided Spatial Multiplexing with Index Modulation
title_zh: 具有索引调制的深度学习辅助空间复用
abstract: In this paper, deep learning (DL)-aided data detection of spatial multiplexing (SMX) multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) transmission with index modulation (IM) (Deep-SMX-IM) has been proposed. Deep-SMX-IM has been constructed by combining a zero-forcing (ZF) detector and DL technique. The proposed method uses the significant advantages of DL techniques to learn transmission characteristics of the frequency and spatial domains. Furthermore, thanks to using subblockbased detection provided by IM, Deep-SMX-IM is a straightforward method, which eventually reveals reduced complexity. It has been shown that Deep-SMX-IM has significant error performance gains compared to ZF detector without increasing computational complexity for different system configurations.
summary: In this paper, deep learning (DL)-aided data detection of spatial multiplexing (SMX) multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) transmission with index modulation (IM) (Deep-SMX-IM) has been proposed. Deep-SMX-IM has been constructed by combining a zero-forcing (ZF) detector and DL technique. The proposed method uses the significant advantages of DL techniques to learn transmission characteristics of the frequency and spatial domains. Furthermore, thanks to using subblockbased detection provided by IM, Deep-SMX-IM is a straightforward method, which eventually reveals reduced complexity. It has been shown that Deep-SMX-IM has significant error performance gains compared to ZF detector without increasing computational complexity for different system configurations.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了基于索引调制（IM）的空间复用（SMX）多输入多输出（MIMO）传输的深度学习（DL）辅助数据检测（Deep-SMX-IM）。 Deep-SMX-IM 是通过结合迫零 (ZF) 检测器和深度学习技术构建的。所提出的方法利用DL技术的显着优势来学习频域和空间域的传输特性。此外，由于使用 IM 提供的基于子块的检测，Deep-SMX-IM 是一种简单的方法，最终降低了复杂性。事实证明，与 ZF 检测器相比，Deep-SMX-IM 具有显着的误差性能提升，而不会增加不同系统配置的计算复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度学习和索引调制的空分复用MIMO传输检测方法Deep-SMX-IM。
AI.motivation: 传统零 forcing 检测器在复杂度与误码率之间难以平衡，需探索更高效的检测方案。
AI.method: 融合零 forcing 检测器与深度学习技术，利用索引调制的子块检测机制降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在不同系统配置下，Deep-SMX-IM相较传统方法实现显著误码率提升且不增加计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习辅助的索引调制空分复用技术能有效提升MIMO系统性能与效率。

authors_text: Yuyang Gao,Tong Sun,Liang Zhao,Sungsoo Hong
title: Aligning Eyes between Humans and Deep Neural Network through Interactive Attention Alignment
title_zh: 通过交互式注意力对齐来协调人类和深度神经网络之间的眼睛
abstract: While Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are deriving the major innovations in nearly every field through their powerful automation, we are also witnessing the peril behind automation as a form of bias, such as automated racism, gender bias, and adversarial bias. As the societal impact of DNNs grows, finding an effective way to steer DNNs to align their behavior with the human mental model has become indispensable in realizing fair and accountable models. We propose a novel framework of Interactive Attention Alignment (IAA) that aims at realizing human-steerable Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). IAA leverages DNN model explanation method as an interactive medium that humans can use to unveil the cases of biased model attention and directly adjust the attention. In improving the DNN using human-generated adjusted attention, we introduce GRADIA, a novel computational pipeline that jointly maximizes attention quality and prediction accuracy. We evaluated IAA framework in Study 1 and GRADIA in Study 2 in a gender classification problem. Study 1 found applying IAA can significantly improve the perceived quality of model attention from human eyes. In Study 2, we found using GRADIA can (1) significantly improve the perceived quality of model attention and (2) significantly improve model performance in scenarios where the training samples are limited. We present implications for future interactive user interfaces design towards human-alignable AI.
summary: While Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are deriving the major innovations in nearly every field through their powerful automation, we are also witnessing the peril behind automation as a form of bias, such as automated racism, gender bias, and adversarial bias. As the societal impact of DNNs grows, finding an effective way to steer DNNs to align their behavior with the human mental model has become indispensable in realizing fair and accountable models. We propose a novel framework of Interactive Attention Alignment (IAA) that aims at realizing human-steerable Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). IAA leverages DNN model explanation method as an interactive medium that humans can use to unveil the cases of biased model attention and directly adjust the attention. In improving the DNN using human-generated adjusted attention, we introduce GRADIA, a novel computational pipeline that jointly maximizes attention quality and prediction accuracy. We evaluated IAA framework in Study 1 and GRADIA in Study 2 in a gender classification problem. Study 1 found applying IAA can significantly improve the perceived quality of model attention from human eyes. In Study 2, we found using GRADIA can (1) significantly improve the perceived quality of model attention and (2) significantly improve model performance in scenarios where the training samples are limited. We present implications for future interactive user interfaces design towards human-alignable AI.
abstract_zh: 虽然深度神经网络 (DNN) 通过其强大的自动化功能在几乎每个领域都带来了重大创新，但我们也目睹了自动化背后作为一种偏见形式的危险，例如自动种族主义、性别偏见和对抗性偏见。随着 DNN 的社会影响力不断增长，找到一种有效的方法来引导 DNN 使其行为与人类心理模型保持一致，对于实现公平和负责任的模型来说已变得不可或缺。我们提出了一种新颖的交互式注意力对齐（IAA）框架，旨在实现人类可操纵的深度神经网络（DNN）。 IAA利用DNN模型解释方法作为交互媒介，人类可以用它来揭示模型注意力有偏差的情况并直接调整注意力。在使用人类生成的调整注意力改进 DNN 时，我们引入了 GRADIA，这是一种新颖的计算管道，可以共同最大化注意力质量和预测准确性。我们在研究 1 中评估了 IAA 框架，在研究 2 中评估了 GRADIA 框架的性别分类问题。研究 1 发现应用 IAA 可以显着提高人眼对模型注意力的感知质量。在研究 2 中，我们发现使用 GRADIA 可以 (1) 显着提高模型注意力的感知质量；(2) 在训练样本有限的场景下显着提高模型性能。我们提出了对未来交互式用户界面设计对人类可对齐人工智能的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过交互式注意力对齐（IAA）框架，使深度神经网络（DNN）的注意力机制与人类认知模型对齐，以减少算法偏见并提升模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络的自动化决策存在种族、性别等偏见，需通过人类可干预的方式调整模型注意力，以实现公平且可解释的AI系统。
AI.method: 设计交互式注意力对齐框架（IAA），结合人类反馈调整模型注意力，并引入GRADIA计算流程联合优化注意力质量与预测准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明，IAA显著提升人类对模型注意力质量的感知；GRADIA在小样本场景下同时提升注意力质量与模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 交互式对齐方法为未来设计人类可控的AI界面提供了理论支持，推动算法与人类认知的协同优化。

We present implications for future interactive user interfaces design towards human-alignable AI. 虽然深度神经网络 (DNN) 通过其强大的自动化功能在几乎每个领域都带来了重大创新，但我们也目睹了自动化背后作为一种偏见形式的危险，例如自动种族主义、性别偏见和对抗性偏见。随着 DNN 的社会影响力不断增长，找到一种有效的方法来引导 DNN 使其行为与人类心理模型保持一致，对于实现公平和负责任的模型来说已变得不可或缺。我们提出了一种新颖的交互式注意力对齐（IAA）框架，旨在实现人类可操纵的深度神经网络（DNN）。 IAA利用DNN模型解释方法作为交互媒介，人类可以用它来揭示模型注意力有偏差的情况并直接调整注意力。在使用人类生成的调整注意力改进 DNN 时，我们引入了 GRADIA，这是一种新颖的计算管道，可以共同最大化注意力质量和预测准确性。我们在研究 1 中评估了 IAA 框架，在研究 2 中评估了 GRADIA 框架的性别分类问题。研究 1 发现应用 IAA 可以显着提高人眼对模型注意力的感知质量。在研究 2 中，我们发现使用 GRADIA 可以 (1) 显着提高模型注意力的感知质量；(2) 在训练样本有限的场景下显着提高模型性能。我们提出了对未来交互式用户界面设计对人类可对齐人工智能的影响。 本文提出了一种通过交互式注意力对齐（IAA）框架，使深度神经网络（DNN）的注意力机制与人类认知模型对齐，以减少算法偏见并提升模型可解释性。 Yuyang Gao,Tong Sun,Liang Zhao,Sungsoo Hong cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Arjun Soin,Jameson Merkow,Jin Long,Joseph Paul Cohen,Smitha Saligrama,Stephen Kaiser,Steven Borg,Ivan Tarapov,Matthew P Lungren
title: CheXstray: Real-time Multi-Modal Data Concordance for Drift Detection in Medical Imaging AI
title_zh: CheXstray：用于医学成像 AI 漂移检测的实时多模态数据一致性
abstract: Clinical Artificial lntelligence (AI) applications are rapidly expanding worldwide, and have the potential to impact to all areas of medical practice. Medical imaging applications constitute a vast majority of approved clinical AI applications. Though healthcare systems are eager to adopt AI solutions a fundamental question remains: \textit{what happens after the AI model goes into production?} We use the CheXpert and PadChest public datasets to build and test a medical imaging AI drift monitoring workflow to track data and model drift without contemporaneous ground truth. We simulate drift in multiple experiments to compare model performance with our novel multi-modal drift metric, which uses DICOM metadata, image appearance representation from a variational autoencoder (VAE), and model output probabilities as input. Through experimentation, we demonstrate a strong proxy for ground truth performance using unsupervised distributional shifts in relevant metadata, predicted probabilities, and VAE latent representation. Our key contributions include (1) proof-of-concept for medical imaging drift detection that includes the use of VAE and domain specific statistical methods, (2) a multi-modal methodology to measure and unify drift metrics, (3) new insights into the challenges and solutions to observe deployed medical imaging AI, and (4) creation of open-source tools that enable others to easily run their own workflows and scenarios. This work has important implications. It addresses the concerning translation gap found in continuous medical imaging AI model monitoring common in dynamic healthcare environments.
summary: Clinical Artificial lntelligence (AI) applications are rapidly expanding worldwide, and have the potential to impact to all areas of medical practice. Medical imaging applications constitute a vast majority of approved clinical AI applications. Though healthcare systems are eager to adopt AI solutions a fundamental question remains: \textit{what happens after the AI model goes into production?} We use the CheXpert and PadChest public datasets to build and test a medical imaging AI drift monitoring workflow to track data and model drift without contemporaneous ground truth. We simulate drift in multiple experiments to compare model performance with our novel multi-modal drift metric, which uses DICOM metadata, image appearance representation from a variational autoencoder (VAE), and model output probabilities as input. Through experimentation, we demonstrate a strong proxy for ground truth performance using unsupervised distributional shifts in relevant metadata, predicted probabilities, and VAE latent representation. Our key contributions include (1) proof-of-concept for medical imaging drift detection that includes the use of VAE and domain specific statistical methods, (2) a multi-modal methodology to measure and unify drift metrics, (3) new insights into the challenges and solutions to observe deployed medical imaging AI, and (4) creation of open-source tools that enable others to easily run their own workflows and scenarios. This work has important implications. It addresses the concerning translation gap found in continuous medical imaging AI model monitoring common in dynamic healthcare environments.
abstract_zh: 临床人工智能（AI）应用正在全球范围内迅速扩展，并有可能影响医疗实践的所有领域。医学成像应用占已批准的临床人工智能应用的绝大多数。尽管医疗保健系统渴望采用人工智能解决方案，但仍然存在一个基本问题：\textit{人工智能模型投入生产后会发生什么？}我们使用 CheXpert 和 PadChest 公共数据集来构建和测试医学成像人工智能漂移监控工作流程，以跟踪数据和模型漂移，而无需同步地面实况。我们在多个实验中模拟漂移，以将模型性能与我们新颖的多模态漂移指标进行比较，该指标使用 DICOM 元数据、变分自动编码器 (VAE) 的图像外观表示以及模型输出概率作为输入。通过实验，我们利用相关元数据、预测概率和 VAE 潜在表示的无监督分布变化，展示了地面真实性能的强大代理。我们的主要贡献包括 (1) 医学成像漂移检测的概念验证，包括使用 VAE 和特定领域的统计方法；(2) 测量和统一漂移指标的多模式方法；(3) 对观察部署的医学成像 AI 的挑战和解决方案的新见解；(4) 创建开源工具，使其他人能够轻松运行自己的工作流程和场景。这项工作具有重要意义。它解决了动态医疗环境中常见的连续医学成像 AI 模型监控中存在的相关翻译差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CheXstray方法，通过多模态数据实时检测医疗影像AI模型中的数据和模型漂移问题，无需同期真实标注数据。
AI.motivation: 临床AI模型部署后性能可能随时间变化，但现有方法难以在无真实标注的情况下持续监测医疗影像AI的漂移问题，需解决动态医疗环境下的模型监控缺口。
AI.method: 基于CheXpert和PadChest数据集，结合DICOM元数据、变分自编码器（VAE）提取的影像表征及模型输出概率，构建多模态漂移度量框架，通过无监督分布偏移分析检测漂移。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法能有效模拟漂移场景，利用元数据、预测概率和VAE潜在表示的分布变化作为真实性能的强代理指标，实现模型漂移的准确检测。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为医疗影像AI的持续监控提供了可行方案，通过开源工具和多模态方法论推动部署模型的可观察性研究，弥合动态医疗环境下的AI应用鸿沟。

authors_text: Peter J. Bevan,Amir Atapour-Abarghouei
title: Detecting Melanoma Fairly: Skin Tone Detection and Debiasing for Skin Lesion Classification
title_zh: 公平检测黑色素瘤：肤色检测和皮肤病变分类去偏
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks have demonstrated human-level performance in the classification of melanoma and other skin lesions, but evident performance disparities between differing skin tones should be addressed before widespread deployment. In this work, we propose an efficient yet effective algorithm for automatically labelling the skin tone of lesion images, and use this to annotate the benchmark ISIC dataset. We subsequently use these automated labels as the target for two leading bias unlearning techniques towards mitigating skin tone bias. Our experimental results provide evidence that our skin tone detection algorithm outperforms existing solutions and that unlearning skin tone may improve generalisation and can reduce the performance disparity between melanoma detection in lighter and darker skin tones.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks have demonstrated human-level performance in the classification of melanoma and other skin lesions, but evident performance disparities between differing skin tones should be addressed before widespread deployment. In this work, we propose an efficient yet effective algorithm for automatically labelling the skin tone of lesion images, and use this to annotate the benchmark ISIC dataset. We subsequently use these automated labels as the target for two leading bias unlearning techniques towards mitigating skin tone bias. Our experimental results provide evidence that our skin tone detection algorithm outperforms existing solutions and that unlearning skin tone may improve generalisation and can reduce the performance disparity between melanoma detection in lighter and darker skin tones.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络在黑色素瘤和其他皮肤病变的分类方面已经证明了人类水平的性能，但在广泛部署之前，应该解决不同肤色之间明显的性能差异。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种高效且有效的算法来自动标记病变图像的肤色，并用它来注释基准 ISIC 数据集。随后，我们使用这些自动化标签作为两种主要的偏见消除技术的目标，以减轻肤色偏见。我们的实验结果证明，我们的肤色检测算法优于现有解决方案，并且忘记肤色可以提高泛化能力，并可以减少浅肤色和深色肤色中黑色素瘤检测之间的性能差异。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决皮肤病变分类中的肤色偏差问题，通过自动检测皮肤色调并应用去偏见技术以提高分类公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有皮肤病变分类模型在不同肤色间的性能存在显著差异，可能导致诊断不公平，需改进算法以消除这种偏差。
AI.method: 提出自动检测皮肤色调的算法并标注数据集，随后应用两种主流去偏技术以减少肤色偏差。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提肤色检测算法优于现有方法，去偏处理有效提升模型泛化能力并缩小不同肤色间的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 自动皮肤色调检测与去偏技术能有效缓解皮肤病变分类中的肤色偏差，提升模型公平性与泛化能力。

authors_text: Christina Göpfert,Alex Haig,Yinlam Chow,Chih-wei Hsu,Ivan Vendrov,Tyler Lu,Deepak Ramachandran,Hubert Pham,Mohammad Ghavamzadeh,Craig Boutilier
title: Discovering Personalized Semantics for Soft Attributes in Recommender Systems using Concept Activation Vectors
title_zh: 使用概念激活向量发现推荐系统中软属性的个性化语义
abstract: Interactive recommender systems have emerged as a promising paradigm to overcome the limitations of the primitive user feedback used by traditional recommender systems (e.g., clicks, item consumption, ratings). They allow users to express intent, preferences, constraints, and contexts in a richer fashion, often using natural language (including faceted search and dialogue). Yet more research is needed to find the most effective ways to use this feedback. One challenge is inferring a user's semantic intent from the open-ended terms or attributes often used to describe a desired item, and using it to refine recommendation results. Leveraging concept activation vectors (CAVs) [26], a recently developed approach for model interpretability in machine learning, we develop a framework to learn a representation that captures the semantics of such attributes and connects them to user preferences and behaviors in recommender systems. One novel feature of our approach is its ability to distinguish objective and subjective attributes (both subjectivity of degree and of sense), and associate different senses of subjective attributes with different users. We demonstrate on both synthetic and real-world data sets that our CAV representation not only accurately interprets users' subjective semantics, but can also be used to improve recommendations through interactive item critiquing.
summary: Interactive recommender systems have emerged as a promising paradigm to overcome the limitations of the primitive user feedback used by traditional recommender systems (e.g., clicks, item consumption, ratings). They allow users to express intent, preferences, constraints, and contexts in a richer fashion, often using natural language (including faceted search and dialogue). Yet more research is needed to find the most effective ways to use this feedback. One challenge is inferring a user's semantic intent from the open-ended terms or attributes often used to describe a desired item, and using it to refine recommendation results. Leveraging concept activation vectors (CAVs) [26], a recently developed approach for model interpretability in machine learning, we develop a framework to learn a representation that captures the semantics of such attributes and connects them to user preferences and behaviors in recommender systems. One novel feature of our approach is its ability to distinguish objective and subjective attributes (both subjectivity of degree and of sense), and associate different senses of subjective attributes with different users. We demonstrate on both synthetic and real-world data sets that our CAV representation not only accurately interprets users' subjective semantics, but can also be used to improve recommendations through interactive item critiquing.
abstract_zh: 交互式推荐系统已成为一种有前途的范例，可以克服传统推荐系统使用的原始用户反馈（例如点击、项目消费、评级）的局限性。它们允许用户以更丰富的方式表达意图、偏好、约束和上下文，通常使用自然语言（包括分面搜索和对话）。然而，还需要更多的研究来找到使用这种反馈的最有效方法。一项挑战是从通常用于描述所需项目的开放式术语或属性中推断用户的语义意图，并使用它来完善推荐结果。利用概念激活向量（CAV）[26]（一种最近开发的机器学习模型可解释性方法），我们开发了一个框架来学习一种表示，该表示捕获此类属性的语义并将它们与推荐系统中的用户偏好和行为联系起来。我们的方法的一个新颖特征是它能够区分客观属性和主观属性（程度和意义的主观性），并将主观属性的不同意义与不同的用户相关联。我们在合成数据集和真实世界数据集上证明，我们的 CAV 表示不仅可以准确解释用户的主观语义，而且还可以用于通过交互式项目评论来改进推荐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用概念激活向量（CAVs）学习个性化语义表示，以改进推荐系统中对软属性（如主观描述）的理解与推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐系统依赖有限的用户反馈（如点击、评分），难以处理用户通过自然语言表达的复杂意图和主观属性，需更有效的方法解析开放属性并关联用户偏好。
AI.method: 基于CAVs模型可解释性方法，构建框架学习属性语义表示，区分客观属性与主观属性的不同程度和语义，并将主观属性的多义性与用户偏好关联。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证，CAV表示能准确解析用户主观语义，并通过交互式物品批评提升推荐效果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过捕捉个性化语义，为推荐系统处理软属性提供了有效方法，可提升推荐准确性和交互性。

They allow users to express intent, preferences, constraints, and contexts in a richer fashion, often using natural language (including faceted search and dialogue). Yet more research is needed to find the most effective ways to use this feedback. One challenge is inferring a user's semantic intent from the open-ended terms or attributes often used to describe a desired item, and using it to refine recommendation results. Leveraging concept activation vectors (CAVs) [26], a recently developed approach for model interpretability in machine learning, we develop a framework to learn a representation that captures the semantics of such attributes and connects them to user preferences and behaviors in recommender systems. One novel feature of our approach is its ability to distinguish objective and subjective attributes (both subjectivity of degree and of sense), and associate different senses of subjective attributes with different users. We demonstrate on both synthetic and real-world data sets that our CAV representation not only accurately interprets users' subjective semantics, but can also be used to improve recommendations through interactive item critiquing. 交互式推荐系统已成为一种有前途的范例，可以克服传统推荐系统使用的原始用户反馈（例如点击、项目消费、评级）的局限性。它们允许用户以更丰富的方式表达意图、偏好、约束和上下文，通常使用自然语言（包括分面搜索和对话）。然而，还需要更多的研究来找到使用这种反馈的最有效方法。一项挑战是从通常用于描述所需项目的开放式术语或属性中推断用户的语义意图，并使用它来完善推荐结果。利用概念激活向量（CAV）[26]（一种最近开发的机器学习模型可解释性方法），我们开发了一个框架来学习一种表示，该表示捕获此类属性的语义并将它们与推荐系统中的用户偏好和行为联系起来。我们的方法的一个新颖特征是它能够区分客观属性和主观属性（程度和意义的主观性），并将主观属性的不同意义与不同的用户相关联。我们在合成数据集和真实世界数据集上证明，我们的 CAV 表示不仅可以准确解释用户的主观语义，而且还可以用于通过交互式项目评论来改进推荐。 本文提出利用概念激活向量（CAVs）学习个性化语义表示，以改进推荐系统中对软属性（如主观描述）的理解与推荐效果。 Christina Göpfert,Alex Haig,Yinlam Chow,Chih-wei Hsu,Ivan Vendrov,Tyler Lu,Deepak Ramachandran,Hubert Pham,Mohammad Ghavamzadeh,Craig Boutilier cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Sitong Liu,Zhichao Lian,Siqi Gu,Liang Xiao
title: Block shuffling learning for Deepfake Detection
title_zh: 用于 Deepfake 检测的块改组学习
abstract: Deepfake detection methods based on convolutional neural networks (CNN) have demonstrated high accuracy. \textcolor{black}{However, these methods often suffer from decreased performance when faced with unknown forgery methods and common transformations such as resizing and blurring, resulting in deviations between training and testing domains.} This phenomenon, known as overfitting, poses a significant challenge. To address this issue, we propose a novel block shuffling regularization method. Firstly, our approach involves dividing the images into blocks and applying both intra-block and inter-block shuffling techniques. This process indirectly achieves weight-sharing across different dimensions. Secondly, we introduce an adversarial loss algorithm to mitigate the overfitting problem induced by the shuffling noise. Finally, we restore the spatial layout of the blocks to capture the semantic associations among them. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, which surpasses existing approaches in forgery face detection. Notably, our method exhibits excellent generalization capabilities, demonstrating robustness against cross-dataset evaluations and common image transformations. Especially our method can be easily integrated with various CNN models. Source code is available at \href{https://github.com/NoWindButRain/BlockShuffleLearning}{Github}.
summary: Deepfake detection methods based on convolutional neural networks (CNN) have demonstrated high accuracy. \textcolor{black}{However, these methods often suffer from decreased performance when faced with unknown forgery methods and common transformations such as resizing and blurring, resulting in deviations between training and testing domains.} This phenomenon, known as overfitting, poses a significant challenge. To address this issue, we propose a novel block shuffling regularization method. Firstly, our approach involves dividing the images into blocks and applying both intra-block and inter-block shuffling techniques. This process indirectly achieves weight-sharing across different dimensions. Secondly, we introduce an adversarial loss algorithm to mitigate the overfitting problem induced by the shuffling noise. Finally, we restore the spatial layout of the blocks to capture the semantic associations among them. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, which surpasses existing approaches in forgery face detection. Notably, our method exhibits excellent generalization capabilities, demonstrating robustness against cross-dataset evaluations and common image transformations. Especially our method can be easily integrated with various CNN models. Source code is available at \href{https://github.com/NoWindButRain/BlockShuffleLearning}{Github}.
abstract_zh: 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的 Deepfake 检测方法已表现出很高的准确性。 \textcolor{black}{然而，当面对未知的伪造方法和常见的变换（例如调整大小和模糊）时，这些方法通常会出现性能下降，从而导致训练和测试域之间的偏差。}这种称为过度拟合的现象提出了重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的块洗牌正则化方法。首先，我们的方法涉及将图像划分为块并应用块内和块间混洗技术。这个过程间接实现了不同维度的权重共享。其次，我们引入对抗性损失算法来减轻洗牌噪声引起的过拟合问题。最后，我们恢复块的空间布局以捕获它们之间的语义关联。大量的实验验证了我们提出的方法的有效性，该方法超越了伪造人脸检测的现有方法。值得注意的是，我们的方法表现出出色的泛化能力，表现出针对跨数据集评估和常见图像转换的鲁棒性。特别是我们的方法可以很容易地与各种 CNN 模型集成。源代码可在 \href{https://github.com/NoWindButRain/BlockShuffleLearning}{Github} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于块洗牌学习的深度伪造检测方法，旨在提高模型在未知伪造方法和常见图像变换下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 基于卷积神经网络的深度伪造检测方法在面对未知伪造方法和常见图像变换时性能下降，导致训练与测试域之间出现偏差，即过拟合问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种块洗牌正则化方法，将图像划分为块并应用块内和块间洗牌技术，引入对抗损失以缓解洗牌噪声引起的过拟合问题，并恢复块的空间布局以捕捉语义关联。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在伪造人脸检测中优于现有方法，具有良好的跨数据集评估和常见图像变换的鲁棒性，并且可以轻松集成到各种CNN模型中。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的块洗牌学习方法有效提升了深度伪造检测模型的泛化能力，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jaejin Cho,Borjan Gagoski,Taehyung Kim,Qiyuan Tian,Stephen Robert Frost,Itthi Chatnuntawech,Berkin Bilgic
title: Wave-Encoded Model-based Deep Learning for Highly Accelerated Imaging with Joint Reconstruction
title_zh: 基于波编码模型的深度学习，用于联合重建的高加速成像
abstract: Purpose: To propose a wave-encoded model-based deep learning (wave-MoDL) strategy for highly accelerated 3D imaging and joint multi-contrast image reconstruction, and further extend this to enable rapid quantitative imaging using an interleaved look-locker acquisition sequence with T2 preparation pulse (3D-QALAS). Method: Recently introduced MoDL technique successfully incorporates convolutional neural network (CNN)-based regularizers into physics-based parallel imaging reconstruction using a small number of network parameters. Wave-CAIPI is an emerging parallel imaging method that accelerates the imaging speed by employing sinusoidal gradients in the phase- and slice-encoding directions during the readout to take better advantage of 3D coil sensitivity profiles. In wave-MoDL, we propose to combine the wave-encoding strategy with unrolled network constraints to accelerate the acquisition speed while enforcing wave-encoded data consistency. We further extend wave-MoDL to reconstruct multi-contrast data with controlled aliasing in parallel imaging (CAIPI) sampling patterns to leverage similarity between multiple images to improve the reconstruction quality. Result: Wave-MoDL enables a 47-second MPRAGE acquisition at 1 mm resolution at 16-fold acceleration. For quantitative imaging, wave-MoDL permits a 2-minute acquisition for T1, T2, and proton density mapping at 1 mm resolution at 12-fold acceleration, from which contrast weighted images can be synthesized as well. Conclusion: Wave-MoDL allows rapid MR acquisition and high-fidelity image reconstruction and may facilitate clinical and neuroscientific applications by incorporating unrolled neural networks into wave-CAIPI reconstruction.
summary: Purpose: To propose a wave-encoded model-based deep learning (wave-MoDL) strategy for highly accelerated 3D imaging and joint multi-contrast image reconstruction, and further extend this to enable rapid quantitative imaging using an interleaved look-locker acquisition sequence with T2 preparation pulse (3D-QALAS). Method: Recently introduced MoDL technique successfully incorporates convolutional neural network (CNN)-based regularizers into physics-based parallel imaging reconstruction using a small number of network parameters. Wave-CAIPI is an emerging parallel imaging method that accelerates the imaging speed by employing sinusoidal gradients in the phase- and slice-encoding directions during the readout to take better advantage of 3D coil sensitivity profiles. In wave-MoDL, we propose to combine the wave-encoding strategy with unrolled network constraints to accelerate the acquisition speed while enforcing wave-encoded data consistency. We further extend wave-MoDL to reconstruct multi-contrast data with controlled aliasing in parallel imaging (CAIPI) sampling patterns to leverage similarity between multiple images to improve the reconstruction quality. Result: Wave-MoDL enables a 47-second MPRAGE acquisition at 1 mm resolution at 16-fold acceleration. For quantitative imaging, wave-MoDL permits a 2-minute acquisition for T1, T2, and proton density mapping at 1 mm resolution at 12-fold acceleration, from which contrast weighted images can be synthesized as well. Conclusion: Wave-MoDL allows rapid MR acquisition and high-fidelity image reconstruction and may facilitate clinical and neuroscientific applications by incorporating unrolled neural networks into wave-CAIPI reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 目的：提出一种基于波编码模型的深度学习 (wave-MoDL) 策略，用于高度加速 3D 成像和联合多对比度图像重建，并进一步扩展该策略，以使用具有 T2 准备脉冲的交错式外观锁定采集序列 (3D-QALAS) 实现快速定量成像。方法：最近引入的 MoDL 技术成功地将基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的正则器结合到使用少量网络参数的基于物理的并行成像重建中。 Wave-CAIPI 是一种新兴的并行成像方法，它通过在读出期间在相位和切片编码方向上采用正弦梯度来加速成像速度，以更好地利用 3D 线圈灵敏度分布。在wave-MoDL中，我们建议将波编码策略与展开的网络约束相结合，以加快采集速度，同时强制波编码数据的一致性。我们进一步扩展wave-MoDL，以利用并行成像中受控混叠（CAIPI）采样模式来重建多对比度数据，以利用多个图像之间的相似性来提高重建质量。结果：Wave-MoDL 能够以 1 毫米分辨率和 16 倍加速度进行 47 秒的 MPRAGE 采集。对于定量成像，wave-MoDL 允许以 1 毫米分辨率和 12 倍加速度在 2 分钟内采集 T1、T2 和质子密度图，从中也可以合成对比度加权图像。结论：Wave-MoDL 允许快速 MR 采集和高保真图像重建，并且可以通过将展开的神经网络合并到 Wave-CAIPI 重建中来促进临床和神经科学应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合波编码和模型驱动深度学习的波-MoDL方法，用于加速3D磁共振成像和多对比度图像重建。
AI.motivation: 传统MRI成像速度慢且分辨率受限，需开发高效算法以实现快速高保真图像重建，满足临床和科研需求。
AI.method: 将波-CAIPI的正弦梯度编码策略与解卷积神经网络（MoDL）结合，通过展开网络约束实现数据一致性，并扩展至多对比度联合重建。
AI.result: 在16倍加速下实现47秒的MPRAGE成像，12倍加速下2分钟完成T1/T2/质子密度定量成像，且可合成对比度加权图像。
AI.conclusion: 波-MoDL通过融合波编码与深度学习显著提升MRI速度和重建质量，有望推动临床与神经科学应用。

search_text: Wave-Encoded Model-based Deep Learning for Highly Accelerated Imaging with Joint Reconstruction 基于波编码模型的深度学习，用于联合重建的高加速成像 Purpose: To propose a wave-encoded model-based deep learning (wave-MoDL) strategy for highly accelerated 3D imaging and joint multi-contrast image reconstruction, and further extend this to enable rapid quantitative imaging using an interleaved look-locker acquisition sequence with T2 preparation pulse (3D-QALAS). Method: Recently introduced MoDL technique successfully incorporates convolutional neural network (CNN)-based regularizers into physics-based parallel imaging reconstruction using a small number of network parameters. Wave-CAIPI is an emerging parallel imaging method that accelerates the imaging speed by employing sinusoidal gradients in the phase- and slice-encoding directions during the readout to take better advantage of 3D coil sensitivity profiles. In wave-MoDL, we propose to combine the wave-encoding strategy with unrolled network constraints to accelerate the acquisition speed while enforcing wave-encoded data consistency. We further extend wave-MoDL to reconstruct multi-contrast data with controlled aliasing in parallel imaging (CAIPI) sampling patterns to leverage similarity between multiple images to improve the reconstruction quality. Result: Wave-MoDL enables a 47-second MPRAGE acquisition at 1 mm resolution at 16-fold acceleration. For quantitative imaging, wave-MoDL permits a 2-minute acquisition for T1, T2, and proton density mapping at 1 mm resolution at 12-fold acceleration, from which contrast weighted images can be synthesized as well. Conclusion: Wave-MoDL allows rapid MR acquisition and high-fidelity image reconstruction and may facilitate clinical and neuroscientific applications by incorporating unrolled neural networks into wave-CAIPI reconstruction. 目的：提出一种基于波编码模型的深度学习 (wave-MoDL) 策略，用于高度加速 3D 成像和联合多对比度图像重建，并进一步扩展该策略，以使用具有 T2 准备脉冲的交错式外观锁定采集序列 (3D-QALAS) 实现快速定量成像。方法：最近引入的 MoDL 技术成功地将基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的正则器结合到使用少量网络参数的基于物理的并行成像重建中。 Wave-CAIPI 是一种新兴的并行成像方法，它通过在读出期间在相位和切片编码方向上采用正弦梯度来加速成像速度，以更好地利用 3D 线圈灵敏度分布。在wave-MoDL中，我们建议将波编码策略与展开的网络约束相结合，以加快采集速度，同时强制波编码数据的一致性。我们进一步扩展wave-MoDL，以利用并行成像中受控混叠（CAIPI）采样模式来重建多对比度数据，以利用多个图像之间的相似性来提高重建质量。结果：Wave-MoDL 能够以 1 毫米分辨率和 16 倍加速度进行 47 秒的 MPRAGE 采集。对于定量成像，wave-MoDL 允许以 1 毫米分辨率和 12 倍加速度在 2 分钟内采集 T1、T2 和质子密度图，从中也可以合成对比度加权图像。结论：Wave-MoDL 允许快速 MR 采集和高保真图像重建，并且可以通过将展开的神经网络合并到 Wave-CAIPI 重建中来促进临床和神经科学应用。 本文提出了一种结合波编码和模型驱动深度学习的波-MoDL方法，用于加速3D磁共振成像和多对比度图像重建。 Jaejin Cho,Borjan Gagoski,Taehyung Kim,Qiyuan Tian,Stephen Robert Frost,Itthi Chatnuntawech,Berkin Bilgic eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuan Tian,Guo Lu,Yichao Yan,Guangtao Zhai,Li Chen,Zhiyong Gao
title: A Coding Framework and Benchmark towards Low-Bitrate Video Understanding
title_zh: 低比特率视频理解的编码框架和基准
abstract: Video compression is indispensable to most video analysis systems. Despite saving transportation bandwidth, it also deteriorates downstream video understanding tasks, especially at low-bitrate settings. To systematically investigate this problem, we first thoroughly review the previous methods, revealing that three principles, i.e., task-decoupled, label-free, and data-emerged semantic prior, are critical to a machine-friendly coding framework but are not fully satisfied so far. In this paper, we propose a traditional-neural mixed coding framework that simultaneously fulfills all these principles, by taking advantage of both traditional codecs and neural networks (NNs). On one hand, the traditional codecs can efficiently encode the pixel signal of videos but may distort the semantic information. On the other hand, highly non-linear NNs are proficient in condensing video semantics into a compact representation. The framework is optimized by ensuring that a transportation-efficient semantic representation of the video is preserved w.r.t. the coding procedure, which is spontaneously learned from unlabeled data in a self-supervised manner. The videos collaboratively decoded from two streams (codec and NN) are of rich semantics, as well as visually photo-realistic, empirically boosting several mainstream downstream video analysis task performances without any post-adaptation procedure. Furthermore, by introducing the attention mechanism and adaptive modeling scheme, the video semantic modeling ability of our approach is further enhanced. Finally, we build a low-bitrate video understanding benchmark with three downstream tasks on eight datasets, demonstrating the notable superiority of our approach. All codes, data, and models will be available at \url{https://github.com/tianyuan168326/VCS-Pytorch}.
summary: Video compression is indispensable to most video analysis systems. Despite saving transportation bandwidth, it also deteriorates downstream video understanding tasks, especially at low-bitrate settings. To systematically investigate this problem, we first thoroughly review the previous methods, revealing that three principles, i.e., task-decoupled, label-free, and data-emerged semantic prior, are critical to a machine-friendly coding framework but are not fully satisfied so far. In this paper, we propose a traditional-neural mixed coding framework that simultaneously fulfills all these principles, by taking advantage of both traditional codecs and neural networks (NNs). On one hand, the traditional codecs can efficiently encode the pixel signal of videos but may distort the semantic information. On the other hand, highly non-linear NNs are proficient in condensing video semantics into a compact representation. The framework is optimized by ensuring that a transportation-efficient semantic representation of the video is preserved w.r.t. the coding procedure, which is spontaneously learned from unlabeled data in a self-supervised manner. The videos collaboratively decoded from two streams (codec and NN) are of rich semantics, as well as visually photo-realistic, empirically boosting several mainstream downstream video analysis task performances without any post-adaptation procedure. Furthermore, by introducing the attention mechanism and adaptive modeling scheme, the video semantic modeling ability of our approach is further enhanced. Finally, we build a low-bitrate video understanding benchmark with three downstream tasks on eight datasets, demonstrating the notable superiority of our approach. All codes, data, and models will be available at \url{https://github.com/tianyuan168326/VCS-Pytorch}.
abstract_zh: 视频压缩对于大多数视频分析系统来说是不可或缺的。尽管节省了传输带宽，但它也会恶化下游视频理解任务，特别是在低比特率设置下。为了系统地研究这个问题，我们首先彻底回顾了以前的方法，揭示了三个原则，即任务解耦、无标签和数据出现的语义先验，对于机器友好的编码框架至关重要，但迄今为止尚未完全满足。在本文中，我们提出了一种传统神经混合编码框架，该框架利用传统编解码器和神经网络（NN）同时满足所有这些原则。一方面，传统的编解码器可以有效地对视频的像素信号进行编码，但可能会扭曲语义信息。另一方面，高度非线性的神经网络擅长将视频语义压缩为紧凑的表示。通过确保保留视频的传输高效语义表示来优化该框架。编码过程，以自我监督的方式从未标记的数据中自发学习。从两个流（编解码器和神经网络）协作解码的视频具有丰富的语义，并且视觉上逼真，无需任何后期适应程序即可凭经验提高几个主流下游视频分析任务的性能。此外，通过引入注意力机制和自适应建模方案，我们的方法的视频语义建模能力进一步增强。最后，我们在八个数据集上构建了一个包含三个下游任务的低比特率视频理解基准，展示了我们的方法的显着优越性。所有代码、数据和模型都可以在 \url{https://github.com/tianyuan168326/VCS-Pytorch} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种传统-神经混合编码框架及低比特率视频理解基准，以解决视频压缩导致的下游任务性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 视频压缩虽节省带宽但损害低比特率下的视频理解任务，现有方法未能满足任务解耦、无标签和数据驱动语义先验等关键原则。
AI.method: 融合传统编解码器与神经网络，通过自监督学习保留语义表示，引入注意力机制和自适应建模增强语义建模能力。
AI.result: 在八个数据集的三个下游任务中验证了方法优越性，无需后适应即可提升主流视频分析任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了视觉保真与语义保留，构建的基准为低比特率视频理解研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Yixin Zhang,Junjie Li,Zilei Wang
title: Low-confidence Samples Matter for Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 低置信度样本对于域适应很重要
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures; an outdated version that will be updated
comments: 11 pages, 5 figures; an outdated version that will be updated
abstract: Domain adaptation (DA) aims to transfer knowledge from a label-rich source domain to a related but label-scarce target domain. The conventional DA strategy is to align the feature distributions of the two domains. Recently, increasing researches have focused on self-training or other semi-supervised algorithms to explore the data structure of the target domain. However, the bulk of them depend largely on confident samples in order to build reliable pseudo labels, prototypes or cluster centers. Representing the target data structure in such a way would overlook the huge low-confidence samples, resulting in sub-optimal transferability that is biased towards the samples similar to the source domain. To overcome this issue, we propose a novel contrastive learning method by processing low-confidence samples, which encourages the model to make use of the target data structure through the instance discrimination process. To be specific, we create positive and negative pairs only using low-confidence samples, and then re-represent the original features with the classifier weights rather than directly utilizing them, which can better encode the task-specific semantic information. Furthermore, we combine cross-domain mixup to augment the proposed contrastive loss. Consequently, the domain gap can be well bridged through contrastive learning of intermediate representations across domains. We evaluate the proposed method in both unsupervised and semi-supervised DA settings, and extensive experimental results on benchmarks reveal that our method is effective and achieves state-of-the-art performance. The code can be found in https://github.com/zhyx12/MixLRCo.
summary: Domain adaptation (DA) aims to transfer knowledge from a label-rich source domain to a related but label-scarce target domain. The conventional DA strategy is to align the feature distributions of the two domains. Recently, increasing researches have focused on self-training or other semi-supervised algorithms to explore the data structure of the target domain. However, the bulk of them depend largely on confident samples in order to build reliable pseudo labels, prototypes or cluster centers. Representing the target data structure in such a way would overlook the huge low-confidence samples, resulting in sub-optimal transferability that is biased towards the samples similar to the source domain. To overcome this issue, we propose a novel contrastive learning method by processing low-confidence samples, which encourages the model to make use of the target data structure through the instance discrimination process. To be specific, we create positive and negative pairs only using low-confidence samples, and then re-represent the original features with the classifier weights rather than directly utilizing them, which can better encode the task-specific semantic information. Furthermore, we combine cross-domain mixup to augment the proposed contrastive loss. Consequently, the domain gap can be well bridged through contrastive learning of intermediate representations across domains. We evaluate the proposed method in both unsupervised and semi-supervised DA settings, and extensive experimental results on benchmarks reveal that our method is effective and achieves state-of-the-art performance. The code can be found in https://github.com/zhyx12/MixLRCo.
abstract_zh: 域适应（DA）旨在将知识从标签丰富的源域转移到相关但标签稀缺的目标域。传统的DA策略是对齐两个域的特征分布。最近，越来越多的研究集中在自训练或其他半监督算法来探索目标域的数据结构。然而，其中大部分在很大程度上依赖于置信样本来构建可靠的伪标签、原型或聚类中心。以这种方式表示目标数据结构会忽略大量的低置信度样本，导致次优的可迁移性偏向与源域相似的样本。为了克服这个问题，我们通过处理低置信度样本提出了一种新颖的对比学习方法，该方法鼓励模型通过实例区分过程利用目标数据结构。具体来说，我们仅使用低置信度样本创建正负对，然后用分类器权重重新表示原始特征，而不是直接利用它们，这样可以更好地编码特定于任务的语义信息。此外，我们结合跨域混合来增强所提出的对比损失。因此，可以通过跨领域的中间表示的对比学习来很好地弥合领域差距。我们在无监督和半监督 DA 设置中评估了所提出的方法，并且基准测试的广泛实验结果表明我们的方法是有效的并实现了最先进的性能。代码可以在https://github.com/zhyx12/MixLRCo中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的对比学习方法，通过处理低置信度样本提升领域适应的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统领域适应方法依赖高置信度样本生成伪标签，忽略了大量低置信度样本，导致目标领域结构表示不完整，影响迁移效果。
AI.method: 利用低置信度样本构建正负样本对，通过分类器权重重构特征表示，并结合跨领域Mixup增强对比损失，促进领域间中间表征学习。
AI.result: 在无监督和半监督领域适应任务中，该方法在多个基准数据集上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 低置信度样本包含关键领域特性信息，通过对比学习有效利用这些样本可显著提升领域适应效果。

search_text: Low-confidence Samples Matter for Domain Adaptation 低置信度样本对于域适应很重要 Domain adaptation (DA) aims to transfer knowledge from a label-rich source domain to a related but label-scarce target domain. The conventional DA strategy is to align the feature distributions of the two domains. Recently, increasing researches have focused on self-training or other semi-supervised algorithms to explore the data structure of the target domain. However, the bulk of them depend largely on confident samples in order to build reliable pseudo labels, prototypes or cluster centers. Representing the target data structure in such a way would overlook the huge low-confidence samples, resulting in sub-optimal transferability that is biased towards the samples similar to the source domain. To overcome this issue, we propose a novel contrastive learning method by processing low-confidence samples, which encourages the model to make use of the target data structure through the instance discrimination process. To be specific, we create positive and negative pairs only using low-confidence samples, and then re-represent the original features with the classifier weights rather than directly utilizing them, which can better encode the task-specific semantic information. Furthermore, we combine cross-domain mixup to augment the proposed contrastive loss. Consequently, the domain gap can be well bridged through contrastive learning of intermediate representations across domains. We evaluate the proposed method in both unsupervised and semi-supervised DA settings, and extensive experimental results on benchmarks reveal that our method is effective and achieves state-of-the-art performance. The code can be found in https://github.com/zhyx12/MixLRCo. 域适应（DA）旨在将知识从标签丰富的源域转移到相关但标签稀缺的目标域。传统的DA策略是对齐两个域的特征分布。最近，越来越多的研究集中在自训练或其他半监督算法来探索目标域的数据结构。然而，其中大部分在很大程度上依赖于置信样本来构建可靠的伪标签、原型或聚类中心。以这种方式表示目标数据结构会忽略大量的低置信度样本，导致次优的可迁移性偏向与源域相似的样本。为了克服这个问题，我们通过处理低置信度样本提出了一种新颖的对比学习方法，该方法鼓励模型通过实例区分过程利用目标数据结构。具体来说，我们仅使用低置信度样本创建正负对，然后用分类器权重重新表示原始特征，而不是直接利用它们，这样可以更好地编码特定于任务的语义信息。此外，我们结合跨域混合来增强所提出的对比损失。因此，可以通过跨领域的中间表示的对比学习来很好地弥合领域差距。我们在无监督和半监督 DA 设置中评估了所提出的方法，并且基准测试的广泛实验结果表明我们的方法是有效的并实现了最先进的性能。代码可以在https://github.com/zhyx12/MixLRCo中找到。 本文提出一种新的对比学习方法，通过处理低置信度样本提升领域适应的性能。 Yixin Zhang,Junjie Li,Zilei Wang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jiayang Bai,Shuichang Lai,Haoyu Qin,Jie Guo,Yanwen Guo
title: GLPanoDepth: Global-to-Local Panoramic Depth Estimation
title_zh: GLPanoDepth：全局到局部的全景深度估计
abstract: In this paper, we propose a learning-based method for predicting dense depth values of a scene from a monocular omnidirectional image. An omnidirectional image has a full field-of-view, providing much more complete descriptions of the scene than perspective images. However, fully-convolutional networks that most current solutions rely on fail to capture rich global contexts from the panorama. To address this issue and also the distortion of equirectangular projection in the panorama, we propose Cubemap Vision Transformers (CViT), a new transformer-based architecture that can model long-range dependencies and extract distortion-free global features from the panorama. We show that cubemap vision transformers have a global receptive field at every stage and can provide globally coherent predictions for spherical signals. To preserve important local features, we further design a convolution-based branch in our pipeline (dubbed GLPanoDepth) and fuse global features from cubemap vision transformers at multiple scales. This global-to-local strategy allows us to fully exploit useful global and local features in the panorama, achieving state-of-the-art performance in panoramic depth estimation.
summary: In this paper, we propose a learning-based method for predicting dense depth values of a scene from a monocular omnidirectional image. An omnidirectional image has a full field-of-view, providing much more complete descriptions of the scene than perspective images. However, fully-convolutional networks that most current solutions rely on fail to capture rich global contexts from the panorama. To address this issue and also the distortion of equirectangular projection in the panorama, we propose Cubemap Vision Transformers (CViT), a new transformer-based architecture that can model long-range dependencies and extract distortion-free global features from the panorama. We show that cubemap vision transformers have a global receptive field at every stage and can provide globally coherent predictions for spherical signals. To preserve important local features, we further design a convolution-based branch in our pipeline (dubbed GLPanoDepth) and fuse global features from cubemap vision transformers at multiple scales. This global-to-local strategy allows us to fully exploit useful global and local features in the panorama, achieving state-of-the-art performance in panoramic depth estimation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的方法，用于从单目全向图像预测场景的密集深度值。全向图像具有完整的视野，比透视图像提供更完整的场景描述。然而，当前大多数解决方案所依赖的全卷积网络无法从全景图中捕获丰富的全局背景。为了解决这个问题以及全景图中等距柱状投影的失真问题，我们提出了 Cubemap Vision Transformers (CViT)，这是一种基于变压器的新架构，可以对长程依赖性进行建模并从全景图中提取无失真的全局特征。我们证明立方体贴图视觉变换器在每个阶段都具有全局感受野，并且可以为球形信号提供全局相干的预测。为了保留重要的局部特征，我们在管道中进一步设计了一个基于卷积的分支（称为 GLPanoDepth），并融合了多个尺度的立方体贴图视觉变换器的全局特征。这种全局到局部的策略使我们能够充分利用全景图中有用的全局和局部特征，在全景深度估计中实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的单目全景图像密集深度预测方法GLPanoDepth，解决全景图像全局上下文建模和投影失真问题。
AI.motivation: 现有全卷积网络难以捕捉全景图的全局上下文且等距投影存在失真，导致全景深度估计效果受限。
AI.method: 设计Cubemap Vision Transformers（CViT）建模长距离依赖并提取无失真全局特征，结合卷积分支构建全局-局部融合策略。
AI.result: 在全景深度估计任务中达到SOTA性能，在多个数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过全局到局部特征融合策略，有效结合全景图像的全局语义与局部细节信息，显著提升深度估计精度。

authors_text: Sakif Hossain,Fatema T. Johora,Jörg P. Müller,Sven Hartmann,Andreas Reinhardt
title: SFMGNet: A Physics-based Neural Network To Predict Pedestrian Trajectories
title_zh: SFMGNet：基于物理的神经网络来预测行人轨迹
comment: 16 pages, 6 figures, AAAI-MAKE 2022: Machine Learning and Knowledge Engineering for Hybrid Intelligence
comments: 16 pages, 6 figures, AAAI-MAKE 2022: Machine Learning and Knowledge Engineering for Hybrid Intelligence
abstract: Autonomous robots and vehicles are expected to soon become an integral part of our environment. Unsatisfactory issues regarding interaction with existing road users, performance in mixed-traffic areas and lack of interpretable behavior remain key obstacles. To address these, we present a physics-based neural network, based on a hybrid approach combining a social force model extended by group force (SFMG) with Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) to predict pedestrian trajectories considering its interaction with static obstacles, other pedestrians and pedestrian groups. We quantitatively and qualitatively evaluate the model with respect to realistic prediction, prediction performance and prediction "interpretability". Initial results suggest, the model even when solely trained on a synthetic dataset, can predict realistic and interpretable trajectories with better than state-of-the-art accuracy.
summary: Autonomous robots and vehicles are expected to soon become an integral part of our environment. Unsatisfactory issues regarding interaction with existing road users, performance in mixed-traffic areas and lack of interpretable behavior remain key obstacles. To address these, we present a physics-based neural network, based on a hybrid approach combining a social force model extended by group force (SFMG) with Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) to predict pedestrian trajectories considering its interaction with static obstacles, other pedestrians and pedestrian groups. We quantitatively and qualitatively evaluate the model with respect to realistic prediction, prediction performance and prediction "interpretability". Initial results suggest, the model even when solely trained on a synthetic dataset, can predict realistic and interpretable trajectories with better than state-of-the-art accuracy.
abstract_zh: 自主机器人和车辆预计将很快成为我们环境中不可或缺的一部分。与现有道路使用者的互动、混合交通区域的表现以及缺乏可解释的行为等问题仍令人不满意，仍然是主要障碍。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于物理的神经网络，该网络基于一种混合方法，将群体力扩展的社会力模型（SFMG）与多层感知器（MLP）相结合，以预测行人轨迹，考虑其与静态障碍物、其他行人和行人群体的相互作用。我们从现实预测、预测性能和预测“可解释性”方面定量和定性评估模型。初步结果表明，即使该模型仅在合成数据集上进行训练，也可以以优于最先进的精度来预测现实且可解释的轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物理的神经网络SFMGNet，用于预测行人轨迹，考虑其与静态障碍物、其他行人及群体的交互。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶机器人和车辆在与现有道路使用者互动、混合交通环境表现及行为可解释性方面存在关键问题。
AI.method: 结合扩展的社会力模型（SFMG）与多层感知机（MLP），构建混合模型预测行人轨迹并模拟多因素交互。
AI.result: 模型仅用合成数据集训练即可预测出真实且可解释的轨迹，准确率优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该物理驱动的神经网络方法有效提升了行人轨迹预测的准确性与可解释性，为自动驾驶提供支持。

search_text: SFMGNet: A Physics-based Neural Network To Predict Pedestrian Trajectories SFMGNet：基于物理的神经网络来预测行人轨迹 Autonomous robots and vehicles are expected to soon become an integral part of our environment. Unsatisfactory issues regarding interaction with existing road users, performance in mixed-traffic areas and lack of interpretable behavior remain key obstacles. To address these, we present a physics-based neural network, based on a hybrid approach combining a social force model extended by group force (SFMG) with Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) to predict pedestrian trajectories considering its interaction with static obstacles, other pedestrians and pedestrian groups. We quantitatively and qualitatively evaluate the model with respect to realistic prediction, prediction performance and prediction "interpretability". Initial results suggest, the model even when solely trained on a synthetic dataset, can predict realistic and interpretable trajectories with better than state-of-the-art accuracy. 自主机器人和车辆预计将很快成为我们环境中不可或缺的一部分。与现有道路使用者的互动、混合交通区域的表现以及缺乏可解释的行为等问题仍令人不满意，仍然是主要障碍。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于物理的神经网络，该网络基于一种混合方法，将群体力扩展的社会力模型（SFMG）与多层感知器（MLP）相结合，以预测行人轨迹，考虑其与静态障碍物、其他行人和行人群体的相互作用。我们从现实预测、预测性能和预测“可解释性”方面定量和定性评估模型。初步结果表明，即使该模型仅在合成数据集上进行训练，也可以以优于最先进的精度来预测现实且可解释的轨迹。 本文提出一种基于物理的神经网络SFMGNet，用于预测行人轨迹，考虑其与静态障碍物、其他行人及群体的交互。 Sakif Hossain,Fatema T. Johora,Jörg P. Müller,Sven Hartmann,Andreas Reinhardt cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Fabio Ferreira,Thomas Nierhoff,Andreas Saelinger,Frank Hutter
title: Learning Synthetic Environments and Reward Networks for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习的学习合成环境和奖励网络
abstract: We introduce Synthetic Environments (SEs) and Reward Networks (RNs), represented by neural networks, as proxy environment models for training Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents. We show that an agent, after being trained exclusively on the SE, is able to solve the corresponding real environment. While an SE acts as a full proxy to a real environment by learning about its state dynamics and rewards, an RN is a partial proxy that learns to augment or replace rewards. We use bi-level optimization to evolve SEs and RNs: the inner loop trains the RL agent, and the outer loop trains the parameters of the SE / RN via an evolution strategy. We evaluate our proposed new concept on a broad range of RL algorithms and classic control environments. In a one-to-one comparison, learning an SE proxy requires more interactions with the real environment than training agents only on the real environment. However, once such an SE has been learned, we do not need any interactions with the real environment to train new agents. Moreover, the learned SE proxies allow us to train agents with fewer interactions while maintaining the original task performance. Our empirical results suggest that SEs achieve this result by learning informed representations that bias the agents towards relevant states. Moreover, we find that these proxies are robust against hyperparameter variation and can also transfer to unseen agents.
summary: We introduce Synthetic Environments (SEs) and Reward Networks (RNs), represented by neural networks, as proxy environment models for training Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents. We show that an agent, after being trained exclusively on the SE, is able to solve the corresponding real environment. While an SE acts as a full proxy to a real environment by learning about its state dynamics and rewards, an RN is a partial proxy that learns to augment or replace rewards. We use bi-level optimization to evolve SEs and RNs: the inner loop trains the RL agent, and the outer loop trains the parameters of the SE / RN via an evolution strategy. We evaluate our proposed new concept on a broad range of RL algorithms and classic control environments. In a one-to-one comparison, learning an SE proxy requires more interactions with the real environment than training agents only on the real environment. However, once such an SE has been learned, we do not need any interactions with the real environment to train new agents. Moreover, the learned SE proxies allow us to train agents with fewer interactions while maintaining the original task performance. Our empirical results suggest that SEs achieve this result by learning informed representations that bias the agents towards relevant states. Moreover, we find that these proxies are robust against hyperparameter variation and can also transfer to unseen agents.
abstract_zh: 我们引入以神经网络为代表的合成环境（SE）和奖励网络（RN）作为训练强化学习（RL）智能体的代理环境模型。我们证明，在经过 SE 专门训练后，智能体能够解决相应的真实环境。 SE 通过了解真实环境的状态动态和奖励来充当真实环境的完全代理，而 RN 是学习增强或替换奖励的部分代理。我们使用双层优化来进化 SE 和 RN：内循环训练 RL 代理，外循环通过进化策略训练 SE / RN 的参数。我们在广泛的 RL 算法和经典控制环境中评估了我们提出的新概念。在一对一的比较中，学习 SE 代理需要与真实环境进行更多的交互，而不是仅在真实环境中训练代理。然而，一旦学习了这样的SE，我们就不需要与真实环境进行任何交互来训练新的智能体。此外，学习到的 SE 代理使我们能够以更少的交互来训练代理，同时保持原始的任务性能。我们的实证结果表明，SE 通过学习使智能体偏向相关状态的知情表征来实现这一结果。此外，我们发现这些代理对于超参数变化具有鲁棒性，并且还可以转移到看不见的代理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出合成环境（SE）和奖励网络（RN）作为强化学习代理的代理环境模型，通过减少与真实环境的交互来训练智能体。
AI.motivation: 真实环境交互成本高且受限，需开发高效代理模型以降低训练成本并提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用双层优化框架：内层训练强化学习代理，外层通过进化策略优化SE/RN参数，结合多种RL算法与经典控制环境进行验证。
AI.result: SE需初始真实环境交互，但后续训练无需真实环境；代理模型能减少交互次数并保持性能，且对超参数变化鲁棒并可迁移至新代理。
AI.conclusion: SE和RN作为高效代理模型，显著降低训练成本，具备鲁棒性和迁移性，为强化学习提供新范式。

authors_text: Nurit Spingarn Eliezer,Ron Banner,Elad Hoffer,Hilla Ben-Yaakov,Tomer Michaeli
title: Energy awareness in low precision neural networks
title_zh: 低精度神经网络中的能量感知
abstract: Power consumption is a major obstacle in the deployment of deep neural networks (DNNs) on end devices. Existing approaches for reducing power consumption rely on quite general principles, including avoidance of multiplication operations and aggressive quantization of weights and activations. However, these methods do not take into account the precise power consumed by each module in the network, and are therefore not optimal. In this paper we develop accurate power consumption models for all arithmetic operations in the DNN, under various working conditions. We reveal several important factors that have been overlooked to date. Based on our analysis, we present PANN (power-aware neural network), a simple approach for approximating any full-precision network by a low-power fixed-precision variant. Our method can be applied to a pre-trained network, and can also be used during training to achieve improved performance. In contrast to previous methods, PANN incurs only a minor degradation in accuracy w.r.t. the full-precision version of the network, even when working at the power-budget of a 2-bit quantized variant. In addition, our scheme enables to seamlessly traverse the power-accuracy trade-off at deployment time, which is a major advantage over existing quantization methods that are constrained to specific bit widths.
summary: Power consumption is a major obstacle in the deployment of deep neural networks (DNNs) on end devices. Existing approaches for reducing power consumption rely on quite general principles, including avoidance of multiplication operations and aggressive quantization of weights and activations. However, these methods do not take into account the precise power consumed by each module in the network, and are therefore not optimal. In this paper we develop accurate power consumption models for all arithmetic operations in the DNN, under various working conditions. We reveal several important factors that have been overlooked to date. Based on our analysis, we present PANN (power-aware neural network), a simple approach for approximating any full-precision network by a low-power fixed-precision variant. Our method can be applied to a pre-trained network, and can also be used during training to achieve improved performance. In contrast to previous methods, PANN incurs only a minor degradation in accuracy w.r.t. the full-precision version of the network, even when working at the power-budget of a 2-bit quantized variant. In addition, our scheme enables to seamlessly traverse the power-accuracy trade-off at deployment time, which is a major advantage over existing quantization methods that are constrained to specific bit widths.
abstract_zh: 功耗是在终端设备上部署深度神经网络（DNN）的主要障碍。现有的降低功耗的方法依赖于相当普遍的原则，包括避免乘法运算以及权重和激活的积极量化。然而，这些方法没有考虑网络中每个模块消耗的精确功率，因此不是最优的。在本文中，我们为 DNN 中的所有算术运算在各种工作条件下开发了准确的功耗模型。我们揭示了迄今为止被忽视的几个重要因素。根据我们的分析，我们提出了 PANN（功耗感知神经网络），这是一种通过低功耗固定精度变体逼近任何全精度网络的简单方法。我们的方法可以应用于预训练的网络，也可以在训练过程中使用以提高性能。与以前的方法相比，PANN 的准确性仅略有下降。即使在 2 位量化变体的功耗预算下工作，网络的全精度版本也是如此。此外，我们的方案能够在部署时无缝地遍历功率精度权衡，这相对于受限于特定位宽的现有量化方法来说是一个主要优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PANN的低精度神经网络方法，通过精确建模各模块功耗以实现能效优化。
AI.motivation: 现有低功耗神经网络方法未考虑各模块实际功耗差异，导致能效优化不足且精度损失较大。
AI.method: 建立深度神经网络各算术操作的精确功耗模型，提出PANN方法在预训练或训练阶段生成固定精度低功耗网络变体。
AI.result: 相比2位量化版本仅产生轻微精度损失，且可灵活调整部署时的功耗-精度权衡。
AI.conclusion: PANN通过精确功耗建模实现了比传统量化方法更优的能效比和部署灵活性。

authors_text: Somi Jeong,Jiyoung Lee,Kwanghoon Sohn
title: Multi-domain Unsupervised Image-to-Image Translation with Appearance Adaptive Convolution
title_zh: 具有外观自适应卷积的多域无监督图像到图像转换
abstract: Over the past few years, image-to-image (I2I) translation methods have been proposed to translate a given image into diverse outputs. Despite the impressive results, they mainly focus on the I2I translation between two domains, so the multi-domain I2I translation still remains a challenge. To address this problem, we propose a novel multi-domain unsupervised image-to-image translation (MDUIT) framework that leverages the decomposed content feature and appearance adaptive convolution to translate an image into a target appearance while preserving the given geometric content. We also exploit a contrast learning objective, which improves the disentanglement ability and effectively utilizes multi-domain image data in the training process by pairing the semantically similar images. This allows our method to learn the diverse mappings between multiple visual domains with only a single framework. We show that the proposed method produces visually diverse and plausible results in multiple domains compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Over the past few years, image-to-image (I2I) translation methods have been proposed to translate a given image into diverse outputs. Despite the impressive results, they mainly focus on the I2I translation between two domains, so the multi-domain I2I translation still remains a challenge. To address this problem, we propose a novel multi-domain unsupervised image-to-image translation (MDUIT) framework that leverages the decomposed content feature and appearance adaptive convolution to translate an image into a target appearance while preserving the given geometric content. We also exploit a contrast learning objective, which improves the disentanglement ability and effectively utilizes multi-domain image data in the training process by pairing the semantically similar images. This allows our method to learn the diverse mappings between multiple visual domains with only a single framework. We show that the proposed method produces visually diverse and plausible results in multiple domains compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，图像到图像（I2I）的转换方法被提出来将给定的图像转换为不同的输出。尽管取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但他们主要关注两个域之间的 I2I 翻译，因此多域 I2I 翻译仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多域无监督图像到图像转换（MDUIT）框架，该框架利用分解的内容特征和外观自适应卷积将图像转换为目标外观，同时保留给定的几何内容。我们还利用对比学习目标，通过配对语义相似的图像，提高解缠能力并在训练过程中有效利用多域图像数据。这使得我们的方法能够仅使用单个框架来学习多个视觉域之间的不同映射。我们表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法在多个领域产生了视觉上多样化且合理的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多领域无监督图像到图像翻译框架（MDUIT），通过分解内容特征和外观自适应卷积，在保持几何内容的同时生成目标领域的外观。
AI.motivation: 现有图像翻译方法主要针对两个领域，难以处理多领域场景且依赖成对数据，而实际应用中多领域无监督翻译需求未被充分满足。
AI.method: 设计分解内容特征提取模块与外观自适应卷积网络，结合对比学习目标，通过语义相似图像配对实现多领域映射学习。
AI.result: 在多个领域测试中，该方法生成的图像在视觉多样性与合理性方面优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的MDUIT框架通过单一体系结构有效解决了多领域无监督图像翻译问题，提升了跨领域映射能力。

search_text: Multi-domain Unsupervised Image-to-Image Translation with Appearance Adaptive Convolution 具有外观自适应卷积的多域无监督图像到图像转换 Over the past few years, image-to-image (I2I) translation methods have been proposed to translate a given image into diverse outputs. Despite the impressive results, they mainly focus on the I2I translation between two domains, so the multi-domain I2I translation still remains a challenge. To address this problem, we propose a novel multi-domain unsupervised image-to-image translation (MDUIT) framework that leverages the decomposed content feature and appearance adaptive convolution to translate an image into a target appearance while preserving the given geometric content. We also exploit a contrast learning objective, which improves the disentanglement ability and effectively utilizes multi-domain image data in the training process by pairing the semantically similar images. This allows our method to learn the diverse mappings between multiple visual domains with only a single framework. We show that the proposed method produces visually diverse and plausible results in multiple domains compared to the state-of-the-art methods. 在过去的几年里，图像到图像（I2I）的转换方法被提出来将给定的图像转换为不同的输出。尽管取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但他们主要关注两个域之间的 I2I 翻译，因此多域 I2I 翻译仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多域无监督图像到图像转换（MDUIT）框架，该框架利用分解的内容特征和外观自适应卷积将图像转换为目标外观，同时保留给定的几何内容。我们还利用对比学习目标，通过配对语义相似的图像，提高解缠能力并在训练过程中有效利用多域图像数据。这使得我们的方法能够仅使用单个框架来学习多个视觉域之间的不同映射。我们表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法在多个领域产生了视觉上多样化且合理的结果。 本文提出了一种多领域无监督图像到图像翻译框架（MDUIT），通过分解内容特征和外观自适应卷积，在保持几何内容的同时生成目标领域的外观。 Somi Jeong,Jiyoung Lee,Kwanghoon Sohn cs.CV

authors_text: Dongyoon Han,YoungJoon Yoo,Beomyoung Kim,Byeongho Heo
title: Learning Features with Parameter-Free Layers
title_zh: 使用无参数层学习特征
abstract: Trainable layers such as convolutional building blocks are the standard network design choices by learning parameters to capture the global context through successive spatial operations. When designing an efficient network, trainable layers such as the depthwise convolution is the source of efficiency in the number of parameters and FLOPs, but there was little improvement to the model speed in practice. This paper argues that simple built-in parameter-free operations can be a favorable alternative to the efficient trainable layers replacing spatial operations in a network architecture. We aim to break the stereotype of organizing the spatial operations of building blocks into trainable layers. Extensive experimental analyses based on layer-level studies with fully-trained models and neural architecture searches are provided to investigate whether parameter-free operations such as the max-pool are functional. The studies eventually give us a simple yet effective idea for redesigning network architectures, where the parameter-free operations are heavily used as the main building block without sacrificing the model accuracy as much. Experimental results on the ImageNet dataset demonstrate that the network architectures with parameter-free operations could enjoy the advantages of further efficiency in terms of model speed, the number of the parameters, and FLOPs. Code and ImageNet pretrained models are available at https://github.com/naver-ai/PfLayer.
summary: Trainable layers such as convolutional building blocks are the standard network design choices by learning parameters to capture the global context through successive spatial operations. When designing an efficient network, trainable layers such as the depthwise convolution is the source of efficiency in the number of parameters and FLOPs, but there was little improvement to the model speed in practice. This paper argues that simple built-in parameter-free operations can be a favorable alternative to the efficient trainable layers replacing spatial operations in a network architecture. We aim to break the stereotype of organizing the spatial operations of building blocks into trainable layers. Extensive experimental analyses based on layer-level studies with fully-trained models and neural architecture searches are provided to investigate whether parameter-free operations such as the max-pool are functional. The studies eventually give us a simple yet effective idea for redesigning network architectures, where the parameter-free operations are heavily used as the main building block without sacrificing the model accuracy as much. Experimental results on the ImageNet dataset demonstrate that the network architectures with parameter-free operations could enjoy the advantages of further efficiency in terms of model speed, the number of the parameters, and FLOPs. Code and ImageNet pretrained models are available at https://github.com/naver-ai/PfLayer.
abstract_zh: 可训练层（例如卷积构建块）是标准网络设计选择，通过学习参数通过连续的空间操作捕获全局上下文。在设计高效网络时，深度卷积等可训练层是参数数量和FLOPs效率的源泉，但在实践中对模型速度的提升甚微。本文认为，简单的内置无参数操作可以成为替代网络架构中空间操作的高效可训练层的有利替代方案。我们的目标是打破将构建块的空间操作组织成可训练层的刻板印象。提供了基于经过充分训练的模型和神经架构搜索的层级研究的广泛实验分析，以研究诸如最大池之类的无参数操作是否有效。这些研究最终为我们提供了一个简单而有效的重新设计网络架构的想法，其中无参数操作被大量用作主要构建块，而不会过多牺牲模型精度。 ImageNet 数据集上的实验结果表明，具有无参数操作的网络架构可以在模型速度、参数数量和 FLOP 方面享有进一步效率的优势。代码和 ImageNet 预训练模型可在 https://github.com/naver-ai/PfLayer 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用无参数操作（如最大池化）作为主要构建块的网络架构设计方法，以提高模型效率。
AI.motivation: 传统的可训练层（如深度卷积）虽然在参数数量和FLOPs上高效，但在实际应用中对模型速度的提升有限，因此需要寻找替代方案。
AI.method: 本文通过层级研究和神经架构搜索，验证了无参数操作在模型中的有效性，并将其作为主要构建块用于重新设计网络架构。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上的实验表明，使用无参数操作的网络架构在模型速度、参数数量和FLOPs方面具有更高的效率，同时保持了较高的模型精度。
AI.conclusion: 无参数操作可以作为高效网络架构设计的可行替代方案，有助于提升模型效率而不显著牺牲准确性。

authors_text: David Leslie,Christopher Burr,Mhairi Aitken,Michael Katell,Morgan Briggs,Cami Rincon
title: Human rights, democracy, and the rule of law assurance framework for AI systems: A proposal
title_zh: 人工智能系统的人权、民主和法治保障框架：提案
abstract: Following on from the publication of its Feasibility Study in December 2020, the Council of Europe's Ad Hoc Committee on Artificial Intelligence (CAHAI) and its subgroups initiated efforts to formulate and draft its Possible Elements of a Legal Framework on Artificial Intelligence, based on the Council of Europe's standards on human rights, democracy, and the rule of law. This document was ultimately adopted by the CAHAI plenary in December 2021. To support this effort, The Alan Turing Institute undertook a programme of research that explored the governance processes and practical tools needed to operationalise the integration of human right due diligence with the assurance of trustworthy AI innovation practices. The resulting framework was completed and submitted to the Council of Europe in September 2021. It presents an end-to-end approach to the assurance of AI project lifecycles that integrates context-based risk analysis and appropriate stakeholder engagement with comprehensive impact assessment, and transparent risk management, impact mitigation, and innovation assurance practices. Taken together, these interlocking processes constitute a Human Rights, Democracy and the Rule of Law Assurance Framework (HUDERAF). The HUDERAF combines the procedural requirements for principles-based human rights due diligence with the governance mechanisms needed to set up technical and socio-technical guardrails for responsible and trustworthy AI innovation practices. Its purpose is to provide an accessible and user-friendly set of mechanisms for facilitating compliance with a binding legal framework on artificial intelligence, based on the Council of Europe's standards on human rights, democracy, and the rule of law, and to ensure that AI innovation projects are carried out with appropriate levels of public accountability, transparency, and democratic governance.
summary: Following on from the publication of its Feasibility Study in December 2020, the Council of Europe's Ad Hoc Committee on Artificial Intelligence (CAHAI) and its subgroups initiated efforts to formulate and draft its Possible Elements of a Legal Framework on Artificial Intelligence, based on the Council of Europe's standards on human rights, democracy, and the rule of law. This document was ultimately adopted by the CAHAI plenary in December 2021. To support this effort, The Alan Turing Institute undertook a programme of research that explored the governance processes and practical tools needed to operationalise the integration of human right due diligence with the assurance of trustworthy AI innovation practices. The resulting framework was completed and submitted to the Council of Europe in September 2021. It presents an end-to-end approach to the assurance of AI project lifecycles that integrates context-based risk analysis and appropriate stakeholder engagement with comprehensive impact assessment, and transparent risk management, impact mitigation, and innovation assurance practices. Taken together, these interlocking processes constitute a Human Rights, Democracy and the Rule of Law Assurance Framework (HUDERAF). The HUDERAF combines the procedural requirements for principles-based human rights due diligence with the governance mechanisms needed to set up technical and socio-technical guardrails for responsible and trustworthy AI innovation practices. Its purpose is to provide an accessible and user-friendly set of mechanisms for facilitating compliance with a binding legal framework on artificial intelligence, based on the Council of Europe's standards on human rights, democracy, and the rule of law, and to ensure that AI innovation projects are carried out with appropriate levels of public accountability, transparency, and democratic governance.
abstract_zh: 继 2020 年 12 月发布可行性研究报告后，欧洲委员会人工智能特设委员会 (CAHAI) 及其小组开始根据欧洲委员会关于人权、民主和法治的标准，制定和起草人工智能法律框架的可能要素。该文件最终于 2021 年 12 月在 CAHAI 全体会议上通过。为了支持这一努力，艾伦图灵研究所开展了一项研究计划，探索将人权尽职调查与可信赖的人工智能创新实践相结合所需的治理流程和实用工具。由此产生的框架已完成并于 2021 年 9 月提交给欧洲委员会。它提出了一种确保人工智能项目生命周期的端到端方法，该方法将基于背景的风险分析和适当的利益相关者参与与全面的影响评估、透明的风险管理、影响缓解和创新保证实践相结合。总而言之，这些相互关联的进程构成了人权、民主和法治保障框架（HUDERAF）。 HUDERAF 将基于原则的人权尽职调查的程序要求与为负责任和值得信赖的人工智能创新实践建立技术和社会技术护栏所需的治理机制结合起来。其目的是基于欧洲委员会关于人权、民主和法治的标准，提供一套易于使用且用户友好的机制，以促进遵守具有约束力的人工智能法律框架，并确保人工智能创新项目在适当水平的公共问责、透明度和民主治理下进行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合人权、民主和法治原则的AI系统保障框架（HUDERAF），以确保AI创新符合欧洲委员会的标准。
AI.motivation: 现有AI治理机制缺乏对人权、民主和法治原则的系统性整合，需建立可操作的法律框架以保障AI项目的公共问责与透明度。
AI.method: 通过研究治理流程与工具，将基于原则的人权尽职调查与可信AI实践结合，构建涵盖风险分析、利益相关方参与及影响评估的端到端框架。
AI.result: 完成HUDERAF框架并提交欧洲委员会，提供符合其标准的AI项目全生命周期保障机制。
AI.conclusion: HUDERAF为AI创新提供了可操作的合规工具，确保其在法治与民主原则下实现负责任的发展。
