search_text: Human rights, democracy, and the rule of law assurance framework for AI systems: A proposal 人工智能系统的人权、民主和法治保障框架：提案 Following on from the publication of its Feasibility Study in December 2020, the Council of Europe's Ad Hoc Committee on Artificial Intelligence (CAHAI) and its subgroups initiated efforts to formulate and draft its Possible Elements of a Legal Framework on Artificial Intelligence, based on the Council of Europe's standards on human rights, democracy, and the rule of law. This document was ultimately adopted by the CAHAI plenary in December 2021. To support this effort, The Alan Turing Institute undertook a programme of research that explored the governance processes and practical tools needed to operationalise the integration of human right due diligence with the assurance of trustworthy AI innovation practices. The resulting framework was completed and submitted to the Council of Europe in September 2021. It presents an end-to-end approach to the assurance of AI project lifecycles that integrates context-based risk analysis and appropriate stakeholder engagement with comprehensive impact assessment, and transparent risk management, impact mitigation, and innovation assurance practices. Taken together, these interlocking processes constitute a Human Rights, Democracy and the Rule of Law Assurance Framework (HUDERAF). The HUDERAF combines the procedural requirements for principles-based human rights due diligence with the governance mechanisms needed to set up technical and socio-technical guardrails for responsible and trustworthy AI innovation practices. Its purpose is to provide an accessible and user-friendly set of mechanisms for facilitating compliance with a binding legal framework on artificial intelligence, based on the Council of Europe's standards on human rights, democracy, and the rule of law, and to ensure that AI innovation projects are carried out with appropriate levels of public accountability, transparency, and democratic governance. 继 2020 年 12 月发布可行性研究报告后，欧洲委员会人工智能特设委员会 (CAHAI) 及其小组开始根据欧洲委员会关于人权、民主和法治的标准，制定和起草人工智能法律框架的可能要素。该文件最终于 2021 年 12 月在 CAHAI 全体会议上通过。为了支持这一努力，艾伦图灵研究所开展了一项研究计划，探索将人权尽职调查与可信赖的人工智能创新实践相结合所需的治理流程和实用工具。由此产生的框架已完成并于 2021 年 9 月提交给欧洲委员会。它提出了一种确保人工智能项目生命周期的端到端方法，该方法将基于背景的风险分析和适当的利益相关者参与与全面的影响评估、透明的风险管理、影响缓解和创新保证实践相结合。总而言之，这些相互关联的进程构成了人权、民主和法治保障框架（HUDERAF）。 HUDERAF 将基于原则的人权尽职调查的程序要求与为负责任和值得信赖的人工智能创新实践建立技术和社会技术护栏所需的治理机制结合起来。其目的是基于欧洲委员会关于人权、民主和法治的标准，提供一套易于使用且用户友好的机制，以促进遵守具有约束力的人工智能法律框架，并确保人工智能创新项目在适当水平的公共问责、透明度和民主治理下进行。 本文提出了一种结合人权、民主和法治原则的AI系统保障框架（HUDERAF），以确保AI创新符合欧洲委员会的标准。 David Leslie,Christopher Burr,Mhairi Aitken,Michael Katell,Morgan Briggs,Cami Rincon cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Komal Mariam,Osama Mohammed Afzal,Wajahat Hussain,Muhammad Umar Javed,Amber Kiyani,Nasir Rajpoot,Syed Ali Khurram,Hassan Aqeel Khan
title: On Smart Gaze based Annotation of Histopathology Images for Training of Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于智能凝视的组织病理学图像注释用于深度卷积神经网络训练
abstract: Unavailability of large training datasets is a bottleneck that needs to be overcome to realize the true potential of deep learning in histopathology applications. Although slide digitization via whole slide imaging scanners has increased the speed of data acquisition, labeling of virtual slides requires a substantial time investment from pathologists. Eye gaze annotations have the potential to speed up the slide labeling process. This work explores the viability and timing comparisons of eye gaze labeling compared to conventional manual labeling for training object detectors. Challenges associated with gaze based labeling and methods to refine the coarse data annotations for subsequent object detection are also discussed. Results demonstrate that gaze tracking based labeling can save valuable pathologist time and delivers good performance when employed for training a deep object detector. Using the task of localization of Keratin Pearls in cases of oral squamous cell carcinoma as a test case, we compare the performance gap between deep object detectors trained using hand-labelled and gaze-labelled data. On average, compared to `Bounding-box' based hand-labeling, gaze-labeling required $57.6\%$ less time per label and compared to `Freehand' labeling, gaze-labeling required on average $85\%$ less time per label.
summary: Unavailability of large training datasets is a bottleneck that needs to be overcome to realize the true potential of deep learning in histopathology applications. Although slide digitization via whole slide imaging scanners has increased the speed of data acquisition, labeling of virtual slides requires a substantial time investment from pathologists. Eye gaze annotations have the potential to speed up the slide labeling process. This work explores the viability and timing comparisons of eye gaze labeling compared to conventional manual labeling for training object detectors. Challenges associated with gaze based labeling and methods to refine the coarse data annotations for subsequent object detection are also discussed. Results demonstrate that gaze tracking based labeling can save valuable pathologist time and delivers good performance when employed for training a deep object detector. Using the task of localization of Keratin Pearls in cases of oral squamous cell carcinoma as a test case, we compare the performance gap between deep object detectors trained using hand-labelled and gaze-labelled data. On average, compared to `Bounding-box' based hand-labeling, gaze-labeling required $57.6\%$ less time per label and compared to `Freehand' labeling, gaze-labeling required on average $85\%$ less time per label.
abstract_zh: 大型训练数据集的不可用是一个需要克服的瓶颈，以实现深度学习在组织病理学应用中的真正潜力。尽管通过整个载玻片成像扫描仪进行的载玻片数字化提高了数据采集的速度，但虚拟载玻片的标记需要病理学家投入大量时间。眼睛注视注释有可能加快载玻片标记过程。这项工作探讨了眼睛注视标记与训练对象检测器的传统手动标记的可行性和时间比较。还讨论了与基于注视的标记相关的挑战以及为后续对象检测细化粗略数据注释的方法。结果表明，基于注视跟踪的标记可以节省病理学家宝贵的时间，并在用于训练深度物体检测器时提供良好的性能。使用口腔鳞状细胞癌病例中的角蛋白珍珠定位任务作为测试用例，我们比较了使用手工标记和凝视标记数据训练的深层物体检测器之间的性能差距。平均而言，与基于“边界框”的手工标记相比，凝视标记每个标签所需的时间平均减少 $57.6\%$，而与“徒手”标记相比，凝视标记每个标签所需的时间平均减少 $85\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨基于眼动追踪的智能标注方法在组织病理学图像训练深度卷积神经网络中的应用。
AI.motivation: 组织病理学领域缺乏大规模标注数据集，且传统人工标注耗时耗力，需寻找更高效的标注方式。
AI.method: 通过对比眼动标注与传统人工标注的效率，分析眼动数据在目标检测中的可行性，并提出粗标注优化方法。
AI.result: 眼动标注相比手工标注（ bounding-box ）节省57.6%时间，相比自由手绘标注节省85%时间，且检测性能良好。
AI.conclusion: 眼动追踪标注能显著提升病理图像标注效率，适用于训练深度学习模型。

authors_text: Martina Mammarella,Cesare Donati,Takumi Shimizu,Masaya Suenaga,Lorenzo Comba,Alessandro Biglia,Kuniaki Uto,Takeshi Hatanaka,Paolo Gay,Fabrizio Dabbene
title: 3D Map Reconstruction of an Orchard using an Angle-Aware Covering Control Strategy
title_zh: 使用角度感知覆盖控制策略重建果园的 3D 地图
abstract: In the last years, unmanned aerial vehicles are becoming a reality in the context of precision agriculture, mainly for monitoring, patrolling and remote sensing tasks, but also for 3D map reconstruction. In this paper, we present an innovative approach where a fleet of unmanned aerial vehicles is exploited to perform remote sensing tasks over an apple orchard for reconstructing a 3D map of the field, formulating the covering control problem to combine the position of a monitoring target and the viewing angle. Moreover, the objective function of the controller is defined by an importance index, which has been computed from a multi-spectral map of the field, obtained by a preliminary flight, using a semantic interpretation scheme based on a convolutional neural network. This objective function is then updated according to the history of the past coverage states, thus allowing the drones to take situation-adaptive actions. The effectiveness of the proposed covering control strategy has been validated through simulations on a Robot Operating System.
summary: In the last years, unmanned aerial vehicles are becoming a reality in the context of precision agriculture, mainly for monitoring, patrolling and remote sensing tasks, but also for 3D map reconstruction. In this paper, we present an innovative approach where a fleet of unmanned aerial vehicles is exploited to perform remote sensing tasks over an apple orchard for reconstructing a 3D map of the field, formulating the covering control problem to combine the position of a monitoring target and the viewing angle. Moreover, the objective function of the controller is defined by an importance index, which has been computed from a multi-spectral map of the field, obtained by a preliminary flight, using a semantic interpretation scheme based on a convolutional neural network. This objective function is then updated according to the history of the past coverage states, thus allowing the drones to take situation-adaptive actions. The effectiveness of the proposed covering control strategy has been validated through simulations on a Robot Operating System.
abstract_zh: 近年来，无人机在精准农业领域逐渐成为现实，主要用于监测、巡逻和遥感任务，也用于3D地图重建。在本文中，我们提出了一种创新方法，利用无人机机队在苹果园上执行遥感任务，以重建田地的 3D 地图，制定覆盖控制问题以结合监控目标的位置和视角。此外，控制器的目标函数由重要性指数定义，该指数是使用基于卷积神经网络的语义解释方案从初步飞行获得的现场多光谱图计算得出的。然后根据过去覆盖状态的历史更新该目标函数，从而允许无人机采取适应情况的行动。所提出的覆盖控制策略的有效性已通过机器人操作系统的模拟得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于角度感知覆盖控制策略的无人机编队方法，用于果园3D地图重建。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机覆盖方法未充分结合视角角度与目标位置关系，导致3D重建效率与精度不足。
AI.method: 融合视角角度与目标位置的覆盖控制模型，利用CNN解析多光谱地图生成重要性指数，并动态更新目标函数以适应历史覆盖状态。
AI.result: 通过ROS仿真验证，该策略有效提升了果园3D地图重建的覆盖率与适应性。
AI.conclusion: 角度感知控制策略可显著优化无人机在复杂农业场景中的3D重建任务表现。

search_text: 3D Map Reconstruction of an Orchard using an Angle-Aware Covering Control Strategy 使用角度感知覆盖控制策略重建果园的 3D 地图 In the last years, unmanned aerial vehicles are becoming a reality in the context of precision agriculture, mainly for monitoring, patrolling and remote sensing tasks, but also for 3D map reconstruction. In this paper, we present an innovative approach where a fleet of unmanned aerial vehicles is exploited to perform remote sensing tasks over an apple orchard for reconstructing a 3D map of the field, formulating the covering control problem to combine the position of a monitoring target and the viewing angle. Moreover, the objective function of the controller is defined by an importance index, which has been computed from a multi-spectral map of the field, obtained by a preliminary flight, using a semantic interpretation scheme based on a convolutional neural network. This objective function is then updated according to the history of the past coverage states, thus allowing the drones to take situation-adaptive actions. The effectiveness of the proposed covering control strategy has been validated through simulations on a Robot Operating System. 近年来，无人机在精准农业领域逐渐成为现实，主要用于监测、巡逻和遥感任务，也用于3D地图重建。在本文中，我们提出了一种创新方法，利用无人机机队在苹果园上执行遥感任务，以重建田地的 3D 地图，制定覆盖控制问题以结合监控目标的位置和视角。此外，控制器的目标函数由重要性指数定义，该指数是使用基于卷积神经网络的语义解释方案从初步飞行获得的现场多光谱图计算得出的。然后根据过去覆盖状态的历史更新该目标函数，从而允许无人机采取适应情况的行动。所提出的覆盖控制策略的有效性已通过机器人操作系统的模拟得到验证。 本文提出一种基于角度感知覆盖控制策略的无人机编队方法，用于果园3D地图重建。 Martina Mammarella,Cesare Donati,Takumi Shimizu,Masaya Suenaga,Lorenzo Comba,Alessandro Biglia,Kuniaki Uto,Takeshi Hatanaka,Paolo Gay,Fabrizio Dabbene eess.SY,cs.RO

authors_text: Shimaa Ahmed,Yash Wani,Ali Shahin Shamsabadi,Mohammad Yaghini,Ilia Shumailov,Nicolas Papernot,Kassem Fawaz
title: Tubes Among Us: Analog Attack on Automatic Speaker Identification
title_zh: 我们身边的电子管：对自动说话人识别的模拟攻击
abstract: Recent years have seen a surge in the popularity of acoustics-enabled personal devices powered by machine learning. Yet, machine learning has proven to be vulnerable to adversarial examples. A large number of modern systems protect themselves against such attacks by targeting artificiality, i.e., they deploy mechanisms to detect the lack of human involvement in generating the adversarial examples. However, these defenses implicitly assume that humans are incapable of producing meaningful and targeted adversarial examples. In this paper, we show that this base assumption is wrong. In particular, we demonstrate that for tasks like speaker identification, a human is capable of producing analog adversarial examples directly with little cost and supervision: by simply speaking through a tube, an adversary reliably impersonates other speakers in eyes of ML models for speaker identification. Our findings extend to a range of other acoustic-biometric tasks such as liveness detection, bringing into question their use in security-critical settings in real life, such as phone banking.
summary: Recent years have seen a surge in the popularity of acoustics-enabled personal devices powered by machine learning. Yet, machine learning has proven to be vulnerable to adversarial examples. A large number of modern systems protect themselves against such attacks by targeting artificiality, i.e., they deploy mechanisms to detect the lack of human involvement in generating the adversarial examples. However, these defenses implicitly assume that humans are incapable of producing meaningful and targeted adversarial examples. In this paper, we show that this base assumption is wrong. In particular, we demonstrate that for tasks like speaker identification, a human is capable of producing analog adversarial examples directly with little cost and supervision: by simply speaking through a tube, an adversary reliably impersonates other speakers in eyes of ML models for speaker identification. Our findings extend to a range of other acoustic-biometric tasks such as liveness detection, bringing into question their use in security-critical settings in real life, such as phone banking.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由机器学习驱动的声学个人设备越来越受欢迎。然而，事实证明，机器学习很容易受到对抗性例子的影响。许多现代系统通过针对人工来保护自己免受此类攻击，即它们部署机制来检测生成对抗性示例时是否缺乏人类参与。然而，这些防御隐含地假设人类无法产生有意义且有针对性的对抗性示例。在本文中，我们表明这个基本假设是错误的。特别是，我们证明，对于说话人识别等任务，人类能够直接生成模拟对抗性示例，而成本和监督都很少：只需通过管道说话，对手就可以在 ML 模型眼中可靠地模仿其他说话人，以进行说话人识别。我们的研究结果扩展到一系列其他声学生物识别任务，例如活体检测，使人们对它们在现实生活中的安全关键环境（例如电话银行）中的使用产生疑问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过模拟攻击自动说话人识别系统的低成本方法，证明人类无需复杂设备即可生成有效对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 现有防御机制假设人类无法生成有效对抗样本，但实际中人类可能通过简单手段实现攻击，威胁安全应用。
AI.method: 通过让人类通过管子发声，改变声学特征，直接生成针对说话人识别系统的对抗样本。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效欺骗ML模型，成功模仿其他说话人，且适用于多种声学生物识别任务。
AI.conclusion: 该研究挑战了现有防御机制的有效性，指出基于声学生物识别的系统在实际安全应用中存在潜在风险。

authors_text: Nuwan Janaka,Xinke Wu,Shan Zhang,Shengdong Zhao,Petr Slovak
title: Visual Behaviors and Mobile Information Acquisition
title_zh: 视觉行为与移动信息获取
abstract: It is common for people to engage in information acquisition tasks while on the move. To understand how users' visual behaviors influence microlearning, a form of mobile information acquisition, we conducted a shadowing study with 8 participants and identified three common visual behaviors: 'glance', 'inspect', and 'drift'. We found that 'drift' best supports mobile information acquisition. We also identified four user-related factors that can influence the utilization of mobile information acquisition opportunities: situational awareness, switching costs, ongoing cognitive processes, and awareness of opportunities. We further examined how these user-related factors interplay with device-related factors through a technology probe with 20 participants using mobile phones and optical head-mounted displays (OHMDs). Results indicate that different device platforms significantly influence how mobile information acquisition opportunities are used: OHMDs can better support mobile information acquisition when visual attention is fragmented. OHMDs facilitate shorter visual switch-times between the task and surroundings, which reduces the mental barrier of task transition. Mobile phones, on the other hand, provide a more focused experience in more stable surroundings. Based on these findings, we discuss trade-offs and design implications for supporting information acquisition tasks on the move.
summary: It is common for people to engage in information acquisition tasks while on the move. To understand how users' visual behaviors influence microlearning, a form of mobile information acquisition, we conducted a shadowing study with 8 participants and identified three common visual behaviors: 'glance', 'inspect', and 'drift'. We found that 'drift' best supports mobile information acquisition. We also identified four user-related factors that can influence the utilization of mobile information acquisition opportunities: situational awareness, switching costs, ongoing cognitive processes, and awareness of opportunities. We further examined how these user-related factors interplay with device-related factors through a technology probe with 20 participants using mobile phones and optical head-mounted displays (OHMDs). Results indicate that different device platforms significantly influence how mobile information acquisition opportunities are used: OHMDs can better support mobile information acquisition when visual attention is fragmented. OHMDs facilitate shorter visual switch-times between the task and surroundings, which reduces the mental barrier of task transition. Mobile phones, on the other hand, provide a more focused experience in more stable surroundings. Based on these findings, we discuss trade-offs and design implications for supporting information acquisition tasks on the move.
abstract_zh: 人们在移动中从事信息获取任务是很常见的。为了了解用户的视觉行为如何影响微学习（移动信息获取的一种形式），我们对 8 名参与者进行了一项跟踪研究，并确定了三种常见的视觉行为：“扫视”、“检查”和“漂移”。我们发现“漂移”最支持移动信息获取。我们还确定了四个可能影响移动信息获取机会利用的与用户相关的因素：态势感知、转换成本、持续认知过程和机会意识。我们通过对 20 名使用手机和光学头戴式显示器 (OHMD) 的参与者进行的技术调查，进一步研究了这些用户相关因素如何与设备相关因素相互作用。结果表明，不同的设备平台显着影响移动信息获取机会的使用方式：当视觉注意力分散时，OHMD 可以更好地支持移动信息获取。 OHMD 有助于缩短任务和周围环境之间的视觉切换时间，从而减少任务转换的心理障碍。另一方面，手机可以在更稳定的环境中提供更专注的体验。基于这些发现，我们讨论了支持移动信息获取任务的权衡和设计含义。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究用户在移动场景下的视觉行为及其对移动信息获取的影响，探讨不同设备和用户因素如何影响信息获取效率。
AI.motivation: 人们在移动过程中常进行信息获取，但现有研究缺乏对视觉行为与设备因素如何共同影响移动信息获取的系统分析。
AI.method: 通过8人的影子研究识别三种视觉行为（瞥视、检查、漂移），结合20人的技术探针实验，对比手机与光学头戴显示器（OHMD）在不同场景下的表现。
AI.result: 漂移行为最利于移动信息获取；OHMD在视觉注意力碎片化场景下表现更优，手机则适合稳定环境；用户因素（如情境意识、切换成本）与设备特性存在交互影响。
AI.conclusion: 设计移动信息获取系统需权衡设备特性与用户情境，OHMD适合动态场景，手机适合静态场景，需根据任务需求优化交互设计。

Based on these findings, we discuss trade-offs and design implications for supporting information acquisition tasks on the move. 人们在移动中从事信息获取任务是很常见的。为了了解用户的视觉行为如何影响微学习（移动信息获取的一种形式），我们对 8 名参与者进行了一项跟踪研究，并确定了三种常见的视觉行为：“扫视”、“检查”和“漂移”。我们发现“漂移”最支持移动信息获取。我们还确定了四个可能影响移动信息获取机会利用的与用户相关的因素：态势感知、转换成本、持续认知过程和机会意识。我们通过对 20 名使用手机和光学头戴式显示器 (OHMD) 的参与者进行的技术调查，进一步研究了这些用户相关因素如何与设备相关因素相互作用。结果表明，不同的设备平台显着影响移动信息获取机会的使用方式：当视觉注意力分散时，OHMD 可以更好地支持移动信息获取。 OHMD 有助于缩短任务和周围环境之间的视觉切换时间，从而减少任务转换的心理障碍。另一方面，手机可以在更稳定的环境中提供更专注的体验。基于这些发现，我们讨论了支持移动信息获取任务的权衡和设计含义。 该论文研究用户在移动场景下的视觉行为及其对移动信息获取的影响，探讨不同设备和用户因素如何影响信息获取效率。 Nuwan Janaka,Xinke Wu,Shan Zhang,Shengdong Zhao,Petr Slovak cs.HC

authors_text: Andrea Asperti,Laura Bugo,Daniele Filippini
title: Enhancing variational generation through self-decomposition
title_zh: 通过自分解增强变分生成
comment: :68T07 Artificial neural networks and deep learningACM Class:I.3.3
comments: :68T07 Artificial neural networks and deep learningACM Class:I.3.3
abstract: In this article we introduce the notion of Split Variational Autoencoder (SVAE), whose output $\hat{x}$ is obtained as a weighted sum $σ\odot \hat{x_1} + (1-σ) \odot \hat{x_2}$ of two generated images $\hat{x_1},\hat{x_2}$, and $σ$ is a {\em learned} compositional map. The composing images $\hat{x_1},\hat{x_2}$, as well as the $σ$-map are automatically synthesized by the model. The network is trained as a usual Variational Autoencoder with a negative loglikelihood loss between training and reconstructed images. No additional loss is required for $\hat{x_1},\hat{x_2}$ or $σ$, neither any form of human tuning. The decomposition is nondeterministic, but follows two main schemes, that we may roughly categorize as either \say{syntactic} or \say{semantic}. In the first case, the map tends to exploit the strong correlation between adjacent pixels, splitting the image in two complementary high frequency sub-images. In the second case, the map typically focuses on the contours of objects, splitting the image in interesting variations of its content, with more marked and distinctive features. In this case, according to empirical observations, the Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) of $\hat{x_1}$ and $\hat{x_2}$ is usually lower (hence better) than that of $\hat{x}$, that clearly suffers from being the average of the former. In a sense, a SVAE forces the Variational Autoencoder to make choices, in contrast with its intrinsic tendency to {\em average} between alternatives with the aim to minimize the reconstruction loss towards a specific sample. According to the FID metric, our technique, tested on typical datasets such as Mnist, Cifar10 and CelebA, allows us to outperform all previous purely variational architectures (not relying on normalization flows).

The composing images $\hat{x_1},\hat{x_2}$, as well as the $σ$-map are automatically synthesized by the model. The network is trained as a usual Variational Autoencoder with a negative loglikelihood loss between training and reconstructed images. No additional loss is required for $\hat{x_1},\hat{x_2}$ or $σ$, neither any form of human tuning. The decomposition is nondeterministic, but follows two main schemes, that we may roughly categorize as either \say{syntactic} or \say{semantic}. In the first case, the map tends to exploit the strong correlation between adjacent pixels, splitting the image in two complementary high frequency sub-images. In the second case, the map typically focuses on the contours of objects, splitting the image in interesting variations of its content, with more marked and distinctive features. In this case, according to empirical observations, the Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) of $\hat{x_1}$ and $\hat{x_2}$ is usually lower (hence better) than that of $\hat{x}$, that clearly suffers from being the average of the former. In a sense, a SVAE forces the Variational Autoencoder to make choices, in contrast with its intrinsic tendency to {\em average} between alternatives with the aim to minimize the reconstruction loss towards a specific sample. According to the FID metric, our technique, tested on typical datasets such as Mnist, Cifar10 and CelebA, allows us to outperform all previous purely variational architectures (not relying on normalization flows).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了分割变分自动编码器（SVAE）的概念，其输出 $\hat{x}$ 是作为两个生成图像 $\hat{x_1}、\hat{x_2}$ 的加权和 $σ\odot \hat{x_1} + (1-σ) \odot \hat{x_2}$ 获得的，并且 $σ$ 是一个{\em学习的}合成图。合成图像 $\hat{x_1},\hat{x_2}$ 以及 $σ$-map 是由模型自动合成的。该网络被训练为通常的变分自动编码器，在训练和重建图像之间具有负对数似然损失。 $\hat{x_1}、\hat{x_2}$ 或 $σ$ 不需要额外的损失，也不需要任何形式的人工调整。分解是不确定的，但遵循两个主要方案，我们可以将其粗略地归类为 \say{syntropic} 或 \say{semantic}。在第一种情况下，地图倾向于利用相邻像素之间的强相关性，将图像分成两个互补的高频子图像。在第二种情况下，地图通常侧重于对象的轮廓，将图像分割为其内容的有趣变化，并具有更明显和独特的特征。在这种情况下，根据经验观察，$\hat{x_1}$ 和 $\hat{x_2}$ 的 Fréchet 起始距离 (FID) 通常低于（因此更好）$\hat{x}$，这显然是前者的平均值。从某种意义上说，SVAE 迫使变分自动编码器做出选择，这与它在备选方案之间进行平均的内在倾向相反，其目的是最小化特定样本的重建损失。根据 FID 指标，我们的技术在 Mnist、Cifar10 和 CelebA 等典型数据集上进行了测试，使我们能够超越所有以前的纯变分架构（不依赖于标准化流）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Split Variational Autoencoder (SVAE)的模型，通过将两个生成图像以学习到的权重图进行组合，提升变分生成的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统变分自编码器（VAE）在生成过程中倾向于对替代方案进行平均，导致特征模糊。本文旨在通过引入非确定性分解机制，迫使模型在生成时做出更明确的选择，从而提升重建质量。
AI.method: SVAE通过学习到的权重图σ，将两个生成图像x̂₁和x̂₂组合为最终输出x̂。分解过程分为两种模式：语法级（高频率子图像）和语义级（物体轮廓）。模型仅使用标准VAE的负对数似然损失进行训练，无需额外损失函数或人工调参。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR10和CelebA数据集上，SVAE的Fréchet Inception Distance（FID）指标优于所有纯变分架构，且分解后的子图像FID值通常低于原始平均输出。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入自分解机制，SVAE有效解决了传统VAE的平均倾向问题，在无需额外损失的情况下实现了更高质量的生成效果。

authors_text: Scott McLachlan,Evangelia Kyrimi,Kudakwashe Dube,Norman Fenton,Burkhard Schafer
title: The Self-Driving Car: Crossroads at the Bleeding Edge of Artificial Intelligence and Law
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车：人工智能和法律前沿的十字路口
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) features are increasingly being embedded in cars and are central to the operation of self-driving cars (SDC). There is little or no effort expended towards understanding and assessing the broad legal and regulatory impact of the decisions made by AI in cars. A comprehensive literature review was conducted to determine the perceived barriers, benefits and facilitating factors of SDC in order to help us understand the suitability and limitations of existing and proposed law and regulation. (1) existing and proposed laws are largely based on claimed benefits of SDV that are still mostly speculative and untested; (2) while publicly presented as issues of assigning blame and identifying who pays where the SDC is involved in an accident, the barriers broadly intersect with almost every area of society, laws and regulations; and (3) new law and regulation are most frequently identified as the primary factor for enabling SDC. Research on assessing the impact of AI in SDC needs to be broadened beyond negligence and liability to encompass barriers, benefits and facilitating factors identified in this paper. Results of this paper are significant in that they point to the need for deeper comprehension of the broad impact of all existing law and regulations on the introduction of SDC technology, with a focus on identifying only those areas truly requiring ongoing legislative attention.

abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 功能越来越多地嵌入汽车中，并且是自动驾驶汽车 (SDC) 操作的核心。人们很少或根本没有花精力去理解和评估人工智能在汽车中做出的决策的广泛法律和监管影响。我们进行了全面的文献综述，以确定 SDC 的感知障碍、好处和促进因素，以帮助我们了解现有和拟议法律法规的适用性和局限性。 (1) 现有和拟议的法律主要基于 SDV 所声称的好处，但这些好处仍然大多是推测性的且未经测试； (2) 虽然公开提出了在 SDC 发生事故时追究责任并确定谁来赔偿的问题，但这些障碍与社会、法律和法规的几乎每个领域都有广泛的交叉； (3) 新的法律和法规最常被认为是实现 SDC 的主要因素。评估人工智能对 SDC 影响的研究需要扩大到疏忽和责任之外，涵盖本文确定的障碍、好处和促进因素。本文的结果意义重大，因为它们指出需要更深入地理解所有现有法律法规对引入 SDC 技术的广泛影响，重点是确定那些真正需要持续立法关注的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文通过文献综述分析自动驾驶汽车（SDC）中人工智能的法律与监管影响，探讨现有及拟议法律的适用性与局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前法律多基于自动驾驶汽车的推测性优势，且其法律障碍涉及社会各领域，需明确立法重点以推动技术发展。
AI.method: 通过全面文献综述，识别SDC的法律障碍、利益及促进因素，评估现有法律框架的适用性。
AI.result: 现有法律基于未验证的假设，事故责任问题仅是表象，核心挑战涉及社会各领域法规；新法规被视作SDC发展的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 需深入理解现有法律对SDC技术的影响，聚焦真正需要立法关注的领域，扩展研究范围至更广泛的法律与社会因素。

conclusion: 需深入理解现有法律对SDC技术的影响，聚焦真正需要立法关注的领域，扩展研究范围至更广泛的法律与社会因素。
search_text: The Self-Driving Car: Crossroads at the Bleeding Edge of Artificial Intelligence and Law 自动驾驶汽车：人工智能和法律前沿的十字路口 Artificial intelligence (AI) features are increasingly being embedded in cars and are central to the operation of self-driving cars (SDC). There is little or no effort expended towards understanding and assessing the broad legal and regulatory impact of the decisions made by AI in cars. A comprehensive literature review was conducted to determine the perceived barriers, benefits and facilitating factors of SDC in order to help us understand the suitability and limitations of existing and proposed law and regulation. (1) existing and proposed laws are largely based on claimed benefits of SDV that are still mostly speculative and untested; (2) while publicly presented as issues of assigning blame and identifying who pays where the SDC is involved in an accident, the barriers broadly intersect with almost every area of society, laws and regulations; and (3) new law and regulation are most frequently identified as the primary factor for enabling SDC. Research on assessing the impact of AI in SDC needs to be broadened beyond negligence and liability to encompass barriers, benefits and facilitating factors identified in this paper. Results of this paper are significant in that they point to the need for deeper comprehension of the broad impact of all existing law and regulations on the introduction of SDC technology, with a focus on identifying only those areas truly requiring ongoing legislative attention. 人工智能 (AI) 功能越来越多地嵌入汽车中，并且是自动驾驶汽车 (SDC) 操作的核心。人们很少或根本没有花精力去理解和评估人工智能在汽车中做出的决策的广泛法律和监管影响。我们进行了全面的文献综述，以确定 SDC 的感知障碍、好处和促进因素，以帮助我们了解现有和拟议法律法规的适用性和局限性。 (1) 现有和拟议的法律主要基于 SDV 所声称的好处，但这些好处仍然大多是推测性的且未经测试； (2) 虽然公开提出了在 SDC 发生事故时追究责任并确定谁来赔偿的问题，但这些障碍与社会、法律和法规的几乎每个领域都有广泛的交叉； (3) 新的法律和法规最常被认为是实现 SDC 的主要因素。评估人工智能对 SDC 影响的研究需要扩大到疏忽和责任之外，涵盖本文确定的障碍、好处和促进因素。本文的结果意义重大，因为它们指出需要更深入地理解所有现有法律法规对引入 SDC 技术的广泛影响，重点是确定那些真正需要持续立法关注的领域。 本文通过文献综述分析自动驾驶汽车（SDC）中人工智能的法律与监管影响，探讨现有及拟议法律的适用性与局限性。 Scott McLachlan,Evangelia Kyrimi,Kudakwashe Dube,Norman Fenton,Burkhard Schafer cs.AI

authors_text: Y. Li,X. Qin,H. Chen,K. Han,P. Zhang
title: Energy-Aware Edge Association for Cluster-based Personalized Federated Learning
title_zh: 基于集群的个性化联邦学习的能量感知边缘关联
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) over wireless network enables data-conscious services by leveraging the ubiquitous intelligence at network edge for privacy-preserving model training. As the proliferation of context-aware services, the diversified personal preferences causes disagreeing conditional distributions among user data, which leads to poor inference performance. In this sense, clustered federated learning is proposed to group user devices with similar preference and provide each cluster with a personalized model. This calls for innovative design in edge association that involves user clustering and also resource management optimization. We formulate an accuracy-cost trade-off optimization problem by jointly considering model accuracy, communication resource allocation and energy consumption. To comply with parameter encryption techniques in FL, we propose an iterative solution procedure which employs deep reinforcement learning based approach at cloud server for edge association. The reward function consists of minimized energy consumption at each base station and the averaged model accuracy of all users. Under our proposed solution, multiple edge base station are fully exploited to realize cost efficient personalized federated learning without any prior knowledge on model parameters. Simulation results show that our proposed strategy outperforms existing strategies in achieving accurate learning at low energy cost.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) over wireless network enables data-conscious services by leveraging the ubiquitous intelligence at network edge for privacy-preserving model training. As the proliferation of context-aware services, the diversified personal preferences causes disagreeing conditional distributions among user data, which leads to poor inference performance. In this sense, clustered federated learning is proposed to group user devices with similar preference and provide each cluster with a personalized model. This calls for innovative design in edge association that involves user clustering and also resource management optimization. We formulate an accuracy-cost trade-off optimization problem by jointly considering model accuracy, communication resource allocation and energy consumption. To comply with parameter encryption techniques in FL, we propose an iterative solution procedure which employs deep reinforcement learning based approach at cloud server for edge association. The reward function consists of minimized energy consumption at each base station and the averaged model accuracy of all users. Under our proposed solution, multiple edge base station are fully exploited to realize cost efficient personalized federated learning without any prior knowledge on model parameters. Simulation results show that our proposed strategy outperforms existing strategies in achieving accurate learning at low energy cost.
abstract_zh: 无线网络上的联邦学习 (FL) 利用网络边缘无处不在的智能进行隐私保护模型训练，从而实现数据意识服务。随着上下文感知服务的激增，多样化的个人偏好导致用户数据之间的条件分布不一致，从而导致推理性能不佳。从这个意义上说，集群联邦学习被提出来将具有相似偏好的用户设备分组，并为每个集群提供个性化模型。这需要边缘关联的创新设计，涉及用户集群和资源管理优化。我们通过共同考虑模型精度、通信资源分配和能耗来制定精度-成本权衡优化问题。为了符合 FL 中的参数加密技术，我们提出了一种迭代解决方案，该过程在云服务器上采用基于深度强化学习的方法进行边缘关联。奖励函数由每个基站的最小能耗和所有用户的平均模型精度组成。根据我们提出的解决方案，充分利用多个边缘基站来实现成本高效的个性化联邦学习，而无需任何模型参数的先验知识。模拟结果表明，我们提出的策略在以低能源成本实现准确学习方面优于现有策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于聚类的个性化联邦学习中的能量感知边缘关联方法，旨在优化模型准确性与能耗之间的平衡。
AI.motivation: 随着个性化服务需求增长，用户数据分布差异导致传统联邦学习推理性能下降。现有方法缺乏对边缘资源管理与能耗的综合优化，需设计新的边缘关联机制以实现高效个性化学习。
AI.method: 构建准确性-成本双目标优化模型，采用基于深度强化学习的迭代算法，在云端服务器实现边缘基站关联决策。奖励函数结合基站能耗最小化与用户模型精度平均化，无需先验模型参数知识。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该策略在保证模型精度的同时显著降低能耗，优于现有边缘关联方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度强化学习实现动态边缘资源分配，本文方法有效解决了聚类联邦学习中的能耗与精度矛盾，为个性化边缘智能服务提供新思路。

authors_text: Xianxu Hou,Linlin Shen,Or Patashnik,Daniel Cohen-Or,Hui Huang
title: FEAT: Face Editing with Attention
title_zh: 壮举：用心进行脸部编辑
abstract: Employing the latent space of pretrained generators has recently been shown to be an effective means for GAN-based face manipulation. The success of this approach heavily relies on the innate disentanglement of the latent space axes of the generator. However, face manipulation often intends to affect local regions only, while common generators do not tend to have the necessary spatial disentanglement. In this paper, we build on the StyleGAN generator, and present a method that explicitly encourages face manipulation to focus on the intended regions by incorporating learned attention maps. During the generation of the edited image, the attention map serves as a mask that guides a blending between the original features and the modified ones. The guidance for the latent space edits is achieved by employing CLIP, which has recently been shown to be effective for text-driven edits. We perform extensive experiments and show that our method can perform disentangled and controllable face manipulations based on text descriptions by attending to the relevant regions only. Both qualitative and quantitative experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our method for facial region editing over alternative methods.
summary: Employing the latent space of pretrained generators has recently been shown to be an effective means for GAN-based face manipulation. The success of this approach heavily relies on the innate disentanglement of the latent space axes of the generator. However, face manipulation often intends to affect local regions only, while common generators do not tend to have the necessary spatial disentanglement. In this paper, we build on the StyleGAN generator, and present a method that explicitly encourages face manipulation to focus on the intended regions by incorporating learned attention maps. During the generation of the edited image, the attention map serves as a mask that guides a blending between the original features and the modified ones. The guidance for the latent space edits is achieved by employing CLIP, which has recently been shown to be effective for text-driven edits. We perform extensive experiments and show that our method can perform disentangled and controllable face manipulations based on text descriptions by attending to the relevant regions only. Both qualitative and quantitative experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our method for facial region editing over alternative methods.
abstract_zh: 最近证明，利用预训练生成器的潜在空间是基于 GAN 的人脸操作的有效手段。这种方法的成功在很大程度上依赖于生成器潜在空间轴的固有解开。然而，面部操作通常只影响局部区域，而常见的生成器往往不具备必要的空间解缠结。在本文中，我们在 StyleGAN 生成器的基础上构建，并提出了一种通过结合学习到的注意力图来明确鼓励面部操作关注预期区域的方法。在编辑图像的生成过程中，注意力图充当掩模，指导原始特征和修改后的特征之间的混合。潜在空间编辑的指导是通过使用 CLIP 来实现的，最近已证明 CLIP 对于文本驱动的编辑是有效的。我们进行了广泛的实验，并表明我们的方法可以通过仅关注相关区域来基于文本描述执行解开且可控的面部操作。定性和定量实验结果都证明了我们的面部区域编辑方法相对于其他方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于StyleGAN和注意力机制的可控面部编辑方法，通过文本描述实现对特定面部区域的精确修改。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN生成器的潜在空间缺乏必要的空间解耦性，难以实现对局部面部区域的精确控制。
AI.method: 在StyleGAN框架中引入学习到的注意力图作为特征融合掩膜，结合CLIP模型实现文本驱动的潜在空间编辑。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有方法，能实现更精确的面部区域编辑。
AI.conclusion: 通过注意力机制和CLIP引导，实现了基于文本描述的可控制、解耦的面部编辑，验证了方法在面部区域编辑任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Xian Xu,Leni Yang,David Yip,Mingming Fan,Zheng Wei,Huamin Qu
title: From `Wow' to `Why': Guidelines for Creating the Opening of a Data Video with Cinematic Styles
title_zh: 从“哇”到“为什么”：创建具有电影风格的数据视频开头的指南
comment: In Proceedings of CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22), April 29-May 5, 2022, New Orleans, LA, USA
comments: In Proceedings of CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22), April 29-May 5, 2022, New Orleans, LA, USA
abstract: Data videos are an increasingly popular storytelling form. The opening of a data video critically influences its success as the opening either attracts the audience to continue watching or bores them to abandon watching. However, little is known about how to create an attractive opening. We draw inspiration from the openings of famous films to facilitate designing data video openings. First, by analyzing over 200 films from several sources, we derived six primary cinematic opening styles adaptable to data videos. Then, we consulted eight experts from the film industry to formulate 28 guidelines. To validate the usability and effectiveness of the guidelines, we asked participants to create data video openings with and without the guidelines, which were then evaluated by experts and the general public. Results showed that the openings designed with the guidelines were perceived to be more attractive, and the guidelines were praised for clarity and inspiration.

abstract_zh: 数据视频是一种越来越流行的讲故事形式。数据视频的开场对其成功至关重要，因为开场要么吸引观众继续观看，要么让他们厌烦而放弃观看。然而，人们对如何创造有吸引力的空缺知之甚少。我们从著名电影的开场中汲取灵感，以方便设计数据视频开场。首先，通过分析多个来源的 200 多部电影，我们得出了六种适用于数据视频的主要电影开场风格。随后，我们咨询了八位电影界专家，制定了28条指南。为了验证指南的可用性和有效性，我们要求参与者在有或没有指南的情况下创建数据视频开口，然后由专家和公众进行评估。结果显示，根据该指南设计的空缺被认为更具吸引力，并且该指南因其清晰性和启发性而受到赞扬。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过借鉴电影开篇手法，制定数据视频开篇设计的指导方针，以提升观众吸引力。
AI.motivation: 数据视频的开篇直接影响观众留存率，但现有研究缺乏系统性指导，需探索有效设计方法。
AI.method: 分析200部电影开篇提炼六种风格，联合8位电影专家制定28条指南，并通过用户实验验证效果。
AI.result: 采用指南设计的开篇被专家和公众评价为更具吸引力，指南获得高度认可。
AI.conclusion: 电影化开篇指南能有效提升数据视频质量，为设计者提供清晰实用的创作框架。

authors_text: Sumedh Vilas Datar and,Jesus Gonzales Bernal
title: Portrait Segmentation Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习进行肖像分割
abstract: A portrait is a painting, drawing, photograph, or engraving of a person, especially one depicting only the face or head and shoulders. In the digital world the portrait of a person is captured by having the person as a subject in the image and capturing the image of the person such that the background is blurred. DSLRs generally do it by reducing the aperture to focus on very close regions of interest and automatically blur the background. In this paper I have come up with a novel approach to replicate the portrait mode from DSLR using any smartphone to generate high quality portrait images.
summary: A portrait is a painting, drawing, photograph, or engraving of a person, especially one depicting only the face or head and shoulders. In the digital world the portrait of a person is captured by having the person as a subject in the image and capturing the image of the person such that the background is blurred. DSLRs generally do it by reducing the aperture to focus on very close regions of interest and automatically blur the background. In this paper I have come up with a novel approach to replicate the portrait mode from DSLR using any smartphone to generate high quality portrait images.
abstract_zh: 肖像是人物的绘画、素描、照片或雕刻，尤其是仅描绘脸部或头部和肩膀的肖像。在数字世界中，通过将人作为图像中的主体并捕捉人的图像使得背景模糊来捕捉人的肖像。单反相机通常通过减小光圈来聚焦于非常接近的感兴趣区域并自动模糊背景来实现这一点。在本文中，我提出了一种新颖的方法，可以使用任何智能手机复制 DSLR 的肖像模式，以生成高质量的肖像图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的人像分割方法，旨在利用智能手机模拟DSLR相机的背景虚化效果，生成高质量人像图像。
AI.motivation: 传统DSLR相机通过调整光圈实现背景虚化，但智能手机受限于硬件条件难以达到相同效果，需借助算法提升人像分割质量。
AI.method: 采用深度学习模型（如卷积神经网络）进行图像分割，通过训练数据学习区分人物与背景，实现类似DSLR的虚化效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能在智能手机上生成具有高质量背景虚化的portrait图像，接近专业相机效果。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习为移动设备实现高质量人像分割提供了可行方案，未来可进一步优化模型轻量化以适应移动端部署。

authors_text: Wentao Lei,Mingming Fan,Juliann Thang
title: "I Shake The Package To Check If It's Mine": A Study of Package Fetching Practices and Challenges of Blind and Low Vision People in China
title_zh: “我摇晃包裹看看是不是我的”：中国盲人和低视力人群取包裹行为及挑战研究
comment: In Proceedings of CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22), April 29-May 5, 2022, New Orleans, LA, USA
comments: In Proceedings of CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22), April 29-May 5, 2022, New Orleans, LA, USA
abstract: With about 230 million packages delivered per day in 2020, fetching packages has become a routine for many city dwellers in China. When fetching packages, people usually need to go to collection sites of their apartment complexes or a KuaiDiGui, an increasingly popular type of self-service package pickup machine. However, little is known whether such processes are accessible to blind and low vision (BLV) city dwellers. We interviewed BLV people (N=20) living in a large metropolitan area in China to understand their practices and challenges of fetching packages. Our findings show that participants encountered difficulties in finding the collection site and localizing and recognizing their packages. When fetching packages from KuaiDiGuis, they had difficulty in identifying the correct KuaiDiGui, interacting with its touch screen, navigating the complex on-screen workflow, and opening the target compartment. We discuss design considerations to make the package fetching process more accessible to the BLV community.
summary: With about 230 million packages delivered per day in 2020, fetching packages has become a routine for many city dwellers in China. When fetching packages, people usually need to go to collection sites of their apartment complexes or a KuaiDiGui, an increasingly popular type of self-service package pickup machine. However, little is known whether such processes are accessible to blind and low vision (BLV) city dwellers. We interviewed BLV people (N=20) living in a large metropolitan area in China to understand their practices and challenges of fetching packages. Our findings show that participants encountered difficulties in finding the collection site and localizing and recognizing their packages. When fetching packages from KuaiDiGuis, they had difficulty in identifying the correct KuaiDiGui, interacting with its touch screen, navigating the complex on-screen workflow, and opening the target compartment. We discuss design considerations to make the package fetching process more accessible to the BLV community.
abstract_zh: 2020年，每天约有2.3亿件包裹投递，取包裹已成为中国许多城市居民的家常便饭。人们在取包裹时，通常需要到公寓的取件点或者快的柜（一种越来越流行的自助取件机）。然而，目前尚不清楚盲人和低视力 (BLV) 城市居民是否可以参与此类过程。我们采访了居住在中国大城市的 BLV 人 (N=20)，以了解他们取包裹的做法和挑战。我们的研究结果表明，参与者在寻找收集地点以及本地化和识别他们的包裹时遇到了困难。当从 KuaiDiGui 获取包裹时，他们很难识别正确的 KuaiDiGui、与其触摸屏交互、导航复杂的屏幕工作流程以及打开目标隔间。我们讨论了设计注意事项，以使 BLV 社区更容易访问包获取过程。

AI.tldr: 本研究调查了中国盲人和低视力人群在取件过程中的实践与挑战，特别是面对快递站点和自助取件机时的困难。
AI.motivation: 随着中国每日快递量巨大，取件成为日常流程，但盲人和低视力人群（BLV）在这一过程中的可及性问题尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 通过访谈20名居住在中国大城市的BLV人士，了解其取件习惯及遇到的障碍。
AI.result: 参与者在定位快递站点、识别自助取件机、操作触屏界面、导航复杂流程及开启目标格口时面临显著困难。
AI.conclusion: 需从设计层面优化取件流程，例如增强语音引导、简化操作界面及提供触觉反馈，以提升BLV群体的可及性。

Our findings show that participants encountered difficulties in finding the collection site and localizing and recognizing their packages. When fetching packages from KuaiDiGuis, they had difficulty in identifying the correct KuaiDiGui, interacting with its touch screen, navigating the complex on-screen workflow, and opening the target compartment. We discuss design considerations to make the package fetching process more accessible to the BLV community. 2020年，每天约有2.3亿件包裹投递，取包裹已成为中国许多城市居民的家常便饭。人们在取包裹时，通常需要到公寓的取件点或者快的柜（一种越来越流行的自助取件机）。然而，目前尚不清楚盲人和低视力 (BLV) 城市居民是否可以参与此类过程。我们采访了居住在中国大城市的 BLV 人 (N=20)，以了解他们取包裹的做法和挑战。我们的研究结果表明，参与者在寻找收集地点以及本地化和识别他们的包裹时遇到了困难。当从 KuaiDiGui 获取包裹时，他们很难识别正确的 KuaiDiGui、与其触摸屏交互、导航复杂的屏幕工作流程以及打开目标隔间。我们讨论了设计注意事项，以使 BLV 社区更容易访问包获取过程。 本研究调查了中国盲人和低视力人群在取件过程中的实践与挑战，特别是面对快递站点和自助取件机时的困难。 Wentao Lei,Mingming Fan,Juliann Thang cs.HC

authors_text: Keli Huang,Botian Shi,Xiang Li,Xin Li,Siyuan Huang,Yikang Li
title: Multi-modal Sensor Fusion for Auto Driving Perception: A Survey
title_zh: 用于自动驾驶感知的多模态传感器融合：调查
abstract: Multi-modal fusion is a fundamental task for the perception of an autonomous driving system, which has recently intrigued many researchers. However, achieving a rather good performance is not an easy task due to the noisy raw data, underutilized information, and the misalignment of multi-modal sensors. In this paper, we provide a literature review of the existing multi-modal-based methods for perception tasks in autonomous driving. Generally, we make a detailed analysis including over 50 papers leveraging perception sensors including LiDAR and camera trying to solve object detection and semantic segmentation tasks. Different from traditional fusion methodology for categorizing fusion models, we propose an innovative way that divides them into two major classes, four minor classes by a more reasonable taxonomy in the view of the fusion stage. Moreover, we dive deep into the current fusion methods, focusing on the remaining problems and open-up discussions on the potential research opportunities. In conclusion, what we expect to do in this paper is to present a new taxonomy of multi-modal fusion methods for the autonomous driving perception tasks and provoke thoughts of the fusion-based techniques in the future.
summary: Multi-modal fusion is a fundamental task for the perception of an autonomous driving system, which has recently intrigued many researchers. However, achieving a rather good performance is not an easy task due to the noisy raw data, underutilized information, and the misalignment of multi-modal sensors. In this paper, we provide a literature review of the existing multi-modal-based methods for perception tasks in autonomous driving. Generally, we make a detailed analysis including over 50 papers leveraging perception sensors including LiDAR and camera trying to solve object detection and semantic segmentation tasks. Different from traditional fusion methodology for categorizing fusion models, we propose an innovative way that divides them into two major classes, four minor classes by a more reasonable taxonomy in the view of the fusion stage. Moreover, we dive deep into the current fusion methods, focusing on the remaining problems and open-up discussions on the potential research opportunities. In conclusion, what we expect to do in this paper is to present a new taxonomy of multi-modal fusion methods for the autonomous driving perception tasks and provoke thoughts of the fusion-based techniques in the future.
abstract_zh: 多模态融合是自动驾驶系统感知的一项基本任务，最近引起了许多研究人员的兴趣。然而，由于原始数据嘈杂、信息利用不足以及多模态传感器的未对准，实现相当好的性能并不是一件容易的事。在本文中，我们对现有的基于多模态的自动驾驶感知任务方法进行了文献综述。一般来说，我们会进行详细分析，包括 50 多篇利用 LiDAR 和摄像头等感知传感器尝试解决对象检测和语义分割任务的论文。与传统的融合方法对融合模型进行分类不同，我们提出了一种创新的方法，从融合阶段的角度通过更合理的分类将其分为两大类，四个小类。此外，我们深入研究当前的融合方法，重点关注剩余的问题，并对潜在的研究机会进行开放的讨论。总之，我们期望在本文中做的是为自动驾驶感知任务提出一种新的多模态融合方法分类，并引发对未来基于融合的技术的思考。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自动驾驶感知中多模态传感器融合的现有方法，提出新的分类体系并探讨未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 多模态传感器融合对自动驾驶感知至关重要，但现有方法存在数据噪声、信息利用率低和传感器对齐问题，需系统性分析与创新分类。
AI.method: 分析50余篇基于LiDAR和摄像头的文献，按融合阶段提出包含两大类四小类的新分类体系，并深入讨论现存问题。
AI.result: 构建了更合理的多模态融合方法分类框架，总结了当前技术局限性及潜在研究机会。
AI.conclusion: 通过新分类体系为自动驾驶感知领域提供理论参考，激发未来融合技术的创新思考。

authors_text: Tianyu Ma,Alan Q. Wang,Adrian V. Dalca,Mert R. Sabuncu
title: Hyper-Convolutions via Implicit Kernels for Medical Imaging
title_zh: 通过隐式内核进行超卷积用于医学成像
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2105.10559
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2105.10559
abstract: The convolutional neural network (CNN) is one of the most commonly used architectures for computer vision tasks. The key building block of a CNN is the convolutional kernel that aggregates information from the pixel neighborhood and shares weights across all pixels. A standard CNN's capacity, and thus its performance, is directly related to the number of learnable kernel weights, which is determined by the number of channels and the kernel size (support). In this paper, we present the \textit{hyper-convolution}, a novel building block that implicitly encodes the convolutional kernel using spatial coordinates. Hyper-convolutions decouple kernel size from the total number of learnable parameters, enabling a more flexible architecture design. We demonstrate in our experiments that replacing regular convolutions with hyper-convolutions can improve performance with less parameters, and increase robustness against noise. We provide our code here: \emph{https://github.com/tym002/Hyper-Convolution}
summary: The convolutional neural network (CNN) is one of the most commonly used architectures for computer vision tasks. The key building block of a CNN is the convolutional kernel that aggregates information from the pixel neighborhood and shares weights across all pixels. A standard CNN's capacity, and thus its performance, is directly related to the number of learnable kernel weights, which is determined by the number of channels and the kernel size (support). In this paper, we present the \textit{hyper-convolution}, a novel building block that implicitly encodes the convolutional kernel using spatial coordinates. Hyper-convolutions decouple kernel size from the total number of learnable parameters, enabling a more flexible architecture design. We demonstrate in our experiments that replacing regular convolutions with hyper-convolutions can improve performance with less parameters, and increase robustness against noise. We provide our code here: \emph{https://github.com/tym002/Hyper-Convolution}
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）是计算机视觉任务最常用的架构之一。 CNN 的关键构建块是卷积核，它聚合来自像素邻域的信息并在所有像素之间共享权重。标准 CNN 的容量及其性能与可学习的内核权重的数量直接相关，而可学习的内核权重由通道数和内核大小（支持度）决定。在本文中，我们提出了 \textit{超卷积}，这是一种使用空间坐标隐式编码卷积核的新颖构建块。超卷积将内核大小与可学习参数总数解耦，从而实现更灵活的架构设计。我们在实验中证明，用超卷积替换常规卷积可以用更少的参数提高性能，并提高对噪声的鲁棒性。我们在这里提供代码：\emph{https://github.com/tym002/Hyper-Convolution}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为超卷积的新方法，通过隐式编码空间坐标来改进卷积核，以提升医学影像任务中的卷积神经网络性能。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络的性能受卷积核参数数量限制，而参数规模与核尺寸和通道数直接相关。作者旨在通过解耦核尺寸与参数数量，设计更灵活且高效的网络架构。
AI.method: 引入超卷积模块，利用空间坐标隐式表示卷积核，使核尺寸不再直接影响可学习参数数量，从而减少参数量并提升模型灵活性。
AI.result: 实验表明，超卷积在保持较少参数的情况下提升了模型性能，并增强了对噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 超卷积为医学影像分析提供了参数高效且鲁棒性强的替代方案，适用于资源受限或数据噪声较大的场景。

authors_text: Wensen Jiang,Yizhu Jiao,Qingqin Wang,Chuanming Liang,Lijie Guo,Yao Zhang,Zhijun Sun,Yun Xiong,Yangyong Zhu
title: Triangle Graph Interest Network for Click-through Rate Prediction
title_zh: 用于点击率预测的三角图兴趣网络
comment: This paper is accepted by WSDM 2022. Source code: https://github.com/alibaba/tgin
comments: This paper is accepted by WSDM 2022. Source code: https://github.com/alibaba/tgin
abstract: Click-through rate prediction is a critical task in online advertising. Currently, many existing methods attempt to extract user potential interests from historical click behavior sequences. However, it is difficult to handle sparse user behaviors or broaden interest exploration. Recently, some researchers incorporate the item-item co-occurrence graph as an auxiliary. Due to the elusiveness of user interests, those works still fail to determine the real motivation of user click behaviors. Besides, those works are more biased towards popular or similar commodities. They lack an effective mechanism to break the diversity restrictions. In this paper, we point out two special properties of triangles in the item-item graphs for recommendation systems: Intra-triangle homophily and Inter-triangle heterophiy. Based on this, we propose a novel and effective framework named Triangle Graph Interest Network (TGIN). For each clicked item in user behavior sequences, we introduce the triangles in its neighborhood of the item-item graphs as a supplement. TGIN regards these triangles as the basic units of user interests, which provide the clues to capture the real motivation for a user clicking an item. We characterize every click behavior by aggregating the information of several interest units to alleviate the elusive motivation problem. The attention mechanism determines users' preference for different interest units. By selecting diverse and relative triangles, TGIN brings in novel and serendipitous items to expand exploration opportunities of user interests. Then, we aggregate the multi-level interests of historical behavior sequences to improve CTR prediction. Extensive experiments on both public and industrial datasets clearly verify the effectiveness of our framework.
summary: Click-through rate prediction is a critical task in online advertising. Currently, many existing methods attempt to extract user potential interests from historical click behavior sequences. However, it is difficult to handle sparse user behaviors or broaden interest exploration. Recently, some researchers incorporate the item-item co-occurrence graph as an auxiliary. Due to the elusiveness of user interests, those works still fail to determine the real motivation of user click behaviors. Besides, those works are more biased towards popular or similar commodities. They lack an effective mechanism to break the diversity restrictions. In this paper, we point out two special properties of triangles in the item-item graphs for recommendation systems: Intra-triangle homophily and Inter-triangle heterophiy. Based on this, we propose a novel and effective framework named Triangle Graph Interest Network (TGIN). For each clicked item in user behavior sequences, we introduce the triangles in its neighborhood of the item-item graphs as a supplement. TGIN regards these triangles as the basic units of user interests, which provide the clues to capture the real motivation for a user clicking an item. We characterize every click behavior by aggregating the information of several interest units to alleviate the elusive motivation problem. The attention mechanism determines users' preference for different interest units. By selecting diverse and relative triangles, TGIN brings in novel and serendipitous items to expand exploration opportunities of user interests. Then, we aggregate the multi-level interests of historical behavior sequences to improve CTR prediction. Extensive experiments on both public and industrial datasets clearly verify the effectiveness of our framework.
abstract_zh: 点击率预测是在线广告中的一项关键任务。目前，许多现有方法试图从历史点击行为序列中提取用户潜在兴趣。然而，处理稀疏的用户行为或拓宽兴趣探索是很困难的。最近，一些研究人员将项目-项目共现图作为辅助。由于用户兴趣的难以捉摸，这些工作仍然无法确定用户点击行为的真正动机。此外，这些作品更偏向于大众化或类似的商品。他们缺乏有效的机制来打破多样性限制。在本文中，我们指出了推荐系统的项目-项目图中三角形的两个特殊属性：三角形内同质性和三角形间异质性。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖有效的框架，称为三角图兴趣网络（TGIN）。对于用户行为序列中的每个点击项目，我们在项目-项目图的邻域中引入三角形作为补充。 TGIN 将这些三角形视为用户兴趣的基本单位，为捕捉用户点击某个项目的真实动机提供了线索。我们通过聚合多个兴趣单元的信息来描述每次点击行为，以缓解难以捉摸的动机问题。注意力机制决定了用户对不同兴趣单元的偏好。通过选择多样化且相关的三角形，TGIN引入新颖且偶然的项目来扩大用户兴趣的探索机会。然后，我们聚合历史行为序列的多层次兴趣来改进CTR预测。对公共和工业数据集的广泛实验清楚地验证了我们框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物品-物品图中三角形结构的点击率预测框架TGIN，通过挖掘用户行为序列中的三角形图结构来提升兴趣建模效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理用户行为稀疏性及兴趣探索多样性，传统图结构方法易偏向流行商品且缺乏有效机制突破多样性限制。
AI.method: 提出TGIN框架，利用物品图中三角形的同质性与异质性特性，以三角形为基本兴趣单元补充用户行为序列，通过注意力机制聚合多级兴趣特征进行点击预测。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和工业数据集上的实验验证了TGIN框架在点击率预测任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TGIN通过三角形图结构建模用户兴趣，有效缓解了兴趣模糊性问题，拓展了兴趣探索的多样性，提升了点击率预测性能。

search_text: Triangle Graph Interest Network for Click-through Rate Prediction 用于点击率预测的三角图兴趣网络 Click-through rate prediction is a critical task in online advertising. Currently, many existing methods attempt to extract user potential interests from historical click behavior sequences. However, it is difficult to handle sparse user behaviors or broaden interest exploration. Recently, some researchers incorporate the item-item co-occurrence graph as an auxiliary. Due to the elusiveness of user interests, those works still fail to determine the real motivation of user click behaviors. Besides, those works are more biased towards popular or similar commodities. They lack an effective mechanism to break the diversity restrictions. In this paper, we point out two special properties of triangles in the item-item graphs for recommendation systems: Intra-triangle homophily and Inter-triangle heterophiy. Based on this, we propose a novel and effective framework named Triangle Graph Interest Network (TGIN). For each clicked item in user behavior sequences, we introduce the triangles in its neighborhood of the item-item graphs as a supplement. TGIN regards these triangles as the basic units of user interests, which provide the clues to capture the real motivation for a user clicking an item. We characterize every click behavior by aggregating the information of several interest units to alleviate the elusive motivation problem. The attention mechanism determines users' preference for different interest units. By selecting diverse and relative triangles, TGIN brings in novel and serendipitous items to expand exploration opportunities of user interests. Then, we aggregate the multi-level interests of historical behavior sequences to improve CTR prediction. Extensive experiments on both public and industrial datasets clearly verify the effectiveness of our framework. 点击率预测是在线广告中的一项关键任务。目前，许多现有方法试图从历史点击行为序列中提取用户潜在兴趣。然而，处理稀疏的用户行为或拓宽兴趣探索是很困难的。最近，一些研究人员将项目-项目共现图作为辅助。由于用户兴趣的难以捉摸，这些工作仍然无法确定用户点击行为的真正动机。此外，这些作品更偏向于大众化或类似的商品。他们缺乏有效的机制来打破多样性限制。在本文中，我们指出了推荐系统的项目-项目图中三角形的两个特殊属性：三角形内同质性和三角形间异质性。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖有效的框架，称为三角图兴趣网络（TGIN）。对于用户行为序列中的每个点击项目，我们在项目-项目图的邻域中引入三角形作为补充。 TGIN 将这些三角形视为用户兴趣的基本单位，为捕捉用户点击某个项目的真实动机提供了线索。我们通过聚合多个兴趣单元的信息来描述每次点击行为，以缓解难以捉摸的动机问题。注意力机制决定了用户对不同兴趣单元的偏好。通过选择多样化且相关的三角形，TGIN引入新颖且偶然的项目来扩大用户兴趣的探索机会。然后，我们聚合历史行为序列的多层次兴趣来改进CTR预测。对公共和工业数据集的广泛实验清楚地验证了我们框架的有效性。 本文提出一种基于物品-物品图中三角形结构的点击率预测框架TGIN，通过挖掘用户行为序列中的三角形图结构来提升兴趣建模效果。 Wensen Jiang,Yizhu Jiao,Qingqin Wang,Chuanming Liang,Lijie Guo,Yao Zhang,Zhijun Sun,Yun Xiong,Yangyong Zhu cs.AI

authors_text: Michael Teng,Michiel van de Panne,Frank Wood
title: Exploration with Multi-Sample Target Values for Distributional Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 分布式强化学习的多样本目标值探索
abstract: Distributional reinforcement learning (RL) aims to learn a value-network that predicts the full distribution of the returns for a given state, often modeled via a quantile-based critic. This approach has been successfully integrated into common RL methods for continuous control, giving rise to algorithms such as Distributional Soft Actor-Critic (DSAC). In this paper, we introduce multi-sample target values (MTV) for distributional RL, as a principled replacement for single-sample target value estimation, as commonly employed in current practice. The improved distributional estimates further lend themselves to UCB-based exploration. These two ideas are combined to yield our distributional RL algorithm, E2DC (Extra Exploration with Distributional Critics). We evaluate our approach on a range of continuous control tasks and demonstrate state-of-the-art model-free performance on difficult tasks such as Humanoid control. We provide further insight into the method via visualization and analysis of the learned distributions and their evolution during training.
summary: Distributional reinforcement learning (RL) aims to learn a value-network that predicts the full distribution of the returns for a given state, often modeled via a quantile-based critic. This approach has been successfully integrated into common RL methods for continuous control, giving rise to algorithms such as Distributional Soft Actor-Critic (DSAC). In this paper, we introduce multi-sample target values (MTV) for distributional RL, as a principled replacement for single-sample target value estimation, as commonly employed in current practice. The improved distributional estimates further lend themselves to UCB-based exploration. These two ideas are combined to yield our distributional RL algorithm, E2DC (Extra Exploration with Distributional Critics). We evaluate our approach on a range of continuous control tasks and demonstrate state-of-the-art model-free performance on difficult tasks such as Humanoid control. We provide further insight into the method via visualization and analysis of the learned distributions and their evolution during training.
abstract_zh: 分布式强化学习（RL）旨在学习一个价值网络，该网络可以预测给定状态的回报的完整分布，通常通过基于分位数的批评家进行建模。这种方法已成功集成到常见的 RL 方法中以进行连续控制，从而产生了分布式 Soft Actor-Critic (DSAC) 等算法。在本文中，我们引入了分布式强化学习的多样本目标值（MTV），作为当前实践中常用的单样本目标值估计的原则替代。改进的分布估计进一步适合基于 UCB 的勘探。这两个想法相结合，产生了我们的分布式强化学习算法 E2DC（分布式批评家的额外探索）。我们在一系列连续控制任务上评估我们的方法，并在人形控制等困难任务上展示最先进的无模型性能。我们通过可视化和分析学习到的分布及其在训练过程中的演变来进一步深入了解该方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多样本目标值的分布强化学习方法E2DC，通过改进分布估计和UCB探索策略，提升连续控制任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统分布强化学习使用单样本目标值估计，可能导致分布估计偏差，限制探索效率。需更精确的分布建模和探索策略以提升复杂任务表现。
AI.method: 引入多样本目标值（MTV）替代单样本估计，结合UCB探索机制，设计分布评论家网络（Distributional Critics），形成E2DC算法。
AI.result: 在多个连续控制任务中，E2DC在Humanoid等困难任务上达到模型自由方法的最先进性能，可视化分析验证了分布估计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多样本目标值与分布评论家结合能有效提升分布强化学习的探索效率和任务表现，为复杂控制问题提供新思路。

authors_text: Xiaomin Li,Vangelis Metsis,Huangyingrui Wang,Anne Hee Hiong Ngu
title: TTS-GAN: A Transformer-based Time-Series Generative Adversarial Network
title_zh: TTS-GAN：基于 Transformer 的时间序列生成对抗网络
comment: The paper has been accepted for publication in the 20th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Medicine (AIME 2022)
comments: The paper has been accepted for publication in the 20th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Medicine (AIME 2022)
abstract: Signal measurements appearing in the form of time series are one of the most common types of data used in medical machine learning applications. However, such datasets are often small, making the training of deep neural network architectures ineffective. For time-series, the suite of data augmentation tricks we can use to expand the size of the dataset is limited by the need to maintain the basic properties of the signal. Data generated by a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) can be utilized as another data augmentation tool. RNN-based GANs suffer from the fact that they cannot effectively model long sequences of data points with irregular temporal relations. To tackle these problems, we introduce TTS-GAN, a transformer-based GAN which can successfully generate realistic synthetic time-series data sequences of arbitrary length, similar to the real ones. Both the generator and discriminator networks of the GAN model are built using a pure transformer encoder architecture. We use visualizations and dimensionality reduction techniques to demonstrate the similarity of real and generated time-series data. We also compare the quality of our generated data with the best existing alternative, which is an RNN-based time-series GAN.
summary: Signal measurements appearing in the form of time series are one of the most common types of data used in medical machine learning applications. However, such datasets are often small, making the training of deep neural network architectures ineffective. For time-series, the suite of data augmentation tricks we can use to expand the size of the dataset is limited by the need to maintain the basic properties of the signal. Data generated by a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) can be utilized as another data augmentation tool. RNN-based GANs suffer from the fact that they cannot effectively model long sequences of data points with irregular temporal relations. To tackle these problems, we introduce TTS-GAN, a transformer-based GAN which can successfully generate realistic synthetic time-series data sequences of arbitrary length, similar to the real ones. Both the generator and discriminator networks of the GAN model are built using a pure transformer encoder architecture. We use visualizations and dimensionality reduction techniques to demonstrate the similarity of real and generated time-series data. We also compare the quality of our generated data with the best existing alternative, which is an RNN-based time-series GAN.
abstract_zh: 以时间序列形式出现的信号测量是医疗机器学习应用中最常见的数据类型之一。然而，此类数据集通常很小，导致深度神经网络架构的训练效率低下。对于时间序列，我们可以用来扩展数据集大小的数据增强技巧套件受到维护信号基本属性的需要的限制。生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的数据可以用作另一种数据增强工具。基于 RNN 的 GAN 无法有效地对具有不规则时间关系的长数据点序列进行建模。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 TTS-GAN，这是一种基于 Transformer 的 GAN，它可以成功生成任意长度的真实合成时间序列数据序列，与真实数据序列类似。 GAN 模型的生成器和鉴别器网络都是使用纯 Transformer 编码器架构构建的。我们使用可视化和降维技术来证明真实和生成的时间序列数据的相似性。我们还将生成数据的质量与现有的最佳替代方案（基于 RNN 的时间序列 GAN）进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TTS-GAN，一种基于Transformer的生成对抗网络，用于生成与真实时间序列数据相似的合成数据。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域的时间序列数据集通常规模较小，且基于RNN的GAN难以有效建模长序列和不规则时间关系，限制了数据增强效果。
AI.method: 采用纯Transformer编码器架构构建生成器和判别器，利用可视化和降维技术验证生成数据与真实数据的相似性，并与现有RNN时间序列GAN进行对比。
AI.result: 生成的合成时间序列数据在视觉和统计特性上与真实数据高度相似，且优于现有RNN基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TTS-GAN通过Transformer架构有效解决了长序列生成问题，为医疗时间序列数据增强提供了高质量的合成数据生成方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出TTS-GAN，一种基于Transformer的生成对抗网络，用于生成与真实时间序列数据相似的合成数据。

search_text: TTS-GAN: A Transformer-based Time-Series Generative Adversarial Network TTS-GAN：基于 Transformer 的时间序列生成对抗网络 Signal measurements appearing in the form of time series are one of the most common types of data used in medical machine learning applications. However, such datasets are often small, making the training of deep neural network architectures ineffective. For time-series, the suite of data augmentation tricks we can use to expand the size of the dataset is limited by the need to maintain the basic properties of the signal. Data generated by a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) can be utilized as another data augmentation tool. RNN-based GANs suffer from the fact that they cannot effectively model long sequences of data points with irregular temporal relations. To tackle these problems, we introduce TTS-GAN, a transformer-based GAN which can successfully generate realistic synthetic time-series data sequences of arbitrary length, similar to the real ones. Both the generator and discriminator networks of the GAN model are built using a pure transformer encoder architecture. We use visualizations and dimensionality reduction techniques to demonstrate the similarity of real and generated time-series data. We also compare the quality of our generated data with the best existing alternative, which is an RNN-based time-series GAN. 以时间序列形式出现的信号测量是医疗机器学习应用中最常见的数据类型之一。然而，此类数据集通常很小，导致深度神经网络架构的训练效率低下。对于时间序列，我们可以用来扩展数据集大小的数据增强技巧套件受到维护信号基本属性的需要的限制。生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的数据可以用作另一种数据增强工具。基于 RNN 的 GAN 无法有效地对具有不规则时间关系的长数据点序列进行建模。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 TTS-GAN，这是一种基于 Transformer 的 GAN，它可以成功生成任意长度的真实合成时间序列数据序列，与真实数据序列类似。 GAN 模型的生成器和鉴别器网络都是使用纯 Transformer 编码器架构构建的。我们使用可视化和降维技术来证明真实和生成的时间序列数据的相似性。我们还将生成数据的质量与现有的最佳替代方案（基于 RNN 的时间序列 GAN）进行比较。 本文提出TTS-GAN，一种基于Transformer的生成对抗网络，用于生成与真实时间序列数据相似的合成数据。 Xiaomin Li,Vangelis Metsis,Huangyingrui Wang,Anne Hee Hiong Ngu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Weiqing Wang,Xiaoyi Qin,Ming Li
title: Cross-Channel Attention-Based Target Speaker Voice Activity Detection: Experimental Results for M2MeT Challenge
title_zh: 基于跨通道注意力的目标说话者语音活动检测：M2MeT 挑战赛的实验结果
abstract: In this paper, we present the speaker diarization system for the Multi-channel Multi-party Meeting Transcription Challenge (M2MeT) from team DKU_DukeECE. As the highly overlapped speech exists in the dataset, we employ an x-vector-based target-speaker voice activity detection (TS-VAD) to find the overlap between speakers. For the single-channel scenario, we separately train a model for each of the 8 channels and fuse the results. We also employ the cross-channel self-attention to further improve the performance, where the non-linear spatial correlations between different channels are learned and fused. Experimental results on the evaluation set show that the single-channel TS-VAD reduces the DER by over 75% from 12.68\% to 3.14%. The multi-channel TS-VAD further reduces the DER by 28% and achieves a DER of 2.26%. Our final submitted system achieves a DER of 2.98% on the AliMeeting test set, which ranks 1st in the M2MET challenge.
summary: In this paper, we present the speaker diarization system for the Multi-channel Multi-party Meeting Transcription Challenge (M2MeT) from team DKU_DukeECE. As the highly overlapped speech exists in the dataset, we employ an x-vector-based target-speaker voice activity detection (TS-VAD) to find the overlap between speakers. For the single-channel scenario, we separately train a model for each of the 8 channels and fuse the results. We also employ the cross-channel self-attention to further improve the performance, where the non-linear spatial correlations between different channels are learned and fused. Experimental results on the evaluation set show that the single-channel TS-VAD reduces the DER by over 75% from 12.68\% to 3.14%. The multi-channel TS-VAD further reduces the DER by 28% and achieves a DER of 2.26%. Our final submitted system achieves a DER of 2.98% on the AliMeeting test set, which ranks 1st in the M2MET challenge.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们展示了 DKU_DukeECE 团队针对多通道多方会议转录挑战赛 (M2MeT) 的发言者分类系统。由于数据集中存在高度重叠的语音，我们采用基于 x 向量的目标说话者语音活动检测 (TS-VAD) 来查找说话者之间的重叠。对于单通道场景，我们分别为 8 个通道训练一个模型并融合结果。我们还利用跨通道自注意力来进一步提高性能，其中不同通道之间的非线性空间相关性被学习和融合。评估集上的实验结果表明，单通道T​​S-VAD将DER降低了75%以上，从12.68%降低到3.14%。多通道TS-VAD进一步将DER降低了28%，实现了2.26%的DER。我们最终提交的系统在 AliMeeting 测试集上获得了 2.98% 的 DER，在 M2MET 挑战中排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于跨通道注意力的目标说话人语音活动检测（TS-VAD）系统，用于多通道多方会议转录挑战（M2MeT），以处理高度重叠的语音问题。
AI.motivation: 由于M2MeT数据集中存在高度重叠的语音，传统方法难以准确检测目标说话人语音活动，因此需要更高效的跨通道信息融合技术。
AI.method: 采用x-vector基于的TS-VAD模型，对单通道分别训练并融合结果；引入跨通道自注意力机制，学习不同通道间的非线性空间相关性以提升性能。
AI.result: 单通道TS-VAD将DER从12.68%降至3.14%，多通道进一步降至2.26%；最终系统在AliMeeting测试集上达到2.98%的DER，位列M2MeT挑战赛第一。
AI.conclusion: 跨通道注意力机制有效提升了多通道语音重叠场景下的目标说话人检测性能，验证了该方法在复杂会议场景中的优越性。

authors_text: Sha Yi,Zeynep Temel,Katia Sycara
title: PuzzleBots: Physical Coupling of Robot Swarms
title_zh: PuzzleBots：机器人群的物理耦合
comment: ef:2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), pp. 8742-8748
comments: ef:2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), pp. 8742-8748
abstract: Robot swarms have been shown to improve the ability of individual robots by inter-robot collaboration. In this paper, we present the PuzzleBots - a low-cost robotic swarm system where robots can physically couple with each other to form functional structures with minimum energy consumption while maintaining individual mobility to navigate within the environment. Each robot has knobs and holes along the sides of its body so that the robots can couple by inserting the knobs into the holes. We present the characterization of knob design and the result of gap-crossing behavior with up to nine robots. We show with hardware experiments that the robots are able to couple with each other to cross gaps and decouple to perform individual tasks. We anticipate the PuzzleBots will be useful in unstructured environments as individuals and coupled systems in real-world applications.
summary: Robot swarms have been shown to improve the ability of individual robots by inter-robot collaboration. In this paper, we present the PuzzleBots - a low-cost robotic swarm system where robots can physically couple with each other to form functional structures with minimum energy consumption while maintaining individual mobility to navigate within the environment. Each robot has knobs and holes along the sides of its body so that the robots can couple by inserting the knobs into the holes. We present the characterization of knob design and the result of gap-crossing behavior with up to nine robots. We show with hardware experiments that the robots are able to couple with each other to cross gaps and decouple to perform individual tasks. We anticipate the PuzzleBots will be useful in unstructured environments as individuals and coupled systems in real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 机器人群已被证明可以通过机器人间协作来提高单个机器人的能力。在本文中，我们提出了 PuzzleBots - 一种低成本的机器人群系统，机器人可以在物理上相互耦合，以最小的能耗形成功能结构，同时保持个体在环境中导航的移动性。每个机器人的身体两侧都有旋钮和孔，这样机器人就可以通过将旋钮插入孔中来进行耦合。我们展示了旋钮设计的特征以及多达九个机器人的间隙跨越行为的结果。我们通过硬件实验表明，机器人能够相互耦合以跨越间隙并解耦以执行单独的任务。我们预计 PuzzleBot 将在非结构化环境中作为实际应用中的个体和耦合系统发挥作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种低成本机器人集群系统PuzzleBots，通过物理耦合实现机器人间协作，同时保持个体移动性以适应复杂环境。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人集群在协作效率与能量消耗方面存在不足，需开发更适应非结构化环境的低成本解决方案。
AI.method: 设计带有凸起与孔洞的机器人结构，通过硬件实验验证最多九台机器人物理耦合的间隙跨越能力及分离任务执行能力。
AI.result: 实验表明机器人可成功物理连接跨越障碍，并在需要时分离执行独立任务，验证了系统可行性。
AI.conclusion: PuzzleBots在保持个体机动性的同时实现协作，为非结构化场景下的实际应用提供了有效方案。

authors_text: Jacob Mackay,David Johnson,Graham Brooker
title: Autocorrelation, Wigner and Ambiguity Transforms on Polygons for Coherent Radiation Rendering
title_zh: 用于相干辐射渲染的多边形上的自相关、维格纳和模糊变换
abstract: Simulating the radar illumination of large scenes generally relies on a geometric model of light transport which largely ignores prominent wave effects. This can be remedied through coherence ray-tracing, but this requires the Wigner transform of the aperture. This diffraction function has been historically difficult to generate, and is relevant in the fields of optics, holography, synchrotron-radiation, quantum systems and radar. In this paper we provide the Wigner transform of arbitrary polygons through geometric transforms and the Stokes Fourier transform; and display its use in Monte-Carlo rendering.
summary: Simulating the radar illumination of large scenes generally relies on a geometric model of light transport which largely ignores prominent wave effects. This can be remedied through coherence ray-tracing, but this requires the Wigner transform of the aperture. This diffraction function has been historically difficult to generate, and is relevant in the fields of optics, holography, synchrotron-radiation, quantum systems and radar. In this paper we provide the Wigner transform of arbitrary polygons through geometric transforms and the Stokes Fourier transform; and display its use in Monte-Carlo rendering.
abstract_zh: 模拟大场景的雷达照明通常依赖于光传输的几何模型，该模型在很大程度上忽略了显着的波效应。这可以通过相干光线追踪来补救，但这需要孔径的维格纳变换。这种衍射函数在历史上一直难以生成，并且与光学、全息术、同步辐射、量子系统和雷达领域相关。在本文中，我们通过几何变换和斯托克斯傅里叶变换提供了任意多边形的维格纳变换；并展示其在蒙特卡罗渲染中的使用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于几何变换和Stokes傅里叶变换的多边形Wigner变换方法，用于相干辐射渲染。
AI.motivation: 传统几何模型忽略波效应，导致雷达和光学场景模拟不够精确，需通过Wigner变换处理相干辐射，但其生成复杂且计算困难。
AI.method: 结合几何变换与Stokes傅里叶变换，计算任意多边形的Wigner变换，并将其集成到蒙特卡洛渲染框架中。
AI.result: 成功实现了多边形Wigner变换的计算，并在蒙特卡洛渲染中验证其有效性，显著提升复杂场景的波效应模拟精度。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效解决了Wigner变换的生成难题，为光学、雷达等领域的相干辐射模拟提供了高效工具，推动相关技术的发展。

authors_text: Vasilis Livanos,Ruta Mehta,Aniket Murhekar
title: (Almost) Envy-Free, Proportional and Efficient Allocations of an Indivisible Mixed Manna
title_zh: （几乎）无嫉妒、按比例且有效地分配不可分割的混合甘露
abstract: We study the problem of finding fair and efficient allocations of a set of indivisible items to a set of agents, where each item may be a good (positively valued) for some agents and a bad (negatively valued) for others, i.e., a mixed manna. As fairness notions, we consider arguably the strongest possible relaxations of envy-freeness and proportionality, namely envy-free up to any item (EFX and EFX$_0$), and proportional up to the maximin good or any bad (PropMX and PropMX$_0$). Our efficiency notion is Pareto-optimality (PO). We study two types of instances: (i) Separable, where the item set can be partitioned into goods and bads, and (ii) Restricted mixed goods (RMG), where for each item $j$, every agent has either a non-positive value for $j$, or values $j$ at the same $v_j>0$. We obtain polynomial-time algorithms for the following: (i) Separable instances: PropMX$_0$ allocation. (ii) RMG instances: Let pure bads be the set of items that everyone values negatively. - PropMX allocation for general pure bads. - EFX+PropMX allocation for identically-ordered pure bads. - EFX+PropMX+PO allocation for identical pure bads. Finally, if the RMG instances are further restricted to binary mixed goods where all the $v_j$'s are the same, we strengthen the results to guarantee EFX$_0$ and PropMX$_0$ respectively.
summary: We study the problem of finding fair and efficient allocations of a set of indivisible items to a set of agents, where each item may be a good (positively valued) for some agents and a bad (negatively valued) for others, i.e., a mixed manna. As fairness notions, we consider arguably the strongest possible relaxations of envy-freeness and proportionality, namely envy-free up to any item (EFX and EFX$_0$), and proportional up to the maximin good or any bad (PropMX and PropMX$_0$). Our efficiency notion is Pareto-optimality (PO). We study two types of instances: (i) Separable, where the item set can be partitioned into goods and bads, and (ii) Restricted mixed goods (RMG), where for each item $j$, every agent has either a non-positive value for $j$, or values $j$ at the same $v_j>0$. We obtain polynomial-time algorithms for the following: (i) Separable instances: PropMX$_0$ allocation. (ii) RMG instances: Let pure bads be the set of items that everyone values negatively. - PropMX allocation for general pure bads. - EFX+PropMX allocation for identically-ordered pure bads. - EFX+PropMX+PO allocation for identical pure bads. Finally, if the RMG instances are further restricted to binary mixed goods where all the $v_j$'s are the same, we strengthen the results to guarantee EFX$_0$ and PropMX$_0$ respectively.
abstract_zh: 我们研究的问题是找到一组不可分割的项目到一组代理的公平和有效的分配，其中每个项目对于某些代理来说可能是好的（正值），而对于其他代理来说是坏的（负值），即混合甘露。作为公平概念，我们认为可以说是对无嫉妒性和比例性的最强可能的放松，即对任何项目（EFX 和 EFX$_0$）都没有嫉妒，并且对最大最小好或任何坏（PropMX 和 PropMX$_0$）成比例。我们的效率概念是帕累托最优（PO）。我们研究两种类型的实例：（i）可分离，其中项目集可以分为好和坏，以及（ii）受限制的混合商品（RMG），其中对于每个项目$j$，每个代理对于$j$要么具有非正值，要么在相同的$v_j>0$处具有$j$值。我们获得以下多项式时间算法： (i) 可分离实例：PropMX$_0$ 分配。 (ii) RMG 实例：让纯坏品成为每个人都负面评价的物品集合。 - 一般纯不良的 PropMX 分配。 - EFX+PropMX 分配相同顺序的纯坏蛋。 - EFX+PropMX+PO 分配相同的纯不良品。最后，如果 RMG 实例进一步限制为所有 $v_j$ 相同的二进制混合商品，我们将加强结果以分别保证 EFX$_0$ 和 PropMX$_0$。

AI.tldr: 研究如何将不可分的混合物品（对不同代理是商品或坏物）公平且高效分配，满足近似无嫉妒、比例性和帕累托最优。
AI.motivation: 混合物品分配在现实场景中普遍存在，但传统公平分配方法难以同时满足无嫉妒、比例性和效率，需设计针对混合物品的放松条件与算法。
AI.method: 针对可分离实例和受限混合商品实例，提出多项式时间算法，结合近似无嫉妒（EFX）与比例性（PropMX）条件，并利用物品价值结构优化分配。
AI.result: 为可分离实例提供PropMX0分配；对受限混合商品实例，分别实现PropMX、EFX+PropMX及EFX+PropMX+PO分配，且在二元混合商品下进一步强化为EFX0和PropMX0。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化问题划分与条件放松，论文为混合物品分配提供了多项式时间解决方案，推动了公平与效率兼顾的分配理论发展。
