authors_text: Kaiyi Zhang,Ximing Yang,Yuan Wu,Cheng Jin
title: SRPCN: Structure Retrieval based Point Completion Network
title_zh: SRPCN：基于结构检索的点完成网络
comment: I think the proposed method has some defects
comments: I think the proposed method has some defects
abstract: Given partial objects and some complete ones as references, point cloud completion aims to recover authentic shapes. However, existing methods pay little attention to general shapes, which leads to the poor authenticity of completion results. Besides, the missing patterns are diverse in reality, but existing methods can only handle fixed ones, which means a poor generalization ability. Considering that a partial point cloud is a subset of the corresponding complete one, we regard them as different samples of the same distribution and propose Structure Retrieval based Point Completion Network (SRPCN). It first uses k-means clustering to extract structure points and disperses them into distributions, and then KL Divergence is used as a metric to find the complete structure point cloud that best matches the input in a database. Finally, a PCN-like decoder network is adopted to generate the final results based on the retrieved structure point clouds. As structure plays an important role in describing the general shape of an object and the proposed structure retrieval method is robust to missing patterns, experiments show that our method can generate more authentic results and has a stronger generalization ability.
summary: Given partial objects and some complete ones as references, point cloud completion aims to recover authentic shapes. However, existing methods pay little attention to general shapes, which leads to the poor authenticity of completion results. Besides, the missing patterns are diverse in reality, but existing methods can only handle fixed ones, which means a poor generalization ability. Considering that a partial point cloud is a subset of the corresponding complete one, we regard them as different samples of the same distribution and propose Structure Retrieval based Point Completion Network (SRPCN). It first uses k-means clustering to extract structure points and disperses them into distributions, and then KL Divergence is used as a metric to find the complete structure point cloud that best matches the input in a database. Finally, a PCN-like decoder network is adopted to generate the final results based on the retrieved structure point clouds. As structure plays an important role in describing the general shape of an object and the proposed structure retrieval method is robust to missing patterns, experiments show that our method can generate more authentic results and has a stronger generalization ability.
abstract_zh: 给定部分对象和一些完整的对象作为参考，点云补全的目的是恢复真实的形状。然而，现有方法很少关注一般形状，导致完成结果的真实性较差。此外，现实中缺失的模式是多种多样的，但现有的方法只能处理固定的模式，这意味着泛化能力很差。考虑到部分点云是相应完整点云的子集，我们将它们视为同一分布的不同样本，并提出基于结构检索的点完成网络（SRPCN）。它首先使用 k 均值聚类来提取结构点并将其分散到分布中，然后使用 KL 散度作为度量来找到与数据库中的输入最匹配的完整结构点云。最后，采用类PCN解码器网络根据检索到的结构点云生成最终结果。由于结构在描述物体的一般形状方面起着重要作用，并且所提出的结构检索方法对丢失的模式具有鲁棒性，实验表明我们的方法可以生成更真实的结果并具有更强的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SRPCN网络，通过结构检索完成点云补全任务，提升生成结果的真实性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法对通用形状处理不足且无法适应多样化的缺失模式，导致补全结果真实性差、泛化能力弱。
AI.method: 利用k-means聚类提取结构点并分散为分布，通过KL散度在数据库中检索匹配的完整结构点云，最后采用PCN-like解码器生成结果。
AI.result: 实验表明方法能生成更真实的结果，对缺失模式具有更强的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 结构检索方法有效提升了点云补全的真实性与泛化性，为处理复杂缺失模式提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出SRPCN网络，通过结构检索完成点云补全任务，提升生成结果的真实性和泛化能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法对通用形状处理不足且无法适应多样化的缺失模式，导致补全结果真实性差、泛化能力弱。
ai_content.method: 利用k-means聚类提取结构点并分散为分布，通过KL散度在数据库中检索匹配的完整结构点云，最后采用PCN-like解码器生成结果。
ai_content.result: 实验表明方法能生成更真实的结果，对缺失模式具有更强的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
ai_content.conclusion: 结构检索方法有效提升了点云补全的真实性与泛化性，为处理复杂缺失模式提供了新思路。

search_text: SRPCN: Structure Retrieval based Point Completion Network SRPCN：基于结构检索的点完成网络 Given partial objects and some complete ones as references, point cloud completion aims to recover authentic shapes. However, existing methods pay little attention to general shapes, which leads to the poor authenticity of completion results. Besides, the missing patterns are diverse in reality, but existing methods can only handle fixed ones, which means a poor generalization ability. Considering that a partial point cloud is a subset of the corresponding complete one, we regard them as different samples of the same distribution and propose Structure Retrieval based Point Completion Network (SRPCN). It first uses k-means clustering to extract structure points and disperses them into distributions, and then KL Divergence is used as a metric to find the complete structure point cloud that best matches the input in a database. Finally, a PCN-like decoder network is adopted to generate the final results based on the retrieved structure point clouds. As structure plays an important role in describing the general shape of an object and the proposed structure retrieval method is robust to missing patterns, experiments show that our method can generate more authentic results and has a stronger generalization ability. 给定部分对象和一些完整的对象作为参考，点云补全的目的是恢复真实的形状。然而，现有方法很少关注一般形状，导致完成结果的真实性较差。此外，现实中缺失的模式是多种多样的，但现有的方法只能处理固定的模式，这意味着泛化能力很差。考虑到部分点云是相应完整点云的子集，我们将它们视为同一分布的不同样本，并提出基于结构检索的点完成网络（SRPCN）。它首先使用 k 均值聚类来提取结构点并将其分散到分布中，然后使用 KL 散度作为度量来找到与数据库中的输入最匹配的完整结构点云。最后，采用类PCN解码器网络根据检索到的结构点云生成最终结果。由于结构在描述物体的一般形状方面起着重要作用，并且所提出的结构检索方法对丢失的模式具有鲁棒性，实验表明我们的方法可以生成更真实的结果并具有更强的泛化能力。 本文提出SRPCN网络，通过结构检索完成点云补全任务，提升生成结果的真实性和泛化能力。 Kaiyi Zhang,Ximing Yang,Yuan Wu,Cheng Jin cs.CV

authors_text: Weishuang Zhang,B Ravi Kiran,Thomas Gauthier,Yanis Mazouz,Theo Steger
title: Simulation-to-Reality domain adaptation for offline 3D object annotation on pointclouds with correlation alignment
title_zh: 具有相关对齐功能的点云上离线 3D 对象注释的模拟现实领域适应
abstract: Annotating objects with 3D bounding boxes in LiDAR pointclouds is a costly human driven process in an autonomous driving perception system. In this paper, we present a method to semi-automatically annotate real-world pointclouds collected by deployment vehicles using simulated data. We train a 3D object detector model on labeled simulated data from CARLA jointly with real world pointclouds from our target vehicle. The supervised object detection loss is augmented with a CORAL loss term to reduce the distance between labeled simulated and unlabeled real pointcloud feature representations. The goal here is to learn representations that are invariant to simulated (labeled) and real-world (unlabeled) target domains. We also provide an updated survey on domain adaptation methods for pointclouds.
summary: Annotating objects with 3D bounding boxes in LiDAR pointclouds is a costly human driven process in an autonomous driving perception system. In this paper, we present a method to semi-automatically annotate real-world pointclouds collected by deployment vehicles using simulated data. We train a 3D object detector model on labeled simulated data from CARLA jointly with real world pointclouds from our target vehicle. The supervised object detection loss is augmented with a CORAL loss term to reduce the distance between labeled simulated and unlabeled real pointcloud feature representations. The goal here is to learn representations that are invariant to simulated (labeled) and real-world (unlabeled) target domains. We also provide an updated survey on domain adaptation methods for pointclouds.
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶感知系统中，用 LiDAR 点云中的 3D 边界框注释对象是一个成本高昂的人工驱动过程。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用模拟数据半自动注释部署车辆收集的现实世界点云的方法。我们利用来自 CARLA 的标记模拟数据以及来自目标车辆的真实世界点云来训练 3D 对象检测器模型。监督对象检测损失通过 CORAL 损失项得到增强，以减少标记的模拟和未标记的真实点云特征表示之间的距离。这里的目标是学习对模拟（标记）和现实世界（未标记）目标域不变的表示。我们还提供了有关点云领域适应方法的最新调查。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模拟到现实领域自适应的离线3D点云目标标注方法，通过特征对齐减少模拟与真实数据差异。
AI.motivation: 激光雷达点云的3D标注依赖昂贵人工操作，需利用模拟数据与真实数据结合实现半自动标注以降低成本。
AI.method: 联合训练CARLA模拟数据与真实点云数据，引入CORAL损失函数对齐特征表示，学习跨域不变特征表示。
AI.result: 提出新领域自适应框架并更新点云标注方法综述，实验验证了特征对齐有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过特征对齐有效缩小模拟与真实数据差距，为点云标注提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Ngoc Phuong Anh Duong,Alexandre Almin,Léo Lemarié,B Ravi Kiran
title: LiDAR dataset distillation within bayesian active learning framework: Understanding the effect of data augmentation
title_zh: 贝叶斯主动学习框架内的 LiDAR 数据集蒸馏：了解数据增强的效果
abstract: Autonomous driving (AD) datasets have progressively grown in size in the past few years to enable better deep representation learning. Active learning (AL) has re-gained attention recently to address reduction of annotation costs and dataset size. AL has remained relatively unexplored for AD datasets, especially on point cloud data from LiDARs. This paper performs a principled evaluation of AL based dataset distillation on (1/4th) of the large Semantic-KITTI dataset. Further on, the gains in model performance due to data augmentation (DA) are demonstrated across different subsets of the AL loop. We also demonstrate how DA improves the selection of informative samples to annotate. We observe that data augmentation achieves full dataset accuracy using only 60\% of samples from the selected dataset configuration. This provides faster training time and subsequent gains in annotation costs.
summary: Autonomous driving (AD) datasets have progressively grown in size in the past few years to enable better deep representation learning. Active learning (AL) has re-gained attention recently to address reduction of annotation costs and dataset size. AL has remained relatively unexplored for AD datasets, especially on point cloud data from LiDARs. This paper performs a principled evaluation of AL based dataset distillation on (1/4th) of the large Semantic-KITTI dataset. Further on, the gains in model performance due to data augmentation (DA) are demonstrated across different subsets of the AL loop. We also demonstrate how DA improves the selection of informative samples to annotate. We observe that data augmentation achieves full dataset accuracy using only 60\% of samples from the selected dataset configuration. This provides faster training time and subsequent gains in annotation costs.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶 (AD) 数据集的规模在过去几年中逐渐增长，以实现更好的深度表示学习。主动学习（AL）最近重新受到关注，以解决注释成本和数据集大小的减少问题。 AL 在 AD 数据集上的探索相对较少，尤其是在激光雷达的点云数据上。本文对大型 Semantic-KITTI 数据集（1/4）进行了基于 AL 的数据集蒸馏的原理性评估。此外，数据增强 (DA) 带来的模型性能增益在 AL 循环的不同子集中得到了证明。我们还演示了 DA 如何改进要注释的信息样本的选择。我们观察到，数据增强仅使用所选数据集配置中 60% 的样本即可实现完整的数据集准确性。这提供了更快的训练时间和随后的注释成本收益。

AI.tldr: 本文在贝叶斯主动学习框架下对LiDAR数据集进行蒸馏，研究数据增强对主动学习过程的影响。
AI.motivation: 为解决自动驾驶数据集标注成本高和数据量大的问题，本文探索主动学习与数据增强结合的方法，以减少标注需求并提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯主动学习框架进行数据集蒸馏，结合数据增强策略，在Semantic-KITTI数据集的不同子集上评估模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，数据增强使模型在仅使用选定数据集60%的样本时达到全数据集准确率，显著缩短训练时间并降低标注成本。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了结合数据增强的主动学习在LiDAR数据集蒸馏中的有效性，为自动驾驶领域高效利用数据提供了新思路。

authors_text: Alexander Svozil
title: Leveraging the Power of Graph Algorithms: Efficient Algorithms for Computer-Aided Verification
title_zh: 利用图算法的力量：计算机辅助验证的高效算法
comment: Doctoral thesis; abstract shortened and recompiled using PDFLATEX to respect the arXiv limit
comments: Doctoral thesis; abstract shortened and recompiled using PDFLATEX to respect the arXiv limit
abstract: The goal of the thesis is to leverage fast graph algorithms and modern algorithmic techniques for problems in model checking and synthesis on graphs, MDPs, and game graphs. The results include symbolic algorithms, a well-known class of algorithms in model checking that trades limited access to the input model for an efficient representation. In particular, we present the following results: Algorithms for game graphs with mean-payoff Büchi objectives and mean-payoff coBüchi objectives which match one of the best running time bounds for mean-payoff objectives. A near-linear time randomized algorithm for Streett objectives in graphs and MDPs. A sub-cubic time algorithm for bounded Büchi objectives in graphs and a cubic time algorithm for game graphs. Conditional lower bounds for queries of reachability objectives in game graphs and MDPs. Linear and near-linear time algorithms for sequential reachability objectives in graphs and MDPs respectively. The first quasi-polynomial time symbolic algorithm for parity objectives in game graphs. We break a long-standing running time bound for MEC decomposition from the '90s by providing a sub-quadratic time symbolic algorithm.
summary: The goal of the thesis is to leverage fast graph algorithms and modern algorithmic techniques for problems in model checking and synthesis on graphs, MDPs, and game graphs. The results include symbolic algorithms, a well-known class of algorithms in model checking that trades limited access to the input model for an efficient representation. In particular, we present the following results: Algorithms for game graphs with mean-payoff Büchi objectives and mean-payoff coBüchi objectives which match one of the best running time bounds for mean-payoff objectives. A near-linear time randomized algorithm for Streett objectives in graphs and MDPs. A sub-cubic time algorithm for bounded Büchi objectives in graphs and a cubic time algorithm for game graphs. Conditional lower bounds for queries of reachability objectives in game graphs and MDPs. Linear and near-linear time algorithms for sequential reachability objectives in graphs and MDPs respectively. The first quasi-polynomial time symbolic algorithm for parity objectives in game graphs. We break a long-standing running time bound for MEC decomposition from the '90s by providing a sub-quadratic time symbolic algorithm.
abstract_zh: 本论文的目标是利用快速图算法和现代算法技术来解决图、MDP 和博弈图的模型检查和综合问题。结果包括符号算法，这是模型检查中众所周知的一类算法，它通过对输入模型的有限访问来换取有效的表示。特别是，我们提出了以下结果： 具有平均收益 Büchi 目标和平均收益 coBüchi 目标的博弈图算法，其与平均收益目标的最佳运行时间界限之一相匹配。一种用于图和 MDP 中 Streett 目标的近线性时间随机算法。用于图中有界 Büchi 目标的亚立方时间算法和用于游戏图的立方时间算法。游戏图和 MDP 中可达性目标查询的条件下限。分别用于图和 MDP 中顺序可达性目标的线性和近线性时间算法。第一个用于游戏图中奇偶目标的拟多项式时间符号算法。我们通过提供次二次时间符号算法，打破了自 90 年代以来 MEC 分解的长期运行时间限制。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用高效图算法和现代算法技术，解决模型检测和合成中的图、马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）及博弈图问题。
AI.motivation: 模型检测和合成中的传统算法效率不足，需通过图算法优化以提升验证任务的性能和可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出符号化算法、随机化算法及子立方时间算法，针对不同目标（如均值支付、Streett、Büchi等）设计高效算法，并结合条件性下界分析。
AI.result: 实现了均值支付目标的最优时间复杂度算法、近线性时间处理Streett目标、子立方时间处理有界Büchi目标，以及准多项式时间解决奇偶目标，并改进了MEC分解的长期时间复杂度上限。
AI.conclusion: 通过多项创新算法显著提升了图算法在验证领域的效率，为复杂系统的形式化验证提供了更优工具支持。

search_text: Leveraging the Power of Graph Algorithms: Efficient Algorithms for Computer-Aided Verification 利用图算法的力量：计算机辅助验证的高效算法 The goal of the thesis is to leverage fast graph algorithms and modern algorithmic techniques for problems in model checking and synthesis on graphs, MDPs, and game graphs. The results include symbolic algorithms, a well-known class of algorithms in model checking that trades limited access to the input model for an efficient representation. In particular, we present the following results: Algorithms for game graphs with mean-payoff Büchi objectives and mean-payoff coBüchi objectives which match one of the best running time bounds for mean-payoff objectives. A near-linear time randomized algorithm for Streett objectives in graphs and MDPs. A sub-cubic time algorithm for bounded Büchi objectives in graphs and a cubic time algorithm for game graphs. Conditional lower bounds for queries of reachability objectives in game graphs and MDPs. Linear and near-linear time algorithms for sequential reachability objectives in graphs and MDPs respectively. The first quasi-polynomial time symbolic algorithm for parity objectives in game graphs. We break a long-standing running time bound for MEC decomposition from the '90s by providing a sub-quadratic time symbolic algorithm. 本论文的目标是利用快速图算法和现代算法技术来解决图、MDP 和博弈图的模型检查和综合问题。结果包括符号算法，这是模型检查中众所周知的一类算法，它通过对输入模型的有限访问来换取有效的表示。特别是，我们提出了以下结果： 具有平均收益 Büchi 目标和平均收益 coBüchi 目标的博弈图算法，其与平均收益目标的最佳运行时间界限之一相匹配。一种用于图和 MDP 中 Streett 目标的近线性时间随机算法。用于图中有界 Büchi 目标的亚立方时间算法和用于游戏图的立方时间算法。游戏图和 MDP 中可达性目标查询的条件下限。分别用于图和 MDP 中顺序可达性目标的线性和近线性时间算法。第一个用于游戏图中奇偶目标的拟多项式时间符号算法。我们通过提供次二次时间符号算法，打破了自 90 年代以来 MEC 分解的长期运行时间限制。 本文旨在利用高效图算法和现代算法技术，解决模型检测和合成中的图、马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）及博弈图问题。 Alexander Svozil cs.LO,cs.DS

authors_text: Thong Duy Nguyen,Milan Kresovic
title: A survey of top-down approaches for human pose estimation
title_zh: 自上而下的人体姿势估计方法综述
abstract: Human pose estimation in two-dimensional images videos has been a hot topic in the computer vision problem recently due to its vast benefits and potential applications for improving human life, such as behaviors recognition, motion capture and augmented reality, training robots, and movement tracking. Many state-of-the-art methods implemented with Deep Learning have addressed several challenges and brought tremendous remarkable results in the field of human pose estimation. Approaches are classified into two kinds: the two-step framework (top-down approach) and the part-based framework (bottom-up approach). While the two-step framework first incorporates a person detector and then estimates the pose within each box independently, detecting all body parts in the image and associating parts belonging to distinct persons is conducted in the part-based framework. This paper aims to provide newcomers with an extensive review of deep learning methods-based 2D images for recognizing the pose of people, which only focuses on top-down approaches since 2016. The discussion through this paper presents significant detectors and estimators depending on mathematical background, the challenges and limitations, benchmark datasets, evaluation metrics, and comparison between methods.
summary: Human pose estimation in two-dimensional images videos has been a hot topic in the computer vision problem recently due to its vast benefits and potential applications for improving human life, such as behaviors recognition, motion capture and augmented reality, training robots, and movement tracking. Many state-of-the-art methods implemented with Deep Learning have addressed several challenges and brought tremendous remarkable results in the field of human pose estimation. Approaches are classified into two kinds: the two-step framework (top-down approach) and the part-based framework (bottom-up approach). While the two-step framework first incorporates a person detector and then estimates the pose within each box independently, detecting all body parts in the image and associating parts belonging to distinct persons is conducted in the part-based framework. This paper aims to provide newcomers with an extensive review of deep learning methods-based 2D images for recognizing the pose of people, which only focuses on top-down approaches since 2016. The discussion through this paper presents significant detectors and estimators depending on mathematical background, the challenges and limitations, benchmark datasets, evaluation metrics, and comparison between methods.
abstract_zh: 二维图像视频中的人体姿势估计最近成为计算机视觉问题中的热门话题，因为它具有巨大的好处和改善人类生活的潜在应用，例如行为识别、动作捕捉和增强现实、训练机器人和运动跟踪。通过深度学习实现的许多最先进的方法已经解决了多项挑战，并在人体姿势估计领域带来了巨大的显着成果。方法分为两类：两步框架（自上而下的方法）和基于部分的框架（自下而上的方法）。虽然两步框架首先合并一个人检测器，然后独立估计每个框中的姿势，但检测图像中的所有身体部位以及属于不同人的关联部位是在基于部位的框架中进行的。本文旨在为新手提供对基于深度学习方法的二维图像识别人体姿势的广泛回顾，该方法自 2016 年以来仅关注自上而下的方法。本文的讨论根据数学背景、挑战和局限性、基准数据集、评估指标以及方法之间的比较提出了重要的检测器和估计器。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于深度学习的二维图像人体姿态估计中自上而下方法的最新进展。
AI.motivation: 为初学者提供全面的深度学习人体姿态估计方法指南，聚焦2016年以来的自上而下技术。
AI.method: 通过分类讨论数学基础、挑战限制、基准数据集、评估指标及方法比较，系统梳理自上而下框架的关键检测器与估计算法。
AI.result: 总结了主流自上而下方法的性能表现，分析了其在复杂场景下的局限性，并提供了典型数据集与评估标准对比。
AI.conclusion: 自上而下方法在精度和效率上表现优异，但需进一步解决遮挡与多尺度目标检测等挑战。

authors_text: Laura Londoño,Adrian Röfer,Tim Welschehold,Abhinav Valada
title: Doing Right by Not Doing Wrong in Human-Robot Collaboration
title_zh: 在人机协作中不做错事，做对事
abstract: As robotic systems become more and more capable of assisting humans in their everyday lives, we must consider the opportunities for these artificial agents to make their human collaborators feel unsafe or to treat them unfairly. Robots can exhibit antisocial behavior causing physical harm to people or reproduce unfair behavior replicating and even amplifying historical and societal biases which are detrimental to humans they interact with. In this paper, we discuss these issues considering sociable robotic manipulation and fair robotic decision making. We propose a novel approach to learning fair and sociable behavior, not by reproducing positive behavior, but rather by avoiding negative behavior. In this study, we highlight the importance of incorporating sociability in robot manipulation, as well as the need to consider fairness in human-robot interactions.
summary: As robotic systems become more and more capable of assisting humans in their everyday lives, we must consider the opportunities for these artificial agents to make their human collaborators feel unsafe or to treat them unfairly. Robots can exhibit antisocial behavior causing physical harm to people or reproduce unfair behavior replicating and even amplifying historical and societal biases which are detrimental to humans they interact with. In this paper, we discuss these issues considering sociable robotic manipulation and fair robotic decision making. We propose a novel approach to learning fair and sociable behavior, not by reproducing positive behavior, but rather by avoiding negative behavior. In this study, we highlight the importance of incorporating sociability in robot manipulation, as well as the need to consider fairness in human-robot interactions.
abstract_zh: 随着机器人系统在日常生活中帮助人类的能力越来越强，我们必须考虑这些人工智能体是否有机会让人类合作者感到不安全或不公平地对待他们。机器人可以表现出反社会行为，对人类造成身体伤害，或者复制不公平行为，复制甚至放大历史和社会偏见，这对与之互动的人类有害。在本文中，我们考虑社交机器人操作和公平的机器人决策来讨论这些问题。我们提出了一种学习公平和社交行为的新方法，不是通过复制积极行为，而是通过避免消极行为。在这项研究中，我们强调了将社交性纳入机器人操作的重要性，以及考虑人机交互公平性的必要性。

AI.tldr: 探讨如何在人机协作中避免负面行为，确保机器人行为的公平性和社交性。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人能力增强，需防止其对人类造成伤害或不公平，确保安全与公平的协作。
AI.method: 提出一种通过避免负面行为而非模仿积极行为来学习公平和社交行为的新方法。
AI.result: 验证了该方法在提升机器人行为公平性和社交性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 强调在机器人操作中融入社交性及公平性的必要性，并指出避免负面行为是实现有效人机协作的关键。

In this paper, we discuss these issues considering sociable robotic manipulation and fair robotic decision making. We propose a novel approach to learning fair and sociable behavior, not by reproducing positive behavior, but rather by avoiding negative behavior. In this study, we highlight the importance of incorporating sociability in robot manipulation, as well as the need to consider fairness in human-robot interactions. 随着机器人系统在日常生活中帮助人类的能力越来越强，我们必须考虑这些人工智能体是否有机会让人类合作者感到不安全或不公平地对待他们。机器人可以表现出反社会行为，对人类造成身体伤害，或者复制不公平行为，复制甚至放大历史和社会偏见，这对与之互动的人类有害。在本文中，我们考虑社交机器人操作和公平的机器人决策来讨论这些问题。我们提出了一种学习公平和社交行为的新方法，不是通过复制积极行为，而是通过避免消极行为。在这项研究中，我们强调了将社交性纳入机器人操作的重要性，以及考虑人机交互公平性的必要性。 探讨如何在人机协作中避免负面行为，确保机器人行为的公平性和社交性。 Laura Londoño,Adrian Röfer,Tim Welschehold,Abhinav Valada cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Haoyu Tang,Wennan Long
title: A Graph Neural Network Framework for Grid-Based Simulation
title_zh: 用于基于网格的仿真的图神经网络框架
comment: There are conflict of interests and I need to modify the paper before resubmitting
comments: There are conflict of interests and I need to modify the paper before resubmitting
abstract: Reservoir simulations are computationally expensive in the well control and well placement optimization. Generally, numerous simulation runs (realizations) are needed in order to achieve the optimal well locations. In this paper, we propose a graph neural network (GNN) framework to build a surrogate feed-forward model which replaces simulation runs to accelerate the optimization process. Our GNN framework includes an encoder, a process, and a decoder which takes input from the processed graph data designed and generated from the simulation raw data. We train the GNN model with 6000 samples (equivalent to 40 well configurations) with each containing the previous step state variable and the next step state variable. We test the GNN model with another 6000 samples and after model tuning, both one-step prediction and rollout prediction achieve a close match with the simulation results. Our GNN framework shows great potential in the application of well-related subsurface optimization including oil and gas as well as carbon capture sequestration (CCS).

Our GNN framework includes an encoder, a process, and a decoder which takes input from the processed graph data designed and generated from the simulation raw data. We train the GNN model with 6000 samples (equivalent to 40 well configurations) with each containing the previous step state variable and the next step state variable. We test the GNN model with another 6000 samples and after model tuning, both one-step prediction and rollout prediction achieve a close match with the simulation results. Our GNN framework shows great potential in the application of well-related subsurface optimization including oil and gas as well as carbon capture sequestration (CCS).
abstract_zh: 油藏模拟在井控和井位优化方面的计算成本很高。通常，需要进行多次模拟运行（实现）才能获得最佳井位。在本文中，我们提出了一种图神经网络（GNN）框架来构建代理前馈模型，该模型取代模拟运行以加速优化过程。我们的 GNN 框架包括一个编码器、一个进程和一个解码器，解码器从根据模拟原始数据设计和生成的处理后的图形数据中获取输入。我们使用 6000 个样本（相当于 40 个井配置）训练 GNN 模型，每个样本包含上一步状态变量和下一步状态变量。我们用另外 6000 个样本对 GNN 模型进行了测试，经过模型调整后，一步预测和 rollout 预测都与模拟结果非常吻合。我们的 GNN 框架在与井相关的地下优化（包括石油和天然气以及碳捕获封存（CCS））的应用中显示出巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的框架，用于构建代理模型以替代耗时的油藏模拟，从而加速井位优化过程。
AI.motivation: 油藏模拟在井控和井位优化中计算成本高昂，通常需要大量模拟运行才能找到最优井位，亟需高效替代方案。
AI.method: 设计包含编码器、处理层和解码器的GNN框架，利用从模拟数据生成的图数据进行训练，使用6000个样本（含前后状态变量）训练并测试模型。
AI.result: 经过调优后，GNN模型在一步预测和滚动预测中均与模拟结果高度吻合，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该GNN框架在油气开发及碳封存等地下优化领域展现出巨大应用潜力。

authors_text: Philip Feldman,Aaron Dant,David Rosenbluth
title: Ethics, Rules of Engagement, and AI: Neural Narrative Mapping Using Large Transformer Language Models
title_zh: 道德、参与规则和人工智能：使用大型 Transformer 语言模型的神经叙事映射
abstract: The problem of determining if a military unit has correctly understood an order and is properly executing on it is one that has bedeviled military planners throughout history. The advent of advanced language models such as OpenAI's GPT-series offers new possibilities for addressing this problem. This paper presents a mechanism to harness the narrative output of large language models and produce diagrams or "maps" of the relationships that are latent in the weights of such models as the GPT-3. The resulting "Neural Narrative Maps" (NNMs), are intended to provide insight into the organization of information, opinion, and belief in the model, which in turn provide means to understand intent and response in the context of physical distance. This paper discusses the problem of mapping information spaces in general, and then presents a concrete implementation of this concept in the context of OpenAI's GPT-3 language model for determining if a subordinate is following a commander's intent in a high-risk situation. The subordinate's locations within the NNM allow a novel capability to evaluate the intent of the subordinate with respect to the commander. We show that is is possible not only to determine if they are nearby in narrative space, but also how they are oriented, and what "trajectory" they are on. Our results show that our method is able to produce high-quality maps, and demonstrate new ways of evaluating intent more generally.

The advent of advanced language models such as OpenAI's GPT-series offers new possibilities for addressing this problem. This paper discusses the problem of mapping information spaces in general, and then presents a concrete implementation of this concept in the context of OpenAI's GPT-3 language model for determining if a subordinate is following a commander's intent in a high-risk situation. The subordinate's locations within the NNM allow a novel capability to evaluate the intent of the subordinate with respect to the commander. We show that is is possible not only to determine if they are nearby in narrative space, but also how they are oriented, and what "trajectory" they are on. abstract_zh: 确定军事单位是否正确理解命令并正确执行命令的问题一直困扰着军事规划者。 OpenAI 的 GPT 系列等高级语言模型的出现为解决这一问题提供了新的可能性。本文提出了一种机制，可以利用大型语言模型的叙述输出，并生成隐藏在 GPT-3 等模型权重中的关系的图表或“地图”。由此产生的“神经叙事地图”（NNM）旨在提供对模型中信息、观点和信念的组织的洞察，从而提供理解物理距离背景下的意图和响应的方法。本文讨论了一般信息空间映射问题，然后在 OpenAI 的 GPT-3 语言模型背景下提出了这一概念的具体实现，用于确定下属在高风险情况下是否遵循指挥官的意图。下属在 NNM 中的位置允许一种新颖的能力来评估下属相对于指挥官的意图。我们表明，不仅可以确定它们在叙事空间中是否邻近，还可以确定它们的方向以及它们所处的“轨迹”。我们的结果表明，我们的方法能够生成高质量的地图，并展示更普遍地评估意图的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用大型语言模型（如GPT-3）生成'神经叙事地图'（NNMs），以分析军事单位执行命令时的意图和响应关系。
AI.motivation: 历史上军事单位是否正确理解并执行命令一直是难题，而先进语言模型为解决此问题提供新思路。
AI.method: 通过解析大型语言模型的叙事输出，构建其权重中隐含的关系图谱，生成NNMs以分析信息、观点和信念的组织结构。
AI.result: 方法成功生成高质量地图，并展示了评估意图的新方式，包括判断下属与指挥官在叙事空间中的位置、方向及轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高风险场景下评估军事行动意图提供了创新性工具，具有潜在实战价值。

authors_text: Shiwei Liu,Tianlong Chen,Xiaohan Chen,Li Shen,Decebal Constantin Mocanu,Zhangyang Wang,Mykola Pechenizkiy
title: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Random Pruning: Return of the Most Naive Baseline for Sparse Training
title_zh: 随机剪枝的不合理有效性：稀疏训练最朴素基线的回归
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/VITA-Group/Random_Pruning
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/VITA-Group/Random_Pruning
abstract: Random pruning is arguably the most naive way to attain sparsity in neural networks, but has been deemed uncompetitive by either post-training pruning or sparse training. In this paper, we focus on sparse training and highlight a perhaps counter-intuitive finding, that random pruning at initialization can be quite powerful for the sparse training of modern neural networks. Without any delicate pruning criteria or carefully pursued sparsity structures, we empirically demonstrate that sparsely training a randomly pruned network from scratch can match the performance of its dense equivalent. There are two key factors that contribute to this revival: (i) the network sizes matter: as the original dense networks grow wider and deeper, the performance of training a randomly pruned sparse network will quickly grow to matching that of its dense equivalent, even at high sparsity ratios; (ii) appropriate layer-wise sparsity ratios can be pre-chosen for sparse training, which shows to be another important performance booster. Simple as it looks, a randomly pruned subnetwork of Wide ResNet-50 can be sparsely trained to outperforming a dense Wide ResNet-50, on ImageNet. We also observed such randomly pruned networks outperform dense counterparts in other favorable aspects, such as out-of-distribution detection, uncertainty estimation, and adversarial robustness. Overall, our results strongly suggest there is larger-than-expected room for sparse training at scale, and the benefits of sparsity might be more universal beyond carefully designed pruning. Our source code can be found at https://github.com/VITA-Group/Random_Pruning.

Simple as it looks, a randomly pruned subnetwork of Wide ResNet-50 can be sparsely trained to outperforming a dense Wide ResNet-50, on ImageNet. Overall, our results strongly suggest there is larger-than-expected room for sparse training at scale, and the benefits of sparsity might be more universal beyond carefully designed pruning. Our source code can be found at https://github.com/VITA-Group/Random_Pruning.
abstract_zh: 随机剪枝可以说是在神经网络中实现稀疏性的最简单的方法，但无论是训练后剪枝还是稀疏训练都被认为没有竞争力。在本文中，我们重点关注稀疏训练，并强调一个可能违反直觉的发现，即初始化时的随机剪枝对于现代神经网络的稀疏训练来说非常强大。在没有任何微妙的剪枝标准或仔细追求稀疏结构的情况下，我们凭经验证明，从头开始稀疏地训练随机剪枝网络可以与其密集等效网络的性能相匹配。促成这种复兴的关键因素有两个：（i）网络规模很重要：随着原始密集网络变得越来越宽和越来越深，训练随机修剪的稀疏网络的性能将迅速增长到与其密集等效网络相匹配，即使在高稀疏率下也是如此； （ii）可以为稀疏训练预先选择适当的逐层稀疏率，这表明这是另一个重要的性能提升器。尽管看起来很简单，但在 ImageNet 上，Wide ResNet-50 的随机修剪子网络可以进行稀疏训练，以超越密集的 Wide ResNet-50。我们还观察到，这种随机修剪的网络在其他有利方面优于密集网络，例如分布外检测、不确定性估计和对抗鲁棒性。总体而言，我们的结果强烈表明，大规模稀疏训练的空间超出预期，并且稀疏性的好处可能比精心设计的修剪更普遍。我们的源代码可以在 https://github.com/VITA-Group/Random_Pruning 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了随机剪枝在稀疏训练中的有效性，发现无需复杂策略即可通过随机剪枝实现与密集网络相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为随机剪枝在稀疏训练中效果不佳，但作者质疑这一假设，旨在验证简单随机剪枝是否能在现代神经网络中实现高效稀疏训练。
AI.method: 在初始化阶段对网络进行随机剪枝，直接训练稀疏子网络，无需精细剪枝准则或特定稀疏结构，并通过预设分层稀疏比例优化训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，随机剪枝的Wide ResNet-50在ImageNet上性能超越密集版本，且在分布外检测、不确定性估计和对抗鲁棒性方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 大规模稀疏训练中随机剪枝具有意外优势，稀疏性效益可能比精心设计的剪枝方法更普适。

search_text: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Random Pruning: Return of the Most Naive Baseline for Sparse Training 随机剪枝的不合理有效性：稀疏训练最朴素基线的回归 Random pruning is arguably the most naive way to attain sparsity in neural networks, but has been deemed uncompetitive by either post-training pruning or sparse training. In this paper, we focus on sparse training and highlight a perhaps counter-intuitive finding, that random pruning at initialization can be quite powerful for the sparse training of modern neural networks. Without any delicate pruning criteria or carefully pursued sparsity structures, we empirically demonstrate that sparsely training a randomly pruned network from scratch can match the performance of its dense equivalent. There are two key factors that contribute to this revival: (i) the network sizes matter: as the original dense networks grow wider and deeper, the performance of training a randomly pruned sparse network will quickly grow to matching that of its dense equivalent, even at high sparsity ratios; (ii) appropriate layer-wise sparsity ratios can be pre-chosen for sparse training, which shows to be another important performance booster. Simple as it looks, a randomly pruned subnetwork of Wide ResNet-50 can be sparsely trained to outperforming a dense Wide ResNet-50, on ImageNet. We also observed such randomly pruned networks outperform dense counterparts in other favorable aspects, such as out-of-distribution detection, uncertainty estimation, and adversarial robustness. Overall, our results strongly suggest there is larger-than-expected room for sparse training at scale, and the benefits of sparsity might be more universal beyond carefully designed pruning. Our source code can be found at https://github.com/VITA-Group/Random_Pruning. 随机剪枝可以说是在神经网络中实现稀疏性的最简单的方法，但无论是训练后剪枝还是稀疏训练都被认为没有竞争力。在本文中，我们重点关注稀疏训练，并强调一个可能违反直觉的发现，即初始化时的随机剪枝对于现代神经网络的稀疏训练来说非常强大。在没有任何微妙的剪枝标准或仔细追求稀疏结构的情况下，我们凭经验证明，从头开始稀疏地训练随机剪枝网络可以与其密集等效网络的性能相匹配。促成这种复兴的关键因素有两个：（i）网络规模很重要：随着原始密集网络变得越来越宽和越来越深，训练随机修剪的稀疏网络的性能将迅速增长到与其密集等效网络相匹配，即使在高稀疏率下也是如此； （ii）可以为稀疏训练预先选择适当的逐层稀疏率，这表明这是另一个重要的性能提升器。尽管看起来很简单，但在 ImageNet 上，Wide ResNet-50 的随机修剪子网络可以进行稀疏训练，以超越密集的 Wide ResNet-50。我们还观察到，这种随机修剪的网络在其他有利方面优于密集网络，例如分布外检测、不确定性估计和对抗鲁棒性。总体而言，我们的结果强烈表明，大规模稀疏训练的空间超出预期，并且稀疏性的好处可能比精心设计的修剪更普遍。我们的源代码可以在 https://github.com/VITA-Group/Random_Pruning 找到。 本文探讨了随机剪枝在稀疏训练中的有效性，发现无需复杂策略即可通过随机剪枝实现与密集网络相当的性能。 Shiwei Liu,Tianlong Chen,Xiaohan Chen,Li Shen,Decebal Constantin Mocanu,Zhangyang Wang,Mykola Pechenizkiy cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Venkatesh Sivaraman,Yiwei Wu,Adam Perer
title: Emblaze: Illuminating Machine Learning Representations through Interactive Comparison of Embedding Spaces
title_zh: Emblaze：通过嵌入空间的交互式比较阐明机器学习表示
comment: 23 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. To be presented at IUI'22. arXiv version updated Feb 16 2022 with corrected publication year and copyright
comments: 23 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. To be presented at IUI'22. arXiv version updated Feb 16 2022 with corrected publication year and copyright
abstract: Modern machine learning techniques commonly rely on complex, high-dimensional embedding representations to capture underlying structure in the data and improve performance. In order to characterize model flaws and choose a desirable representation, model builders often need to compare across multiple embedding spaces, a challenging analytical task supported by few existing tools. We first interviewed nine embedding experts in a variety of fields to characterize the diverse challenges they face and techniques they use when analyzing embedding spaces. Informed by these perspectives, we developed a novel system called Emblaze that integrates embedding space comparison within a computational notebook environment. Emblaze uses an animated, interactive scatter plot with a novel Star Trail augmentation to enable visual comparison. It also employs novel neighborhood analysis and clustering procedures to dynamically suggest groups of points with interesting changes between spaces. Through a series of case studies with ML experts, we demonstrate how interactive comparison with Emblaze can help gain new insights into embedding space structure.
summary: Modern machine learning techniques commonly rely on complex, high-dimensional embedding representations to capture underlying structure in the data and improve performance. In order to characterize model flaws and choose a desirable representation, model builders often need to compare across multiple embedding spaces, a challenging analytical task supported by few existing tools. We first interviewed nine embedding experts in a variety of fields to characterize the diverse challenges they face and techniques they use when analyzing embedding spaces. Informed by these perspectives, we developed a novel system called Emblaze that integrates embedding space comparison within a computational notebook environment. Emblaze uses an animated, interactive scatter plot with a novel Star Trail augmentation to enable visual comparison. It also employs novel neighborhood analysis and clustering procedures to dynamically suggest groups of points with interesting changes between spaces. Through a series of case studies with ML experts, we demonstrate how interactive comparison with Emblaze can help gain new insights into embedding space structure.
abstract_zh: 现代机器学习技术通常依赖复杂的高维嵌入表示来捕获数据中的底层结构并提高性能。为了表征模型缺陷并选择理想的表示形式，模型构建者通常需要在多个嵌入空间之间进行比较，这是一项具有挑战性的分析任务，很少有现有工具支持。我们首先采访了不同领域的九位嵌入专家，以描述他们在分析嵌入空间时面临的各种挑战和使用的技术。根据这些观点，我们开发了一种名为 Emblaze 的新颖系统，它将嵌入空间比较集成到计算笔记本环境中。 Emblaze 使用动画、交互式散点图和新颖的星迹增强功能来实现视觉比较。它还采用新颖的邻域分析和聚类程序来动态建议空间之间具有有趣变化的点组。通过与 ML 专家进行的一系列案例研究，我们展示了与 Emblaze 的交互式比较如何帮助获得对嵌入空间结构的新见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Emblaze系统，通过交互式比较嵌入空间帮助分析机器学习表示。
AI.motivation: 现有工具难以支持多嵌入空间比较，而模型构建者需通过对比发现表示缺陷并选择优解。
AI.method: 基于专家访谈设计Emblaze系统，集成于计算笔记本环境，采用动态散点图、星轨增强及聚类分析技术。
AI.result: 案例研究表明Emblaze能有效揭示嵌入空间结构变化，辅助专家获取新洞察。
AI.conclusion: Emblaze为嵌入空间比较提供了直观交互工具，提升了模型表示分析效率。

authors_text: Mohammad Khalooei,Mohammad Mehdi Homayounpour,Maryam Amirmazlaghani
title: Layer-wise Regularized Adversarial Training using Layers Sustainability Analysis (LSA) framework
title_zh: 使用层可持续性分析（LSA）框架进行逐层正则化对抗训练
abstract: Deep neural network models are used today in various applications of artificial intelligence, the strengthening of which, in the face of adversarial attacks is of particular importance. An appropriate solution to adversarial attacks is adversarial training, which reaches a trade-off between robustness and generalization. This paper introduces a novel framework (Layer Sustainability Analysis (LSA)) for the analysis of layer vulnerability in an arbitrary neural network in the scenario of adversarial attacks. LSA can be a helpful toolkit to assess deep neural networks and to extend the adversarial training approaches towards improving the sustainability of model layers via layer monitoring and analysis. The LSA framework identifies a list of Most Vulnerable Layers (MVL list) of the given network. The relative error, as a comparison measure, is used to evaluate representation sustainability of each layer against adversarial inputs. The proposed approach for obtaining robust neural networks to fend off adversarial attacks is based on a layer-wise regularization (LR) over LSA proposal(s) for adversarial training (AT); i.e. the AT-LR procedure. AT-LR could be used with any benchmark adversarial attack to reduce the vulnerability of network layers and to improve conventional adversarial training approaches. The proposed idea performs well theoretically and experimentally for state-of-the-art multilayer perceptron and convolutional neural network architectures. Compared with the AT-LR and its corresponding base adversarial training, the classification accuracy of more significant perturbations increased by 16.35%, 21.79%, and 10.730% on Moon, MNIST, and CIFAR-10 benchmark datasets, respectively. The LSA framework is available and published at https://github.com/khalooei/LSA.
summary: Deep neural network models are used today in various applications of artificial intelligence, the strengthening of which, in the face of adversarial attacks is of particular importance. An appropriate solution to adversarial attacks is adversarial training, which reaches a trade-off between robustness and generalization. This paper introduces a novel framework (Layer Sustainability Analysis (LSA)) for the analysis of layer vulnerability in an arbitrary neural network in the scenario of adversarial attacks. LSA can be a helpful toolkit to assess deep neural networks and to extend the adversarial training approaches towards improving the sustainability of model layers via layer monitoring and analysis. The LSA framework identifies a list of Most Vulnerable Layers (MVL list) of the given network. The relative error, as a comparison measure, is used to evaluate representation sustainability of each layer against adversarial inputs. The proposed approach for obtaining robust neural networks to fend off adversarial attacks is based on a layer-wise regularization (LR) over LSA proposal(s) for adversarial training (AT); i.e. the AT-LR procedure. AT-LR could be used with any benchmark adversarial attack to reduce the vulnerability of network layers and to improve conventional adversarial training approaches. The proposed idea performs well theoretically and experimentally for state-of-the-art multilayer perceptron and convolutional neural network architectures. Compared with the AT-LR and its corresponding base adversarial training, the classification accuracy of more significant perturbations increased by 16.35%, 21.79%, and 10.730% on Moon, MNIST, and CIFAR-10 benchmark datasets, respectively. The LSA framework is available and published at https://github.com/khalooei/LSA.
abstract_zh: 如今，深度神经网络模型被用于人工智能的各种应用中，面对对抗性攻击时，加强深度神经网络模型尤为重要。对抗性攻击的一个合适的解决方案是对抗性训练，它达到了鲁棒性和泛化性之间的权衡。本文介绍了一种新颖的框架（层可持续性分析（LSA）），用于分析对抗性攻击场景中任意神经网络的层脆弱性。 LSA 可以成为评估深度神经网络的有用工具包，并扩展对抗性训练方法，通过层监控和分析来提高模型层的可持续性。 LSA 框架识别给定网络的最脆弱层列表（MVL 列表）。相对误差作为比较度量，用于评估每层针对对抗性输入的表示可持续性。所提出的获得鲁棒神经网络以抵御对抗性攻击的方法是基于针对对抗性训练（AT）的 LSA 建议的逐层正则化（LR）；即 AT-LR 过程。 AT-LR 可与任何基准对抗性攻击一起使用，以减少网络层的脆弱性并改进传统的对抗性训练方法。对于最先进的多层感知器和卷积神经网络架构，所提出的想法在理论上和实验上表现良好。与 AT-LR 及其相应的基础对抗训练相比，在 Moon、MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 基准数据集上，更显着扰动的分类精度分别提高了 16.35%、21.79% 和 10.730%。 LSA 框架可在 https://github.com/khalooei/LSA 上获取并发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于层可持续性分析（LSA）框架的逐层正则化对抗训练方法，用于提升深度神经网络在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击威胁深度学习模型的安全性，传统对抗训练难以平衡模型鲁棒性与泛化能力，需针对性改进网络层的脆弱性分析与优化。
AI.method: 通过LSA框架识别网络中最脆弱的层（MVL列表），利用相对误差衡量各层表征可持续性，并结合逐层正则化（LR）改进对抗训练（AT），形成AT-LR方法。
AI.result: 在Moon、MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上，AT-LR方法分别提升了16.35%、21.79%和10.73%的分类准确率，优于传统对抗训练。
AI.conclusion: LSA框架与AT-LR方法能有效增强模型对抗攻击的鲁棒性，为改进对抗训练提供了新的层级分析与优化工具。

search_text: Layer-wise Regularized Adversarial Training using Layers Sustainability Analysis (LSA) framework 使用层可持续性分析（LSA）框架进行逐层正则化对抗训练 Deep neural network models are used today in various applications of artificial intelligence, the strengthening of which, in the face of adversarial attacks is of particular importance. An appropriate solution to adversarial attacks is adversarial training, which reaches a trade-off between robustness and generalization. This paper introduces a novel framework (Layer Sustainability Analysis (LSA)) for the analysis of layer vulnerability in an arbitrary neural network in the scenario of adversarial attacks. LSA can be a helpful toolkit to assess deep neural networks and to extend the adversarial training approaches towards improving the sustainability of model layers via layer monitoring and analysis. The LSA framework identifies a list of Most Vulnerable Layers (MVL list) of the given network. The relative error, as a comparison measure, is used to evaluate representation sustainability of each layer against adversarial inputs. The proposed approach for obtaining robust neural networks to fend off adversarial attacks is based on a layer-wise regularization (LR) over LSA proposal(s) for adversarial training (AT); i.e. the AT-LR procedure. AT-LR could be used with any benchmark adversarial attack to reduce the vulnerability of network layers and to improve conventional adversarial training approaches. The proposed idea performs well theoretically and experimentally for state-of-the-art multilayer perceptron and convolutional neural network architectures. Compared with the AT-LR and its corresponding base adversarial training, the classification accuracy of more significant perturbations increased by 16.35%, 21.79%, and 10.730% on Moon, MNIST, and CIFAR-10 benchmark datasets, respectively. The LSA framework is available and published at https://github.com/khalooei/LSA. 如今，深度神经网络模型被用于人工智能的各种应用中，面对对抗性攻击时，加强深度神经网络模型尤为重要。对抗性攻击的一个合适的解决方案是对抗性训练，它达到了鲁棒性和泛化性之间的权衡。本文介绍了一种新颖的框架（层可持续性分析（LSA）），用于分析对抗性攻击场景中任意神经网络的层脆弱性。 LSA 可以成为评估深度神经网络的有用工具包，并扩展对抗性训练方法，通过层监控和分析来提高模型层的可持续性。 LSA 框架识别给定网络的最脆弱层列表（MVL 列表）。相对误差作为比较度量，用于评估每层针对对抗性输入的表示可持续性。所提出的获得鲁棒神经网络以抵御对抗性攻击的方法是基于针对对抗性训练（AT）的 LSA 建议的逐层正则化（LR）；即 AT-LR 过程。 AT-LR 可与任何基准对抗性攻击一起使用，以减少网络层的脆弱性并改进传统的对抗性训练方法。对于最先进的多层感知器和卷积神经网络架构，所提出的想法在理论上和实验上表现良好。与 AT-LR 及其相应的基础对抗训练相比，在 Moon、MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 基准数据集上，更显着扰动的分类精度分别提高了 16.35%、21.79% 和 10.730%。 LSA 框架可在 https://github.com/khalooei/LSA 上获取并发布。 本文提出了一种基于层可持续性分析（LSA）框架的逐层正则化对抗训练方法，用于提升深度神经网络在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性。 Mohammad Khalooei,Mohammad Mehdi Homayounpour,Maryam Amirmazlaghani cs.CV

authors_text: Allison H. Baker,Alexander Pinard,Dorit M. Hammerling
title: DSSIM: a structural similarity index for floating-point data
title_zh: DSSIM：浮点数据的结构相似性索引
abstract: Data visualization is a critical component in terms of interacting with floating-point output data from large model simulation codes. Indeed, postprocessing analysis workflows on simulation data often generate a large number of images from the raw data, many of which are then compared to each other or to specified reference images. In this image-comparison scenario, image quality assessment (IQA) measures are quite useful, and the Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) continues to be a popular choice. However, generating large numbers of images can be costly, and plot-specific (but data independent) choices can affect the SSIM value. A natural question is whether we can apply the SSIM directly to the floating-point simulation data and obtain an indication of whether differences in the data are likely to impact a visual assessment, effectively bypassing the creation of a specific set of images from the data. To this end, we propose an alternative to the popular SSIM that can be applied directly to the floating point data, which we refer to as the Data SSIM (DSSIM). While we demonstrate the usefulness of the DSSIM in the context of evaluating differences due to lossy compression on large volumes of simulation data from a popular climate model, the DSSIM may prove useful for many other applications involving simulation or image data.
summary: Data visualization is a critical component in terms of interacting with floating-point output data from large model simulation codes. Indeed, postprocessing analysis workflows on simulation data often generate a large number of images from the raw data, many of which are then compared to each other or to specified reference images. In this image-comparison scenario, image quality assessment (IQA) measures are quite useful, and the Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) continues to be a popular choice. However, generating large numbers of images can be costly, and plot-specific (but data independent) choices can affect the SSIM value. A natural question is whether we can apply the SSIM directly to the floating-point simulation data and obtain an indication of whether differences in the data are likely to impact a visual assessment, effectively bypassing the creation of a specific set of images from the data. To this end, we propose an alternative to the popular SSIM that can be applied directly to the floating point data, which we refer to as the Data SSIM (DSSIM). While we demonstrate the usefulness of the DSSIM in the context of evaluating differences due to lossy compression on large volumes of simulation data from a popular climate model, the DSSIM may prove useful for many other applications involving simulation or image data.
abstract_zh: 数据可视化是与大型模型仿真代码的浮点输出数据交互的关键组件。事实上，模拟数据的后处理分析工作流程通常会从原始数据生成大量图像，然后将其中许多图像相互比较或与指定的参考图像进行比较。在这种图像比较场景中，图像质量评估（IQA）措施非常有用，并且结构相似性指数（SSIM）仍然是流行的选择。然而，生成大量图像的成本可能很高，并且特定于图（但与数据无关）的选择可能会影响 SSIM 值。一个自然的问题是，我们是否可以将 SSIM 直接应用于浮点模拟数据，并获得数据差异是否可能影响视觉评估的指示，从而有效地绕过从数据创建一组特定图像。为此，我们提出了一种可以直接应用于浮点数据的流行 SSIM 的替代方案，我们将其称为数据 SSIM (DSSIM)。虽然我们在评估来自流行气候模型的大量模拟数据的有损压缩造成的差异方面证明了 DSSIM 的有用性，但 DSSIM 可能对涉及模拟或图像数据的许多其他应用有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种直接应用于浮点数据的结构相似性指数（DSSIM），以替代传统图像比较方法，避免生成大量图像的高昂成本。
AI.motivation: 生成大量图像进行比较的成本较高，且图像特定的选择可能影响SSIM值，因此需要直接基于浮点数据进行差异评估的方法。
AI.method: 开发了DSSIM方法，直接对浮点模拟数据应用结构相似性指数，跳过图像生成步骤，从而评估数据差异对视觉评估的影响。
AI.result: 在评估气候模型的损失压缩数据差异中验证了DSSIM的有效性，并表明其可能适用于其他模拟或图像数据场景。
AI.conclusion: DSSIM为直接分析浮点数据提供了可行方案，能够有效减少图像生成需求，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Vasileios Tsouvalas,Tanir Ozcelebi,Nirvana Meratnia
title: Privacy-preserving Speech Emotion Recognition through Semi-Supervised Federated Learning
title_zh: 通过半监督联邦学习保护隐私的语音情感识别
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.06877
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.06877
abstract: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) refers to the recognition of human emotions from natural speech. If done accurately, it can offer a number of benefits in building human-centered context-aware intelligent systems. Existing SER approaches are largely centralized, without considering users' privacy. Federated Learning (FL) is a distributed machine learning paradigm dealing with decentralization of privacy-sensitive personal data. In this paper, we present a privacy-preserving and data-efficient SER approach by utilizing the concept of FL. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first federated SER approach, which utilizes self-training learning in conjunction with federated learning to exploit both labeled and unlabeled on-device data. Our experimental evaluations on the IEMOCAP dataset shows that our federated approach can learn generalizable SER models even under low availability of data labels and highly non-i.i.d. distributions. We show that our approach with as few as 10% labeled data, on average, can improve the recognition rate by 8.67% compared to the fully-supervised federated counterparts.
summary: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) refers to the recognition of human emotions from natural speech. If done accurately, it can offer a number of benefits in building human-centered context-aware intelligent systems. Existing SER approaches are largely centralized, without considering users' privacy. Federated Learning (FL) is a distributed machine learning paradigm dealing with decentralization of privacy-sensitive personal data. In this paper, we present a privacy-preserving and data-efficient SER approach by utilizing the concept of FL. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first federated SER approach, which utilizes self-training learning in conjunction with federated learning to exploit both labeled and unlabeled on-device data. Our experimental evaluations on the IEMOCAP dataset shows that our federated approach can learn generalizable SER models even under low availability of data labels and highly non-i.i.d. distributions. We show that our approach with as few as 10% labeled data, on average, can improve the recognition rate by 8.67% compared to the fully-supervised federated counterparts.
abstract_zh: 语音情感识别（SER）是指从自然语音中识别人类情感。如果做得准确，它可以为构建以人为中心的情境感知智能系统带来许多好处。现有的SER方法很大程度上是中心化的，没有考虑用户的隐私。联邦学习（FL）是一种分布式机器学习范例，用于处理隐私敏感个人数据的去中心化。在本文中，我们利用 FL 的概念提出了一种隐私保护和数据高效的 SER 方法。据我们所知，这是第一个联合 SER 方法，它利用自我训练学习与联合学习来利用标记和未标记的设备数据。我们对 IEMOCAP 数据集的实验评估表明，即使在数据标签可用性低和高度非独立同分布的情况下，我们的联合方法也可以学习可推广的 SER 模型。分布。我们表明，与完全监督的联邦同行相比，我们的方法平均只需 10% 的标记数据即可将识别率提高 8.67%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于联邦学习的隐私保护语音情感识别方法，通过半监督学习利用设备端的标签和未标签数据。
AI.motivation: 现有语音情感识别方法多为集中式，忽视用户隐私；联邦学习可实现隐私保护，但需解决数据标签稀缺和非独立同分布问题。
AI.method: 结合自训练与联邦学习框架，利用设备端的少量标签数据和大量未标签数据进行半监督学习，构建可泛化的语音情感识别模型。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP数据集上，仅使用10%标签数据时，识别准确率较全监督联邦学习方法平均提升8.67%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了半监督联邦学习在隐私保护语音情感识别中的有效性，为低标签场景下的模型训练提供了新思路。

search_text: Privacy-preserving Speech Emotion Recognition through Semi-Supervised Federated Learning 通过半监督联邦学习保护隐私的语音情感识别 Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) refers to the recognition of human emotions from natural speech. If done accurately, it can offer a number of benefits in building human-centered context-aware intelligent systems. Existing SER approaches are largely centralized, without considering users' privacy. Federated Learning (FL) is a distributed machine learning paradigm dealing with decentralization of privacy-sensitive personal data. In this paper, we present a privacy-preserving and data-efficient SER approach by utilizing the concept of FL. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first federated SER approach, which utilizes self-training learning in conjunction with federated learning to exploit both labeled and unlabeled on-device data. Our experimental evaluations on the IEMOCAP dataset shows that our federated approach can learn generalizable SER models even under low availability of data labels and highly non-i.i.d. distributions. We show that our approach with as few as 10% labeled data, on average, can improve the recognition rate by 8.67% compared to the fully-supervised federated counterparts. 语音情感识别（SER）是指从自然语音中识别人类情感。如果做得准确，它可以为构建以人为中心的情境感知智能系统带来许多好处。现有的SER方法很大程度上是中心化的，没有考虑用户的隐私。联邦学习（FL）是一种分布式机器学习范例，用于处理隐私敏感个人数据的去中心化。在本文中，我们利用 FL 的概念提出了一种隐私保护和数据高效的 SER 方法。据我们所知，这是第一个联合 SER 方法，它利用自我训练学习与联合学习来利用标记和未标记的设备数据。我们对 IEMOCAP 数据集的实验评估表明，即使在数据标签可用性低和高度非独立同分布的情况下，我们的联合方法也可以学习可推广的 SER 模型。分布。我们表明，与完全监督的联邦同行相比，我们的方法平均只需 10% 的标记数据即可将识别率提高 8.67%。 本文提出一种基于联邦学习的隐私保护语音情感识别方法，通过半监督学习利用设备端的标签和未标签数据。 Vasileios Tsouvalas,Tanir Ozcelebi,Nirvana Meratnia cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Andrea Frosini,Ilaria Mancini,Simone Rinaldi,Giuseppe Romana,Marinella Sciortino
title: Logarithmic equal-letter runs for BWT of purely morphic words
title_zh: 纯语态词的 BWT 的对数等字母运行
abstract: In this paper we study the number $r_{bwt}$ of equal-letter runs produced by the Burrows-Wheeler transform ($BWT$) when it is applied to purely morphic finite words, which are words generated by iterating prolongable morphisms. Such a parameter $r_{bwt}$ is very significant since it provides a measure of the performances of the $BWT$, in terms of both compressibility and indexing. In particular, we prove that, when $BWT$ is applied to any purely morphic finite word on a binary alphabet, $r_{bwt}$ is $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$, where $n$ is the length of the word. Moreover, we prove that $r_{bwt}$ is $Θ(\log n)$ for the binary words generated by a large class of prolongable binary morphisms. These bounds are proved by providing some new structural properties of the \emph{bispecial circular factors} of such words.
summary: In this paper we study the number $r_{bwt}$ of equal-letter runs produced by the Burrows-Wheeler transform ($BWT$) when it is applied to purely morphic finite words, which are words generated by iterating prolongable morphisms. Such a parameter $r_{bwt}$ is very significant since it provides a measure of the performances of the $BWT$, in terms of both compressibility and indexing. In particular, we prove that, when $BWT$ is applied to any purely morphic finite word on a binary alphabet, $r_{bwt}$ is $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$, where $n$ is the length of the word. Moreover, we prove that $r_{bwt}$ is $Θ(\log n)$ for the binary words generated by a large class of prolongable binary morphisms. These bounds are proved by providing some new structural properties of the \emph{bispecial circular factors} of such words.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了 Burrows-Wheeler 变换 ($BWT$) 应用于纯态射有限词（通过迭代可延长态射生成的词）时产生的等字母运行的数量 $r_{bwt}$。这样的参数 $r_{bwt}$ 非常重要，因为它在可压缩性和索引方面提供了 $BWT$ 性能的衡量标准。特别是，我们证明，当 $BWT$ 应用于二进制字母表上的任何纯形态有限单词时，$r_{bwt}$ 是 $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$，其中 $n$ 是单词的长度。此外，我们证明对于一大类可延长的二元态射生成的二元词，$r_{bwt}$ 是$θ(\log n)$。这些界限是通过提供这些词的 \emph{双特殊循环因子} 的一些新结构属性来证明的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了对纯形态词应用Burrows-Wheeler变换（BWT）时产生的等字母运行数r_bwt，并分析其在二元字母表上的对数界。
AI.motivation: r_bwt是衡量BWT压缩性能和索引效率的重要参数，理解其在纯形态词中的行为有助于优化相关算法。
AI.method: 通过分析纯形态词的双特殊循环因子的结构特性，证明了r_bwt的上界和下界。
AI.result: 对于二元字母表上的任意纯形态有限词，r_bwt为O(log n)；对于一大类二元延展态态射生成的词，r_bwt为Θ(log n)。
AI.conclusion: 通过双特殊因子的结构特性，建立了BWT在纯形态词上的对数界，深化了对其压缩性能的理解。

authors_text: Runsheng Xu,Zhengzhong Tu,Yuanqi Du,Xiaoyu Dong,Jinlong Li,Zibo Meng,Jiaqi Ma,Hongkai Yu
title: ROMNet: Renovate the Old Memories
title_zh: ROMNet：翻新旧记忆
abstract: Renovating the memories in old photos is an intriguing research topic in computer vision fields. These legacy images often suffer from severe and commingled degradations such as cracks, noise, and color-fading, while lack of large-scale paired old photo datasets makes this restoration task very challenging. In this work, we present a novel reference-based end-to-end learning framework that can jointly repair and colorize the degraded legacy pictures. Specifically, the proposed framework consists of three modules: a restoration sub-network for degradation restoration, a similarity sub-network for color histogram matching and transfer, and a colorization subnet that learns to predict the chroma elements of the images conditioned on chromatic reference signals. The whole system takes advantage of the color histogram priors in a given reference image, which vastly reduces the dependency on large-scale training data. Apart from the proposed method, we also create, to our knowledge, the first public and real-world old photo dataset with paired ground truth for evaluating old photo restoration models, wherein each old photo is paired with a manually restored pristine image by PhotoShop experts. Our extensive experiments conducted on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-arts both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Renovating the memories in old photos is an intriguing research topic in computer vision fields. These legacy images often suffer from severe and commingled degradations such as cracks, noise, and color-fading, while lack of large-scale paired old photo datasets makes this restoration task very challenging. In this work, we present a novel reference-based end-to-end learning framework that can jointly repair and colorize the degraded legacy pictures. Specifically, the proposed framework consists of three modules: a restoration sub-network for degradation restoration, a similarity sub-network for color histogram matching and transfer, and a colorization subnet that learns to predict the chroma elements of the images conditioned on chromatic reference signals. The whole system takes advantage of the color histogram priors in a given reference image, which vastly reduces the dependency on large-scale training data. Apart from the proposed method, we also create, to our knowledge, the first public and real-world old photo dataset with paired ground truth for evaluating old photo restoration models, wherein each old photo is paired with a manually restored pristine image by PhotoShop experts. Our extensive experiments conducted on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-arts both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 修复旧照片中的记忆是计算机视觉领域一个有趣的研究课题。这些遗留图像经常遭受严重且混合的退化，例如裂纹、噪声和褪色，而缺乏大规模配对的旧照片数据集使得这项修复任务非常具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于参考的端到端学习框架，可以联合修复退化的遗留图片并为其着色。具体来说，所提出的框架由三个模块组成：用于退化恢复的恢复子网、用于颜色直方图匹配和传输的相似性子网以及学习预测以彩色参考信号为条件的图像的色度元素的彩色化子网。整个系统利用给定参考图像中的颜色直方图先验，这大大减少了对大规模训练数据的依赖。除了所提出的方法之外，据我们所知，我们还创建了第一个公开的、真实世界的旧照片数据集，其中包含配对的基本事实，用于评估旧照片修复模型，其中每张旧照片都与 PhotoShop 专家手动修复的原始图像配对。我们对合成数据集和真实数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在数量和质量上都显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROMNet框架，通过参考图像联合修复和着色退化老照片，解决历史图像修复中数据不足和复杂退化问题。
AI.motivation: 老照片常存在裂缝、噪点、褪色等混合退化问题，但缺乏大规模配对数据集导致修复任务极具挑战性。
AI.method: 设计包含修复子网络（处理退化）、相似度子网络（颜色直方图匹配）和着色子网络（基于参考信号预测色度）的端到端框架，并构建首个真实老照片配对数据集。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均显著优于现有方法，定量指标和视觉效果均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过利用参考图像颜色先验有效减少对大规模数据的依赖，为老照片修复提供了新思路和基准数据集。

The whole system takes advantage of the color histogram priors in a given reference image, which vastly reduces the dependency on large-scale training data. Apart from the proposed method, we also create, to our knowledge, the first public and real-world old photo dataset with paired ground truth for evaluating old photo restoration models, wherein each old photo is paired with a manually restored pristine image by PhotoShop experts. Our extensive experiments conducted on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-arts both quantitatively and qualitatively. 修复旧照片中的记忆是计算机视觉领域一个有趣的研究课题。这些遗留图像经常遭受严重且混合的退化，例如裂纹、噪声和褪色，而缺乏大规模配对的旧照片数据集使得这项修复任务非常具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于参考的端到端学习框架，可以联合修复退化的遗留图片并为其着色。具体来说，所提出的框架由三个模块组成：用于退化恢复的恢复子网、用于颜色直方图匹配和传输的相似性子网以及学习预测以彩色参考信号为条件的图像的色度元素的彩色化子网。整个系统利用给定参考图像中的颜色直方图先验，这大大减少了对大规模训练数据的依赖。除了所提出的方法之外，据我们所知，我们还创建了第一个公开的、真实世界的旧照片数据集，其中包含配对的基本事实，用于评估旧照片修复模型，其中每张旧照片都与 PhotoShop 专家手动修复的原始图像配对。我们对合成数据集和真实数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在数量和质量上都显着优于最先进的方法。 本文提出ROMNet框架，通过参考图像联合修复和着色退化老照片，解决历史图像修复中数据不足和复杂退化问题。 Runsheng Xu,Zhengzhong Tu,Yuanqi Du,Xiaoyu Dong,Jinlong Li,Zibo Meng,Jiaqi Ma,Hongkai Yu eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Eashan Adhikarla,Dan Luo,Brian D. Davison
title: Memory Defense: More Robust Classification via a Memory-Masking Autoencoder
title_zh: 内存防御：通过内存屏蔽自动编码器进行更稳健的分类
abstract: Many deep neural networks are susceptible to minute perturbations of images that have been carefully crafted to cause misclassification. Ideally, a robust classifier would be immune to small variations in input images, and a number of defensive approaches have been created as a result. One method would be to discern a latent representation which could ignore small changes to the input. However, typical autoencoders easily mingle inter-class latent representations when there are strong similarities between classes, making it harder for a decoder to accurately project the image back to the original high-dimensional space. We propose a novel framework, Memory Defense, an augmented classifier with a memory-masking autoencoder to counter this challenge. By masking other classes, the autoencoder learns class-specific independent latent representations. We test the model's robustness against four widely used attacks. Experiments on the Fashion-MNIST & CIFAR-10 datasets demonstrate the superiority of our model. We make available our source code at GitHub repository: https://github.com/eashanadhikarla/MemDefense
summary: Many deep neural networks are susceptible to minute perturbations of images that have been carefully crafted to cause misclassification. Ideally, a robust classifier would be immune to small variations in input images, and a number of defensive approaches have been created as a result. One method would be to discern a latent representation which could ignore small changes to the input. However, typical autoencoders easily mingle inter-class latent representations when there are strong similarities between classes, making it harder for a decoder to accurately project the image back to the original high-dimensional space. We propose a novel framework, Memory Defense, an augmented classifier with a memory-masking autoencoder to counter this challenge. By masking other classes, the autoencoder learns class-specific independent latent representations. We test the model's robustness against four widely used attacks. Experiments on the Fashion-MNIST & CIFAR-10 datasets demonstrate the superiority of our model. We make available our source code at GitHub repository: https://github.com/eashanadhikarla/MemDefense
abstract_zh: 许多深度神经网络很容易受到精心设计的图像的微小扰动，从而导致错误分类。理想情况下，一个强大的分类器将不受输入图像中微小变化的影响，因此已经创建了许多防御方法。一种方法是识别潜在的表示，该表示可以忽略输入的微小变化。然而，当类之间存在很强的相似性时，典型的自动编码器很容易混合类间潜在表示，使得解码器更难以准确地将图像投影回原始高维空间。我们提出了一种新颖的框架“内存防御”，这是一种带有内存屏蔽自动编码器的增强分类器来应对这一挑战。通过屏蔽其他类，自动编码器学习特定于类的独立潜在表示。我们测试了该模型针对四种广泛使用的攻击的稳健性。 Fashion-MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 数据集上的实验证明了我们模型的优越性。我们在 GitHub 存储库中提供源代码：https://github.com/eashanadhikarla/MemDefense

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Memory Defense的新型防御框架，通过记忆掩码自编码器增强分类模型对图像微小扰动攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有自编码器在处理类间高度相似的数据时，容易混淆潜在表示，导致解码器难以准确还原原始图像，从而影响分类鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计记忆掩码自编码器，通过在训练时掩码其他类别信息，强制模型学习类特定的独立潜在表示，提升对输入扰动的免疫能力。
AI.result: 在Fashion-MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上，该模型在四种常见攻击下均表现出优于现有方法的分类鲁棒性，且开源代码已发布。
AI.conclusion: 记忆掩码机制有效解决了类间表示混淆问题，验证了该框架在提升模型鲁棒性方面的优越性。

authors_text: Shahed Anzarus Sabab,Mohammad Ridwan Kabir,Sayed Rizban Hussain,Hasan Mahmud,Md. Kamrul Hasan,Husne Ara Rubaiyeat
title: VIS-iTrack: Visual Intention through Gaze Tracking using Low-Cost Webcam
title_zh: VIS-iTrack：使用低成本网络摄像头通过注视跟踪实现视觉意图
abstract: Human intention is an internal, mental characterization for acquiring desired information. From interactive interfaces containing either textual or graphical information, intention to perceive desired information is subjective and strongly connected with eye gaze. In this work, we determine such intention by analyzing real-time eye gaze data with a low-cost regular webcam. We extracted unique features (e.g., Fixation Count, Eye Movement Ratio) from the eye gaze data of 31 participants to generate a dataset containing 124 samples of visual intention for perceiving textual or graphical information, labeled as either TEXT or IMAGE, having 48.39% and 51.61% distribution, respectively. Using this dataset, we analyzed 5 classifiers, including Support Vector Machine (SVM) (Accuracy: 92.19%). Using the trained SVM, we investigated the variation of visual intention among 30 participants, distributed in 3 age groups, and found out that young users were more leaned towards graphical contents whereas older adults felt more interested in textual ones. This finding suggests that real-time eye gaze data can be a potential source of identifying visual intention, analyzing which intention aware interactive interfaces can be designed and developed to facilitate human cognition.
summary: Human intention is an internal, mental characterization for acquiring desired information. From interactive interfaces containing either textual or graphical information, intention to perceive desired information is subjective and strongly connected with eye gaze. In this work, we determine such intention by analyzing real-time eye gaze data with a low-cost regular webcam. We extracted unique features (e.g., Fixation Count, Eye Movement Ratio) from the eye gaze data of 31 participants to generate a dataset containing 124 samples of visual intention for perceiving textual or graphical information, labeled as either TEXT or IMAGE, having 48.39% and 51.61% distribution, respectively. Using this dataset, we analyzed 5 classifiers, including Support Vector Machine (SVM) (Accuracy: 92.19%). Using the trained SVM, we investigated the variation of visual intention among 30 participants, distributed in 3 age groups, and found out that young users were more leaned towards graphical contents whereas older adults felt more interested in textual ones. This finding suggests that real-time eye gaze data can be a potential source of identifying visual intention, analyzing which intention aware interactive interfaces can be designed and developed to facilitate human cognition.
abstract_zh: 人类意图是获取所需信息的内部心理特征。从包含文本或图形信息的交互界面中，感知所需信息的意图是主观的，并且与眼睛注视密切相关。在这项工作中，我们通过使用低成本常规网络摄像头分析实时眼睛注视数据来确定这种意图。我们从 31 名参与者的眼球注视数据中提取了独特的特征（例如注视次数、眼动比率），生成一个数据集，其中包含 124 个用于感知文本或图形信息的视觉意图样本，标记为文本或图像，分布率分别为 48.39% 和 51.61%。使用该数据集，我们分析了 5 个分类器，包括支持向量机 (SVM)（准确度：92.19%）。使用经过训练的 SVM，我们调查了分布在 3 个年龄组的 30 名参与者的视觉意图的变化，发现年轻用户更倾向于图形内容，而老年人则对文本内容更感兴趣。这一发现表明，实时眼睛注视数据可以成为识别视觉意图的潜在来源，分析可以设计和开发哪些意图感知交互界面以促进人类认知。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VIS-iTrack方法，利用低成本网络摄像头实时追踪眼动数据，识别用户对文本或图像信息的视觉意图。
AI.motivation: 传统交互界面难以捕捉用户主观信息获取意图，而眼动数据能反映用户注意力分布，通过低成本设备实现意图识别可提升交互系统智能化水平。
AI.method: 采集31名参与者眼动数据，提取固定次数、眼动比率等特征构建124样本数据集，采用SVM等5种分类器训练模型，并分析30名参与者跨年龄段的意图差异。
AI.result: SVM分类器达到92.19%准确率，发现年轻用户更倾向图形内容（51.61%），年长用户更关注文本内容（48.39%）。
AI.conclusion: 实时眼动数据可有效识别视觉意图，为开发意图感知型交互界面提供数据支持，不同年龄段用户存在显著的内容偏好差异。

authors_text: Yicheng Chen,Rick S. Blum,Brian M. Sadler
title: Communication Efficient Federated Learning via Ordered ADMM in a Fully Decentralized Setting
title_zh: 在完全去中心化的环境中通过有序 ADMM 实现高效通信的联邦学习
abstract: The challenge of communication-efficient distributed optimization has attracted attention in recent years. In this paper, a communication efficient algorithm, called ordering-based alternating direction method of multipliers (OADMM) is devised in a general fully decentralized network setting where a worker can only exchange messages with neighbors. Compared to the classical ADMM, a key feature of OADMM is that transmissions are ordered among workers at each iteration such that a worker with the most informative data broadcasts its local variable to neighbors first, and neighbors who have not transmitted yet can update their local variables based on that received transmission. In OADMM, we prohibit workers from transmitting if their current local variables are not sufficiently different from their previously transmitted value. A variant of OADMM, called SOADMM, is proposed where transmissions are ordered but transmissions are never stopped for each node at each iteration. Numerical results demonstrate that given a targeted accuracy, OADMM can significantly reduce the number of communications compared to existing algorithms including ADMM. We also show numerically that SOADMM can accelerate convergence, resulting in communication savings compared to the classical ADMM.
summary: The challenge of communication-efficient distributed optimization has attracted attention in recent years. In this paper, a communication efficient algorithm, called ordering-based alternating direction method of multipliers (OADMM) is devised in a general fully decentralized network setting where a worker can only exchange messages with neighbors. Compared to the classical ADMM, a key feature of OADMM is that transmissions are ordered among workers at each iteration such that a worker with the most informative data broadcasts its local variable to neighbors first, and neighbors who have not transmitted yet can update their local variables based on that received transmission. In OADMM, we prohibit workers from transmitting if their current local variables are not sufficiently different from their previously transmitted value. A variant of OADMM, called SOADMM, is proposed where transmissions are ordered but transmissions are never stopped for each node at each iteration. Numerical results demonstrate that given a targeted accuracy, OADMM can significantly reduce the number of communications compared to existing algorithms including ADMM. We also show numerically that SOADMM can accelerate convergence, resulting in communication savings compared to the classical ADMM.
abstract_zh: 近年来，通信高效的分布式优化的挑战引起了人们的关注。在本文中，在一般的完全去中心化网络设置中设计了一种称为基于排序的交替方向乘法器（OADMM）的高效通信算法，其中工作人员只能与邻居交换消息。与经典的 ADMM 相比，OADMM 的一个关键特征是每次迭代时在工作进程之间对传输进行排序，以便拥有最多信息量数据的工作进程首先将其局部变量广播给邻居，而尚未传输的邻居可以根据接收到的传输更新其本地变量。在 OADMM 中，如果工作人员当前的局部变量与之前传输的值没有足够的差异，我们会禁止工作人员传输。提出了 OADMM 的一种变体，称为 SOADMM，其中传输是有序的，但在每次迭代时每个节点的传输都不会停止。数值结果表明，与包括 ADMM 在内的现有算法相比，在给定目标精度的情况下，OADMM 可以显着减少通信次数。我们还通过数值证明 SOADMM 可以加速收敛，从而与经典 ADMM 相比节省通信量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在完全去中心化网络中实现高效通信的联邦学习算法OADMM及其变体SOADMM，通过有序传输机制减少通信次数。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式优化算法在去中心化网络中存在通信效率低、冗余传输多的问题，需设计减少通信次数同时保持收敛性的新方法。
AI.method: 提出有序ADMM（OADMM）算法，通过节点间有序传输机制优先广播信息量大的变量，并禁止差异较小的冗余传输；进一步设计永不中断传输的SOADMM变体。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，OADMM在保证精度下显著减少通信次数，SOADMM相比经典ADMM实现更快收敛和通信节省。
AI.conclusion: 有序传输机制有效提升去中心化联邦学习的通信效率，所提算法在减少通信开销和加速收敛方面具有显著优势。

search_text: Communication Efficient Federated Learning via Ordered ADMM in a Fully Decentralized Setting 在完全去中心化的环境中通过有序 ADMM 实现高效通信的联邦学习 The challenge of communication-efficient distributed optimization has attracted attention in recent years. In this paper, a communication efficient algorithm, called ordering-based alternating direction method of multipliers (OADMM) is devised in a general fully decentralized network setting where a worker can only exchange messages with neighbors. Compared to the classical ADMM, a key feature of OADMM is that transmissions are ordered among workers at each iteration such that a worker with the most informative data broadcasts its local variable to neighbors first, and neighbors who have not transmitted yet can update their local variables based on that received transmission. In OADMM, we prohibit workers from transmitting if their current local variables are not sufficiently different from their previously transmitted value. A variant of OADMM, called SOADMM, is proposed where transmissions are ordered but transmissions are never stopped for each node at each iteration. Numerical results demonstrate that given a targeted accuracy, OADMM can significantly reduce the number of communications compared to existing algorithms including ADMM. We also show numerically that SOADMM can accelerate convergence, resulting in communication savings compared to the classical ADMM. 近年来，通信高效的分布式优化的挑战引起了人们的关注。在本文中，在一般的完全去中心化网络设置中设计了一种称为基于排序的交替方向乘法器（OADMM）的高效通信算法，其中工作人员只能与邻居交换消息。与经典的 ADMM 相比，OADMM 的一个关键特征是每次迭代时在工作进程之间对传输进行排序，以便拥有最多信息量数据的工作进程首先将其局部变量广播给邻居，而尚未传输的邻居可以根据接收到的传输更新其本地变量。在 OADMM 中，如果工作人员当前的局部变量与之前传输的值没有足够的差异，我们会禁止工作人员传输。提出了 OADMM 的一种变体，称为 SOADMM，其中传输是有序的，但在每次迭代时每个节点的传输都不会停止。数值结果表明，与包括 ADMM 在内的现有算法相比，在给定目标精度的情况下，OADMM 可以显着减少通信次数。我们还通过数值证明 SOADMM 可以加速收敛，从而与经典 ADMM 相比节省通信量。 本文提出一种在完全去中心化网络中实现高效通信的联邦学习算法OADMM及其变体SOADMM，通过有序传输机制减少通信次数。 Yicheng Chen,Rick S. Blum,Brian M. Sadler cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: S. Mazdak Abulnaga,Oded Stein,Polina Golland,Justin Solomon
title: Symmetric Volume Maps: Order-Invariant Volumetric Mesh Correspondence with Free Boundary
title_zh: 对称体积贴图：与自由边界的阶数不变体积网格对应
comment: Accepted to ACM Transactions on Graphics. Our code is available at https://github.com/mabulnaga/symmetric-volume-maps
comments: Accepted to ACM Transactions on Graphics. Our code is available at https://github.com/mabulnaga/symmetric-volume-maps
abstract: Although shape correspondence is a central problem in geometry processing, most methods for this task apply only to two-dimensional surfaces. The neglected task of volumetric correspondence--a natural extension relevant to shapes extracted from simulation, medical imaging, and volume rendering--presents unique challenges that do not appear in the two-dimensional case. In this work, we propose a method for mapping between volumes represented as tetrahedral meshes. Our formulation minimizes a distortion energy designed to extract maps symmetrically, i.e., without dependence on the ordering of the source and target domains. We accompany our method with theoretical discussion describing the consequences of this symmetry assumption, leading us to select a symmetrized ARAP energy that favors isometric correspondences. Our final formulation optimizes for near-isometry while matching the boundary. We demonstrate our method on a diverse geometric dataset, producing low-distortion matchings that align closely to the boundary.
summary: Although shape correspondence is a central problem in geometry processing, most methods for this task apply only to two-dimensional surfaces. The neglected task of volumetric correspondence--a natural extension relevant to shapes extracted from simulation, medical imaging, and volume rendering--presents unique challenges that do not appear in the two-dimensional case. In this work, we propose a method for mapping between volumes represented as tetrahedral meshes. Our formulation minimizes a distortion energy designed to extract maps symmetrically, i.e., without dependence on the ordering of the source and target domains. We accompany our method with theoretical discussion describing the consequences of this symmetry assumption, leading us to select a symmetrized ARAP energy that favors isometric correspondences. Our final formulation optimizes for near-isometry while matching the boundary. We demonstrate our method on a diverse geometric dataset, producing low-distortion matchings that align closely to the boundary.
abstract_zh: 尽管形状对应是几何处理中的核心问题，但该任务的大多数方法仅适用于二维表面。被忽视的体积对应任务——与从模拟、医学成像和体积渲染中提取的形状相关的自然延伸——提出了二维情况下不会出现的独特挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在表示为四面体网格的体积之间进行映射的方法。我们的公式最大限度地减少了扭曲能量，旨在对称地提取地图，即不依赖于源域和目标域的顺序。我们通过理论讨论来配合我们的方法，描述这种对称性假设的后果，引导我们选择有利于等距对应的对称 ARAP 能量。我们的最终公式在匹配边界的同时优化了近等距。我们在不同的几何数据集上演示了我们的方法，产生与边界紧密对齐的低失真匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种对称体积映射方法，用于在四面体网格表示的体积之间进行无序依赖的体积网格对应。
AI.motivation: 尽管形状对应是几何处理的核心问题，但现有方法多局限于二维表面，而体积对应（如医学影像、模拟数据中的形状）因三维特性面临独特挑战，亟需新方法。
AI.method: 通过最小化对称扭曲能量函数，设计独立于源目标域顺序的映射方案，并采用对称ARAP能量优化近等距对应，同时匹配边界条件。
AI.result: 在多样化几何数据集上实现了低扭曲且边界对齐的匹配结果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论分析与实验验证，为体积网格对应提供了兼顾对称性与边界约束的解决方案。
