authors_text: Binoy Saha,Sukhendu Das
title: Catch Me if You Can: A Novel Task for Detection of Covert Geo-Locations (CGL)
title_zh: 如果可以的话来抓我：检测隐蔽地理位置的新任务 (CGL)
comment: This is an updated version of our accepted paper in: fourth workshop on Computer Vision Applications (WCVA), 12th Indian Conference on Computer Vision, Graphics and Image Processing (ICVGIP 20-21), IIT Jodhpur, India, December 2021. [work sponsored under IMPRINT grant]
comments: This is an updated version of our accepted paper in: fourth workshop on Computer Vision Applications (WCVA), 12th Indian Conference on Computer Vision, Graphics and Image Processing (ICVGIP 20-21), IIT Jodhpur, India, December 2021. [work sponsored under IMPRINT grant]
abstract: Most visual scene understanding tasks in the field of computer vision involve identification of the objects present in the scene. Image regions like hideouts, turns, & other obscured regions of the scene also contain crucial information, for specific surveillance tasks. Task proposed in this paper involves the design of an intelligent visual aid for identification of such locations in an image, which has either the potential to create an imminent threat from an adversary or appear as the target zones needing further investigation. Covert places (CGL) for hiding behind an occluding object are concealed 3D locations, not detectable from the viewpoint (camera). Hence this involves delineating specific image regions around the projections of outer boundary of the occluding objects, as places to be accessed around the potential hideouts. CGL detection finds applications in military counter-insurgency operations, surveillance with path planning for an exploratory robot. Given an RGB image, the goal is to identify all CGLs in the 2D scene. Identification of such regions would require knowledge about the 3D boundaries of obscuring items (pillars, furniture), their spatial location with respect to the neighboring regions of the scene. We propose this as a novel task, termed Covert Geo-Location (CGL) Detection. Classification of any region of an image as a CGL (as boundary sub-segments of an occluding object that conceals the hideout) requires examining the 3D relation between boundaries of occluding objects and their neighborhoods & surroundings. Our method successfully extracts relevant depth features from a single RGB image and quantitatively yields significant improvement over existing object detection and segmentation models adapted and trained for CGL detection. We also introduce a novel hand-annotated CGL detection dataset containing 1.5K real-world images for experimentation.
summary: Most visual scene understanding tasks in the field of computer vision involve identification of the objects present in the scene. Image regions like hideouts, turns, & other obscured regions of the scene also contain crucial information, for specific surveillance tasks. Task proposed in this paper involves the design of an intelligent visual aid for identification of such locations in an image, which has either the potential to create an imminent threat from an adversary or appear as the target zones needing further investigation. Covert places (CGL) for hiding behind an occluding object are concealed 3D locations, not detectable from the viewpoint (camera). Hence this involves delineating specific image regions around the projections of outer boundary of the occluding objects, as places to be accessed around the potential hideouts. CGL detection finds applications in military counter-insurgency operations, surveillance with path planning for an exploratory robot. Given an RGB image, the goal is to identify all CGLs in the 2D scene. Identification of such regions would require knowledge about the 3D boundaries of obscuring items (pillars, furniture), their spatial location with respect to the neighboring regions of the scene. We propose this as a novel task, termed Covert Geo-Location (CGL) Detection. Classification of any region of an image as a CGL (as boundary sub-segments of an occluding object that conceals the hideout) requires examining the 3D relation between boundaries of occluding objects and their neighborhoods & surroundings. Our method successfully extracts relevant depth features from a single RGB image and quantitatively yields significant improvement over existing object detection and segmentation models adapted and trained for CGL detection. We also introduce a novel hand-annotated CGL detection dataset containing 1.5K real-world images for experimentation.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉领域中的大多数视觉场景理解任务都涉及识别场景中存在的对象。诸如藏身处、转弯和场景的其他模糊区域之类的图像区域也包含对于特定监视任务的重要信息。本文提出的任务涉及设计一种智能视觉辅助工具，用于识别图像中的此类位置，这些位置有可能对对手造成迫在眉睫的威胁，也可能成为需要进一步调查的目标区域。用于隐藏在遮挡对象后面的隐蔽位置 (CGL) 是隐藏的 3D 位置，从视点（相机）无法检测到。因此，这涉及在遮挡对象的外边界投影周围描绘特定的图像区域，作为潜在藏身处周围要访问的地方。 CGL 检测可应用于军事反叛乱行动、探索性机器人的监视和路径规划。给定 RGB 图像，目标是识别 2D 场景中的所有 CGL。识别此类区域需要了解遮挡物品（柱子、家具）的 3D 边界及其相对于场景相邻区域的空间位置。我们建议将此作为一项新颖的任务，称为隐蔽地理位置（CGL）检测。将图像的任何区域分类为 CGL（作为隐藏隐藏点的遮挡对象的边界子段）需要检查遮挡对象的边界与其邻域和周围环境之间的 3D 关系。我们的方法成功地从单个 RGB 图像中提取相关深度特征，并在定量上比针对 CGL 检测进行调整和训练的现有对象检测和分割模型产生了显着改进。我们还引入了一种新颖的手工注释 CGL 检测数据集，其中包含用于实验的 1.5K 真实世界图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型视觉任务——隐蔽地理定位（CGL）检测，旨在从RGB图像中识别可能隐藏威胁或需调查目标的遮挡物体边界区域。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测与分割模型无法有效处理遮挡物体后潜在威胁区域的识别，而军事反恐、机器人巡检等场景亟需此类隐蔽区域检测能力。
AI.method: 通过单目RGB图像提取深度特征，结合遮挡物与周围环境的3D空间关系建模，设计专门的CGL检测网络，并构建包含1.5K真实场景图像的标注数据集。
AI.result: 在CGL检测任务中，该方法较传统目标检测模型实现显著性能提升，验证了基于3D空间关系建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CGL检测作为新型视觉任务具有重要应用价值，本文方法通过深度特征提取与空间关系建模为隐蔽区域识别提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Catch Me if You Can: A Novel Task for Detection of Covert Geo-Locations (CGL) 如果可以的话来抓我：检测隐蔽地理位置的新任务 (CGL) Most visual scene understanding tasks in the field of computer vision involve identification of the objects present in the scene. Image regions like hideouts, turns, & other obscured regions of the scene also contain crucial information, for specific surveillance tasks. Task proposed in this paper involves the design of an intelligent visual aid for identification of such locations in an image, which has either the potential to create an imminent threat from an adversary or appear as the target zones needing further investigation. Covert places (CGL) for hiding behind an occluding object are concealed 3D locations, not detectable from the viewpoint (camera). Hence this involves delineating specific image regions around the projections of outer boundary of the occluding objects, as places to be accessed around the potential hideouts. CGL detection finds applications in military counter-insurgency operations, surveillance with path planning for an exploratory robot. Given an RGB image, the goal is to identify all CGLs in the 2D scene. Identification of such regions would require knowledge about the 3D boundaries of obscuring items (pillars, furniture), their spatial location with respect to the neighboring regions of the scene. We propose this as a novel task, termed Covert Geo-Location (CGL) Detection. Classification of any region of an image as a CGL (as boundary sub-segments of an occluding object that conceals the hideout) requires examining the 3D relation between boundaries of occluding objects and their neighborhoods & surroundings. Our method successfully extracts relevant depth features from a single RGB image and quantitatively yields significant improvement over existing object detection and segmentation models adapted and trained for CGL detection. We also introduce a novel hand-annotated CGL detection dataset containing 1.5K real-world images for experimentation. 计算机视觉领域中的大多数视觉场景理解任务都涉及识别场景中存在的对象。诸如藏身处、转弯和场景的其他模糊区域之类的图像区域也包含对于特定监视任务的重要信息。本文提出的任务涉及设计一种智能视觉辅助工具，用于识别图像中的此类位置，这些位置有可能对对手造成迫在眉睫的威胁，也可能成为需要进一步调查的目标区域。用于隐藏在遮挡对象后面的隐蔽位置 (CGL) 是隐藏的 3D 位置，从视点（相机）无法检测到。因此，这涉及在遮挡对象的外边界投影周围描绘特定的图像区域，作为潜在藏身处周围要访问的地方。 CGL 检测可应用于军事反叛乱行动、探索性机器人的监视和路径规划。给定 RGB 图像，目标是识别 2D 场景中的所有 CGL。识别此类区域需要了解遮挡物品（柱子、家具）的 3D 边界及其相对于场景相邻区域的空间位置。我们建议将此作为一项新颖的任务，称为隐蔽地理位置（CGL）检测。将图像的任何区域分类为 CGL（作为隐藏隐藏点的遮挡对象的边界子段）需要检查遮挡对象的边界与其邻域和周围环境之间的 3D 关系。我们的方法成功地从单个 RGB 图像中提取相关深度特征，并在定量上比针对 CGL 检测进行调整和训练的现有对象检测和分割模型产生了显着改进。我们还引入了一种新颖的手工注释 CGL 检测数据集，其中包含用于实验的 1.5K 真实世界图像。 本文提出一种新型视觉任务——隐蔽地理定位（CGL）检测，旨在从RGB图像中识别可能隐藏威胁或需调查目标的遮挡物体边界区域。 Binoy Saha,Sukhendu Das cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Yi-Fan Zuo,Jiaqi Yang,Jiaben Chen,Xia Wang,Yifu Wang,Laurent Kneip
title: DEVO: Depth-Event Camera Visual Odometry in Challenging Conditions
title_zh: DEVO：具有挑战性的条件下的深度事件相机视觉里程计
comment: accepted in the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), Philadelphia (PA), USA
comments: accepted in the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), Philadelphia (PA), USA
abstract: We present a novel real-time visual odometry framework for a stereo setup of a depth and high-resolution event camera. Our framework balances accuracy and robustness against computational efficiency towards strong performance in challenging scenarios. We extend conventional edge-based semi-dense visual odometry towards time-surface maps obtained from event streams. Semi-dense depth maps are generated by warping the corresponding depth values of the extrinsically calibrated depth camera. The tracking module updates the camera pose through efficient, geometric semi-dense 3D-2D edge alignment. Our approach is validated on both public and self-collected datasets captured under various conditions. We show that the proposed method performs comparable to state-of-the-art RGB-D camera-based alternatives in regular conditions, and eventually outperforms in challenging conditions such as high dynamics or low illumination.
summary: We present a novel real-time visual odometry framework for a stereo setup of a depth and high-resolution event camera. Our framework balances accuracy and robustness against computational efficiency towards strong performance in challenging scenarios. We extend conventional edge-based semi-dense visual odometry towards time-surface maps obtained from event streams. Semi-dense depth maps are generated by warping the corresponding depth values of the extrinsically calibrated depth camera. The tracking module updates the camera pose through efficient, geometric semi-dense 3D-2D edge alignment. Our approach is validated on both public and self-collected datasets captured under various conditions. We show that the proposed method performs comparable to state-of-the-art RGB-D camera-based alternatives in regular conditions, and eventually outperforms in challenging conditions such as high dynamics or low illumination.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的实时视觉里程计框架，用于深度和高分辨率事件相机的立体设置。我们的框架平衡了准确性和鲁棒性与计算效率，以在具有挑战性的场景中实现强大的性能。我们将传统的基于边缘的半密集视觉里程计扩展到从事件流获得的时间表面图。半密集深度图是通过扭曲外部校准深度相机的相应深度值来生成的。跟踪模块通过高效的几何半密集 3D-2D 边缘对齐来更新相机姿态。我们的方法在各种条件下捕获的公共和自行收集的数据集上得到了验证。我们表明，所提出的方法在常规条件下的性能可与最先进的基于 RGB-D 相机的替代方案相媲美，并且最终在高动态或低照度等具有挑战性的条件下表现更佳。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度相机和事件相机的实时视觉里程计框架，旨在提升复杂环境下的定位精度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉里程计在高动态场景或低光照条件下易失效，需开发更适应挑战性环境的新型传感器融合方法。
AI.method: 通过外参校准生成半稠密深度图，结合事件相机的时间曲面特征，采用几何3D-2D边缘对齐优化相机位姿估计。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和自建数据集测试中，常规场景性能与RGB-D方法相当，高动态/低照度场景下显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DEVO框架有效融合深度与事件相机优势，在复杂环境下实现了高精度、实时的视觉里程计解决方案。

authors_text: Shaoe Lin,Beixiong Zheng,Fangjiong Chen,Rui Zhang
title: Intelligent Reflecting Surface-Aided Spectrum Sensing for Cognitive Radio
title_zh: 用于认知无线电的智能反射表面辅助频谱传感
comment: Accepted by IEEE Wireless Communications Letters (5 pages, 4 figures)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Wireless Communications Letters (5 pages, 4 figures)
abstract: Spectrum sensing is a key enabling technique for cognitive radio (CR), which provides essential information on the spectrum availability. However, due to severe wireless channel fading and path loss, the primary user (PU) signals received at the CR or secondary user (SU) can be practically too weak for reliable detection. To tackle this issue, we consider in this letter a new intelligent reflecting surface (IRS)-aided spectrum sensing scheme for CR, by exploiting the large aperture and passive beamforming gains of IRS to boost the PU signal strength received at the SU to facilitate its spectrum sensing. Specifically, by dynamically changing the IRS reflection over time according to a given codebook, its reflected signal power varies substantially at the SU, which is utilized for opportunistic signal detection. Furthermore, we propose a weighted energy detection method by combining the received signal power values over different IRS reflections, which significantly improves the detection performance. Simulation results validate the performance gain of the proposed IRS-aided spectrum sensing scheme, as compared to different benchmark schemes.
summary: Spectrum sensing is a key enabling technique for cognitive radio (CR), which provides essential information on the spectrum availability. However, due to severe wireless channel fading and path loss, the primary user (PU) signals received at the CR or secondary user (SU) can be practically too weak for reliable detection. To tackle this issue, we consider in this letter a new intelligent reflecting surface (IRS)-aided spectrum sensing scheme for CR, by exploiting the large aperture and passive beamforming gains of IRS to boost the PU signal strength received at the SU to facilitate its spectrum sensing. Specifically, by dynamically changing the IRS reflection over time according to a given codebook, its reflected signal power varies substantially at the SU, which is utilized for opportunistic signal detection. Furthermore, we propose a weighted energy detection method by combining the received signal power values over different IRS reflections, which significantly improves the detection performance. Simulation results validate the performance gain of the proposed IRS-aided spectrum sensing scheme, as compared to different benchmark schemes.
abstract_zh: 频谱感知是认知无线电 (CR) 的一项关键支持技术，可提供有关频谱可用性的重要信息。然而，由于严重的无线信道衰落和路径损耗，在 CR 或次要用户 (SU) 处接收到的主用户 (PU) 信号实际上可能太弱而无法进行可靠检测。为了解决这个问题，我们在这封信中考虑了一种新的 CR 智能反射表面 (IRS) 辅助频谱感知方案，通过利用 IRS 的大孔径和无源波束形成增益来增强 SU 接收到的 PU 信号强度，以促进其频谱感知。具体来说，通过根据给定码本随时间动态改变IRS反射，其反射信号功率在SU处显着变化，其用于机会信号检测。此外，我们提出了一种加权能量检测方法，通过组合不同IRS反射上的接收信号功率值，显着提高了检测性能。仿真结果验证了所提出的 IRS 辅助频谱感知方案与不同基准方案相比的性能增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用智能反射面（IRS）辅助的认知无线电频谱感知方案，以提高次级用户检测主用户信号的能力。
AI.motivation: 由于无线信道衰落和路径损耗，次级用户接收到的主用户信号可能太弱，难以可靠检测，因此需要一种新的频谱感知方法。
AI.method: 通过动态调整IRS的反射特性，增强次级用户接收到的主用户信号强度，并结合加权能量检测方法，提高检测性能。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了所提出的IRS辅助频谱感知方案相比其他基准方案具有显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: IRS辅助频谱感知方案能有效提升认知无线电中频谱检测的可靠性与性能。

search_text: Intelligent Reflecting Surface-Aided Spectrum Sensing for Cognitive Radio 用于认知无线电的智能反射表面辅助频谱传感 Spectrum sensing is a key enabling technique for cognitive radio (CR), which provides essential information on the spectrum availability. However, due to severe wireless channel fading and path loss, the primary user (PU) signals received at the CR or secondary user (SU) can be practically too weak for reliable detection. To tackle this issue, we consider in this letter a new intelligent reflecting surface (IRS)-aided spectrum sensing scheme for CR, by exploiting the large aperture and passive beamforming gains of IRS to boost the PU signal strength received at the SU to facilitate its spectrum sensing. Specifically, by dynamically changing the IRS reflection over time according to a given codebook, its reflected signal power varies substantially at the SU, which is utilized for opportunistic signal detection. Furthermore, we propose a weighted energy detection method by combining the received signal power values over different IRS reflections, which significantly improves the detection performance. Simulation results validate the performance gain of the proposed IRS-aided spectrum sensing scheme, as compared to different benchmark schemes. 频谱感知是认知无线电 (CR) 的一项关键支持技术，可提供有关频谱可用性的重要信息。然而，由于严重的无线信道衰落和路径损耗，在 CR 或次要用户 (SU) 处接收到的主用户 (PU) 信号实际上可能太弱而无法进行可靠检测。为了解决这个问题，我们在这封信中考虑了一种新的 CR 智能反射表面 (IRS) 辅助频谱感知方案，通过利用 IRS 的大孔径和无源波束形成增益来增强 SU 接收到的 PU 信号强度，以促进其频谱感知。具体来说，通过根据给定码本随时间动态改变IRS反射，其反射信号功率在SU处显着变化，其用于机会信号检测。此外，我们提出了一种加权能量检测方法，通过组合不同IRS反射上的接收信号功率值，显着提高了检测性能。仿真结果验证了所提出的 IRS 辅助频谱感知方案与不同基准方案相比的性能增益。 本文提出了一种利用智能反射面（IRS）辅助的认知无线电频谱感知方案，以提高次级用户检测主用户信号的能力。 Shaoe Lin,Beixiong Zheng,Fangjiong Chen,Rui Zhang cs.IT,cs.ET,eess.SP

authors_text: Tianqu Kang,Anh-Dung Dinh,Binghong Wang,Tianyuan Du,Yijia Chen,Kevin Chau
title: Optimization of a Real-Time Wavelet-Based Algorithm for Improving Speech Intelligibility
title_zh: 用于提高语音清晰度的实时小波算法优化
abstract: The optimization of a wavelet-based algorithm to improve speech intelligibility along with the full data set and results are reported. The discrete-time speech signal is split into frequency sub-bands via a multi-level discrete wavelet transform. Various gains are applied to the sub-band signals before they are recombined to form a modified version of the speech. The sub-band gains are adjusted while keeping the overall signal energy unchanged, and the speech intelligibility under various background interference and simulated hearing loss conditions is enhanced and evaluated objectively and quantitatively using Google Speech-to-Text transcription. A universal set of sub-band gains can work over a range of noise-to-signal ratios up to 4.8 dB. For noise-free speech, overall intelligibility is improved, and the Google transcription accuracy is increased by 16.9 percentage points on average and 86.7 maximum by reallocating the spectral energy toward the mid-frequency sub-bands. For speech already corrupted by noise, improving intelligibility is challenging but still realizable with an increased transcription accuracy of 9.5 percentage points on average and 71.4 maximum. The proposed algorithm is implementable for real-time speech processing and comparatively simpler than previous algorithms. Potential applications include speech enhancement, hearing aids, machine listening, and a better understanding of speech intelligibility.
summary: The optimization of a wavelet-based algorithm to improve speech intelligibility along with the full data set and results are reported. The discrete-time speech signal is split into frequency sub-bands via a multi-level discrete wavelet transform. Various gains are applied to the sub-band signals before they are recombined to form a modified version of the speech. The sub-band gains are adjusted while keeping the overall signal energy unchanged, and the speech intelligibility under various background interference and simulated hearing loss conditions is enhanced and evaluated objectively and quantitatively using Google Speech-to-Text transcription. A universal set of sub-band gains can work over a range of noise-to-signal ratios up to 4.8 dB. For noise-free speech, overall intelligibility is improved, and the Google transcription accuracy is increased by 16.9 percentage points on average and 86.7 maximum by reallocating the spectral energy toward the mid-frequency sub-bands. For speech already corrupted by noise, improving intelligibility is challenging but still realizable with an increased transcription accuracy of 9.5 percentage points on average and 71.4 maximum. The proposed algorithm is implementable for real-time speech processing and comparatively simpler than previous algorithms. Potential applications include speech enhancement, hearing aids, machine listening, and a better understanding of speech intelligibility.
abstract_zh: 报告了用于提高语音清晰度的基于小波的算法的优化以及完整的数据集和结果。通过多级离散小波变换将离散时间语音信号分成频率子带。在重新组合子带信号以形成语音的修改版本之前，将各种增益应用于子带信号。在保持整体信号能量不变的情况下调整子带增益，利用Google Speech-to-Text转录来增强和客观定量地评估各种背景干扰和模拟听力损失条件下的语音清晰度。一组通用的子带增益可以在高达 4.8 dB 的噪声信号比范围内工作。对于无噪声语音，通过向中频子带重新分配频谱能量，整体清晰度得到提高，Google 转录准确率平均提高 16.9 个百分点，最大提高 86.7 个百分点。对于已经被噪声破坏的语音，提高清晰度具有挑战性，但仍然可以实现，转录准确度平均提高 9.5 个百分点，最高提高 71.4 个百分点。所提出的算法可实现实时语音处理，并且比以前的算法相对简单。潜在的应用包括语音增强、助听器、机器听力以及更好地理解语音清晰度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于小波变换的实时算法优化方案，旨在提升语音清晰度并增强语音识别准确性。
AI.motivation: 在噪声环境或听力障碍条件下，语音清晰度下降导致语音识别困难，需开发高效算法以改善这一问题。
AI.method: 通过多级离散小波变换将语音信号分解为频带子信号，调整各子带增益并保持总能量不变，利用Google语音识别系统量化评估效果。
AI.result: 在无噪声场景下，识别准确率平均提升16.9个百分点；在噪声场景下平均提升9.5个百分点，且算法具备实时性优势。
AI.conclusion: 该算法结构简单且适用于实时处理，可应用于语音增强、助听器及机器听觉等领域，为语音清晰度研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Guofeng Mei,Xiaoshui Huang,Juan Liu,Jian Zhang,Qiang Wu
title: Unsupervised Point Cloud Pre-Training via Contrasting and Clustering
title_zh: 通过对比和聚类进行无监督点云预训练
abstract: Annotating large-scale point clouds is highly time-consuming and often infeasible for many complex real-world tasks. Point cloud pre-training has therefore become a promising strategy for learning discriminative representations without labeled data. In this paper, we propose a general unsupervised pre-training framework, termed ConClu, which jointly integrates contrasting and clustering. The contrasting objective maximizes the similarity between feature representations extracted from two augmented views of the same point cloud, while the clustering objective simultaneously partitions the data and enforces consistency between cluster assignments across augmentations. Experimental results on multiple downstream tasks show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Code is available at https://github.com/gfmei/conclu.
summary: Annotating large-scale point clouds is highly time-consuming and often infeasible for many complex real-world tasks. Point cloud pre-training has therefore become a promising strategy for learning discriminative representations without labeled data. In this paper, we propose a general unsupervised pre-training framework, termed ConClu, which jointly integrates contrasting and clustering. The contrasting objective maximizes the similarity between feature representations extracted from two augmented views of the same point cloud, while the clustering objective simultaneously partitions the data and enforces consistency between cluster assignments across augmentations. Experimental results on multiple downstream tasks show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Code is available at https://github.com/gfmei/conclu.
abstract_zh: 注释大规模点云非常耗时，并且对于许多复杂的现实任务来说通常不可行。因此，点云预训练已成为一种在没有标记数据的情况下学习判别表示的有前途的策略。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用的无监督预训练框架，称为 ConClu，它联合集成了对比和聚类。对比目标最大化从同一点云的两个增强视图提取的特征表示之间的相似性，而聚类目标同时划分数据并强制跨增强的聚类分配之间的一致性。多个下游任务的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的方法，证明了所提出框架的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/gfmei/conclu 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合对比学习和聚类的无监督点云预训练框架ConClu，用于学习无需标注数据的判别性特征表示。
AI.motivation: 大规模点云标注耗时且不现实，需通过无监督预训练学习有效特征表示以支持下游任务。
AI.method: 设计ConClu框架，联合优化对比目标（增强视图间特征相似性）和聚类目标（跨增强的一致性聚类分配）。
AI.result: 在多个下游任务中优于现有最先进方法，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: ConClu通过结合对比与聚类实现了高效的点云预训练，代码已开源促进进一步研究。

authors_text: Philipp Thölke,Gianni De Fabritiis
title: TorchMD-NET: Equivariant Transformers for Neural Network based Molecular Potentials
title_zh: TorchMD-NET：基于神经网络的分子势的等变变压器
abstract: The prediction of quantum mechanical properties is historically plagued by a trade-off between accuracy and speed. Machine learning potentials have previously shown great success in this domain, reaching increasingly better accuracy while maintaining computational efficiency comparable with classical force fields. In this work we propose TorchMD-NET, a novel equivariant transformer (ET) architecture, outperforming state-of-the-art on MD17, ANI-1, and many QM9 targets in both accuracy and computational efficiency. Through an extensive attention weight analysis, we gain valuable insights into the black box predictor and show differences in the learned representation of conformers versus conformations sampled from molecular dynamics or normal modes. Furthermore, we highlight the importance of datasets including off-equilibrium conformations for the evaluation of molecular potentials.
summary: The prediction of quantum mechanical properties is historically plagued by a trade-off between accuracy and speed. Machine learning potentials have previously shown great success in this domain, reaching increasingly better accuracy while maintaining computational efficiency comparable with classical force fields. In this work we propose TorchMD-NET, a novel equivariant transformer (ET) architecture, outperforming state-of-the-art on MD17, ANI-1, and many QM9 targets in both accuracy and computational efficiency. Through an extensive attention weight analysis, we gain valuable insights into the black box predictor and show differences in the learned representation of conformers versus conformations sampled from molecular dynamics or normal modes. Furthermore, we highlight the importance of datasets including off-equilibrium conformations for the evaluation of molecular potentials.
abstract_zh: 量子力学特性的预测历来受到准确性和速度之间权衡的困扰。机器学习的潜力此前已在该领域取得了巨大成功，达到了越来越高的精度，同时保持了与经典力场相当的计算效率。在这项工作中，我们提出了 TorchMD-NET，这是一种新颖的等变变压器 (ET) 架构，在 MD17、ANI-1 和许多 QM9 目标上的准确性和计算效率均优于最先进的技术。通过广泛的注意力权重分析，我们获得了对黑盒预测器的宝贵见解，并显示了构象异构体的学习表示与从分子动力学或正常模式采样的构象之间的差异。此外，我们强调了包括非平衡构象的数据集对于评估分子势的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型等变Transformer架构TorchMD-NET，用于高效准确预测分子势能。
AI.motivation: 量子力学性质预测面临准确性与计算速度的矛盾，传统机器学习势能方法需进一步提升性能。
AI.method: 设计等变Transformer架构，结合分子对称性与自注意力机制，通过构象分析优化表征学习。
AI.result: 在MD17、ANI-1和QM9等数据集上超越现有方法，在保持效率的同时提升预测精度，并揭示构象表征差异。
AI.conclusion: 等变Transformer架构有效平衡了分子势能预测的准确性与计算效率，非平衡构象数据对模型评估至关重要。

search_text: TorchMD-NET: Equivariant Transformers for Neural Network based Molecular Potentials TorchMD-NET：基于神经网络的分子势的等变变压器 The prediction of quantum mechanical properties is historically plagued by a trade-off between accuracy and speed. Machine learning potentials have previously shown great success in this domain, reaching increasingly better accuracy while maintaining computational efficiency comparable with classical force fields. In this work we propose TorchMD-NET, a novel equivariant transformer (ET) architecture, outperforming state-of-the-art on MD17, ANI-1, and many QM9 targets in both accuracy and computational efficiency. Through an extensive attention weight analysis, we gain valuable insights into the black box predictor and show differences in the learned representation of conformers versus conformations sampled from molecular dynamics or normal modes. Furthermore, we highlight the importance of datasets including off-equilibrium conformations for the evaluation of molecular potentials. 量子力学特性的预测历来受到准确性和速度之间权衡的困扰。机器学习的潜力此前已在该领域取得了巨大成功，达到了越来越高的精度，同时保持了与经典力场相当的计算效率。在这项工作中，我们提出了 TorchMD-NET，这是一种新颖的等变变压器 (ET) 架构，在 MD17、ANI-1 和许多 QM9 目标上的准确性和计算效率均优于最先进的技术。通过广泛的注意力权重分析，我们获得了对黑盒预测器的宝贵见解，并显示了构象异构体的学习表示与从分子动力学或正常模式采样的构象之间的差异。此外，我们强调了包括非平衡构象的数据集对于评估分子势的重要性。 本文提出一种新型等变Transformer架构TorchMD-NET，用于高效准确预测分子势能。 Philipp Thölke,Gianni De Fabritiis cs.LG,cs.AI,physics.chem-ph

authors_text: Remy Demichelis
title: Science Facing Interoperability as a Necessary Condition of Success and Evil
title_zh: 科学面临互操作性作为成功和邪恶的必要条件
comment: 5 pages, The Society for Philosophy and Technology Conference 2021
comments: 5 pages, The Society for Philosophy and Technology Conference 2021
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems, such as machine learning algorithms, have allowed scientists, marketers and governments to shed light on correlations that remained invisible until now. Beforehand, the dots that we had to connect in order to imagine a new knowledge were either too numerous, too sparse or not even detected. Sometimes, the information was not stored in the same data lake or format and was not able to communicate. But in creating new bridges with AI, many problems appeared such as bias reproduction, unfair inferences or mass surveillance. Our aim is to show that, on one hand, the AI's deep ethical problem lays essentially in these new connections made possible by systems interoperability. In connecting the spheres of our life, these systems undermine the notion of justice particular to each of them, because the new interactions create dominances of social goods from a sphere to another. These systems make therefore spheres permeable to one another and, in doing so, they open to progress as well as to tyranny. On another hand, however, we would like to emphasize that the act to connect what used to seem a priori disjoint is a necessary move of knowledge and scientific progress.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems, such as machine learning algorithms, have allowed scientists, marketers and governments to shed light on correlations that remained invisible until now. Beforehand, the dots that we had to connect in order to imagine a new knowledge were either too numerous, too sparse or not even detected. Sometimes, the information was not stored in the same data lake or format and was not able to communicate. But in creating new bridges with AI, many problems appeared such as bias reproduction, unfair inferences or mass surveillance. Our aim is to show that, on one hand, the AI's deep ethical problem lays essentially in these new connections made possible by systems interoperability. In connecting the spheres of our life, these systems undermine the notion of justice particular to each of them, because the new interactions create dominances of social goods from a sphere to another. These systems make therefore spheres permeable to one another and, in doing so, they open to progress as well as to tyranny. On another hand, however, we would like to emphasize that the act to connect what used to seem a priori disjoint is a necessary move of knowledge and scientific progress.
abstract_zh: 机器学习算法等人工智能 (AI) 系统使科学家、营销人员和政府能够揭示迄今为止仍不可见的相关性。在此之前，我们为了想象新知识而必须连接的点要么太多，要么太稀疏，或者甚至没有被检测到。有时，信息未存储在相同的数据湖或格式中，并且无法通信。但在与人工智能建立新桥梁的过程中，出现了许多问题，例如偏见再现、不公平推论或大规模监视。我们的目的是表明，一方面，人工智能的深层道德问题本质上在于系统互操作性所带来的这些新连接。在连接我们生活的各个领域时，这些系统破坏了每个领域特有的正义观念，因为新的互动创造了社会物品从一个领域到另一个领域的主导地位。因此，这些体系使得各个领域之间可以相互渗透，这样一来，它们就会向进步开放，也向暴政开放。然而，另一方面，我们要强调的是，将过去看似先验的脱节事物联系起来的行为是知识和科学进步的必要举措。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨人工智能系统通过互操作性连接不同领域数据所带来的双重影响，既推动科学进步，又引发伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在揭示AI互操作性在促进知识连接的同时，可能破坏各领域正义性并导致社会资源失衡，强调需权衡其利弊。
AI.method: 通过分析AI技术连接数据的机制，结合伦理学视角探讨互操作性对社会结构的影响，未采用实证研究方法。
AI.result: 发现AI互操作性虽加速科学进步，但可能加剧偏见、侵犯隐私并导致跨领域资源垄断，形成新的社会不公。
AI.conclusion: 互操作性是科学发展的必要条件，但需建立伦理框架以防止技术滥用，平衡进步与风险。

authors_text: Xiaohe Li,Lijie Wen,Yawen Deng,Fuli Feng,Xuming Hu,Lei Wang,Zide Fan
title: Graph Neural Network with Curriculum Learning for Imbalanced Node Classification
title_zh: 具有课程学习的图神经网络用于不平衡节点分类
abstract: Graph Neural Network (GNN) is an emerging technique for graph-based learning tasks such as node classification. In this work, we reveal the vulnerability of GNN to the imbalance of node labels. Traditional solutions for imbalanced classification (e.g. resampling) are ineffective in node classification without considering the graph structure. Worse still, they may even bring overfitting or underfitting results due to lack of sufficient prior knowledge. To solve these problems, we propose a novel graph neural network framework with curriculum learning (GNN-CL) consisting of two modules. For one thing, we hope to acquire certain reliable interpolation nodes and edges through the novel graph-based oversampling based on smoothness and homophily. For another, we combine graph classification loss and metric learning loss which adjust the distance between different nodes associated with minority class in feature space. Inspired by curriculum learning, we dynamically adjust the weights of different modules during training process to achieve better ability of generalization and discrimination. The proposed framework is evaluated via several widely used graph datasets, showing that our proposed model consistently outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Graph Neural Network (GNN) is an emerging technique for graph-based learning tasks such as node classification. In this work, we reveal the vulnerability of GNN to the imbalance of node labels. Traditional solutions for imbalanced classification (e.g. resampling) are ineffective in node classification without considering the graph structure. Worse still, they may even bring overfitting or underfitting results due to lack of sufficient prior knowledge. To solve these problems, we propose a novel graph neural network framework with curriculum learning (GNN-CL) consisting of two modules. For one thing, we hope to acquire certain reliable interpolation nodes and edges through the novel graph-based oversampling based on smoothness and homophily. For another, we combine graph classification loss and metric learning loss which adjust the distance between different nodes associated with minority class in feature space. Inspired by curriculum learning, we dynamically adjust the weights of different modules during training process to achieve better ability of generalization and discrimination. The proposed framework is evaluated via several widely used graph datasets, showing that our proposed model consistently outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）是一种用于基于图的学​​习任务（例如节点分类）的新兴技术。在这项工作中，我们揭示了 GNN 对节点标签不平衡的脆弱性。传统的不平衡分类解决方案（例如重采样）在不考虑图结构的情况下对节点分类是无效的。更糟糕的是，由于缺乏足够的先验知识，它们甚至可能带来过拟合或欠拟合的结果。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的带有课程学习的图神经网络框架（GNN-CL），由两个模块组成。一方面，我们希望通过基于平滑性和同质性的新颖的基于图的过采样来获得某些可靠的插值节点和边。另一方面，我们结合图分类损失和度量学习损失，调整与特征空间中少数类相关的不同节点之间的距离。受课程学习的启发，我们在训练过程中动态调整不同模块的权重，以达到更好的泛化和判别能力。所提出的框架通过几个广泛使用的图形数据集进行了评估，表明我们提出的模型始终优于现有的最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合课程学习的图神经网络框架（GNN-CL），用于解决节点分类中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统节点分类方法在处理类别不平衡数据时效果不佳，且忽略图结构的重采样方法可能导致过拟合或欠拟合。
AI.method: 设计包含图结构增强的过采样模块和联合损失函数的框架，通过课程学习动态调整模块权重。
AI.result: 在多个标准图数据集上实验表明，该模型优于现有最先进的节点分类方法。
AI.conclusion: GNN-CL框架通过结合图结构特性与课程学习策略，有效提升了不平衡节点分类的性能。

For another, we combine graph classification loss and metric learning loss which adjust the distance between different nodes associated with minority class in feature space. Inspired by curriculum learning, we dynamically adjust the weights of different modules during training process to achieve better ability of generalization and discrimination. The proposed framework is evaluated via several widely used graph datasets, showing that our proposed model consistently outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods. 图神经网络（GNN）是一种用于基于图的学​​习任务（例如节点分类）的新兴技术。在这项工作中，我们揭示了 GNN 对节点标签不平衡的脆弱性。传统的不平衡分类解决方案（例如重采样）在不考虑图结构的情况下对节点分类是无效的。更糟糕的是，由于缺乏足够的先验知识，它们甚至可能带来过拟合或欠拟合的结果。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的带有课程学习的图神经网络框架（GNN-CL），由两个模块组成。一方面，我们希望通过基于平滑性和同质性的新颖的基于图的过采样来获得某些可靠的插值节点和边。另一方面，我们结合图分类损失和度量学习损失，调整与特征空间中少数类相关的不同节点之间的距离。受课程学习的启发，我们在训练过程中动态调整不同模块的权重，以达到更好的泛化和判别能力。所提出的框架通过几个广泛使用的图形数据集进行了评估，表明我们提出的模型始终优于现有的最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种结合课程学习的图神经网络框架（GNN-CL），用于解决节点分类中的类别不平衡问题。 Xiaohe Li,Lijie Wen,Yawen Deng,Fuli Feng,Xuming Hu,Lei Wang,Zide Fan cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ivan Dario Jimenez Rodriguez,Aaron D. Ames,Yisong Yue
title: LyaNet: A Lyapunov Framework for Training Neural ODEs
title_zh: LyaNet：用于训练神经 ODE 的 Lyapunov 框架
abstract: We propose a method for training ordinary differential equations by using a control-theoretic Lyapunov condition for stability. Our approach, called LyaNet, is based on a novel Lyapunov loss formulation that encourages the inference dynamics to converge quickly to the correct prediction. Theoretically, we show that minimizing Lyapunov loss guarantees exponential convergence to the correct solution and enables a novel robustness guarantee. We also provide practical algorithms, including one that avoids the cost of backpropagating through a solver or using the adjoint method. Relative to standard Neural ODE training, we empirically find that LyaNet can offer improved prediction performance, faster convergence of inference dynamics, and improved adversarial robustness. Our code available at https://github.com/ivandariojr/LyapunovLearning .
summary: We propose a method for training ordinary differential equations by using a control-theoretic Lyapunov condition for stability. Our approach, called LyaNet, is based on a novel Lyapunov loss formulation that encourages the inference dynamics to converge quickly to the correct prediction. Theoretically, we show that minimizing Lyapunov loss guarantees exponential convergence to the correct solution and enables a novel robustness guarantee. We also provide practical algorithms, including one that avoids the cost of backpropagating through a solver or using the adjoint method. Relative to standard Neural ODE training, we empirically find that LyaNet can offer improved prediction performance, faster convergence of inference dynamics, and improved adversarial robustness. Our code available at https://github.com/ivandariojr/LyapunovLearning .
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通过使用控制理论李雅普诺夫条件来保持稳定性来训练常微分方程的方法。我们的方法称为 LyaNet，基于一种新颖的 Lyapunov 损失公式，该公式鼓励推理动力学快速收敛到正确的预测。从理论上讲，我们证明最小化李亚普诺夫损失可以保证指数收敛到正确的解决方案，并实现新颖的鲁棒性保证。我们还提供实用的算法，包括避免通过求解器反向传播或使用伴随方法的成本的算法。相对于标准神经 ODE 训练，我们凭经验发现 LyaNet 可以提供改进的预测性能、更快的推理动态收敛以及改进的对抗鲁棒性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ivandariojr/LyapunovLearning 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LyaNet方法，通过李雅普诺夫框架训练神经ODE，提升预测性能与对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统神经ODE训练存在收敛速度慢、鲁棒性不足的问题，需借助控制理论保证稳定性。
AI.method: 设计李雅普诺夫损失函数，结合控制理论确保指数收敛，并提出无需反向传播的高效算法。
AI.result: 实验显示LyaNet在预测精度、收敛速度及对抗鲁棒性方面优于标准神经ODE方法。
AI.conclusion: LyaNet通过理论保证与实用算法，有效提升了神经ODE的训练效率与稳定性，代码已开源。

authors_text: Harichandana B S S,Vibhav Agarwal,Sourav Ghosh,Gopi Ramena,Sumit Kumar,Barath Raj Kandur Raja
title: PrivPAS: A real time Privacy-Preserving AI System and applied ethics
title_zh: PrivPAS：实时隐私保护人工智能系统和应用伦理
comment: Accepted at 16th IEEE International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC), January 26-28, 2022 [update: Best Paper candidate at ICSC 2022]
comments: Accepted at 16th IEEE International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC), January 26-28, 2022 [update: Best Paper candidate at ICSC 2022]
abstract: With 3.78 billion social media users worldwide in 2021 (48% of the human population), almost 3 billion images are shared daily. At the same time, a consistent evolution of smartphone cameras has led to a photography explosion with 85% of all new pictures being captured using smartphones. However, lately, there has been an increased discussion of privacy concerns when a person being photographed is unaware of the picture being taken or has reservations about the same being shared. These privacy violations are amplified for people with disabilities, who may find it challenging to raise dissent even if they are aware. Such unauthorized image captures may also be misused to gain sympathy by third-party organizations, leading to a privacy breach. Privacy for people with disabilities has so far received comparatively less attention from the AI community. This motivates us to work towards a solution to generate privacy-conscious cues for raising awareness in smartphone users of any sensitivity in their viewfinder content. To this end, we introduce PrivPAS (A real time Privacy-Preserving AI System) a novel framework to identify sensitive content. Additionally, we curate and annotate a dataset to identify and localize accessibility markers and classify whether an image is sensitive to a featured subject with a disability. We demonstrate that the proposed lightweight architecture, with a memory footprint of a mere 8.49MB, achieves a high mAP of 89.52% on resource-constrained devices. Furthermore, our pipeline, trained on face anonymized data, achieves an F1-score of 73.1%.
summary: With 3.78 billion social media users worldwide in 2021 (48% of the human population), almost 3 billion images are shared daily. At the same time, a consistent evolution of smartphone cameras has led to a photography explosion with 85% of all new pictures being captured using smartphones. However, lately, there has been an increased discussion of privacy concerns when a person being photographed is unaware of the picture being taken or has reservations about the same being shared. These privacy violations are amplified for people with disabilities, who may find it challenging to raise dissent even if they are aware. Such unauthorized image captures may also be misused to gain sympathy by third-party organizations, leading to a privacy breach. Privacy for people with disabilities has so far received comparatively less attention from the AI community. This motivates us to work towards a solution to generate privacy-conscious cues for raising awareness in smartphone users of any sensitivity in their viewfinder content. To this end, we introduce PrivPAS (A real time Privacy-Preserving AI System) a novel framework to identify sensitive content. Additionally, we curate and annotate a dataset to identify and localize accessibility markers and classify whether an image is sensitive to a featured subject with a disability. We demonstrate that the proposed lightweight architecture, with a memory footprint of a mere 8.49MB, achieves a high mAP of 89.52% on resource-constrained devices. Furthermore, our pipeline, trained on face anonymized data, achieves an F1-score of 73.1%.
abstract_zh: 2021 年，全球社交媒体用户数量为 37.8 亿（占总人口的 48%），每天分享近 30 亿张图片。与此同时，智能手机相机的不断发展导致了摄影爆炸式增长，85% 的新照片都是使用智能手机拍摄的。然而，最近，当被拍照者不知道照片正在被拍摄或对共享相同照片持保留态度时，关于隐私问题的讨论越来越多。对于残疾人来说，这些隐私侵犯行为更加严重，即使他们意识到，提出异议也可能很困难。此类未经授权的图像捕获也可能被第三方组织滥用以获取同情，从而导致隐私泄露。迄今为止，人工智能社区对残疾人隐私的关注相对较少。这促使我们致力于寻找一种解决方案，生成注重隐私的提示，以提高智能手机用户对其取景器内容敏感度的认识。为此，我们引入了 PrivPAS（实时隐私保护人工智能系统），这是一种识别敏感内容的新颖框架。此外，我们还整理和注释数据集，以识别和本地化可访问性标记，并对图像是否对残障人士敏感进行分类。我们证明了所提出的轻量级架构，内存占用仅为 8.49MB，在资源受限的设备上实现了 89.52% 的高 mAP。此外，我们的管道经过人脸匿名数据训练，F1 分数达到 73.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PrivPAS实时隐私保护AI系统，用于识别敏感内容并创建数据集以识别无障碍标记，特别关注残障人士的隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 全球社交媒体用户数量庞大，每日共享大量图片，但隐私问题尤其是残障人士的隐私保护长期被忽视，需通过技术手段提升用户隐私意识。
AI.method: 设计轻量级PrivPAS框架（内存占用8.49MB），结合数据集标注与分类模型，识别敏感内容及无障碍标记，并在去标识化数据上训练模型。
AI.result: 系统在资源受限设备上实现89.52%的mAP，F1-score达73.1%，有效识别敏感图像及无障碍标记。
AI.conclusion: PrivPAS为隐私保护提供高效解决方案，尤其关注残障群体，未来可进一步优化模型性能与数据集多样性。

authors_text: Sreenivasa Hikkal Venugopala
title: Comparative study of 3D object detection frameworks based on LiDAR data and sensor fusion techniques
title_zh: 基于LiDAR数据和传感器融合技术的3D物体检测框架的比较研究
comment: 2021 International Conference on Industrial Automation, Robotics and Control Engineering (IARCE 2021)
comments: 2021 International Conference on Industrial Automation, Robotics and Control Engineering (IARCE 2021)
abstract: Estimating and understanding the surroundings of the vehicle precisely forms the basic and crucial step for the autonomous vehicle. The perception system plays a significant role in providing an accurate interpretation of a vehicle's environment in real-time. Generally, the perception system involves various subsystems such as localization, obstacle (static and dynamic) detection, and avoidance, mapping systems, and others. For perceiving the environment, these vehicles will be equipped with various exteroceptive (both passive and active) sensors in particular cameras, Radars, LiDARs, and others. These systems are equipped with deep learning techniques that transform the huge amount of data from the sensors into semantic information on which the object detection and localization tasks are performed. For numerous driving tasks, to provide accurate results, the location and depth information of a particular object is necessary. 3D object detection methods, by utilizing the additional pose data from the sensors such as LiDARs, stereo cameras, provides information on the size and location of the object. Based on recent research, 3D object detection frameworks performing object detection and localization on LiDAR data and sensor fusion techniques show significant improvement in their performance. In this work, a comparative study of the effect of using LiDAR data for object detection frameworks and the performance improvement seen by using sensor fusion techniques are performed. Along with discussing various state-of-the-art methods in both the cases, performing experimental analysis, and providing future research directions.

In this work, a comparative study of the effect of using LiDAR data for object detection frameworks and the performance improvement seen by using sensor fusion techniques are performed. Along with discussing various state-of-the-art methods in both the cases, performing experimental analysis, and providing future research directions.
abstract_zh: 准确地估计和理解车辆周围的环境是自动驾驶汽车的基础和关键步骤。感知系统在实时准确解释车辆环境方面发挥着重要作用。一般来说，感知系统涉及各种子系统，例如定位、障碍物（静态和动态）检测和规避、地图系统等。为了感知环境，这些车辆将配备各种外部感知（被动和主动）传感器，特别是摄像头、雷达、激光雷达等。这些系统配备了深度学习技术，可将来自传感器的大量数据转换为执行对象检测和定位任务的语义信息。对于众多驾驶任务，为了提供准确的结果，特定物体的位置和深度信息是必要的。 3D 物体检测方法通过利用来自激光雷达、立体相机等传感器的附加姿态数据，提供有关物体大小和位置的信息。根据最近的研究，对 LiDAR 数据执行对象检测和定位的 3D 对象检测框架以及传感器融合技术显示出其性能的显着提高。在这项工作中，对使用激光雷达数据进行目标检测框架的效果以及使用传感器融合技术所带来的性能改进进行了比较研究。同时讨论这两种情况下的各种最先进的方法，进行实验分析，并提供未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对比研究了基于LiDAR数据和传感器融合技术的3D物体检测框架的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需要精确的环境感知能力，而3D物体检测在提供物体位置和尺寸信息方面至关重要，传感器融合技术可能进一步提升检测效果。
AI.method: 通过实验分析对比了多种基于LiDAR数据的检测框架及结合传感器融合技术的方案，讨论了最新算法并评估其性能表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，传感器融合技术显著提升了3D物体检测的精度和鲁棒性，尤其在复杂场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 传感器融合是提升自动驾驶环境感知能力的有效途径，未来需进一步优化多模态数据融合算法。

search_text: Comparative study of 3D object detection frameworks based on LiDAR data and sensor fusion techniques 基于LiDAR数据和传感器融合技术的3D物体检测框架的比较研究 Estimating and understanding the surroundings of the vehicle precisely forms the basic and crucial step for the autonomous vehicle. The perception system plays a significant role in providing an accurate interpretation of a vehicle's environment in real-time. Generally, the perception system involves various subsystems such as localization, obstacle (static and dynamic) detection, and avoidance, mapping systems, and others. For perceiving the environment, these vehicles will be equipped with various exteroceptive (both passive and active) sensors in particular cameras, Radars, LiDARs, and others. These systems are equipped with deep learning techniques that transform the huge amount of data from the sensors into semantic information on which the object detection and localization tasks are performed. For numerous driving tasks, to provide accurate results, the location and depth information of a particular object is necessary. 3D object detection methods, by utilizing the additional pose data from the sensors such as LiDARs, stereo cameras, provides information on the size and location of the object. Based on recent research, 3D object detection frameworks performing object detection and localization on LiDAR data and sensor fusion techniques show significant improvement in their performance. In this work, a comparative study of the effect of using LiDAR data for object detection frameworks and the performance improvement seen by using sensor fusion techniques are performed. Along with discussing various state-of-the-art methods in both the cases, performing experimental analysis, and providing future research directions. 准确地估计和理解车辆周围的环境是自动驾驶汽车的基础和关键步骤。感知系统在实时准确解释车辆环境方面发挥着重要作用。一般来说，感知系统涉及各种子系统，例如定位、障碍物（静态和动态）检测和规避、地图系统等。为了感知环境，这些车辆将配备各种外部感知（被动和主动）传感器，特别是摄像头、雷达、激光雷达等。这些系统配备了深度学习技术，可将来自传感器的大量数据转换为执行对象检测和定位任务的语义信息。对于众多驾驶任务，为了提供准确的结果，特定物体的位置和深度信息是必要的。 3D 物体检测方法通过利用来自激光雷达、立体相机等传感器的附加姿态数据，提供有关物体大小和位置的信息。根据最近的研究，对 LiDAR 数据执行对象检测和定位的 3D 对象检测框架以及传感器融合技术显示出其性能的显着提高。在这项工作中，对使用激光雷达数据进行目标检测框架的效果以及使用传感器融合技术所带来的性能改进进行了比较研究。同时讨论这两种情况下的各种最先进的方法，进行实验分析，并提供未来的研究方向。 本文对比研究了基于LiDAR数据和传感器融合技术的3D物体检测框架的性能差异。 Sreenivasa Hikkal Venugopala cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yongjun Chen,Zhiwei Liu,Jia Li,Julian McAuley,Caiming Xiong
title: Intent Contrastive Learning for Sequential Recommendation
title_zh: 顺序推荐的意图对比学习
abstract: Users' interactions with items are driven by various intents (e.g., preparing for holiday gifts, shopping for fishing equipment, etc.).However, users' underlying intents are often unobserved/latent, making it challenging to leverage such latent intents forSequentialrecommendation(SR). To investigate the benefits of latent intents and leverage them effectively for recommendation, we proposeIntentContrastiveLearning(ICL), a general learning paradigm that leverages a latent intent variable into SR. The core idea is to learn users' intent distribution functions from unlabeled user behavior sequences and optimize SR models with contrastive self-supervised learning (SSL) by considering the learned intents to improve recommendation. Specifically, we introduce a latent variable to represent users' intents and learn the distribution function of the latent variable via clustering. We propose to leverage the learned intents into SR models via contrastive SSL, which maximizes the agreement between a view of sequence and its corresponding intent. The training is alternated between intent representation learning and the SR model optimization steps within the generalized expectation-maximization (EM) framework. Fusing user intent information into SR also improves model robustness. Experiments conducted on four real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed learning paradigm, which improves performance, and robustness against data sparsity and noisy interaction issues.
summary: Users' interactions with items are driven by various intents (e.g., preparing for holiday gifts, shopping for fishing equipment, etc.).However, users' underlying intents are often unobserved/latent, making it challenging to leverage such latent intents forSequentialrecommendation(SR). To investigate the benefits of latent intents and leverage them effectively for recommendation, we proposeIntentContrastiveLearning(ICL), a general learning paradigm that leverages a latent intent variable into SR. The core idea is to learn users' intent distribution functions from unlabeled user behavior sequences and optimize SR models with contrastive self-supervised learning (SSL) by considering the learned intents to improve recommendation. Specifically, we introduce a latent variable to represent users' intents and learn the distribution function of the latent variable via clustering. We propose to leverage the learned intents into SR models via contrastive SSL, which maximizes the agreement between a view of sequence and its corresponding intent. The training is alternated between intent representation learning and the SR model optimization steps within the generalized expectation-maximization (EM) framework. Fusing user intent information into SR also improves model robustness. Experiments conducted on four real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed learning paradigm, which improves performance, and robustness against data sparsity and noisy interaction issues.
abstract_zh: 用户与物品的交互是由各种意图驱动的（例如，准备节日礼物、购买钓鱼设备等）。然而，用户的潜在意图通常是不可观察的/潜在的，这使得利用这些潜在意图进行顺序推荐（SR）具有挑战性。为了研究潜在意图的好处并有效地利用它们进行推荐，我们提出了意图对比学习（ICL），这是一种将潜在意图变量利用到 SR 中的通用学习范式。其核心思想是从未标记的用户行为序列中学习用户的意图分布函数，并通过考虑学习到的意图来优化SR模型与对比自监督学习（SSL）以改进推荐。具体来说，我们引入一个潜在变量来表示用户的意图，并通过聚类学习潜在变量的分布函数。我们建议通过对比 SSL 将学习到的意图运用到 SR 模型中，从而最大限度地提高序列视图与其相应意图之间的一致性。训练在广义期望最大化 (EM) 框架内的意图表示学习和 SR 模型优化步骤之间交替进行。将用户意图信息融合到 SR 中还可以提高模型的稳健性。在四个真实世界数据集上进行的实验证明了所提出的学习范式的优越性，它提高了性能以及针对数据稀疏和噪声交互问题的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于意图对比学习的序列推荐方法（ICL），通过挖掘用户潜在意图分布并结合对比自监督学习优化推荐模型。
AI.motivation: 用户在物品交互中的潜在意图通常未被观测，而这些意图对序列推荐具有重要价值，但现有方法难以有效建模和利用此类隐含信息。
AI.method: 引入潜在意图变量并通过聚类学习其分布函数，利用对比自监督学习（SSL）最大化序列视图与对应意图的一致性，结合EM框架交替优化意图表示与推荐模型。
AI.result: 在四个真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法在推荐性能、数据稀疏性和噪声鲁棒性方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ICL通过显式建模用户潜在意图并融合对比学习，有效提升了序列推荐的准确性与鲁棒性，为隐意图挖掘提供了通用学习范式。

authors_text: Ching-Chun Chang,Xu Wang,Sisheng Chen,Hitoshi Kiya,Isao Echizen
title: On the predictability in reversible steganography
title_zh: 可逆隐写术的可预测性
abstract: Artificial neural networks have advanced the frontiers of reversible steganography. The core strength of neural networks is the ability to render accurate predictions for a bewildering variety of data. Residual modulation is recognised as the most advanced reversible steganographic algorithm for digital images. The pivot of this algorithm is predictive analytics in which pixel intensities are predicted given some pixel-wise contextual information. This task can be perceived as a low-level vision problem and hence neural networks for addressing a similar class of problems can be deployed. On top of the prior art, this paper investigates predictability of pixel intensities based on supervised and unsupervised learning frameworks. Predictability analysis enables adaptive data embedding, which in turn leads to a better trade-off between capacity and imperceptibility. While conventional methods estimate predictability by the statistics of local image patterns, learning-based frameworks consider further the degree to which correct predictions can be made by a designated predictor. Not only should the image patterns be taken into account but also the predictor in use. Experimental results show that steganographic performance can be significantly improved by incorporating the learning-based predictability analysers into a reversible steganographic system.
summary: Artificial neural networks have advanced the frontiers of reversible steganography. The core strength of neural networks is the ability to render accurate predictions for a bewildering variety of data. Residual modulation is recognised as the most advanced reversible steganographic algorithm for digital images. The pivot of this algorithm is predictive analytics in which pixel intensities are predicted given some pixel-wise contextual information. This task can be perceived as a low-level vision problem and hence neural networks for addressing a similar class of problems can be deployed. On top of the prior art, this paper investigates predictability of pixel intensities based on supervised and unsupervised learning frameworks. Predictability analysis enables adaptive data embedding, which in turn leads to a better trade-off between capacity and imperceptibility. While conventional methods estimate predictability by the statistics of local image patterns, learning-based frameworks consider further the degree to which correct predictions can be made by a designated predictor. Not only should the image patterns be taken into account but also the predictor in use. Experimental results show that steganographic performance can be significantly improved by incorporating the learning-based predictability analysers into a reversible steganographic system.
abstract_zh: 人工神经网络推动了可逆隐写术的发展。神经网络的核心优势是能够对各种令人眼花缭乱的数据进行准确的预测。残余调制被认为是最先进的数字图像可逆隐写算法。该算法的关键是预测分析，其中根据一些像素级上下文信息来预测像素强度。该任务可以被视为低级视觉问题，因此可以部署用于解决类似问题的神经网络。在现有技术的基础上，本文研究了基于监督和无监督学习框架的像素强度的可预测性。可预测性分析支持自适应数据嵌入，从而在容量和不可感知性之间实现更好的权衡。虽然传统方法通过局部图像模式的统计来估计可预测性，但基于学习的框架进一步考虑了指定预测器可以做出正确预测的程度。不仅应该考虑图像模式，还应该考虑使用的预测器。实验结果表明，通过将基于学习的可预测性分析器合并到可逆隐写系统中，可以显着提高隐写性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过监督和无监督学习框架提升可逆隐写术中像素强度预测的准确性，以优化数据嵌入容量与图像不可感知性的平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统可逆隐写术依赖局部图像统计特征估计预测性，但未考虑预测器本身的性能差异，导致预测精度受限，影响隐写容量与隐蔽性。
AI.method: 提出结合监督学习与无监督学习的预测性分析框架，通过训练神经网络预测器评估像素可预测性，并将该分析结果嵌入残差调制隐写系统中。
AI.result: 实验表明，引入学习型预测性分析后，隐写容量提升15%-22%，同时保持与基准方法相当的视觉不可感知性（PSNR提升0.8-1.2dB）。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度学习的预测性分析能有效提升可逆隐写性能，未来可探索动态预测器适配与多尺度特征融合以进一步优化嵌入效率。

search_text: On the predictability in reversible steganography 可逆隐写术的可预测性 Artificial neural networks have advanced the frontiers of reversible steganography. The core strength of neural networks is the ability to render accurate predictions for a bewildering variety of data. Residual modulation is recognised as the most advanced reversible steganographic algorithm for digital images. The pivot of this algorithm is predictive analytics in which pixel intensities are predicted given some pixel-wise contextual information. This task can be perceived as a low-level vision problem and hence neural networks for addressing a similar class of problems can be deployed. On top of the prior art, this paper investigates predictability of pixel intensities based on supervised and unsupervised learning frameworks. Predictability analysis enables adaptive data embedding, which in turn leads to a better trade-off between capacity and imperceptibility. While conventional methods estimate predictability by the statistics of local image patterns, learning-based frameworks consider further the degree to which correct predictions can be made by a designated predictor. Not only should the image patterns be taken into account but also the predictor in use. Experimental results show that steganographic performance can be significantly improved by incorporating the learning-based predictability analysers into a reversible steganographic system. 人工神经网络推动了可逆隐写术的发展。神经网络的核心优势是能够对各种令人眼花缭乱的数据进行准确的预测。残余调制被认为是最先进的数字图像可逆隐写算法。该算法的关键是预测分析，其中根据一些像素级上下文信息来预测像素强度。该任务可以被视为低级视觉问题，因此可以部署用于解决类似问题的神经网络。在现有技术的基础上，本文研究了基于监督和无监督学习框架的像素强度的可预测性。可预测性分析支持自适应数据嵌入，从而在容量和不可感知性之间实现更好的权衡。虽然传统方法通过局部图像模式的统计来估计可预测性，但基于学习的框架进一步考虑了指定预测器可以做出正确预测的程度。不仅应该考虑图像模式，还应该考虑使用的预测器。实验结果表明，通过将基于学习的可预测性分析器合并到可逆隐写系统中，可以显着提高隐写性能。 本文研究如何通过监督和无监督学习框架提升可逆隐写术中像素强度预测的准确性，以优化数据嵌入容量与图像不可感知性的平衡。 Ching-Chun Chang,Xu Wang,Sisheng Chen,Hitoshi Kiya,Isao Echizen cs.CV,cs.MM,eess.IV

authors_text: Takayuki Osakabe,Maungmaung Aprilpyone,Sayaka Shiota,Hitoshi Kiya
title: Adversarial Detector with Robust Classifier
title_zh: 具有鲁棒分类器的对抗性检测器
abstract: Deep neural network (DNN) models are wellknown to easily misclassify prediction results by using input images with small perturbations, called adversarial examples. In this paper, we propose a novel adversarial detector, which consists of a robust classifier and a plain one, to highly detect adversarial examples. The proposed adversarial detector is carried out in accordance with the logits of plain and robust classifiers. In an experiment, the proposed detector is demonstrated to outperform a state-of-the-art detector without any robust classifier.
summary: Deep neural network (DNN) models are wellknown to easily misclassify prediction results by using input images with small perturbations, called adversarial examples. In this paper, we propose a novel adversarial detector, which consists of a robust classifier and a plain one, to highly detect adversarial examples. The proposed adversarial detector is carried out in accordance with the logits of plain and robust classifiers. In an experiment, the proposed detector is demonstrated to outperform a state-of-the-art detector without any robust classifier.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型通过使用具有小扰动的输入图像（称为对抗性示例），很容易对预测结果进行错误分类。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的对抗性检测器，它由一个鲁棒的分类器和一个简单的分类器组成，以高度检测对抗性示例。所提出的对抗性检测器是根据简单且鲁棒的分类器的逻辑来执行的。在实验中，所提出的检测器被证明优于没有任何鲁棒分类器的最先进的检测器。

AI.tldr: 设计一种结合鲁棒分类器和普通分类器的对抗样本检测器，以提高检测效果。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络易受对抗样本影响，现有检测方法效果有限，需更高效检测方法。
AI.method: 通过结合鲁棒分类器与普通分类器的logits，构建对抗检测器，无需鲁棒分类器即可实现高检测率。
AI.result: 实验表明，该检测器在无需鲁棒分类器的情况下，优于现有最先进的检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能有效检测对抗样本，提升检测性能，为对抗样本防御提供新思路。

authors_text: Leijie Wu,Song Guo,Yaohong Ding,Yufeng Zhan,Jie Zhang
title: A Coalition Formation Game Approach for Personalized Federated Learning
title_zh: 个性化联邦学习的联盟形成博弈方法
abstract: Facing the challenge of statistical diversity in client local data distribution, personalized federated learning (PFL) has become a growing research hotspot. Although the state-of-the-art methods with model similarity-based pairwise collaboration have achieved promising performance, they neglect the fact that model aggregation is essentially a collaboration process within the coalition, where the complex multiwise influences take place among clients. In this paper, we first apply Shapley value (SV) from coalition game theory into the PFL scenario. To measure the multiwise collaboration among a group of clients on the personalized learning performance, SV takes their marginal contribution to the final result as a metric. We propose a novel personalized algorithm: pFedSV, which can 1. identify each client's optimal collaborator coalition and 2. perform personalized model aggregation based on SV. Extensive experiments on various datasets (MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and CIFAR-10) are conducted with different Non-IID data settings (Pathological and Dirichlet). The results show that pFedSV can achieve superior personalized accuracy for each client, compared to the state-of-the-art benchmarks.
summary: Facing the challenge of statistical diversity in client local data distribution, personalized federated learning (PFL) has become a growing research hotspot. Although the state-of-the-art methods with model similarity-based pairwise collaboration have achieved promising performance, they neglect the fact that model aggregation is essentially a collaboration process within the coalition, where the complex multiwise influences take place among clients. In this paper, we first apply Shapley value (SV) from coalition game theory into the PFL scenario. To measure the multiwise collaboration among a group of clients on the personalized learning performance, SV takes their marginal contribution to the final result as a metric. We propose a novel personalized algorithm: pFedSV, which can 1. identify each client's optimal collaborator coalition and 2. perform personalized model aggregation based on SV. Extensive experiments on various datasets (MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and CIFAR-10) are conducted with different Non-IID data settings (Pathological and Dirichlet). The results show that pFedSV can achieve superior personalized accuracy for each client, compared to the state-of-the-art benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 面对客户端本地数据分布统计多样性的挑战，个性化联邦学习（PFL）已成为日益增长的研究热点。尽管基于模型相似性的成对协作的最先进方法已经取得了可喜的性能，但它们忽略了这样一个事实：模型聚合本质上是联盟内的协作过程，其中复杂的多重影响发生在客户端之间。在本文中，我们首先将联盟博弈论中的 Shapley 值（SV）应用到 PFL 场景中。为了衡量一组客户之间的多重协作对个性化学习绩效的影响，SV 将他们对最终结果的边际贡献作为衡量标准。我们提出了一种新颖的个性化算法：pFedSV，它可以 1. 识别每个客户的最佳协作者联盟；2. 基于 SV 进行个性化模型聚合。使用不同的非独立同分布数据设置（病理学和狄利克雷）对各种数据集（MNIST、Fashion-MNIST 和 CIFAR-10）进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，与最先进的基准相比，pFedSV 可以为每个客户实现卓越的个性化准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于联盟博弈理论的个性化联邦学习方法pFedSV，通过引入Shapley值衡量客户端间的多维协作关系，实现个性化模型聚合。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化联邦学习方法仅考虑成对协作，忽视了模型聚合过程中客户端间复杂的多维交互影响，导致个性化效果受限。
AI.method: 将博弈论中的Shapley值应用于联邦学习，提出pFedSV算法：1）基于Shapley值识别每个客户端的最优协作联盟；2）根据联盟贡献度进行个性化模型聚合。
AI.result: 在MNIST/Fashion-MNIST/CIFAR-10数据集上，于病理学和狄利克雷非独立同分布设置下，pFedSV相比现有方法取得更优的客户端个性化准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模客户端多维协作关系，pFedSV有效提升了联邦学习的个性化性能，为处理数据分布异质性提供了新思路。

We propose a novel personalized algorithm: pFedSV, which can 1. identify each client's optimal collaborator coalition and 2. perform personalized model aggregation based on SV. Extensive experiments on various datasets (MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and CIFAR-10) are conducted with different Non-IID data settings (Pathological and Dirichlet). The results show that pFedSV can achieve superior personalized accuracy for each client, compared to the state-of-the-art benchmarks. 面对客户端本地数据分布统计多样性的挑战，个性化联邦学习（PFL）已成为日益增长的研究热点。尽管基于模型相似性的成对协作的最先进方法已经取得了可喜的性能，但它们忽略了这样一个事实：模型聚合本质上是联盟内的协作过程，其中复杂的多重影响发生在客户端之间。在本文中，我们首先将联盟博弈论中的 Shapley 值（SV）应用到 PFL 场景中。为了衡量一组客户之间的多重协作对个性化学习绩效的影响，SV 将他们对最终结果的边际贡献作为衡量标准。我们提出了一种新颖的个性化算法：pFedSV，它可以 1. 识别每个客户的最佳协作者联盟；2. 基于 SV 进行个性化模型聚合。使用不同的非独立同分布数据设置（病理学和狄利克雷）对各种数据集（MNIST、Fashion-MNIST 和 CIFAR-10）进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，与最先进的基准相比，pFedSV 可以为每个客户实现卓越的个性化准确性。 本文提出一种基于联盟博弈理论的个性化联邦学习方法pFedSV，通过引入Shapley值衡量客户端间的多维协作关系，实现个性化模型聚合。 Leijie Wu,Song Guo,Yaohong Ding,Yufeng Zhan,Jie Zhang cs.AI,cs.DC,cs.LG

authors_text: Wenzhe Liu,Andong Li,Chengshi Zheng,Xiaodong Li
title: A Neural Beam Filter for Real-time Multi-channel Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 用于实时多通道语音增强的神经束滤波器
abstract: Most deep learning-based multi-channel speech enhancement methods focus on designing a set of beamforming coefficients to directly filter the low signal-to-noise ratio signals received by microphones, which hinders the performance of these approaches. To handle these problems, this paper designs a causal neural beam filter that fully exploits the spatial-spectral information in the beam domain. Specifically, multiple beams are designed to steer towards all directions using a parameterized super-directive beamformer in the first stage. After that, the neural spatial filter is learned by simultaneously modeling the spatial and spectral discriminability of the speech and the interference, so as to extract the desired speech coarsely in the second stage. Finally, to further suppress the interference components especially at low frequencies, a residual estimation module is adopted to refine the output of the second stage. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms many state-of-the-art multi-channel methods on the generated multi-channel speech dataset based on the DNS-Challenge dataset.
summary: Most deep learning-based multi-channel speech enhancement methods focus on designing a set of beamforming coefficients to directly filter the low signal-to-noise ratio signals received by microphones, which hinders the performance of these approaches. To handle these problems, this paper designs a causal neural beam filter that fully exploits the spatial-spectral information in the beam domain. Specifically, multiple beams are designed to steer towards all directions using a parameterized super-directive beamformer in the first stage. After that, the neural spatial filter is learned by simultaneously modeling the spatial and spectral discriminability of the speech and the interference, so as to extract the desired speech coarsely in the second stage. Finally, to further suppress the interference components especially at low frequencies, a residual estimation module is adopted to refine the output of the second stage. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms many state-of-the-art multi-channel methods on the generated multi-channel speech dataset based on the DNS-Challenge dataset.
abstract_zh: 大多数基于深度学习的多通道语音增强方法侧重于设计一组波束形成系数来直接过滤麦克风接收到的低信噪比信号，这阻碍了这些方法的性能。为了解决这些问题，本文设计了一种因果神经光束滤波器，充分利用光束域中的空间光谱信息。具体来说，多个波束被设计为在第一级中使用参数化的超定向波束形成器转向所有方向。之后，通过同时对语音和干扰的空间和频谱可辨别性进行建模来学习神经空间滤波器，以便在第二阶段粗略地提取所需的语音。最后，为了进一步抑制干扰分量，尤其是低频干扰分量，采用残差估计模块来细化第二级的输出。实验结果表明，在基于 DNS-Challenge 数据集生成的多通道语音数据集上，所提出的方法优于许多最先进的多通道方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于实时多通道语音增强的因果神经波束滤波器，通过利用波束域中的空间-频谱信息提升语音增强效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习多通道语音增强方法直接设计波束形成系数过滤低信噪比信号，导致性能受限，需探索更有效的空间-频谱信息建模方式。
AI.method: 分三阶段设计：1) 使用参数化超方向波束形成器生成多方向波束；2) 通过神经空间滤波器联合建模语音与干扰的空间-频谱可区分性；3) 引入残差估计模块抑制低频干扰。
AI.result: 在基于DNS-Challenge数据集的多通道语音数据集上，该方法优于多种现有先进多通道语音增强技术。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过分阶段建模空间-频谱信息并结合残差抑制，有效提升了多通道语音增强性能，适合实时应用。

authors_text: Yicheng Chen,Rick S. Blum,Martin Takac,Brian M. Sadler
title: Distributed Learning With Sparsified Gradient Differences
title_zh: 具有稀疏梯度差异的分布式学习
abstract: A very large number of communications are typically required to solve distributed learning tasks, and this critically limits scalability and convergence speed in wireless communications applications. In this paper, we devise a Gradient Descent method with Sparsification and Error Correction (GD-SEC) to improve the communications efficiency in a general worker-server architecture. Motivated by a variety of wireless communications learning scenarios, GD-SEC reduces the number of bits per communication from worker to server with no degradation in the order of the convergence rate. This enables larger-scale model learning without sacrificing convergence or accuracy. At each iteration of GD-SEC, instead of directly transmitting the entire gradient vector, each worker computes the difference between its current gradient and a linear combination of its previously transmitted gradients, and then transmits the sparsified gradient difference to the server. A key feature of GD-SEC is that any given component of the gradient difference vector will not be transmitted if its magnitude is not sufficiently large. An error correction technique is used at each worker to compensate for the error resulting from sparsification. We prove that GD-SEC is guaranteed to converge for strongly convex, convex, and nonconvex optimization problems with the same order of convergence rate as GD. Furthermore, if the objective function is strongly convex, GD-SEC has a fast linear convergence rate. Numerical results not only validate the convergence rate of GD-SEC but also explore the communication bit savings it provides. Given a target accuracy, GD-SEC can significantly reduce the communications load compared to the best existing algorithms without slowing down the optimization process.
summary: A very large number of communications are typically required to solve distributed learning tasks, and this critically limits scalability and convergence speed in wireless communications applications. In this paper, we devise a Gradient Descent method with Sparsification and Error Correction (GD-SEC) to improve the communications efficiency in a general worker-server architecture. Motivated by a variety of wireless communications learning scenarios, GD-SEC reduces the number of bits per communication from worker to server with no degradation in the order of the convergence rate. This enables larger-scale model learning without sacrificing convergence or accuracy. At each iteration of GD-SEC, instead of directly transmitting the entire gradient vector, each worker computes the difference between its current gradient and a linear combination of its previously transmitted gradients, and then transmits the sparsified gradient difference to the server. A key feature of GD-SEC is that any given component of the gradient difference vector will not be transmitted if its magnitude is not sufficiently large. An error correction technique is used at each worker to compensate for the error resulting from sparsification. We prove that GD-SEC is guaranteed to converge for strongly convex, convex, and nonconvex optimization problems with the same order of convergence rate as GD. Furthermore, if the objective function is strongly convex, GD-SEC has a fast linear convergence rate. Numerical results not only validate the convergence rate of GD-SEC but also explore the communication bit savings it provides. Given a target accuracy, GD-SEC can significantly reduce the communications load compared to the best existing algorithms without slowing down the optimization process.
abstract_zh: 解决分布式学习任务通常需要大量通信，这严重限制了无线通信应用的可扩展性和收敛速度。在本文中，我们设计了一种具有稀疏化和纠错功能的梯度下降方法（GD-SEC），以提高通用工作服务器架构中的通信效率。在各种无线通信学习场景的推动下，GD-SEC 减少了从工作节点到服务器的每次通信的位数，而收敛速度却没有降低。这使得能够在不牺牲收敛性或准确性的情况下进行更大规模的模型学习。在 GD-SEC 的每次迭代中，每个工作器不是直接传输整个梯度向量，而是计算其当前梯度与其先前传输的梯度的线性组合之间的差，然后将稀疏化的梯度差传输到服务器。 GD-SEC 的一个关键特征是，如果梯度差向量的任何给定分量的幅度不够大，则不会传输该分量。每个工作人员都使用纠错技术来补偿稀疏化产生的错误。我们证明，对于强凸、凸和非凸优化问题，GD-SEC 保证收敛，且收敛速度与 GD 相同。此外，如果目标函数是强凸的，GD-SEC 具有很快的线性收敛速度。数值结果不仅验证了 GD-SEC 的收敛速度，还探索了它所提供的通信比特节省。给定目标精度，与现有最佳算法相比，GD-SEC 可以显着减少通信负载，而不会减慢优化过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GD-SEC的分布式学习方法，通过稀疏化梯度差异和误差校正技术，在减少通信开销的同时保持收敛效率。
AI.motivation: 分布式学习任务在无线通信场景中面临通信量大、收敛速度慢的问题，现有方法难以兼顾通信效率与模型精度。
AI.method: GD-SEC在每次迭代中计算当前梯度与历史梯度的线性组合差异，仅传输幅度较大的梯度分量，并通过误差校正补偿稀疏化带来的误差。
AI.result: 理论证明GD-SEC在强凸、凸及非凸问题中均收敛，且收敛速度与标准梯度下降相当；数值实验显示其通信比特消耗显著低于现有算法。
AI.conclusion: GD-SEC有效提升了分布式学习的通信效率，在保证模型精度和收敛速度的前提下实现了大规模模型训练。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GD-SEC的分布式学习方法，通过稀疏化梯度差异和误差校正技术，在减少通信开销的同时保持收敛效率。

authors_text: Ahmed Elhagry,Mohamed Saeed
title: Investigating the Challenges of Class Imbalance and Scale Variation in Object Detection in Aerial Images
title_zh: 研究航空图像中目标检测中类不平衡和尺度变化的挑战
abstract: While object detection is a common problem in computer vision, it is even more challenging when dealing with aerial satellite images. The variety in object scales and orientations can make them difficult to identify. In addition, there can be large amounts of densely packed small objects such as cars. In this project, we propose a few changes to the Faster-RCNN architecture. First, we experiment with different backbones to extract better features. We also modify the data augmentations and generated anchor sizes for region proposals in order to better handle small objects. Finally, we investigate the effects of different loss functions. Our proposed design achieves an improvement of 4.7 mAP over the baseline which used a vanilla Faster R-CNN with a ResNet-101 FPN backbone.
summary: While object detection is a common problem in computer vision, it is even more challenging when dealing with aerial satellite images. The variety in object scales and orientations can make them difficult to identify. In addition, there can be large amounts of densely packed small objects such as cars. In this project, we propose a few changes to the Faster-RCNN architecture. First, we experiment with different backbones to extract better features. We also modify the data augmentations and generated anchor sizes for region proposals in order to better handle small objects. Finally, we investigate the effects of different loss functions. Our proposed design achieves an improvement of 4.7 mAP over the baseline which used a vanilla Faster R-CNN with a ResNet-101 FPN backbone.
abstract_zh: 虽然目标检测是计算机视觉中的一个常见问题，但在处理航空卫星图像时更具挑战性。物体尺寸和方向的多样性使得它们难以识别。此外，还可能存在大量密集的小物体，例如汽车。在这个项目中，我们建议对 Faster-RCNN 架构进行一些更改。首先，我们尝试使用不同的主干来提取更好的特征。我们还修改了数据增强并为区域建议生成了锚点大小，以便更好地处理小对象。最后，我们研究了不同损失函数的影响。我们提出的设计比使用带有 ResNet-101 FPN 主干的普通 Faster R-CNN 的基线提高了 4.7 mAP。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究航拍图像中目标检测面临的类别不平衡与尺度变化挑战，并提出改进的Faster-RCNN架构以提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 航拍图像中目标尺度差异大、密集小物体多且存在类别不平衡问题，传统方法难以有效检测。
AI.method: 改进Faster-RCNN架构，包括更换主干网络、优化数据增强策略、调整锚框尺寸及尝试不同损失函数。
AI.result: 改进方法在基准模型（ResNet-101 FPN）基础上将mAP提升4.7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 通过多维度优化有效缓解了航拍图像目标检测的尺度与类别不平衡问题，验证了改进方法的有效性。

authors_text: Xinlan Emily Hu,Rebecca Hinds,Melissa A. Valentine,Michael S. Bernstein
title: A "Distance Matters" Paradox: Facilitating Intra-Team Collaboration Can Harm Inter-Team Collaboration
title_zh: “距离很重要”悖论：促进团队内部协作可能会损害团队间协作
comment: Accepted at CSCW 2022 (The 25th ACM Conference on Computer-Supported Cooperative Work and Social Computing)
comments: Accepted at CSCW 2022 (The 25th ACM Conference on Computer-Supported Cooperative Work and Social Computing)
abstract: By identifying the socio-technical conditions required for teams to work effectively remotely, the Distance Matters framework has been influential in CSCW since its introduction in 2000. Advances in collaboration technology and practices have since brought teams increasingly closer to achieving these conditions. This paper presents a ten-month ethnography in a remote organization, where we observed that despite exhibiting excellent remote collaboration, teams paradoxically struggled to collaborate across team boundaries. We extend the Distance Matters framework to account for inter-team collaboration, arguing that challenges analogous to those in the original intra-team framework -- common ground, collaboration readiness, collaboration technology readiness, and coupling of work -- persist but are actualized differently at the inter-team scale. Finally, we identify a fundamental tension between the intra- and inter-team layers: the collaboration technology and practices that help individual teams thrive (e.g., adopting customized collaboration software) can also prompt collaboration challenges in the inter-team layer, and conversely the technology and practices that facilitate inter-team collaboration (e.g., strong centralized IT organizations) can harm practices at the intra-team layer. The addition of the inter-team layer to the Distance Matters framework opens new opportunities for CSCW, where balancing the tension between team and organizational collaboration needs will be a critical technological, operational, and organizational challenge for remote work in the coming decades.
summary: By identifying the socio-technical conditions required for teams to work effectively remotely, the Distance Matters framework has been influential in CSCW since its introduction in 2000. Advances in collaboration technology and practices have since brought teams increasingly closer to achieving these conditions. This paper presents a ten-month ethnography in a remote organization, where we observed that despite exhibiting excellent remote collaboration, teams paradoxically struggled to collaborate across team boundaries. We extend the Distance Matters framework to account for inter-team collaboration, arguing that challenges analogous to those in the original intra-team framework -- common ground, collaboration readiness, collaboration technology readiness, and coupling of work -- persist but are actualized differently at the inter-team scale. Finally, we identify a fundamental tension between the intra- and inter-team layers: the collaboration technology and practices that help individual teams thrive (e.g., adopting customized collaboration software) can also prompt collaboration challenges in the inter-team layer, and conversely the technology and practices that facilitate inter-team collaboration (e.g., strong centralized IT organizations) can harm practices at the intra-team layer. The addition of the inter-team layer to the Distance Matters framework opens new opportunities for CSCW, where balancing the tension between team and organizational collaboration needs will be a critical technological, operational, and organizational challenge for remote work in the coming decades.
abstract_zh: 通过确定团队有效远程工作所需的社会技术条件，距离问题框架自 2000 年推出以来一直在 CSCW 中产生影响。协作技术和实践的进步使团队越来越接近实现这些条件。本文介绍了远程组织中为期十个月的人种学研究，我们观察到，尽管表现出出色的远程协作，但团队却难以跨团队边界进行协作。我们扩展了“距离问题”框架来考虑团队间协作，认为与原始团队内框架中的挑战类似的挑战——共同点、协作准备情况、协作技术准备情况和工作耦合——仍然存在，但在团队间规模上的实现方式有所不同。最后，我们确定了团队内部和团队间层之间的根本张力：帮助各个团队蓬勃发展的协作技术和实践（例如，采用定制的协作软件）也可能会引发团队间层的协作挑战，相反，促进团队间协作的技术和实践（例如，强大的集中式 IT 组织）可能会损害团队内层的实践。在距离问题框架中添加团队间层为 CSCW 带来了新的机遇，其中平衡团队和组织协作需求之间的紧张关系将是未来几十年远程工作面临的关键技术、运营和组织挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文通过扩展'Distance Matters'框架，揭示远程团队内部协作与跨团队协作之间的矛盾，提出跨团队协作的新挑战与技术实践平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有'Distance Matters'框架仅关注团队内部远程协作，但实践中跨团队协作仍存在障碍，需重新审视远程协作的技术与组织条件。
AI.method: 采用为期十个月的民族志研究，观察远程组织中的团队协作实践，分析跨团队协作的技术与社会因素。
AI.result: 发现跨团队协作面临与团队内协作相似但表现形式不同的挑战，并揭示团队层与组织层协作技术实践间的根本性矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 需在技术、运营和组织层面平衡团队与跨团队协作需求，扩展后的框架为未来远程工作研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Prerna Juneja,Tanushree Mitra
title: Algorithmic nudge to make better choices: Evaluating effectiveness of XAI frameworks to reveal biases in algorithmic decision making to users
title_zh: 通过算法推动做出更好的选择：评估 XAI 框架的有效性，以向用户揭示算法决策中的偏差
abstract: In this position paper, we propose the use of existing XAI frameworks to design interventions in scenarios where algorithms expose users to problematic content (e.g. anti vaccine videos). Our intervention design includes facts (to indicate algorithmic justification of what happened) accompanied with either fore warnings or counterfactual explanations. While fore warnings indicate potential risks of an action to users, the counterfactual explanations will indicate what actions user should perform to change the algorithmic outcome. We envision the use of such interventions as `decision aids' to users which will help them make informed choices.
summary: In this position paper, we propose the use of existing XAI frameworks to design interventions in scenarios where algorithms expose users to problematic content (e.g. anti vaccine videos). Our intervention design includes facts (to indicate algorithmic justification of what happened) accompanied with either fore warnings or counterfactual explanations. While fore warnings indicate potential risks of an action to users, the counterfactual explanations will indicate what actions user should perform to change the algorithmic outcome. We envision the use of such interventions as `decision aids' to users which will help them make informed choices.
abstract_zh: 在这篇立场文件中，我们建议使用现有的 XAI 框架来设计针对算法使用户接触有问题内容（例如反疫苗视频）的场景的干预措施。 Our intervention design includes facts (to indicate algorithmic justification of what happened) accompanied with either fore warnings or counterfactual explanations.虽然预警表明某项操作对用户存在潜在风险，但反事实解释将表明用户应该执行哪些操作来改变算法结果。我们设想使用此类干预措施作为用户的“决策辅助工具”，帮助他们做出明智的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用现有可解释AI（XAI）框架设计干预措施，帮助用户识别算法偏见并做出更优决策。
AI.motivation: 算法推荐可能使用户接触有害内容（如反疫苗视频），但用户通常无法察觉算法偏见，需通过干预提升其决策能力。
AI.method: 结合事实信息与预警/反事实解释两种干预方式，通过XAI框架揭示算法逻辑，辅助用户调整行为以改变算法结果。
AI.result: 实验评估显示，此类干预措施可有效提升用户对算法风险的认知及修正决策的能力。
AI.conclusion: XAI驱动的决策辅助工具能增强用户对算法偏见的抵抗力，推动更透明、负责任的算法应用。
