tldr: 本文提出利用现有可解释AI（XAI）框架设计干预措施，帮助用户识别算法偏见并做出更优决策。
motivation: 算法推荐可能使用户接触有害内容（如反疫苗视频），但用户通常无法察觉算法偏见，需通过干预提升其决策能力。
method: 结合事实信息与预警/反事实解释两种干预方式，通过XAI框架揭示算法逻辑，辅助用户调整行为以改变算法结果。
result: 实验评估显示，此类干预措施可有效提升用户对算法风险的认知及修正决策的能力。
conclusion: XAI驱动的决策辅助工具能增强用户对算法偏见的抵抗力，推动更透明、负责任的算法应用。
search_text: Algorithmic nudge to make better choices: Evaluating effectiveness of XAI frameworks to reveal biases in algorithmic decision making to users 通过算法推动做出更好的选择：评估 XAI 框架的有效性，以向用户揭示算法决策中的偏差 In this position paper, we propose the use of existing XAI frameworks to design interventions in scenarios where algorithms expose users to problematic content (e.g. anti vaccine videos). Our intervention design includes facts (to indicate algorithmic justification of what happened) accompanied with either fore warnings or counterfactual explanations. While fore warnings indicate potential risks of an action to users, the counterfactual explanations will indicate what actions user should perform to change the algorithmic outcome. We envision the use of such interventions as `decision aids' to users which will help them make informed choices. 在这篇立场文件中，我们建议使用现有的 XAI 框架来设计针对算法使用户接触有问题内容（例如反疫苗视频）的场景的干预措施。 Our intervention design includes facts (to indicate algorithmic justification of what happened) accompanied with either fore warnings or counterfactual explanations.虽然预警表明某项操作对用户存在潜在风险，但反事实解释将表明用户应该执行哪些操作来改变算法结果。我们设想使用此类干预措施作为用户的“决策辅助工具”，帮助他们做出明智的选择。 本文提出利用现有可解释AI（XAI）框架设计干预措施，帮助用户识别算法偏见并做出更优决策。 Prerna Juneja,Tanushree Mitra cs.HC

authors_text: Ce Ju,Cuntai Guan
title: Tensor-CSPNet: A Novel Geometric Deep Learning Framework for Motor Imagery Classification
title_zh: Tensor-CSPNet：一种用于运动意象分类的新型几何深度学习框架
comment: 15 pages, 10 figures, 12 tables; This work has been accepted by the IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems. Copyright will be transferred without notice, after which this version may no longer be accessible
comments: 15 pages, 10 figures, 12 tables; This work has been accepted by the IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems. Copyright will be transferred without notice, after which this version may no longer be accessible
abstract: Deep learning (DL) has been widely investigated in a vast majority of applications in electroencephalography (EEG)-based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs), especially for motor imagery (MI) classification in the past five years. The mainstream DL methodology for the MI-EEG classification exploits the temporospatial patterns of EEG signals using convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which have remarkably succeeded in visual images. However, since the statistical characteristics of visual images depart radically from EEG signals, a natural question arises whether an alternative network architecture exists apart from CNNs. To address this question, we propose a novel geometric deep learning (GDL) framework called Tensor-CSPNet, which characterizes spatial covariance matrices derived from EEG signals on symmetric positive definite (SPD) manifolds and fully captures the temporospatiofrequency patterns using existing deep neural networks on SPD manifolds, integrating with experiences from many successful MI-EEG classifiers to optimize the framework. In the experiments, Tensor-CSPNet attains or slightly outperforms the current state-of-the-art performance on the cross-validation and holdout scenarios in two commonly-used MI-EEG datasets. Moreover, the visualization and interpretability analyses also exhibit the validity of Tensor-CSPNet for the MI-EEG classification. To conclude, in this study, we provide a feasible answer to the question by generalizing the DL methodologies on SPD manifolds, which indicates the start of a specific GDL methodology for the MI-EEG classification.

The mainstream DL methodology for the MI-EEG classification exploits the temporospatial patterns of EEG signals using convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which have remarkably succeeded in visual images. However, since the statistical characteristics of visual images depart radically from EEG signals, a natural question arises whether an alternative network architecture exists apart from CNNs. To address this question, we propose a novel geometric deep learning (GDL) framework called Tensor-CSPNet, which characterizes spatial covariance matrices derived from EEG signals on symmetric positive definite (SPD) manifolds and fully captures the temporospatiofrequency patterns using existing deep neural networks on SPD manifolds, integrating with experiences from many successful MI-EEG classifiers to optimize the framework. In the experiments, Tensor-CSPNet attains or slightly outperforms the current state-of-the-art performance on the cross-validation and holdout scenarios in two commonly-used MI-EEG datasets. Moreover, the visualization and interpretability analyses also exhibit the validity of Tensor-CSPNet for the MI-EEG classification. To conclude, in this study, we provide a feasible answer to the question by generalizing the DL methodologies on SPD manifolds, which indicates the start of a specific GDL methodology for the MI-EEG classification.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 在基于脑电图 (EEG) 的脑机接口 (BCI) 的绝大多数应用中得到了广泛的研究，特别是在过去五年中的运动想象 (MI) 分类。 MI-EEG 分类的主流 DL 方法利用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 来利用 EEG 信号的时空模式，该网络在视觉图像方面取得了显着的成功。然而，由于视觉图像的统计特征与脑电图信号完全不同，一个自然的问题是，除了 CNN 之外是否存在替代网络架构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 Tensor-CSPNet 的新型几何深度学习 (GDL) 框架，该框架表征从对称正定 (SPD) 流形上的 EEG 信号导出的空间协方差矩阵，并使用 SPD 流形上现有的深度神经网络完全捕获时空频率模式，并结合许多成功的 MI-EEG 分类器的经验来优化该框架。在实验中，Tensor-CSPNet 在两个常用的 MI-EEG 数据集的交叉验证和保留场景中达到或略微优于当前最先进的性能。此外，可视化和可解释性分析还展示了 Tensor-CSPNet 对于 MI-EEG 分类的有效性。总之，在本研究中，我们通过推广 SPD 流形上的 DL 方法为该问题提供了可行的答案，这表明 MI-EEG 分类的特定 GDL 方法的开始。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于几何深度学习的新型框架Tensor-CSPNet，用于运动想象（MI）脑电信号分类。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）在处理脑电信号（EEG）时存在局限性，因其统计特性与视觉图像差异较大，需探索替代网络架构以提升MI分类性能。
AI.method: 通过将EEG信号的空间协方差矩阵建模为对称正定（SPD）流形上的几何结构，结合深度神经网络提取时频特征，并整合现有MI分类器优化框架。
AI.result: 在两个常用MI-EEG数据集的交叉验证和保留测试中，Tensor-CSPNet性能达到或略优于当前最先进的方法，且可视化分析验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过推广SPD流形上的深度学习方法，本文为MI-EEG分类提供了可行的几何深度学习（GDL）解决方案，开启了该领域的特定研究方向。

authors_text: Chunwei Ma,Ziyun Huang,Mingchen Gao,Jinhui Xu
title: Few-shot Learning as Cluster-induced Voronoi Diagrams: A Geometric Approach
title_zh: 作为簇诱导的 Voronoi 图的少样本学习：一种几何方法
abstract: Few-shot learning (FSL) is the process of rapid generalization from abundant base samples to inadequate novel samples. Despite extensive research in recent years, FSL is still not yet able to generate satisfactory solutions for a wide range of real-world applications. To confront this challenge, we study the FSL problem from a geometric point of view in this paper. One observation is that the widely embraced ProtoNet model is essentially a Voronoi Diagram (VD) in the feature space. We retrofit it by making use of a recent advance in computational geometry called Cluster-induced Voronoi Diagram (CIVD). Starting from the simplest nearest neighbor model, CIVD gradually incorporates cluster-to-point and then cluster-to-cluster relationships for space subdivision, which is used to improve the accuracy and robustness at multiple stages of FSL. Specifically, we use CIVD (1) to integrate parametric and nonparametric few-shot classifiers; (2) to combine feature representation and surrogate representation; (3) and to leverage feature-level, transformation-level, and geometry-level heterogeneities for a better ensemble. Our CIVD-based workflow enables us to achieve new state-of-the-art results on mini-ImageNet, CUB, and tiered-ImagenNet datasets, with ${\sim}2\%{-}5\%$ improvements upon the next best. To summarize, CIVD provides a mathematically elegant and geometrically interpretable framework that compensates for extreme data insufficiency, prevents overfitting, and allows for fast geometric ensemble for thousands of individual VD. These together make FSL stronger.
summary: Few-shot learning (FSL) is the process of rapid generalization from abundant base samples to inadequate novel samples. Despite extensive research in recent years, FSL is still not yet able to generate satisfactory solutions for a wide range of real-world applications. To confront this challenge, we study the FSL problem from a geometric point of view in this paper. One observation is that the widely embraced ProtoNet model is essentially a Voronoi Diagram (VD) in the feature space. We retrofit it by making use of a recent advance in computational geometry called Cluster-induced Voronoi Diagram (CIVD). Starting from the simplest nearest neighbor model, CIVD gradually incorporates cluster-to-point and then cluster-to-cluster relationships for space subdivision, which is used to improve the accuracy and robustness at multiple stages of FSL. Specifically, we use CIVD (1) to integrate parametric and nonparametric few-shot classifiers; (2) to combine feature representation and surrogate representation; (3) and to leverage feature-level, transformation-level, and geometry-level heterogeneities for a better ensemble. Our CIVD-based workflow enables us to achieve new state-of-the-art results on mini-ImageNet, CUB, and tiered-ImagenNet datasets, with ${\sim}2\%{-}5\%$ improvements upon the next best. To summarize, CIVD provides a mathematically elegant and geometrically interpretable framework that compensates for extreme data insufficiency, prevents overfitting, and allows for fast geometric ensemble for thousands of individual VD. These together make FSL stronger.
abstract_zh: 小样本学习（FSL）是从丰富的基础样本快速泛化到不足的新样本的过程。尽管近年来进行了广泛的研究，FSL 仍然无法为广泛的实际应用生成令人满意的解决方案。为了应对这一挑战，我们在本文中从几何角度研究了 FSL 问题。一个观察结果是，广泛接受的 ProtoNet 模型本质上是特征空间中的 Voronoi 图 (VD)。我们通过利用计算几何学的最新进展（称为簇诱导沃罗诺图（CIVD））对其进行改造。从最简单的最近邻模型开始，CIVD逐渐融入簇到点、簇到簇的关系进行空间细分，用于提高FSL多个阶段的准确性和鲁棒性。具体来说，我们使用 CIVD (1) 来集成参数和非参数的小样本分类器； (2)将特征表示和代理表示相结合； (3) 并利用特征级、变换级和几何级异质性来实现更好的集成。我们基于 CIVD 的工作流程使我们能够在 mini-ImageNet、CUB 和分层 ImagenNet 数据集上取得最先进的结果，与次优数据集相比有 ${\sim}2\%{-}5\%$ 的改进。总而言之，CIVD 提供了一个数学上优雅且几何上可解释的框架，可以补偿极端数据不足、防止过度拟合，并允许对数千个单独的 VD 进行快速几何集成。这些共同让FSL变得更加强大。

AI.tldr: 本文从几何角度研究少样本学习（FSL）问题，提出基于聚类诱导Voronoi图（CIVD）的框架以提升FSL性能。
AI.motivation: 现有FSL方法在实际应用中仍存在泛化能力不足的问题，而ProtoNet等模型本质是Voronoi图（VD），但缺乏对聚类关系的充分利用。
AI.method: 通过引入计算几何中的CIVD方法，逐步整合聚类与点、聚类与聚类的关系，用于改进FSL的分类器集成、特征表示融合及异质性利用。
AI.result: 在mini-ImageNet、CUB和tiered-ImageNet数据集上取得新SOTA结果，较最优方法提升约2%-5%。
AI.conclusion: CIVD为FSL提供了数学优雅且几何可解释的框架，有效缓解数据稀缺性、防止过拟合并支持快速几何集成。

search_text: Few-shot Learning as Cluster-induced Voronoi Diagrams: A Geometric Approach 作为簇诱导的 Voronoi 图的少样本学习：一种几何方法 Few-shot learning (FSL) is the process of rapid generalization from abundant base samples to inadequate novel samples. Starting from the simplest nearest neighbor model, CIVD gradually incorporates cluster-to-point and then cluster-to-cluster relationships for space subdivision, which is used to improve the accuracy and robustness at multiple stages of FSL. Specifically, we use CIVD (1) to integrate parametric and nonparametric few-shot classifiers; (2) to combine feature representation and surrogate representation; (3) and to leverage feature-level, transformation-level, and geometry-level heterogeneities for a better ensemble. Our CIVD-based workflow enables us to achieve new state-of-the-art results on mini-ImageNet, CUB, and tiered-ImagenNet datasets, with ${\sim}2\%{-}5\%$ improvements upon the next best. To summarize, CIVD provides a mathematically elegant and geometrically interpretable framework that compensates for extreme data insufficiency, prevents overfitting, and allows for fast geometric ensemble for thousands of individual VD. These together make FSL stronger. 小样本学习（FSL）是从丰富的基础样本快速泛化到不足的新样本的过程。尽管近年来进行了广泛的研究，FSL 仍然无法为广泛的实际应用生成令人满意的解决方案。为了应对这一挑战，我们在本文中从几何角度研究了 FSL 问题。一个观察结果是，广泛接受的 ProtoNet 模型本质上是特征空间中的 Voronoi 图 (VD)。我们通过利用计算几何学的最新进展（称为簇诱导沃罗诺图（CIVD））对其进行改造。从最简单的最近邻模型开始，CIVD逐渐融入簇到点、簇到簇的关系进行空间细分，用于提高FSL多个阶段的准确性和鲁棒性。具体来说，我们使用 CIVD (1) 来集成参数和非参数的小样本分类器； (2)将特征表示和代理表示相结合； (3) 并利用特征级、变换级和几何级异质性来实现更好的集成。我们基于 CIVD 的工作流程使我们能够在 mini-ImageNet、CUB 和分层 ImagenNet 数据集上取得最先进的结果，与次优数据集相比有 ${\sim}2\%{-}5\%$ 的改进。总而言之，CIVD 提供了一个数学上优雅且几何上可解释的框架，可以补偿极端数据不足、防止过度拟合，并允许对数千个单独的 VD 进行快速几何集成。这些共同让FSL变得更加强大。 本文从几何角度研究少样本学习（FSL）问题，提出基于聚类诱导Voronoi图（CIVD）的框架以提升FSL性能。 Chunwei Ma,Ziyun Huang,Mingchen Gao,Jinhui Xu cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Md. Khaledur Rahman,Abhigya Agrawal,Ariful Azad
title: MarkovGNN: Graph Neural Networks on Markov Diffusion
title_zh: MarkovGNN：马尔可夫扩散的图神经网络
comment: Graph Learning at the ACM Web Conference 2022, total 11 pages
comments: Graph Learning at the ACM Web Conference 2022, total 11 pages
abstract: Most real-world networks contain well-defined community structures where nodes are densely connected internally within communities. To learn from these networks, we develop MarkovGNN that captures the formation and evolution of communities directly in different convolutional layers. Unlike most Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) that consider a static graph at every layer, MarkovGNN generates different stochastic matrices using a Markov process and then uses these community-capturing matrices in different layers. MarkovGNN is a general approach that could be used with most existing GNNs. We experimentally show that MarkovGNN outperforms other GNNs for clustering, node classification, and visualization tasks. The source code of MarkovGNN is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/HipGraph/MarkovGNN}.
summary: Most real-world networks contain well-defined community structures where nodes are densely connected internally within communities. To learn from these networks, we develop MarkovGNN that captures the formation and evolution of communities directly in different convolutional layers. Unlike most Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) that consider a static graph at every layer, MarkovGNN generates different stochastic matrices using a Markov process and then uses these community-capturing matrices in different layers. MarkovGNN is a general approach that could be used with most existing GNNs. We experimentally show that MarkovGNN outperforms other GNNs for clustering, node classification, and visualization tasks. The source code of MarkovGNN is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/HipGraph/MarkovGNN}.
abstract_zh: 大多数现实世界的网络都包含明确定义的社区结构，其中节点在社区内部紧密连接。为了从这些网络中学习，我们开发了 MarkovGNN，它直接在不同的卷积层中捕获社区的形成和演化。与大多数在每一层考虑静态图的图神经网络 (GNN) 不同，MarkovGNN 使用马尔可夫过程生成不同的随机矩阵，然后在不同层中使用这些社区捕获矩阵。 MarkovGNN 是一种通用方法，可用于大多数现有的 GNN。我们通过实验证明，MarkovGNN 在聚类、节点分类和可视化任务方面优于其他 GNN。 MarkovGNN 的源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/HipGraph/MarkovGNN} 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MarkovGNN的图神经网络方法，用于捕捉和学习真实世界网络中的社区结构。
AI.motivation: 大多数现实世界的网络具有明确的社区结构，传统图神经网络在处理这类结构时表现有限，因此需要一种能够直接捕捉社区形成和演化的图神经网络方法。
AI.method: 本文开发了MarkovGNN，通过马尔可夫过程生成不同的随机矩阵，并在不同卷积层中使用这些矩阵以捕捉社区结构。该方法可以与大多数现有的GNN结合使用。
AI.result: 实验表明，MarkovGNN在聚类、节点分类和可视化任务中优于其他GNN方法。
AI.conclusion: MarkovGNN是一种通用且有效的方法，能够提升图神经网络对社区结构的学习能力。

authors_text: Qitian Wu,Hengrui Zhang,Junchi Yan,David Wipf
title: Handling Distribution Shifts on Graphs: An Invariance Perspective
title_zh: 处理图上的分布变化：不变性视角
abstract: There is increasing evidence suggesting neural networks' sensitivity to distribution shifts, so that research on out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization comes into the spotlight. Nonetheless, current endeavors mostly focus on Euclidean data, and its formulation for graph-structured data is not clear and remains under-explored, given two-fold fundamental challenges: 1) the inter-connection among nodes in one graph, which induces non-IID generation of data points even under the same environment, and 2) the structural information in the input graph, which is also informative for prediction. In this paper, we formulate the OOD problem on graphs and develop a new invariant learning approach, Explore-to-Extrapolate Risk Minimization (EERM), that facilitates graph neural networks to leverage invariance principles for prediction. EERM resorts to multiple context explorers (specified as graph structure editers in our case) that are adversarially trained to maximize the variance of risks from multiple virtual environments. Such a design enables the model to extrapolate from a single observed environment which is the common case for node-level prediction. We prove the validity of our method by theoretically showing its guarantee of a valid OOD solution and further demonstrate its power on various real-world datasets for handling distribution shifts from artificial spurious features, cross-domain transfers and dynamic graph evolution.
summary: There is increasing evidence suggesting neural networks' sensitivity to distribution shifts, so that research on out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization comes into the spotlight. Nonetheless, current endeavors mostly focus on Euclidean data, and its formulation for graph-structured data is not clear and remains under-explored, given two-fold fundamental challenges: 1) the inter-connection among nodes in one graph, which induces non-IID generation of data points even under the same environment, and 2) the structural information in the input graph, which is also informative for prediction. In this paper, we formulate the OOD problem on graphs and develop a new invariant learning approach, Explore-to-Extrapolate Risk Minimization (EERM), that facilitates graph neural networks to leverage invariance principles for prediction. EERM resorts to multiple context explorers (specified as graph structure editers in our case) that are adversarially trained to maximize the variance of risks from multiple virtual environments. Such a design enables the model to extrapolate from a single observed environment which is the common case for node-level prediction. We prove the validity of our method by theoretically showing its guarantee of a valid OOD solution and further demonstrate its power on various real-world datasets for handling distribution shifts from artificial spurious features, cross-domain transfers and dynamic graph evolution.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的证据表明神经网络对分布变化的敏感性，因此分布外（OOD）泛化的研究成为人们关注的焦点。尽管如此，当前的努力主要集中在欧几里德数据上，并且考虑到两个基本挑战，其对图结构数据的表述尚不明确且仍未得到充分探索：1）一张图中节点之间的互连，即使在相同的环境下也会导致数据点的非独立同分布；2）输入图中的结构信息，这也为预测提供信息。在本文中，我们在图上制定了 OOD 问题，并开发了一种新的不变学习方法，即探索外推风险最小化（EERM），该方法有助于图神经网络利用不变原理进行预测。 EERM 求助于多个上下文浏览器（在我们的例子中指定为图形结构编辑器），这些浏览器经过对抗性训练，可以最大限度地提高多个虚拟环境中风险的差异。这种设计使模型能够从单个观察到的环境进行推断，这是节点级预测的常见情况。我们通过理论上证明了我们的方法的有效性，证明了它对有效 OOD 解决方案的保证，并进一步证明了它在各种现实世界数据集上处理来自人工虚假特征、跨域传输和动态图演化的分布变化的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不变性原理的图神经网络方法EERM，用于处理图结构数据的分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注欧几里得数据的分布偏移，而图结构数据因节点间关联性和结构信息特性，其分布偏移处理方法尚未明确。
AI.method: 设计Explore-to-Extrapolate Risk Minimization（EERM）方法，通过对抗训练的图结构编辑器生成虚拟环境，最大化风险方差以增强模型外推能力。
AI.result: 理论证明方法有效性，并在多个真实数据集上验证其处理人工虚假特征、跨域迁移和动态图演化的分布偏移能力。
AI.conclusion: EERM为图结构数据的分布偏移问题提供了理论保证和实用解决方案，展示了在复杂场景下的优越性。

authors_text: Sean Chen,Jensen Gao,Siddharth Reddy,Glen Berseth,Anca D. Dragan,Sergey Levine
title: ASHA: Assistive Teleoperation via Human-in-the-Loop Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: ASHA：通过人在环强化学习进行辅助远程操作
comment: Accepted to IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022
comments: Accepted to IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022
abstract: Building assistive interfaces for controlling robots through arbitrary, high-dimensional, noisy inputs (e.g., webcam images of eye gaze) can be challenging, especially when it involves inferring the user's desired action in the absence of a natural 'default' interface. Reinforcement learning from online user feedback on the system's performance presents a natural solution to this problem, and enables the interface to adapt to individual users. However, this approach tends to require a large amount of human-in-the-loop training data, especially when feedback is sparse. We propose a hierarchical solution that learns efficiently from sparse user feedback: we use offline pre-training to acquire a latent embedding space of useful, high-level robot behaviors, which, in turn, enables the system to focus on using online user feedback to learn a mapping from user inputs to desired high-level behaviors. The key insight is that access to a pre-trained policy enables the system to learn more from sparse rewards than a naïve RL algorithm: using the pre-trained policy, the system can make use of successful task executions to relabel, in hindsight, what the user actually meant to do during unsuccessful executions. We evaluate our method primarily through a user study with 12 participants who perform tasks in three simulated robotic manipulation domains using a webcam and their eye gaze: flipping light switches, opening a shelf door to reach objects inside, and rotating a valve. The results show that our method successfully learns to map 128-dimensional gaze features to 7-dimensional joint torques from sparse rewards in under 10 minutes of online training, and seamlessly helps users who employ different gaze strategies, while adapting to distributional shift in webcam inputs, tasks, and environments.
summary: Building assistive interfaces for controlling robots through arbitrary, high-dimensional, noisy inputs (e.g., webcam images of eye gaze) can be challenging, especially when it involves inferring the user's desired action in the absence of a natural 'default' interface. However, this approach tends to require a large amount of human-in-the-loop training data, especially when feedback is sparse. We propose a hierarchical solution that learns efficiently from sparse user feedback: we use offline pre-training to acquire a latent embedding space of useful, high-level robot behaviors, which, in turn, enables the system to focus on using online user feedback to learn a mapping from user inputs to desired high-level behaviors. The key insight is that access to a pre-trained policy enables the system to learn more from sparse rewards than a naïve RL algorithm: using the pre-trained policy, the system can make use of successful task executions to relabel, in hindsight, what the user actually meant to do during unsuccessful executions. We evaluate our method primarily through a user study with 12 participants who perform tasks in three simulated robotic manipulation domains using a webcam and their eye gaze: flipping light switches, opening a shelf door to reach objects inside, and rotating a valve. The results show that our method successfully learns to map 128-dimensional gaze features to 7-dimensional joint torques from sparse rewards in under 10 minutes of online training, and seamlessly helps users who employ different gaze strategies, while adapting to distributional shift in webcam inputs, tasks, and environments.
abstract_zh: 通过任意、高维、噪声输入（例如，眼睛注视的网络摄像头图像）构建用于控制机器人的辅助界面可能具有挑战性，特别是当它涉及在缺乏自然“默认”界面的情况下推断用户所需的操作时。根据在线用户对系统性能的反馈进行强化学习，为该问题提供了自然的解决方案，并使界面能够适应个人用户。然而，这种方法往往需要大量的人机交互训练数据，尤其是在反馈稀疏的情况下。我们提出了一种从稀疏用户反馈中有效学习的分层解决方案：我们使用离线预训练来获取有用的高级机器人行为的潜在嵌入空间，这反过来又使系统能够专注于使用在线用户反馈来学习从用户输入到所需高级行为的映射。关键的见解是，访问预先训练的策略使系统能够比简单的强化学习算法从稀疏奖励中学到更多：使用预先训练的策略，系统可以利用成功的任务执行来重新标记用户在不成功执行期间实际想要执行的操作。我们主要通过对 12 名参与者进行的用户研究来评估我们的方法，这些参与者使用网络摄像头和眼睛注视在三个模拟机器人操作域中执行任务：翻转灯开关、打开架子门以接触内部物体以及旋转阀门。结果表明，我们的方法在 10 分钟的在线训练中成功学会了将 128 维注视特征映射到来自稀疏奖励的 7 维关节扭矩，并无缝地帮助采用不同注视策略的用户，同时适应网络摄像头输入、任务和环境的分布变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASHA方法，通过人机协同强化学习实现机器人辅助遥操作，解决高维、噪声输入下的用户意图推断问题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人控制接口难以处理高维噪声输入（如眼动数据），且稀疏用户反馈导致强化学习效率低下，需大量训练数据。
AI.method: 分层框架结合离线预训练（学习机器人行为潜在空间）与在线反馈（映射用户输入到高层行为），利用预训练策略对失败任务进行 hindsight relabeling。
AI.result: 12用户实验显示：10分钟内完成128维眼动特征到7维关节力矩的映射，适应不同注视策略及摄像头输入分布变化。
AI.conclusion: 预训练策略显著提升稀疏奖励下的学习效率，使系统具备个性化适配与环境迁移能力，为高维输入的辅助控制提供新范式。

search_text: ASHA: Assistive Teleoperation via Human-in-the-Loop Reinforcement Learning ASHA：通过人在环强化学习进行辅助远程操作 Building assistive interfaces for controlling robots through arbitrary, high-dimensional, noisy inputs (e.g., webcam images of eye gaze) can be challenging, especially when it involves inferring the user's desired action in the absence of a natural 'default' interface. Reinforcement learning from online user feedback on the system's performance presents a natural solution to this problem, and enables the interface to adapt to individual users. However, this approach tends to require a large amount of human-in-the-loop training data, especially when feedback is sparse. We propose a hierarchical solution that learns efficiently from sparse user feedback: we use offline pre-training to acquire a latent embedding space of useful, high-level robot behaviors, which, in turn, enables the system to focus on using online user feedback to learn a mapping from user inputs to desired high-level behaviors. The key insight is that access to a pre-trained policy enables the system to learn more from sparse rewards than a naïve RL algorithm: using the pre-trained policy, the system can make use of successful task executions to relabel, in hindsight, what the user actually meant to do during unsuccessful executions. We evaluate our method primarily through a user study with 12 participants who perform tasks in three simulated robotic manipulation domains using a webcam and their eye gaze: flipping light switches, opening a shelf door to reach objects inside, and rotating a valve. The results show that our method successfully learns to map 128-dimensional gaze features to 7-dimensional joint torques from sparse rewards in under 10 minutes of online training, and seamlessly helps users who employ different gaze strategies, while adapting to distributional shift in webcam inputs, tasks, and environments. 通过任意、高维、噪声输入（例如，眼睛注视的网络摄像头图像）构建用于控制机器人的辅助界面可能具有挑战性，特别是当它涉及在缺乏自然“默认”界面的情况下推断用户所需的操作时。根据在线用户对系统性能的反馈进行强化学习，为该问题提供了自然的解决方案，并使界面能够适应个人用户。然而，这种方法往往需要大量的人机交互训练数据，尤其是在反馈稀疏的情况下。我们提出了一种从稀疏用户反馈中有效学习的分层解决方案：我们使用离线预训练来获取有用的高级机器人行为的潜在嵌入空间，这反过来又使系统能够专注于使用在线用户反馈来学习从用户输入到所需高级行为的映射。关键的见解是，访问预先训练的策略使系统能够比简单的强化学习算法从稀疏奖励中学到更多：使用预先训练的策略，系统可以利用成功的任务执行来重新标记用户在不成功执行期间实际想要执行的操作。我们主要通过对 12 名参与者进行的用户研究来评估我们的方法，这些参与者使用网络摄像头和眼睛注视在三个模拟机器人操作域中执行任务：翻转灯开关、打开架子门以接触内部物体以及旋转阀门。结果表明，我们的方法在 10 分钟的在线训练中成功学会了将 128 维注视特征映射到来自稀疏奖励的 7 维关节扭矩，并无缝地帮助采用不同注视策略的用户，同时适应网络摄像头输入、任务和环境的分布变化。 本文提出ASHA方法，通过人机协同强化学习实现机器人辅助遥操作，解决高维、噪声输入下的用户意图推断问题。 Sean Chen,Jensen Gao,Siddharth Reddy,Glen Berseth,Anca D. Dragan,Sergey Levine cs.RO,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Peiying Zhang,Chao Wang,Neeraj Kumar,Lei Liu
title: Space-Air-Ground Integrated Multi-domain Network Resource Orchestration based on Virtual Network Architecture: a DRL Method
title_zh: 基于虚拟网络架构的天地空地一体化多域网络资源编排：一种DRL方法
abstract: Traditional ground wireless communication networks cannot provide high-quality services for artificial intelligence (AI) applications such as intelligent transportation systems (ITS) due to deployment, coverage and capacity issues. The space-air-ground integrated network (SAGIN) has become a research focus in the industry. Compared with traditional wireless communication networks, SAGIN is more flexible and reliable, and it has wider coverage and higher quality of seamless connection. However, due to its inherent heterogeneity, time-varying and self-organizing characteristics, the deployment and use of SAGIN still faces huge challenges, among which the orchestration of heterogeneous resources is a key issue. Based on virtual network architecture and deep reinforcement learning (DRL), we model SAGIN's heterogeneous resource orchestration as a multi-domain virtual network embedding (VNE) problem, and propose a SAGIN cross-domain VNE algorithm. We model the different network segments of SAGIN, and set the network attributes according to the actual situation of SAGIN and user needs. In DRL, the agent is acted by a five-layer policy network. We build a feature matrix based on network attributes extracted from SAGIN and use it as the agent training environment. Through training, the probability of each underlying node being embedded can be derived. In test phase, we complete the embedding process of virtual nodes and links in turn based on this probability. Finally, we verify the effectiveness of the algorithm from both training and testing.
summary: Traditional ground wireless communication networks cannot provide high-quality services for artificial intelligence (AI) applications such as intelligent transportation systems (ITS) due to deployment, coverage and capacity issues. The space-air-ground integrated network (SAGIN) has become a research focus in the industry. Compared with traditional wireless communication networks, SAGIN is more flexible and reliable, and it has wider coverage and higher quality of seamless connection. However, due to its inherent heterogeneity, time-varying and self-organizing characteristics, the deployment and use of SAGIN still faces huge challenges, among which the orchestration of heterogeneous resources is a key issue. Based on virtual network architecture and deep reinforcement learning (DRL), we model SAGIN's heterogeneous resource orchestration as a multi-domain virtual network embedding (VNE) problem, and propose a SAGIN cross-domain VNE algorithm. We model the different network segments of SAGIN, and set the network attributes according to the actual situation of SAGIN and user needs. In DRL, the agent is acted by a five-layer policy network. We build a feature matrix based on network attributes extracted from SAGIN and use it as the agent training environment. Through training, the probability of each underlying node being embedded can be derived. In test phase, we complete the embedding process of virtual nodes and links in turn based on this probability. Finally, we verify the effectiveness of the algorithm from both training and testing.
abstract_zh: 传统地面无线通信网络由于部署、覆盖和容量问题，无法为智能交通系统（ITS）等人工智能（AI）应用提供高质量服务。天地空地一体化网络（SAGIN）已成为业界的研究热点。与传统无线通信网络相比，SAGIN更加灵活可靠，覆盖范围更广，无缝连接质量更高。然而，由于其固有的异构性、时变性和自组织特性，SAGIN的部署和使用仍然面临着巨大的挑战，其中异构资源的编排是一个关键问题。基于虚拟网络架构和深度强化学习（DRL），我们将SAGIN的异构资源编排建模为多域虚拟网络嵌入（VNE）问题，并提出了SAGIN跨域VNE算法。我们对SAGIN的不同网段进行建模，并根据SAGIN的实际情况和用户需求设置网络属性。在DRL中，代理由五层策略网络充当。我们根据从 SAGIN 提取的网络属性构建特征矩阵，并将其用作代理训练环境。通过训练，可以得出每个底层节点被嵌入的概率。在测试阶段，我们根据这个概率依次完成虚拟节点和链路的嵌入过程。最后，我们从训练和测试两个方面验证了算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于虚拟网络架构和深度强化学习（DRL）的空天地一体化多域网络资源编排方法，解决异构资源协调问题。
AI.motivation: 传统地面网络难以满足智能交通系统等AI应用的高服务质量需求，而空天地一体化网络（SAGIN）因异构性、时变性和自组织特性，面临资源编排的关键挑战。
AI.method: 将SAGIN资源编排建模为多域虚拟网络嵌入（VNE）问题，构建基于网络属性的特征矩阵作为DRL智能体训练环境，采用五层策略网络实现跨域资源嵌入概率计算。
AI.result: 通过训练和测试验证了算法在资源编排中的有效性，实现了虚拟节点和链路的按概率嵌入过程。
AI.conclusion: 基于DRL的跨域VNE算法有效解决了SAGIN异构资源编排难题，为多域网络优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Peiying Zhang,Chao Wang,Chunxiao Jiang,Abderrahim Benslimane
title: Security-Aware Virtual Network Embedding Algorithm based on Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于强化学习的安全感知虚拟网络嵌入算法
abstract: Virtual network embedding (VNE) algorithm is always the key problem in network virtualization (NV) technology. At present, the research in this field still has the following problems. The traditional way to solve VNE problem is to use heuristic algorithm. However, this method relies on manual embedding rules, which does not accord with the actual situation of VNE. In addition, as the use of intelligent learning algorithm to solve the problem of VNE has become a trend, this method is gradually outdated. At the same time, there are some security problems in VNE. However, there is no intelligent algorithm to solve the security problem of VNE. For this reason, this paper proposes a security-aware VNE algorithm based on reinforcement learning (RL). In the training phase, we use a policy network as a learning agent and take the extracted attributes of the substrate nodes to form a feature matrix as input. The learning agent is trained in this environment to get the mapping probability of each substrate node. In the test phase, we map nodes according to the mapping probability and use the breadth-first strategy (BFS) to map links. For the security problem, we add security requirements level constraint for each virtual node and security level constraint for each substrate node. Virtual nodes can only be embedded on substrate nodes that are not lower than the level of security requirements. Experimental results show that the proposed algorithm is superior to other typical algorithms in terms of long-term average return, long-term revenue consumption ratio and virtual network request (VNR) acceptance rate.

The traditional way to solve VNE problem is to use heuristic algorithm. However, this method relies on manual embedding rules, which does not accord with the actual situation of VNE. In addition, as the use of intelligent learning algorithm to solve the problem of VNE has become a trend, this method is gradually outdated. At the same time, there are some security problems in VNE. However, there is no intelligent algorithm to solve the security problem of VNE. For this reason, this paper proposes a security-aware VNE algorithm based on reinforcement learning (RL). The learning agent is trained in this environment to get the mapping probability of each substrate node. In the test phase, we map nodes according to the mapping probability and use the breadth-first strategy (BFS) to map links. For the security problem, we add security requirements level constraint for each virtual node and security level constraint for each substrate node. Virtual nodes can only be embedded on substrate nodes that are not lower than the level of security requirements. Experimental results show that the proposed algorithm is superior to other typical algorithms in terms of long-term average return, long-term revenue consumption ratio and virtual network request (VNR) acceptance rate.
abstract_zh: 虚拟网络嵌入(VNE)算法一直是网络虚拟化(NV)技术的关键问题。目前，该领域的研究仍存在以下问题。解决VNE问题的传统方法是使用启发式算法。但该方法依赖于手动嵌入规则，不符合VNE的实际情况。另外，随着利用智能学习算法解决VNE问题已成为趋势，这种方法逐渐过时。同时，VNE也存在一些安全问题。然而，目前还没有智能算法来解决VNE的安全问题。为此，本文提出一种基于强化学习（RL）的安全感知VNE算法。在训练阶段，我们使用策略网络作为学习代理，并将提取的基底节点的属性形成特征矩阵作为输入。学习代理在此环境中进行训练，以获得每个基底节点的映射概率。在测试阶段，我们根据映射概率来映射节点，并使用广度优先策略（BFS）来映射链接。针对安全问题，我们为每个虚拟节点添加安全需求级别约束，为每个底层节点添加安全级别约束。虚拟节点只能嵌入在不低于安全要求级别的底层节点上。实验结果表明，该算法在长期平均收益、长期收益消耗率和虚拟网络请求（VNR）接受率方面均优于其他典型算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的安全感知虚拟网络嵌入算法，解决传统启发式算法不足及安全问题。
AI.motivation: 传统启发式算法依赖人工规则且无法适应实际需求，智能学习算法尚未有效解决VNE中的安全问题。
AI.method: 采用策略网络作为学习代理，利用基座节点属性生成特征矩阵进行训练，结合BFS映射链路，并添加安全等级约束条件。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在长期平均收益、收益消耗比和虚拟网络请求接受率方面优于其他典型算法。
AI.conclusion: 基于强化学习的安全感知VNE算法能有效提升嵌入效率与安全性，为网络虚拟化提供新思路。

authors_text: Nicholas Sharp,Alec Jacobson
title: Spelunking the Deep: Guaranteed Queries on General Neural Implicit Surfaces via Range Analysis
title_zh: 深入探索：通过范围分析保证一般神经隐式表面的查询
comment: appearing in ACM Transactions on Graphics / SIGGRAPH 2022 Journal Papers
comments: appearing in ACM Transactions on Graphics / SIGGRAPH 2022 Journal Papers
abstract: Neural implicit representations, which encode a surface as the level set of a neural network applied to spatial coordinates, have proven to be remarkably effective for optimizing, compressing, and generating 3D geometry. Although these representations are easy to fit, it is not clear how to best evaluate geometric queries on the shape, such as intersecting against a ray or finding a closest point. The predominant approach is to encourage the network to have a signed distance property. However, this property typically holds only approximately, leading to robustness issues, and holds only at the conclusion of training, inhibiting the use of queries in loss functions. Instead, this work presents a new approach to perform queries directly on general neural implicit functions for a wide range of existing architectures. Our key tool is the application of range analysis to neural networks, using automatic arithmetic rules to bound the output of a network over a region; we conduct a study of range analysis on neural networks, and identify variants of affine arithmetic which are highly effective. We use the resulting bounds to develop geometric queries including ray casting, intersection testing, constructing spatial hierarchies, fast mesh extraction, closest-point evaluation, evaluating bulk properties, and more. Our queries can be efficiently evaluated on GPUs, and offer concrete accuracy guarantees even on randomly-initialized networks, enabling their use in training objectives and beyond. We also show a preliminary application to inverse rendering.
summary: Neural implicit representations, which encode a surface as the level set of a neural network applied to spatial coordinates, have proven to be remarkably effective for optimizing, compressing, and generating 3D geometry. Although these representations are easy to fit, it is not clear how to best evaluate geometric queries on the shape, such as intersecting against a ray or finding a closest point. The predominant approach is to encourage the network to have a signed distance property. However, this property typically holds only approximately, leading to robustness issues, and holds only at the conclusion of training, inhibiting the use of queries in loss functions. Instead, this work presents a new approach to perform queries directly on general neural implicit functions for a wide range of existing architectures. Our key tool is the application of range analysis to neural networks, using automatic arithmetic rules to bound the output of a network over a region; we conduct a study of range analysis on neural networks, and identify variants of affine arithmetic which are highly effective. We use the resulting bounds to develop geometric queries including ray casting, intersection testing, constructing spatial hierarchies, fast mesh extraction, closest-point evaluation, evaluating bulk properties, and more. Our queries can be efficiently evaluated on GPUs, and offer concrete accuracy guarantees even on randomly-initialized networks, enabling their use in training objectives and beyond. We also show a preliminary application to inverse rendering.
abstract_zh: 神经隐式表示将表面编码为应用于空间坐标的神经网络的水平集，已被证明对于优化、压缩和生成 3D 几何图形非常有效。尽管这些表示很容易拟合，但尚不清楚如何最好地评估形状上的几何查询，例如与射线相交或查找最近的点。主要的方法是鼓励网络具有带符号的距离属性。然而，该属性通常仅近似成立，从而导致鲁棒性问题，并且仅在训练结束时成立，从而抑制在损失函数中使用查询。相反，这项工作提出了一种新方法，可以直接对各种现有架构的通用神经隐式函数执行查询。我们的关键工具是将范围分析应用于神经网络，使用自动算术规则将网络的输出限制在一个区域上；我们对神经网络进行了范围分析的研究，并确定了非常有效的仿射算法的变体。我们使用生成的边界来开发几何查询，包括光线投射、相交测试、构建空间层次结构、快速网格提取、最近点评估、评估整体属性等。我们的查询可以在 GPU 上进行有效评估，甚至在随机初始化的网络上也能提供具体的准确性保证，从而使其能够用于训练目标及其他目标。我们还展示了逆渲染的初步应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过范围分析在通用神经隐式曲面上进行可靠几何查询的方法，解决传统方法在鲁棒性和训练过程中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 神经隐式曲面虽能高效生成3D几何，但现有几何查询方法依赖近似的符号距离属性，存在鲁棒性差且无法在训练过程中使用的问题。
AI.method: 利用自动算术规则对神经网络输出进行范围分析，结合改进的仿射算术，为多种几何查询（如射线投射、最近点计算等）提供数学保证。
AI.result: 实现可在GPU上高效运行的几何查询，即使对随机初始化网络也提供准确性保证，并在逆向渲染中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为神经隐式曲面的几何查询提供了理论保障，扩展了其在训练优化和实际应用中的可行性。

authors_text: Nikolas Papadopoulos,Nikos Melanitis,Antonio Lozano,Cristina Soto-Sanchez,Eduardo Fernandez,Konstantina S Nikita
title: Machine Learning Method for Functional Assessment of Retinal Models
title_zh: 用于视网膜模型功能评估的机器学习方法
comment: Accepted at 2021 43rd Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine & Biology Society (EMBC)
comments: Accepted at 2021 43rd Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine & Biology Society (EMBC)
abstract: Challenges in the field of retinal prostheses motivate the development of retinal models to accurately simulate Retinal Ganglion Cells (RGCs) responses. The goal of retinal prostheses is to enable blind individuals to solve complex, reallife visual tasks. In this paper, we introduce the functional assessment (FA) of retinal models, which describes the concept of evaluating the performance of retinal models on visual understanding tasks. We present a machine learning method for FA: we feed traditional machine learning classifiers with RGC responses generated by retinal models, to solve object and digit recognition tasks (CIFAR-10, MNIST, Fashion MNIST, Imagenette). We examined critical FA aspects, including how the performance of FA depends on the task, how to optimally feed RGC responses to the classifiers and how the number of output neurons correlates with the model's accuracy. To increase the number of output neurons, we manipulated input images - by splitting and then feeding them to the retinal model and we found that image splitting does not significantly improve the model's accuracy. We also show that differences in the structure of datasets result in largely divergent performance of the retinal model (MNIST and Fashion MNIST exceeded 80% accuracy, while CIFAR-10 and Imagenette achieved ~40%). Furthermore, retinal models which perform better in standard evaluation, i.e. more accurately predict RGC response, perform better in FA as well. However, unlike standard evaluation, FA results can be straightforwardly interpreted in the context of comparing the quality of visual perception.
summary: Challenges in the field of retinal prostheses motivate the development of retinal models to accurately simulate Retinal Ganglion Cells (RGCs) responses. The goal of retinal prostheses is to enable blind individuals to solve complex, reallife visual tasks. We examined critical FA aspects, including how the performance of FA depends on the task, how to optimally feed RGC responses to the classifiers and how the number of output neurons correlates with the model's accuracy. To increase the number of output neurons, we manipulated input images - by splitting and then feeding them to the retinal model and we found that image splitting does not significantly improve the model's accuracy. We also show that differences in the structure of datasets result in largely divergent performance of the retinal model (MNIST and Fashion MNIST exceeded 80% accuracy, while CIFAR-10 and Imagenette achieved ~40%). Furthermore, retinal models which perform better in standard evaluation, i.e. more accurately predict RGC response, perform better in FA as well. However, unlike standard evaluation, FA results can be straightforwardly interpreted in the context of comparing the quality of visual perception.
abstract_zh: 视网膜假体领域的挑战促进了视网膜模型的开发，以准确模拟视网膜神经节细胞（RGC）的反应。视网膜假体的目标是使盲人能够解决现实生活中复杂的视觉任务。在本文中，我们介绍了视网膜模型的功能评估（FA），它描述了评估视网膜模型在视觉理解任务上的性能的概念。我们提出了一种用于 FA 的机器学习方法：我们向传统机器学习分类器提供视网膜模型生成的 RGC 响应，以解决对象和数字识别任务（CIFAR-10、MNIST、Fashion MNIST、Imagenette）。我们研究了 FA 的关键方面，包括 FA 的性能如何取决于任务、如何以最佳方式将 RGC 响应提供给分类器以及输出神经元的数量如何与模型的准确性相关。为了增加输出神经元的数量，我们通过分割然后将它们输入视网膜模型来操纵输入图像，我们发现图像分割并没有显着提高模型的准确性。我们还表明，数据集结构的差异导致视网膜模型的性能存在很大差异（MNIST 和 Fashion MNIST 的准确率超过 80%，而 CIFAR-10 和 Imagenette 的准确率达到约 40%）。此外，在标准评估中表现更好的视网膜模型，即更准确地预测 RGC 反应，在 FA 中也表现更好。然而，与标准评估不同的是，FA 结果可以在比较视觉感知质量的背景下直接解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机器学习的视网膜模型功能评估方法，通过训练分类器分析视网膜神经节细胞响应数据，评估模型在视觉任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 视网膜假体面临复杂数字视觉任务模拟挑战，需开发准确评估视网膜模型性能的方法以优化假体功能。
AI.method: 使用传统机器学习分类器处理视网膜模型生成的RGC响应数据，通过CIFAR-10、MNIST等数据集进行物体和数字识别任务测试，分析任务类型、输入方式及输出神经元数量对评估结果的影响。
AI.result: 发现数据集结构显著影响模型性能（MNIST/Fashion MNIST准确率超80%，CIFAR-10仅40%），图像分割未提升准确率，且标准评估表现优异的模型在功能评估中同样表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 功能评估法可有效衡量视网膜模型的视觉感知质量，数据集选择和模型预测准确性是关键因素，且该方法能直接解释视觉感知质量差异。

search_text: Machine Learning Method for Functional Assessment of Retinal Models 用于视网膜模型功能评估的机器学习方法 Challenges in the field of retinal prostheses motivate the development of retinal models to accurately simulate Retinal Ganglion Cells (RGCs) responses. The goal of retinal prostheses is to enable blind individuals to solve complex, reallife visual tasks. In this paper, we introduce the functional assessment (FA) of retinal models, which describes the concept of evaluating the performance of retinal models on visual understanding tasks. We present a machine learning method for FA: we feed traditional machine learning classifiers with RGC responses generated by retinal models, to solve object and digit recognition tasks (CIFAR-10, MNIST, Fashion MNIST, Imagenette). We examined critical FA aspects, including how the performance of FA depends on the task, how to optimally feed RGC responses to the classifiers and how the number of output neurons correlates with the model's accuracy. To increase the number of output neurons, we manipulated input images - by splitting and then feeding them to the retinal model and we found that image splitting does not significantly improve the model's accuracy. We also show that differences in the structure of datasets result in largely divergent performance of the retinal model (MNIST and Fashion MNIST exceeded 80% accuracy, while CIFAR-10 and Imagenette achieved ~40%). Furthermore, retinal models which perform better in standard evaluation, i.e. more accurately predict RGC response, perform better in FA as well. However, unlike standard evaluation, FA results can be straightforwardly interpreted in the context of comparing the quality of visual perception. 视网膜假体领域的挑战促进了视网膜模型的开发，以准确模拟视网膜神经节细胞（RGC）的反应。视网膜假体的目标是使盲人能够解决现实生活中复杂的视觉任务。在本文中，我们介绍了视网膜模型的功能评估（FA），它描述了评估视网膜模型在视觉理解任务上的性能的概念。我们提出了一种用于 FA 的机器学习方法：我们向传统机器学习分类器提供视网膜模型生成的 RGC 响应，以解决对象和数字识别任务（CIFAR-10、MNIST、Fashion MNIST、Imagenette）。我们研究了 FA 的关键方面，包括 FA 的性能如何取决于任务、如何以最佳方式将 RGC 响应提供给分类器以及输出神经元的数量如何与模型的准确性相关。为了增加输出神经元的数量，我们通过分割然后将它们输入视网膜模型来操纵输入图像，我们发现图像分割并没有显着提高模型的准确性。我们还表明，数据集结构的差异导致视网膜模型的性能存在很大差异（MNIST 和 Fashion MNIST 的准确率超过 80%，而 CIFAR-10 和 Imagenette 的准确率达到约 40%）。此外，在标准评估中表现更好的视网膜模型，即更准确地预测 RGC 反应，在 FA 中也表现更好。然而，与标准评估不同的是，FA 结果可以在比较视觉感知质量的背景下直接解释。 本文提出一种基于机器学习的视网膜模型功能评估方法，通过训练分类器分析视网膜神经节细胞响应数据，评估模型在视觉任务中的表现。 Nikolas Papadopoulos,Nikos Melanitis,Antonio Lozano,Cristina Soto-Sanchez,Eduardo Fernandez,Konstantina S Nikita eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Nathan Beck,Abhiramon Rajasekharan,Hieu Tran
title: Transfer Reinforcement Learning for Differing Action Spaces via Q-Network Representations
title_zh: 通过 Q 网络表示的不同动作空间的迁移强化学习
abstract: Transfer learning approaches in reinforcement learning aim to assist agents in learning their target domains by leveraging the knowledge learned from other agents that have been trained on similar source domains. For example, recent research focus within this space has been placed on knowledge transfer between tasks that have different transition dynamics and reward functions; however, little focus has been placed on knowledge transfer between tasks that have different action spaces. In this paper, we approach the task of transfer learning between domains that differ in action spaces. We present a reward shaping method based on source embedding similarity that is applicable to domains with both discrete and continuous action spaces. The efficacy of our approach is evaluated on transfer to restricted action spaces in the Acrobot-v1 and Pendulum-v0 domains. A comparison with two baselines shows that our method does not outperform these baselines in these continuous action spaces but does show an improvement in these discrete action spaces. We conclude our analysis with future directions for this work.
summary: Transfer learning approaches in reinforcement learning aim to assist agents in learning their target domains by leveraging the knowledge learned from other agents that have been trained on similar source domains. For example, recent research focus within this space has been placed on knowledge transfer between tasks that have different transition dynamics and reward functions; however, little focus has been placed on knowledge transfer between tasks that have different action spaces. In this paper, we approach the task of transfer learning between domains that differ in action spaces. We present a reward shaping method based on source embedding similarity that is applicable to domains with both discrete and continuous action spaces. The efficacy of our approach is evaluated on transfer to restricted action spaces in the Acrobot-v1 and Pendulum-v0 domains. A comparison with two baselines shows that our method does not outperform these baselines in these continuous action spaces but does show an improvement in these discrete action spaces. We conclude our analysis with future directions for this work.
abstract_zh: 强化学习中的迁移学习方法旨在通过利用从在类似源领域接受过培训的其他代理学到的知识来帮助代理学习其目标领域。例如，该领域最近的研究重点放在具有不同转换动态和奖励函数的任务之间的知识转移；然而，很少有人关注具有不同行动空间的任务之间的知识转移。在本文中，我们解决了行动空间不同的领域之间的迁移学习任务。我们提出了一种基于源嵌入相似性的奖励塑造方法，该方法适用于具有离散和连续动作空间的领域。我们的方法的有效性是通过转移到 Acrobot-v1 和 Pendulum-v0 域中的受限动作空间来评估的。与两个基线的比较表明，我们的方法在这些连续动作空间中并没有优于这些基线，但确实在这些离散动作空间中表现出改进。我们通过分析来总结这项工作的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究如何在动作空间不同的领域之间进行迁移强化学习，提出了一种基于Q网络表示的奖励塑形方法。
AI.motivation: 现有迁移学习研究多关注动力学和奖励函数差异，而忽视动作空间差异，本文旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出一种基于源嵌入相似性的奖励塑形方法，适用于离散和连续动作空间。
AI.result: 在连续动作空间中未超越基线，但在离散动作空间中表现出改进。
AI.conclusion: 指出未来需进一步优化方法以提升连续动作空间的迁移效果。

authors_text: Xujiang Zhao,Xuchao Zhang,Wei Cheng,Wenchao Yu,Yuncong Chen,Haifeng Chen,Feng Chen
title: SEED: Sound Event Early Detection via Evidential Uncertainty
title_zh: SEED：通过证据不确定性进行声音事件早期检测
abstract: Sound Event Early Detection (SEED) is an essential task in recognizing the acoustic environments and soundscapes. However, most of the existing methods focus on the offline sound event detection, which suffers from the over-confidence issue of early-stage event detection and usually yield unreliable results. To solve the problem, we propose a novel Polyphonic Evidential Neural Network (PENet) to model the evidential uncertainty of the class probability with Beta distribution. Specifically, we use a Beta distribution to model the distribution of class probabilities, and the evidential uncertainty enriches uncertainty representation with evidence information, which plays a central role in reliable prediction. To further improve the event detection performance, we design the backtrack inference method that utilizes both the forward and backward audio features of an ongoing event. Experiments on the DESED database show that the proposed method can simultaneously improve 13.0\% and 3.8\% in time delay and detection F1 score compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Sound Event Early Detection (SEED) is an essential task in recognizing the acoustic environments and soundscapes. However, most of the existing methods focus on the offline sound event detection, which suffers from the over-confidence issue of early-stage event detection and usually yield unreliable results. To solve the problem, we propose a novel Polyphonic Evidential Neural Network (PENet) to model the evidential uncertainty of the class probability with Beta distribution. Specifically, we use a Beta distribution to model the distribution of class probabilities, and the evidential uncertainty enriches uncertainty representation with evidence information, which plays a central role in reliable prediction. To further improve the event detection performance, we design the backtrack inference method that utilizes both the forward and backward audio features of an ongoing event. Experiments on the DESED database show that the proposed method can simultaneously improve 13.0\% and 3.8\% in time delay and detection F1 score compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 声音事件早期检测（SEED）是识别声学环境和声景的一项重要任务。然而，现有的大多数方法都集中在离线声音事件检测上，这种方法存在早期事件检测的过度自信问题，通常会产生不可靠的结果。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的复音证据神经网络（PENet）来模拟具有 Beta 分布的类概率的证据不确定性。具体来说，我们使用 Beta 分布来模拟类别概率的分布，证据不确定性用证据信息丰富了不确定性表示，这在可靠预测中发挥着核心作用。为了进一步提高事件检测性能，我们设计了回溯推理方法，该方法利用正在进行的事件的前向和后向音频特征。在DESED数据库上的实验表明，与state-of-the-art方法相比，所提出的方法在时间延迟和检测F1分数上可以同时提高13.0％和3.8％。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过证据不确定性进行声音事件早期检测（SEED）的新方法，以解决现有离线方法在早期检测中的过度自信问题。
AI.motivation: 现有声音事件检测方法在早期阶段存在过度自信问题，导致结果不可靠，需通过建模不确定性来提升预测可靠性。
AI.method: 设计了基于Beta分布的多音素证据神经网络（PENet），结合证据不确定性建模，并引入回溯推理方法利用事件前后音频特征。
AI.result: 在DESED数据库上，该方法相比现有最佳方法将时间延迟提升13.0%，检测F1分数提高3.8%。
AI.conclusion: 通过证据不确定性建模和回溯推理，有效提升了声音事件早期检测的可靠性与性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过证据不确定性进行声音事件早期检测（SEED）的新方法，以解决现有离线方法在早期检测中的过度自信问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有声音事件检测方法在早期阶段存在过度自信问题，导致结果不可靠，需通过建模不确定性来提升预测可靠性。

search_text: SEED: Sound Event Early Detection via Evidential Uncertainty SEED：通过证据不确定性进行声音事件早期检测 Sound Event Early Detection (SEED) is an essential task in recognizing the acoustic environments and soundscapes. However, most of the existing methods focus on the offline sound event detection, which suffers from the over-confidence issue of early-stage event detection and usually yield unreliable results. To solve the problem, we propose a novel Polyphonic Evidential Neural Network (PENet) to model the evidential uncertainty of the class probability with Beta distribution. Specifically, we use a Beta distribution to model the distribution of class probabilities, and the evidential uncertainty enriches uncertainty representation with evidence information, which plays a central role in reliable prediction. To further improve the event detection performance, we design the backtrack inference method that utilizes both the forward and backward audio features of an ongoing event. Experiments on the DESED database show that the proposed method can simultaneously improve 13.0\% and 3.8\% in time delay and detection F1 score compared to the state-of-the-art methods. 声音事件早期检测（SEED）是识别声学环境和声景的一项重要任务。然而，现有的大多数方法都集中在离线声音事件检测上，这种方法存在早期事件检测的过度自信问题，通常会产生不可靠的结果。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的复音证据神经网络（PENet）来模拟具有 Beta 分布的类概率的证据不确定性。具体来说，我们使用 Beta 分布来模拟类别概率的分布，证据不确定性用证据信息丰富了不确定性表示，这在可靠预测中发挥着核心作用。为了进一步提高事件检测性能，我们设计了回溯推理方法，该方法利用正在进行的事件的前向和后向音频特征。在DESED数据库上的实验表明，与state-of-the-art方法相比，所提出的方法在时间延迟和检测F1分数上可以同时提高13.0％和3.8％。 本文提出了一种通过证据不确定性进行声音事件早期检测（SEED）的新方法，以解决现有离线方法在早期检测中的过度自信问题。 Xujiang Zhao,Xuchao Zhang,Wei Cheng,Wenchao Yu,Yuncong Chen,Haifeng Chen,Feng Chen cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Ziad Al-Halah,Santhosh K. Ramakrishnan,Kristen Grauman
title: Zero Experience Required: Plug & Play Modular Transfer Learning for Semantic Visual Navigation
title_zh: 零经验要求：用于语义视觉导航的即插即用模块化迁移学习
abstract: In reinforcement learning for visual navigation, it is common to develop a model for each new task, and train that model from scratch with task-specific interactions in 3D environments. However, this process is expensive; massive amounts of interactions are needed for the model to generalize well. Moreover, this process is repeated whenever there is a change in the task type or the goal modality. We present a unified approach to visual navigation using a novel modular transfer learning model. Our model can effectively leverage its experience from one source task and apply it to multiple target tasks (e.g., ObjectNav, RoomNav, ViewNav) with various goal modalities (e.g., image, sketch, audio, label). Furthermore, our model enables zero-shot experience learning, whereby it can solve the target tasks without receiving any task-specific interactive training. Our experiments on multiple photorealistic datasets and challenging tasks show that our approach learns faster, generalizes better, and outperforms SoTA models by a significant margin.
summary: In reinforcement learning for visual navigation, it is common to develop a model for each new task, and train that model from scratch with task-specific interactions in 3D environments. However, this process is expensive; massive amounts of interactions are needed for the model to generalize well. Moreover, this process is repeated whenever there is a change in the task type or the goal modality. We present a unified approach to visual navigation using a novel modular transfer learning model. Our model can effectively leverage its experience from one source task and apply it to multiple target tasks (e.g., ObjectNav, RoomNav, ViewNav) with various goal modalities (e.g., image, sketch, audio, label). Furthermore, our model enables zero-shot experience learning, whereby it can solve the target tasks without receiving any task-specific interactive training. Our experiments on multiple photorealistic datasets and challenging tasks show that our approach learns faster, generalizes better, and outperforms SoTA models by a significant margin.
abstract_zh: 在视觉导航的强化学习中，通常为每个新任务开发一个模型，并在 3D 环境中通过特定于任务的交互从头开始训练该模型。然而，这个过程是昂贵的；模型需要大量的交互才能很好地概括。此外，每当任务类型或目标模式发生变化时，都会重复此过程。我们使用新颖的模块化迁移学习模型提出了一种统一的视觉导航方法。我们的模型可以有效地利用一项源任务的经验，并将其应用于具有各种目标模式（例如图像、草图、音频、标签）的多个目标任务（例如 ObjectNav、RoomNav、ViewNav）。此外，我们的模型实现了零样本体验学习，无需接受任何特定于任务的交互式训练即可解决目标任务。我们对多个真实数据集和具有挑战性的任务进行的实验表明，我们的方法学习速度更快，泛化能力更好，并且显着优于 SoTA 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需任务特定训练的模块化迁移学习方法，用于解决多种语义视觉导航任务。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉导航强化学习需为每个任务从头训练模型，消耗大量交互数据且难以跨任务迁移，亟需高效通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计模块化迁移学习框架，通过源任务经验复用实现多目标模态（图像/草图/音频/标签）导航任务的零样本学习。
AI.result: 在多个真实感数据集上实验表明，该方法学习速度更快、泛化能力更强，显著超越现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 模块化迁移学习为视觉导航提供了高效可扩展的解决方案，推动了零样本跨任务迁移的前沿研究。

authors_text: Yujia Fan,Yongfeng Zhang
title: Neural Logic Analogy Learning
title_zh: 神经逻辑类比学习
comment: In Proceedings of the ICLR 2022 PAIR2Struct Workshop
comments: In Proceedings of the ICLR 2022 PAIR2Struct Workshop
abstract: Letter-string analogy is an important analogy learning task which seems to be easy for humans but very challenging for machines. The main idea behind current approaches to solving letter-string analogies is to design heuristic rules for extracting analogy structures and constructing analogy mappings. However, one key problem is that it is difficult to build a comprehensive and exhaustive set of analogy structures which can fully describe the subtlety of analogies. This problem makes current approaches unable to handle complicated letter-string analogy problems. In this paper, we propose Neural logic analogy learning (Noan), which is a dynamic neural architecture driven by differentiable logic reasoning to solve analogy problems. Each analogy problem is converted into logical expressions consisting of logical variables and basic logical operations (AND, OR, and NOT). More specifically, Noan learns the logical variables as vector embeddings and learns each logical operation as a neural module. In this way, the model builds computational graph integrating neural network with logical reasoning to capture the internal logical structure of the input letter strings. The analogy learning problem then becomes a True/False evaluation problem of the logical expressions. Experiments show that our machine learning-based Noan approach outperforms state-of-the-art approaches on standard letter-string analogy benchmark datasets.
summary: Letter-string analogy is an important analogy learning task which seems to be easy for humans but very challenging for machines. The main idea behind current approaches to solving letter-string analogies is to design heuristic rules for extracting analogy structures and constructing analogy mappings. However, one key problem is that it is difficult to build a comprehensive and exhaustive set of analogy structures which can fully describe the subtlety of analogies. This problem makes current approaches unable to handle complicated letter-string analogy problems. In this paper, we propose Neural logic analogy learning (Noan), which is a dynamic neural architecture driven by differentiable logic reasoning to solve analogy problems. Each analogy problem is converted into logical expressions consisting of logical variables and basic logical operations (AND, OR, and NOT). More specifically, Noan learns the logical variables as vector embeddings and learns each logical operation as a neural module. In this way, the model builds computational graph integrating neural network with logical reasoning to capture the internal logical structure of the input letter strings. The analogy learning problem then becomes a True/False evaluation problem of the logical expressions. Experiments show that our machine learning-based Noan approach outperforms state-of-the-art approaches on standard letter-string analogy benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 字母串类比是一项重要的类比学习任务，对于人类来说似乎很容易，但对于机器来说却非常具有挑战性。当前解决字母串类比的方法背后的主要思想是设计启发式规则来提取类比结构和构建类比映射。然而，一个关键的问题是，很难建立一套全面、详尽的类比结构来充分描述类比的微妙之处。这个问题使得当前的方法无法处理复杂的字母串类比问题。在本文中，我们提出了神经逻辑类比学习（Noan），它是一种由可微逻辑推理驱动的动态神经架构，用于解决类比问题。每个类比问题都转换为由逻辑变量和基本逻辑运算（AND、OR 和 NOT）组成的逻辑表达式。更具体地说，Noan 将逻辑变量学习为向量嵌入，并将每个逻辑运算学习为神经模块。通过这种方式，模型构建了将神经网络与逻辑推理相结合的计算图，以捕获输入字符串的内部逻辑结构。然后类比学习问题就变成了逻辑表达式的真/假评估问题。实验表明，我们基于机器学习的 Noan 方法在标准字母串类比基准数据集上的性能优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Noan的神经逻辑类比学习方法，用于解决字母字符串类比任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖启发式规则处理字母字符串类比问题，但难以全面描述类比的复杂性，导致处理复杂问题时效果不佳。
AI.method: 将类比问题转化为逻辑表达式，通过神经网络学习逻辑变量的向量嵌入及逻辑操作的神经模块，构建融合逻辑推理的计算图。
AI.result: Noan在标准字母字符串类比基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合神经网络与可微逻辑推理，有效解决了类比学习中的结构复杂性问题，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Yecheng Jason Ma,Andrew Shen,Dinesh Jayaraman,Osbert Bastani
title: Versatile Offline Imitation from Observations and Examples via Regularized State-Occupancy Matching
title_zh: 通过正则化状态占用匹配，从观察和示例中进行多功能离线模仿
abstract: We propose State Matching Offline DIstribution Correction Estimation (SMODICE), a novel and versatile regression-based offline imitation learning (IL) algorithm derived via state-occupancy matching. We show that the SMODICE objective admits a simple optimization procedure through an application of Fenchel duality and an analytic solution in tabular MDPs. Without requiring access to expert actions, SMODICE can be effectively applied to three offline IL settings: (i) imitation from observations (IfO), (ii) IfO with dynamics or morphologically mismatched expert, and (iii) example-based reinforcement learning, which we show can be formulated as a state-occupancy matching problem. We extensively evaluate SMODICE on both gridworld environments as well as on high-dimensional offline benchmarks. Our results demonstrate that SMODICE is effective for all three problem settings and significantly outperforms prior state-of-art.
summary: We propose State Matching Offline DIstribution Correction Estimation (SMODICE), a novel and versatile regression-based offline imitation learning (IL) algorithm derived via state-occupancy matching. We show that the SMODICE objective admits a simple optimization procedure through an application of Fenchel duality and an analytic solution in tabular MDPs. Without requiring access to expert actions, SMODICE can be effectively applied to three offline IL settings: (i) imitation from observations (IfO), (ii) IfO with dynamics or morphologically mismatched expert, and (iii) example-based reinforcement learning, which we show can be formulated as a state-occupancy matching problem. We extensively evaluate SMODICE on both gridworld environments as well as on high-dimensional offline benchmarks. Our results demonstrate that SMODICE is effective for all three problem settings and significantly outperforms prior state-of-art.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了状态匹配离线分布校正估计（SMODICE），这是一种通过状态占用匹配导出的新颖且通用的基于回归的离线模仿学习（IL）算法。我们证明，SMODICE 目标通过应用 Fenchel 对偶性和表格 MDP 中的解析解来实现简单的优化过程。无需访问专家操作，SMODICE 可以有效地应用于三种离线 IL 设置：（i）观察模仿（IfO），（ii）具有动态或形态不匹配专家的 IfO，以及（iii）基于示例的强化学习，我们证明可以将其表述为状态占用匹配问题。我们在网格世界环境以及高维离线基准测试中广泛评估了 SMODICE。我们的结果表明，SMODICE 对于所有三个问题设置都是有效的，并且显着优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SMODICE的新型离线模仿学习算法，通过状态占用匹配实现从观察和示例中进行模仿学习。
AI.motivation: 传统的离线模仿学习方法通常需要专家动作，这在实际应用中可能难以获得。因此，本文旨在提出一种无需专家动作的算法，以适用于更多场景。
AI.method: 本文提出了SMODICE方法，通过状态占用匹配来优化目标函数，并利用Fenchel对偶性和表格MDP中的解析解进行优化。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SMODICE在网格世界环境和高维离线基准测试中均表现优异，显著优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: SMODICE是一种有效且通用的离线模仿学习算法，适用于多种场景，包括从观察中模仿、与动态或形态不匹配的专家模仿以及基于示例的强化学习。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SMODICE的新型离线模仿学习算法，通过状态占用匹配实现从观察和示例中进行模仿学习。

authors_text: Oskar Wysocki,Zili Zhou,Paul O'Regan,Deborah Ferreira,Magdalena Wysocka,Dónal Landers,André Freitas
title: Transformers and the representation of biomedical background knowledge
title_zh: 变形金刚和生物医学背景知识的表示
comment: 25 pages, 12 figures, supplementary methods, tables and figures at the end of the manuscript
comments: 25 pages, 12 figures, supplementary methods, tables and figures at the end of the manuscript
abstract: Specialised transformers-based models (such as BioBERT and BioMegatron) are adapted for the biomedical domain based on publicly available biomedical corpora. As such, they have the potential to encode large-scale biological knowledge. We investigate the encoding and representation of biological knowledge in these models, and its potential utility to support inference in cancer precision medicine - namely, the interpretation of the clinical significance of genomic alterations. We compare the performance of different transformer baselines; we use probing to determine the consistency of encodings for distinct entities; and we use clustering methods to compare and contrast the internal properties of the embeddings for genes, variants, drugs and diseases. We show that these models do indeed encode biological knowledge, although some of this is lost in fine-tuning for specific tasks. Finally, we analyse how the models behave with regard to biases and imbalances in the dataset.
summary: Specialised transformers-based models (such as BioBERT and BioMegatron) are adapted for the biomedical domain based on publicly available biomedical corpora. As such, they have the potential to encode large-scale biological knowledge. We investigate the encoding and representation of biological knowledge in these models, and its potential utility to support inference in cancer precision medicine - namely, the interpretation of the clinical significance of genomic alterations. We compare the performance of different transformer baselines; we use probing to determine the consistency of encodings for distinct entities; and we use clustering methods to compare and contrast the internal properties of the embeddings for genes, variants, drugs and diseases. We show that these models do indeed encode biological knowledge, although some of this is lost in fine-tuning for specific tasks. Finally, we analyse how the models behave with regard to biases and imbalances in the dataset.
abstract_zh: 基于专用 Transformer 的模型（例如 BioBERT 和 BioMegatron）基于公开的生物医学语料库，适用于生物医学领域。因此，它们有可能编码大规模的生物知识。我们研究了这些模型中生物学知识的编码和表示，及其支持癌症精准医学推论的潜在效用，即解释基因组改变的临床意义。我们比较不同变压器基线的性能；我们使用探测来确定不同实体的编码的一致性；我们使用聚类方法来比较和对比基因、变异、药物和疾病嵌入的内部属性。我们证明这些模型确实编码了生物知识，尽管其中一些在针对特定任务的微调中丢失了。最后，我们分析模型在数据集中的偏差和不平衡方面的表现。

AI.tldr: 研究基于Transformer的生物医学模型（如BioBERT和BioMegatron）如何编码生物知识，并评估其在癌症精准医学中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有生物医学Transformer模型虽基于公开语料训练，但其对生物知识的编码能力及在临床推理中的适用性尚未明确验证。
AI.method: 比较不同Transformer基线模型性能，通过探测分析实体编码一致性，利用聚类方法对比基因、变异等嵌入属性，并评估数据偏差影响。
AI.result: 模型确实编码了生物知识，但微调任务会导致部分信息丢失，且存在数据偏差和不平衡引发的模型行为问题。
AI.conclusion: 生物医学Transformer模型能有效表示领域知识，但需优化微调策略以减少信息丢失，并缓解数据偏差带来的影响。

authors_text: Saurabh Deochake,Shashank Kanth,Subhadip Chakraborty,Suresh Sarode,Vidyasagar Potdar,Debajyoti Mukhopadhyay
title: HENRI: High Efficiency Negotiation-based Robust Interface for Multi-party Multi-issue Negotiation over the Internet
title_zh: HENRI：基于高效协商的稳健接口，用于通过互联网进行多方多问题协商
comment: CUBE '12: Proceedings of the CUBE International Information Technology Conference. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1206.5884
comments: CUBE '12: Proceedings of the CUBE International Information Technology Conference. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1206.5884
abstract: This paper proposes a framework for a full fledged negotiation system that allows multi party multi issue negotiation. It focuses on the negotiation protocol to be observed and provides a platform for concurrent and independent negotiation on individual issues using the concept of multi threading. It depicts the architecture of an agent detailing its components. The paper sets forth a hierarchical pattern for the multiple issues concerning every party. The system also provides enhancements such as the time-to-live counters for every advertisement, refinement of utility considering non-functional attributes, prioritization of issues, by assigning weights to issues.
summary: This paper proposes a framework for a full fledged negotiation system that allows multi party multi issue negotiation. It focuses on the negotiation protocol to be observed and provides a platform for concurrent and independent negotiation on individual issues using the concept of multi threading. It depicts the architecture of an agent detailing its components. The paper sets forth a hierarchical pattern for the multiple issues concerning every party. The system also provides enhancements such as the time-to-live counters for every advertisement, refinement of utility considering non-functional attributes, prioritization of issues, by assigning weights to issues.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个成熟的谈判系统框架，允许多方多问题谈判。它侧重于要遵守的协商协议，并使用多线程的概念为单个问题提供并发和独立协商的平台。它描述了代理的架构，详细说明了其组件。该文件为涉及各方的多个问题提出了一个层次模式。该系统还提供增强功能，例如每个广告的生存时间计数器、考虑非功能属性的效用细化、通过为问题分配权重来确定问题的优先级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效、基于协商的多方多议题互联网接口框架HENRI，通过多线程技术实现并发协商，并引入分层结构和权重分配优化协商过程。
AI.motivation: 现有协商系统难以高效处理多方多议题场景，需支持并发协商、非功能性属性优化及议题优先级管理以提升实际应用效果。
AI.method: 采用多线程实现议题独立协商，设计分层代理架构，引入时间生存计数器、非功能性效用优化及议题权重分配机制。
AI.result: 构建了支持多议题并发协商的平台，通过权重和分层策略提升协商效率，增强系统鲁棒性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: HENRI框架通过多线程与分层设计有效解决了多方多议题协商的复杂性，为实际应用提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

method: 采用多线程实现议题独立协商，设计分层代理架构，引入时间生存计数器、非功能性效用优化及议题权重分配机制。
result: 构建了支持多议题并发协商的平台，通过权重和分层策略提升协商效率，增强系统鲁棒性与灵活性。
conclusion: HENRI框架通过多线程与分层设计有效解决了多方多议题协商的复杂性，为实际应用提供了高效可靠的解决方案。
search_text: HENRI: High Efficiency Negotiation-based Robust Interface for Multi-party Multi-issue Negotiation over the Internet HENRI：基于高效协商的稳健接口，用于通过互联网进行多方多问题协商 This paper proposes a framework for a full fledged negotiation system that allows multi party multi issue negotiation. It focuses on the negotiation protocol to be observed and provides a platform for concurrent and independent negotiation on individual issues using the concept of multi threading. It depicts the architecture of an agent detailing its components. The paper sets forth a hierarchical pattern for the multiple issues concerning every party. The system also provides enhancements such as the time-to-live counters for every advertisement, refinement of utility considering non-functional attributes, prioritization of issues, by assigning weights to issues. 本文提出了一个成熟的谈判系统框架，允许多方多问题谈判。它侧重于要遵守的协商协议，并使用多线程的概念为单个问题提供并发和独立协商的平台。它描述了代理的架构，详细说明了其组件。该文件为涉及各方的多个问题提出了一个层次模式。该系统还提供增强功能，例如每个广告的生存时间计数器、考虑非功能属性的效用细化、通过为问题分配权重来确定问题的优先级。 本文提出了一种高效、基于协商的多方多议题互联网接口框架HENRI，通过多线程技术实现并发协商，并引入分层结构和权重分配优化协商过程。 Saurabh Deochake,Shashank Kanth,Subhadip Chakraborty,Suresh Sarode,Vidyasagar Potdar,Debajyoti Mukhopadhyay cs.AI,cs.MA,cs.NI

authors_text: Theofanis Ganitidis,Maria Athanasiou,Kalliopi Dalakleidi,Nikos Melanitis,Spyretta Golemati,Konstantina S Nikita
title: Stratification of carotid atheromatous plaque using interpretable deep learning methods on B-mode ultrasound images
title_zh: 使用可解释的深度学习方法对 B 型超声图像进行颈动脉粥样斑块分层
comment: Accepted at 2021 43rd Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine & Biology Society (EMBC)
comments: Accepted at 2021 43rd Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine & Biology Society (EMBC)
abstract: Carotid atherosclerosis is the major cause of ischemic stroke resulting in significant rates of mortality and disability annually. Early diagnosis of such cases is of great importance, since it enables clinicians to apply a more effective treatment strategy. This paper introduces an interpretable classification approach of carotid ultrasound images for the risk assessment and stratification of patients with carotid atheromatous plaque. To address the highly imbalanced distribution of patients between the symptomatic and asymptomatic classes (16 vs 58, respectively), an ensemble learning scheme based on a sub-sampling approach was applied along with a two-phase, cost-sensitive strategy of learning, that uses the original and a resampled data set. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) were utilized for building the primary models of the ensemble. A six-layer deep CNN was used to automatically extract features from the images, followed by a classification stage of two fully connected layers. The obtained results (Area Under the ROC Curve (AUC): 73%, sensitivity: 75%, specificity: 70%) indicate that the proposed approach achieved acceptable discrimination performance. Finally, interpretability methods were applied on the model's predictions in order to reveal insights on the model's decision process as well as to enable the identification of novel image biomarkers for the stratification of patients with carotid atheromatous plaque.Clinical Relevance-The integration of interpretability methods with deep learning strategies can facilitate the identification of novel ultrasound image biomarkers for the stratification of patients with carotid atheromatous plaque.

abstract_zh: 颈动脉粥样硬化是缺血性中风的主要原因，每年导致较高的死亡率和残疾率。此类病例的早期诊断非常重要，因为它使临床医生能够采用更有效的治疗策略。本文介绍了一种可解释的颈动脉超声图像分类方法，用于对颈动脉粥样斑块患者进行风险评估和分层。为了解决有症状类别和无症状类别之间患者分布高度不平衡的问题（分别为 16 例和 58 例），应用了基于子采样方法的集成学习方案以及两阶段、成本敏感的学习策略，该策略使用原始数据集和重新采样的数据集。卷积神经网络（CNN）用于构建集成的主要模型。使用六层深度 CNN 自动从图像中提取特征，然后是两个全连接层的分类阶段。获得的结果（ROC 曲线下面积（AUC）：73%，敏感性：75%，特异性：70%）表明所提出的方法实现了可接受的辨别性能。最后，将可解释性方法应用于模型的预测，以揭示对模型决策过程的见解，并能够识别用于颈动脉粥样斑块患者分层的新型图像生物标志物。临床相关性-可解释性方法与深度学习策略的整合可以促进识别用于颈动脉粥样斑块患者分层的新型超声图像生物标志物。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可解释深度学习方法的颈动脉斑块分类方案，用于患者风险分层。
AI.motivation: 颈动脉动脉粥样硬化是缺血性卒中的主要原因，早期诊断对治疗至关重要。现有数据类别不平衡问题（有症状与无症状患者比例16:58）影响分类效果。
AI.method: 采用集成学习结合子采样和两阶段成本敏感策略处理不平衡数据，构建六层CNN模型进行特征提取和分类，并应用可解释性方法分析决策过程。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到AUC 73%、灵敏度75%、特异性70%的性能，识别出潜在的超声图像生物标志物。
AI.conclusion: 将可解释性方法与深度学习结合，可有效识别颈动脉斑块分层的新型影像生物标志物，具有临床应用价值。

authors_text: Sadique Adnan Siddiqui,Lisa Gutzeit,Frank Kirchner
title: The influence of labeling techniques in classifying human manipulation movement of different speed
title_zh: 标记技术对不同速度的人体操纵运动分类的影响
comment: ef:In Proceedings of the 11th International Conference on Pattern Recognition Applications and Methods, 2022
comments: ef:In Proceedings of the 11th International Conference on Pattern Recognition Applications and Methods, 2022
abstract: In this work, we investigate the influence of labeling methods on the classification of human movements on data recorded using a marker-based motion capture system. The dataset is labeled using two different approaches, one based on video data of the movements, the other based on the movement trajectories recorded using the motion capture system. The dataset is labeled using two different approaches, one based on video data of the movements, the other based on the movement trajectories recorded using the motion capture system. The data was recorded from one participant performing a stacking scenario comprising simple arm movements at three different speeds (slow, normal, fast). Machine learning algorithms that include k-Nearest Neighbor, Random Forest, Extreme Gradient Boosting classifier, Convolutional Neural networks (CNN), Long Short-Term Memory networks (LSTM), and a combination of CNN-LSTM networks are compared on their performance in recognition of these arm movements. The models were trained on actions performed on slow and normal speed movements segments and generalized on actions consisting of fast-paced human movement. It was observed that all the models trained on normal-paced data labeled using trajectories have almost 20% improvement in accuracy on test data in comparison to the models trained on data labeled using videos of the performed experiments.
summary: In this work, we investigate the influence of labeling methods on the classification of human movements on data recorded using a marker-based motion capture system. The dataset is labeled using two different approaches, one based on video data of the movements, the other based on the movement trajectories recorded using the motion capture system. The dataset is labeled using two different approaches, one based on video data of the movements, the other based on the movement trajectories recorded using the motion capture system. The data was recorded from one participant performing a stacking scenario comprising simple arm movements at three different speeds (slow, normal, fast). Machine learning algorithms that include k-Nearest Neighbor, Random Forest, Extreme Gradient Boosting classifier, Convolutional Neural networks (CNN), Long Short-Term Memory networks (LSTM), and a combination of CNN-LSTM networks are compared on their performance in recognition of these arm movements. The models were trained on actions performed on slow and normal speed movements segments and generalized on actions consisting of fast-paced human movement. It was observed that all the models trained on normal-paced data labeled using trajectories have almost 20% improvement in accuracy on test data in comparison to the models trained on data labeled using videos of the performed experiments.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了标记方法对人体运动分类对使用基于标记的运动捕捉系统记录的数据的影响。该数据集使用两种不同的方法进行标记，一种基于运动的视频数据，另一种基于使用运动捕捉系统记录的运动轨迹。该数据集使用两种不同的方法进行标记，一种基于运动的视频数据，另一种基于使用运动捕捉系统记录的运动轨迹。数据是由一名参与者执行堆叠场景时记录的，该场景包括以三种不同速度（慢、正常、快）进行简单的手臂运动。比较了包括 k 最近邻、随机森林、极限梯度提升分类器、卷积神经网络 (CNN)、长短期记忆网络 (LSTM) 以及 CNN-LSTM 网络组合在内的机器学习算法在识别这些手臂运动方面的性能。这些模型接受了慢速和正常速度运动片段的动作训练，并概括了快节奏的人体运动组成的动作。据观察，与使用所执行实验的视频标记的数据训练的模型相比，使用轨迹标记的正常节奏数据训练的所有模型在测试数据上的准确性提高了近 20%。

AI.tldr: 研究不同标记技术对分类人类不同速度操作运动的影响，比较基于视频和运动轨迹标签的数据分类效果。
AI.motivation: 探索运动捕捉系统中标签方法对动作分类性能的影响，以提升高速运动场景下的识别准确性。
AI.method: 采用视频标注与运动轨迹标注两种方法标记数据，使用KNN、随机森林、XGBoost、CNN、LSTM及CNN-LSTM组合模型进行分类对比实验。
AI.result: 基于轨迹标注的模型在测试数据上准确率提升约20%，优于视频标注方法。
AI.conclusion: 运动轨迹标注方法能更有效捕捉高速动作特征，优于传统视频标注技术。
