It was observed that all the models trained on normal-paced data labeled using trajectories have almost 20% improvement in accuracy on test data in comparison to the models trained on data labeled using videos of the performed experiments. 在这项工作中，我们研究了标记方法对人体运动分类对使用基于标记的运动捕捉系统记录的数据的影响。该数据集使用两种不同的方法进行标记，一种基于运动的视频数据，另一种基于使用运动捕捉系统记录的运动轨迹。该数据集使用两种不同的方法进行标记，一种基于运动的视频数据，另一种基于使用运动捕捉系统记录的运动轨迹。数据是由一名参与者执行堆叠场景时记录的，该场景包括以三种不同速度（慢、正常、快）进行简单的手臂运动。比较了包括 k 最近邻、随机森林、极限梯度提升分类器、卷积神经网络 (CNN)、长短期记忆网络 (LSTM) 以及 CNN-LSTM 网络组合在内的机器学习算法在识别这些手臂运动方面的性能。这些模型接受了慢速和正常速度运动片段的动作训练，并概括了快节奏的人体运动组成的动作。据观察，与使用所执行实验的视频标记的数据训练的模型相比，使用轨迹标记的正常节奏数据训练的所有模型在测试数据上的准确性提高了近 20%。 研究不同标记技术对分类人类不同速度操作运动的影响，比较基于视频和运动轨迹标签的数据分类效果。 Sadique Adnan Siddiqui,Lisa Gutzeit,Frank Kirchner cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Cristina Mata,Nick Locascio,Mohammed Azeem Sheikh,Kenny Kihara,Dan Fischetti
title: StandardSim: A Synthetic Dataset For Retail Environments
title_zh: StandardSim：零售环境的综合数据集
abstract: Autonomous checkout systems rely on visual and sensory inputs to carry out fine-grained scene understanding in retail environments. Retail environments present unique challenges compared to typical indoor scenes owing to the vast number of densely packed, unique yet similar objects. The problem becomes even more difficult when only RGB input is available, especially for data-hungry tasks such as instance segmentation. To address the lack of datasets for retail, we present StandardSim, a large-scale photorealistic synthetic dataset featuring annotations for semantic segmentation, instance segmentation, depth estimation, and object detection. Our dataset provides multiple views per scene, enabling multi-view representation learning. Further, we introduce a novel task central to autonomous checkout called change detection, requiring pixel-level classification of takes, puts and shifts in objects over time. We benchmark widely-used models for segmentation and depth estimation on our dataset, show that our test set constitutes a difficult benchmark compared to current smaller-scale datasets and that our training set provides models with crucial information for autonomous checkout tasks.
summary: Autonomous checkout systems rely on visual and sensory inputs to carry out fine-grained scene understanding in retail environments. Retail environments present unique challenges compared to typical indoor scenes owing to the vast number of densely packed, unique yet similar objects. The problem becomes even more difficult when only RGB input is available, especially for data-hungry tasks such as instance segmentation. To address the lack of datasets for retail, we present StandardSim, a large-scale photorealistic synthetic dataset featuring annotations for semantic segmentation, instance segmentation, depth estimation, and object detection. Our dataset provides multiple views per scene, enabling multi-view representation learning. Further, we introduce a novel task central to autonomous checkout called change detection, requiring pixel-level classification of takes, puts and shifts in objects over time. We benchmark widely-used models for segmentation and depth estimation on our dataset, show that our test set constitutes a difficult benchmark compared to current smaller-scale datasets and that our training set provides models with crucial information for autonomous checkout tasks.
abstract_zh: 自主结账系统依靠视觉和感官输入在零售环境中进行细粒度的场景理解。与典型的室内场景相比，零售环境面临着独特的挑战，因为存在大量密集、独特但相似的物体。当只有 RGB 输入可用时，这个问题变得更加困难，特别是对于实例分割等数据密集型任务。为了解决零售数据集的缺乏，我们提出了 StandardSim，这是一个大规模的真实感合成数据集，具有语义分割、实例分割、深度估计和对象检测的注释。我们的数据集为每个场景提供多个视图，从而实现多视图表示学习。此外，我们引入了一项名为变化检测的自动结账核心任务，需要对对象随时间的移动、放置和移动进行像素级分类。我们对数据集上广泛使用的分割和深度估计模型进行了基准测试，表明与当前较小规模的数据集相比，我们的测试集构成了一个困难的基准，并且我们的训练集为模型提供了用于自主结帐任务的关键信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StandardSim，一个用于零售环境的合成数据集，以支持自主结账系统的细粒度场景理解任务。
AI.motivation: 零售环境中密集且相似的商品排列使得基于RGB输入的视觉任务（如实例分割）面临挑战，现有数据集难以满足需求。
AI.method: 构建大规模逼真合成数据集，包含语义分割、实例分割、深度估计等标注，并引入多视图场景和变化检测新任务。
AI.result: 基准测试表明，该数据集比现有小规模数据集更具挑战性，训练集有效提升了自主结账相关模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: StandardSim为零售场景的自主结账系统提供了关键数据支持，推动了相关算法的研究与优化。

authors_text: Francesco Ceccon,Jordan Jalving,Joshua Haddad,Alexander Thebelt,Calvin Tsay,Carl D. Laird,Ruth Misener
title: OMLT: Optimization & Machine Learning Toolkit
title_zh: OMLT：优化和机器学习工具包
abstract: The optimization and machine learning toolkit (OMLT) is an open-source software package incorporating neural network and gradient-boosted tree surrogate models, which have been trained using machine learning, into larger optimization problems. We discuss the advances in optimization technology that made OMLT possible and show how OMLT seamlessly integrates with the algebraic modeling language Pyomo. We demonstrate how to use OMLT for solving decision-making problems in both computer science and engineering.
summary: The optimization and machine learning toolkit (OMLT) is an open-source software package incorporating neural network and gradient-boosted tree surrogate models, which have been trained using machine learning, into larger optimization problems. We discuss the advances in optimization technology that made OMLT possible and show how OMLT seamlessly integrates with the algebraic modeling language Pyomo. We demonstrate how to use OMLT for solving decision-making problems in both computer science and engineering.
abstract_zh: 优化和机器学习工具包 (OMLT) 是一个开源软件包，结合了神经网络和梯度增强树代理模型，这些模型已使用机器学习进行训练，可解决更大的优化问题。我们讨论了使 OMLT 成为可能的优化技术的进步，并展示了 OMLT 如何与代数建模语言 Pyomo 无缝集成。我们演示如何使用 OMLT 解决计算机科学和工程中的决策问题。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为OMLT的开源工具包，该工具包将机器学习模型整合到优化问题中，并展示其与Pyomo的集成应用。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法难以处理复杂非线性问题，而机器学习模型可提供高效近似，需开发工具实现两者的结合。
AI.method: 开发OMLT工具包，支持神经网络和梯度提升树作为代理模型，并通过Pyomo代数建模语言实现优化问题求解。
AI.result: OMLT成功应用于计算机科学与工程领域的决策问题，验证了机器学习与优化技术结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: OMLT为跨学科优化问题提供了新方法，推动了机器学习模型在优化领域的实际应用。

authors_text: Anand Balakrishnan,Stefan Jakšić,Edgar A. Aguilar,Dejan Ničković,Jyotirmoy V. Deshmukh
title: Model-Free Reinforcement Learning for Symbolic Automata-encoded Objectives
title_zh: 用于符号自动机编码目标的无模型强化学习
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a popular approach for robotic path planning in uncertain environments. However, the control policies trained for an RL agent crucially depend on user-defined, state-based reward functions. Poorly designed rewards can lead to policies that do get maximal rewards but fail to satisfy desired task objectives or are unsafe. There are several examples of the use of formal languages such as temporal logics and automata to specify high-level task specifications for robots (in lieu of Markovian rewards). Recent efforts have focused on inferring state-based rewards from formal specifications; here, the goal is to provide (probabilistic) guarantees that the policy learned using RL (with the inferred rewards) satisfies the high-level formal specification. A key drawback of several of these techniques is that the rewards that they infer are sparse: the agent receives positive rewards only upon completion of the task and no rewards otherwise. This naturally leads to poor convergence properties and high variance during RL. In this work, we propose using formal specifications in the form of symbolic automata: these serve as a generalization of both bounded-time temporal logic-based specifications as well as automata. Furthermore, our use of symbolic automata allows us to define non-sparse potential-based rewards which empirically shape the reward surface, leading to better convergence during RL. We also show that our potential-based rewarding strategy still allows us to obtain the policy that maximizes the satisfaction of the given specification.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a popular approach for robotic path planning in uncertain environments. However, the control policies trained for an RL agent crucially depend on user-defined, state-based reward functions. Poorly designed rewards can lead to policies that do get maximal rewards but fail to satisfy desired task objectives or are unsafe. There are several examples of the use of formal languages such as temporal logics and automata to specify high-level task specifications for robots (in lieu of Markovian rewards). Recent efforts have focused on inferring state-based rewards from formal specifications; here, the goal is to provide (probabilistic) guarantees that the policy learned using RL (with the inferred rewards) satisfies the high-level formal specification. A key drawback of several of these techniques is that the rewards that they infer are sparse: the agent receives positive rewards only upon completion of the task and no rewards otherwise. This naturally leads to poor convergence properties and high variance during RL. In this work, we propose using formal specifications in the form of symbolic automata: these serve as a generalization of both bounded-time temporal logic-based specifications as well as automata. Furthermore, our use of symbolic automata allows us to define non-sparse potential-based rewards which empirically shape the reward surface, leading to better convergence during RL. We also show that our potential-based rewarding strategy still allows us to obtain the policy that maximizes the satisfaction of the given specification.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）是不确定环境中机器人路径规划的一种流行方法。然而，为 RL 代理训练的控制策略很大程度上取决于用户定义的、基于状态的奖励函数。奖励设计不当可能会导致政策确实获得了最大奖励，但无法满足预期的任务目标或不安全。有几个使用形式语言（例如时间逻辑和自动机）来为机器人指定高级任务规范（代替马尔可夫奖励）的例子。最近的工作重点是从正式规范中推断基于状态的奖励；这里，目标是提供（概率）保证，使用 RL 学习的策略（带有推断的奖励）满足高级正式规范。这些技术中的一些技术的一个主要缺点是它们推断的奖励很少：代理仅在完成任务时才会收到积极的奖励，否则不会获得任何奖励。这自然会导致强化学习期间的收敛性较差且方差较高。在这项工作中，我们建议使用符号自动机形式的形式规范：它们作为基于有限时间时间逻辑的规范以及自动机的泛化。此外，我们对符号自动机的使用使我们能够定义基于非稀疏势的奖励，这些奖励根据经验塑造奖励表面，从而在强化学习期间实现更好的收敛。我们还表明，基于潜力的奖励策略仍然允许我们获得最大化给定规格满意度的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于符号自动机编码目标的模型无关强化学习方法，通过非稀疏势能奖励机制提升策略学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习依赖人工设计的稀疏奖励函数，易导致策略无法满足任务目标或存在安全隐患，而现有基于形式化规范的奖励推断方法收敛性差且方差高。
AI.method: 采用符号自动机作为形式化规范的通用表示，设计非稀疏势能奖励函数以塑造更平滑的奖励表面，结合模型无关强化学习框架进行策略优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著提升了强化学习的收敛速度与稳定性，同时保证策略对给定规范的最大满足度。
AI.conclusion: 符号自动机与势能奖励的结合为形式化规范驱动的强化学习提供了有效解决方案，平衡了奖励密度与任务目标达成的矛盾。

search_text: Model-Free Reinforcement Learning for Symbolic Automata-encoded Objectives 用于符号自动机编码目标的无模型强化学习 Reinforcement learning (RL) is a popular approach for robotic path planning in uncertain environments. However, the control policies trained for an RL agent crucially depend on user-defined, state-based reward functions. Poorly designed rewards can lead to policies that do get maximal rewards but fail to satisfy desired task objectives or are unsafe. There are several examples of the use of formal languages such as temporal logics and automata to specify high-level task specifications for robots (in lieu of Markovian rewards). Recent efforts have focused on inferring state-based rewards from formal specifications; here, the goal is to provide (probabilistic) guarantees that the policy learned using RL (with the inferred rewards) satisfies the high-level formal specification. A key drawback of several of these techniques is that the rewards that they infer are sparse: the agent receives positive rewards only upon completion of the task and no rewards otherwise. This naturally leads to poor convergence properties and high variance during RL. In this work, we propose using formal specifications in the form of symbolic automata: these serve as a generalization of both bounded-time temporal logic-based specifications as well as automata. Furthermore, our use of symbolic automata allows us to define non-sparse potential-based rewards which empirically shape the reward surface, leading to better convergence during RL. We also show that our potential-based rewarding strategy still allows us to obtain the policy that maximizes the satisfaction of the given specification. 强化学习（RL）是不确定环境中机器人路径规划的一种流行方法。然而，为 RL 代理训练的控制策略很大程度上取决于用户定义的、基于状态的奖励函数。奖励设计不当可能会导致政策确实获得了最大奖励，但无法满足预期的任务目标或不安全。有几个使用形式语言（例如时间逻辑和自动机）来为机器人指定高级任务规范（代替马尔可夫奖励）的例子。最近的工作重点是从正式规范中推断基于状态的奖励；这里，目标是提供（概率）保证，使用 RL 学习的策略（带有推断的奖励）满足高级正式规范。这些技术中的一些技术的一个主要缺点是它们推断的奖励很少：代理仅在完成任务时才会收到积极的奖励，否则不会获得任何奖励。这自然会导致强化学习期间的收敛性较差且方差较高。在这项工作中，我们建议使用符号自动机形式的形式规范：它们作为基于有限时间时间逻辑的规范以及自动机的泛化。此外，我们对符号自动机的使用使我们能够定义基于非稀疏势的奖励，这些奖励根据经验塑造奖励表面，从而在强化学习期间实现更好的收敛。我们还表明，基于潜力的奖励策略仍然允许我们获得最大化给定规格满意度的策略。 本文提出了一种基于符号自动机编码目标的模型无关强化学习方法，通过非稀疏势能奖励机制提升策略学习效果。 Anand Balakrishnan,Stefan Jakšić,Edgar A. Aguilar,Dejan Ničković,Jyotirmoy V. Deshmukh cs.AI,cs.LO,cs.RO

authors_text: Sercan O. Arik,Nathanael C. Yoder,Tomas Pfister
title: Self-Adaptive Forecasting for Improved Deep Learning on Non-Stationary Time-Series
title_zh: 用于改进非平稳时间序列深度学习的自适应预测
abstract: Real-world time-series datasets often violate the assumptions of standard supervised learning for forecasting -- their distributions evolve over time, rendering the conventional training and model selection procedures suboptimal. In this paper, we propose a novel method, Self-Adaptive Forecasting (SAF), to modify the training of time-series forecasting models to improve their performance on forecasting tasks with such non-stationary time-series data. SAF integrates a self-adaptation stage prior to forecasting based on `backcasting', i.e. predicting masked inputs backward in time. This is a form of test-time training that creates a self-supervised learning problem on test samples before performing the prediction task. In this way, our method enables efficient adaptation of encoded representations to evolving distributions, leading to superior generalization. SAF can be integrated with any canonical encoder-decoder based time-series architecture such as recurrent neural networks or attention-based architectures. On synthetic and real-world datasets in domains where time-series data are known to be notoriously non-stationary, such as healthcare and finance, we demonstrate a significant benefit of SAF in improving forecasting accuracy.
summary: Real-world time-series datasets often violate the assumptions of standard supervised learning for forecasting -- their distributions evolve over time, rendering the conventional training and model selection procedures suboptimal. In this paper, we propose a novel method, Self-Adaptive Forecasting (SAF), to modify the training of time-series forecasting models to improve their performance on forecasting tasks with such non-stationary time-series data. SAF integrates a self-adaptation stage prior to forecasting based on `backcasting', i.e. predicting masked inputs backward in time. This is a form of test-time training that creates a self-supervised learning problem on test samples before performing the prediction task. In this way, our method enables efficient adaptation of encoded representations to evolving distributions, leading to superior generalization. SAF can be integrated with any canonical encoder-decoder based time-series architecture such as recurrent neural networks or attention-based architectures. On synthetic and real-world datasets in domains where time-series data are known to be notoriously non-stationary, such as healthcare and finance, we demonstrate a significant benefit of SAF in improving forecasting accuracy.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的时间序列数据集经常违反用于预测的标准监督学习的假设——它们的分布随着时间的推移而变化，使得传统的训练和模型选择程序不是最优的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法——自适应预测（SAF），来修改时间序列预测模型的训练，以提高其在非平稳时间序列数据的预测任务上的性能。 SAF 在基于“回溯”的预测之前集成了一个自适应阶段，即及时向后预测屏蔽输入。这是测试时训练的一种形式，在执行预测任务之前在测试样本上创建自监督学习问题。通过这种方式，我们的方法能够有效地适应编码表示以适应不断发展的分布，从而实现卓越的泛化。 SAF 可以与任何基于时间序列架构的规范编码器-解码器集成，例如循环神经网络或基于注意力的架构。在时间序列数据众所周知的非平稳领域（例如医疗保健和金融）中的合成数据集和现实世界数据集上，我们证明了 SAF 在提高预测准确性方面的显着优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应预测方法（SAF），通过测试时训练提升深度学习模型在非平稳时间序列上的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现实时间序列数据分布随时间演变，传统监督学习方法因假设数据分布固定而难以适应这种非平稳特性。
AI.method: SAF在预测前引入反向预测（backcasting）的自适应阶段，利用测试样本生成自监督学习任务以调整特征表示。
AI.result: 在医疗健康和金融等非平稳数据集上，SAF显著提升了预测准确性，且兼容各类编码器-解码器架构。
AI.conclusion: SAF通过测试时自适应训练有效解决了非平稳时间序列的分布偏移问题，增强了模型的泛化能力。

authors_text: Samuele Tosatto,Andrew Patterson,Martha White,A. Rupam Mahmood
title: A Temporal-Difference Approach to Policy Gradient Estimation
title_zh: 策略梯度估计的时差方法
abstract: The policy gradient theorem (Sutton et al., 2000) prescribes the usage of a cumulative discounted state distribution under the target policy to approximate the gradient. Most algorithms based on this theorem, in practice, break this assumption, introducing a distribution shift that can cause the convergence to poor solutions. In this paper, we propose a new approach of reconstructing the policy gradient from the start state without requiring a particular sampling strategy. The policy gradient calculation in this form can be simplified in terms of a gradient critic, which can be recursively estimated due to a new Bellman equation of gradients. By using temporal-difference updates of the gradient critic from an off-policy data stream, we develop the first estimator that sidesteps the distribution shift issue in a model-free way. We prove that, under certain realizability conditions, our estimator is unbiased regardless of the sampling strategy. We empirically show that our technique achieves a superior bias-variance trade-off and performance in presence of off-policy samples.
summary: The policy gradient theorem (Sutton et al., 2000) prescribes the usage of a cumulative discounted state distribution under the target policy to approximate the gradient. Most algorithms based on this theorem, in practice, break this assumption, introducing a distribution shift that can cause the convergence to poor solutions. In this paper, we propose a new approach of reconstructing the policy gradient from the start state without requiring a particular sampling strategy. The policy gradient calculation in this form can be simplified in terms of a gradient critic, which can be recursively estimated due to a new Bellman equation of gradients. By using temporal-difference updates of the gradient critic from an off-policy data stream, we develop the first estimator that sidesteps the distribution shift issue in a model-free way. We prove that, under certain realizability conditions, our estimator is unbiased regardless of the sampling strategy. We empirically show that our technique achieves a superior bias-variance trade-off and performance in presence of off-policy samples.
abstract_zh: 策略梯度定理（Sutton et al., 2000）规定在目标策略下使用累积贴现状态分布来近似梯度。实际上，大多数基于该定理的算法都打破了这一假设，引入了可能导致收敛到不良解决方案的分布偏移。在本文中，我们提出了一种从起始状态重建策略梯度的新方法，而不需要特定的采样策略。这种形式的策略梯度计算可以用梯度批评器来简化，由于新的贝尔曼梯度方程，可以递归地估计梯度批评器。通过使用来自非策略数据流的梯度批评家的时差更新，我们开发了第一个以无模型方式回避分布偏移问题的估计器。我们证明，在某些可实现性条件下，无论采样策略如何，我们的估计量都是无偏的。我们凭经验表明，我们的技术在存在非策略样本的情况下实现了卓越的偏差-方差权衡和性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时序差分的策略梯度估计方法，通过重构初始状态下的策略梯度，避免分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 传统策略梯度算法依赖目标策略的累积折扣状态分布，实际应用中因采样策略差异导致分布偏移，影响收敛效果。
AI.method: 从初始状态重建策略梯度，引入梯度评论家并通过新贝尔曼方程递归估计，利用时序差分更新离线数据流中的梯度估计器。
AI.result: 证明在可实现性条件下估计器无偏，实验显示其在离线样本场景下具有更优的偏差-方差平衡及性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效规避分布偏移问题，为无模型策略优化提供了新的理论框架和实用方案。

By using temporal-difference updates of the gradient critic from an off-policy data stream, we develop the first estimator that sidesteps the distribution shift issue in a model-free way. We prove that, under certain realizability conditions, our estimator is unbiased regardless of the sampling strategy. We empirically show that our technique achieves a superior bias-variance trade-off and performance in presence of off-policy samples. 策略梯度定理（Sutton et al., 2000）规定在目标策略下使用累积贴现状态分布来近似梯度。实际上，大多数基于该定理的算法都打破了这一假设，引入了可能导致收敛到不良解决方案的分布偏移。在本文中，我们提出了一种从起始状态重建策略梯度的新方法，而不需要特定的采样策略。这种形式的策略梯度计算可以用梯度批评器来简化，由于新的贝尔曼梯度方程，可以递归地估计梯度批评器。通过使用来自非策略数据流的梯度批评家的时差更新，我们开发了第一个以无模型方式回避分布偏移问题的估计器。我们证明，在某些可实现性条件下，无论采样策略如何，我们的估计量都是无偏的。我们凭经验表明，我们的技术在存在非策略样本的情况下实现了卓越的偏差-方差权衡和性能。 本文提出一种基于时序差分的策略梯度估计方法，通过重构初始状态下的策略梯度，避免分布偏移问题。 Samuele Tosatto,Andrew Patterson,Martha White,A. Rupam Mahmood cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Athindran Ramesh Kumar,Gurudutt Hosangadi
title: Malleable Agents for Re-Configurable Robotic Manipulators
title_zh: 用于可重新配置机器人操纵器的可延展代理
abstract: Re-configurable robots have more utility and flexibility for many real-world tasks. Designing a learning agent to operate such robots requires adapting to different configurations. Here, we focus on robotic arms with multiple rigid links connected by joints. We propose a deep reinforcement learning agent with sequence neural networks embedded in the agent to adapt to robotic arms that have a varying number of links. Further, with the additional tool of domain randomization, this agent adapts to different configurations. We perform simulations on a 2D N-link arm to show the ability of our network to transfer and generalize efficiently.
summary: Re-configurable robots have more utility and flexibility for many real-world tasks. Designing a learning agent to operate such robots requires adapting to different configurations. Here, we focus on robotic arms with multiple rigid links connected by joints. We propose a deep reinforcement learning agent with sequence neural networks embedded in the agent to adapt to robotic arms that have a varying number of links. Further, with the additional tool of domain randomization, this agent adapts to different configurations. We perform simulations on a 2D N-link arm to show the ability of our network to transfer and generalize efficiently.
abstract_zh: 可重新配置的机器人对于许多现实世界的任务来说具有更多的实用性和灵活性。设计一个学习代理来操作此类机器人需要适应不同的配置。在这里，我们关注的是具有多个通过关节连接的刚性连杆的机械臂。我们提出了一种深度强化学习代理，其中嵌入了序列神经网络，以适应具有不同数量链接的机械臂。此外，通过域随机化的附加工具，该代理可以适应不同的配置。我们在 2D N 链接臂上进行模拟，以展示我们的网络有效传输和泛化的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的可塑智能体，用于适应不同配置的可重构机械臂。
AI.motivation: 可重构机器人在实际任务中具有更高灵活性，但现有方法难以适应机械臂连接方式和链接数量的变化。
AI.method: 设计包含序列神经网络的深度强化学习框架，结合领域随机化技术，通过2D N连杆臂仿真验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该网络能高效实现跨配置迁移和泛化，成功适应不同链接数量的机械臂控制。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可塑智能体有效提升了可重构机器人操作的适应性，为复杂环境下的机器人控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yash Jakhotiya,Vaibhav Kumar,Ashwin Pathak,Raj Shah
title: JARVix at SemEval-2022 Task 2: It Takes One to Know One? Idiomaticity Detection using Zero and One-Shot Learning
title_zh: JARVix 在 SemEval-2022 任务 2：知己知彼？使用零学习和一次性学习进行惯用性检测
comment: Accepted at the 16th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation (SemEval-2022), NAACL. Best Project Award for Georgia Tech CS 7650. Code available at https://github.com/ashwinpathak20/Idiomaticity_Detection_Using_Few_Shot_Learning
comments: Accepted at the 16th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation (SemEval-2022), NAACL. Best Project Award for Georgia Tech CS 7650. Code available at https://github.com/ashwinpathak20/Idiomaticity_Detection_Using_Few_Shot_Learning
abstract: Large Language Models have been successful in a wide variety of Natural Language Processing tasks by capturing the compositionality of the text representations. In spite of their great success, these vector representations fail to capture meaning of idiomatic multi-word expressions (MWEs). In this paper, we focus on the detection of idiomatic expressions by using binary classification. We use a dataset consisting of the literal and idiomatic usage of MWEs in English and Portuguese. Thereafter, we perform the classification in two different settings: zero shot and one shot, to determine if a given sentence contains an idiom or not. N shot classification for this task is defined by N number of common idioms between the training and testing sets. In this paper, we train multiple Large Language Models in both the settings and achieve an F1 score (macro) of 0.73 for the zero shot setting and an F1 score (macro) of 0.85 for the one shot setting. An implementation of our work can be found at https://github.com/ashwinpathak20/Idiomaticity_Detection_Using_Few_Shot_Learning.
summary: Large Language Models have been successful in a wide variety of Natural Language Processing tasks by capturing the compositionality of the text representations. In spite of their great success, these vector representations fail to capture meaning of idiomatic multi-word expressions (MWEs). In this paper, we focus on the detection of idiomatic expressions by using binary classification. We use a dataset consisting of the literal and idiomatic usage of MWEs in English and Portuguese. Thereafter, we perform the classification in two different settings: zero shot and one shot, to determine if a given sentence contains an idiom or not. N shot classification for this task is defined by N number of common idioms between the training and testing sets. In this paper, we train multiple Large Language Models in both the settings and achieve an F1 score (macro) of 0.73 for the zero shot setting and an F1 score (macro) of 0.85 for the one shot setting. An implementation of our work can be found at https://github.com/ashwinpathak20/Idiomaticity_Detection_Using_Few_Shot_Learning.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型通过捕获文本表示的组合性，在各种自然语言处理任务中取得了成功。尽管取得了巨大成功，但这些向量表示无法捕捉惯用的多词表达（MWE）的含义。在本文中，我们重点关注使用二元分类来检测惯用表达。我们使用的数据集包含英语和葡萄牙语中 MWE 的字面意义和惯用用法。此后，我们在两种不同的设置中进行分类：零镜头和一次镜头，以确定给定的句子是否包含习语。此任务的 N 个镜头分类是由训练集和测试集之间的 N 个常见习语定义的。在本文中，我们在这两种设置中训练多个大型语言模型，并在零样本设置中实现 0.73 的 F1 分数（宏），在单样本设置中实现 0.85 的 F1 分数（宏）。我们工作的实现可以在 https://github.com/ashwinpathak20/Idiomaticity_Detection_Using_Few_Shot_Learning 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用零次和一次学习方法检测句子中的习语表达，通过二分类任务在英语和葡萄牙语数据集上进行实验。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在自然语言处理中表现优异，但其向量表示难以捕捉习语性多词表达（MWEs）的含义，因此需要新的检测方法。
AI.method: 采用二分类框架，利用包含英语和葡萄牙语习语字面用法与习语用法的数据集，在零次（无共享习语）和一次（少量共享习语）学习设置下训练多个大型语言模型。
AI.result: 零次学习设置下获得宏观F1分数0.73，一次学习设置下达到0.85，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 习语检测任务中，一次学习方法优于零次学习，表明少量共享习语信息能显著提升模型性能。
